all_cards.text: 選擇(一項)： - 攻擊。這次攻擊中你+3[combat]，造成+2傷害。放逐照明彈。 - 查找任意一位調查員的牌堆頂部9張卡牌，並將其中1張[[盟友]]支援卡放置入你的控制下。然後，放逐照明彈，並混洗被查找的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text: Either (choose one): - Fight. You get +3 [combat] and deal +2 damage for this attack. Exile Flare. - Search the top 9 cards of any investigator's deck for an [[Ally]] asset and put it into play under your control. Then, exile Flare. Shuffle the searched deck.

all_cards.name: 煙斗
all_cards.text:
使用(3補給)。
[free]花費1補給，消耗煙斗，並受到1點傷害：治癒1點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (3 supplies).
[fast] Spend 1 supply, exhaust Smoking Pipe, and take 1 damage: Heal 1 horror.
all_cards.flavor: 事後一支煙，賽過活神仙。

all_cards.name: 止痛藥
all_cards.text:
使用(3補給)。
[free]花費1補給，消耗止痛藥，並受到1點恐懼：治癒1點傷害。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (3 supplies).
[fast] Spend 1 supply, exhaust Painkillers, and take 1 horror: Heal 1 damage.
all_cards.flavor: 止痛藥雖好，可不要貪吃哦。

all_cards.name: 子彈帶
all_cards.text: 你擁有額外1個手部槽位，只能用於放置[[武器]]支援卡。
all_cards.real_text: You have 1 additional hand slot, which can only be used to hold a [[Weapon]] asset.

all_cards.name: 藝術生
all_cards.text: [reaction]在藝術生入場後：發現你所在地點的1個線索。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] After Art Student enters play: Discover 1 clue at your location.
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 米斯卡塔尼克

all_cards.name: 推理
all_cards.text: 如果調查一個地點時本技能檢定成功，額外發現該地點的1個線索(如果超過難度至少2點，改為額外發現2個線索)。
all_cards.real_text: If this skill test is successful while investigating a location, discover 1 additional clue at that location (2 additional clues instead if it succeeds by 2 or more).
all_cards.flavor: 我就知道我看過這個符號。我現在通知其他人還為時不晚！

all_cards.name: 彈簧刀
all_cards.text: 快速。 [action]攻擊。這次攻擊中你+2[combat]。如果你成功且超過難度至少2點，該次攻擊造成+1傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Fast. [action] Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. If you succeed by 2 or more, this attack deals +1 damage.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 近戰. 違法

all_cards.name: 催眠術
all_cards.text:
快速。在一名敵人攻擊你所在地點的調查員時打出。
取消該次攻擊。然後從混亂袋中抽出1個標記。如果是[skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]、[elder_thing]或[auto_fail]標記，將敵人的傷害轉移給敵人自身。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when an enemy attacks an investigator at your location.
Cancel that attack. Then, reveal a random token from the chaos bag. If it has a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol, deal the attacking enemy's damage to itself.

all_cards.name: 皺縮術
all_cards.text: 使用(4充能)。 [Action]花費1充能：攻擊。這次攻擊不使用[combat]，改為使用[willpower]。這次攻擊中你+2[willpower]，並造成+1傷害。如果攻擊中抽出[skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]、[elder_thing]或[auto_fail]標記，受到1點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (4 charges). [action] Spend one charge: Fight. This attack uses [willpower] instead of [combat]. You get +2 [willpower] and deal +1 damage for this attack. If a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol is revealed during this attack, take 1 horror.

all_cards.name: 報紙
all_cards.text: 如果你沒有線索，調查時你獲得+2[intellect]。
all_cards.real_text: You get +2 [intellect] while investigating if you have no clues.
all_cards.flavor: 新聞頭條裡絲毫沒有提到你目擊的恐怖事件。但訃告欄裡的名字卻多得讓人心中發怵。

all_cards.name: 誘敵深入
all_cards.text: 疊加到你所在地點。 在敵軍階段中移動的敵人，改為朝疊加地點以最短路徑移動，而不是其原本路線。 強制 - 當該卡被疊加的輪次結束時：丟棄誘敵深入。
all_cards.real_text: Attach to your location. During the enemy phase, each enemy that moves does so along the shortest path toward the attached location, instead of to where it would normally move. Forced - While attached, at the end of the round: Discard Lure.

all_cards.name: 寶物獵人
all_cards.text:
永久。
你擁有額外1個飾品槽位。
all_cards.real_text:
Permanent.
You have 1 additional accessory slot.
all_cards.flavor: 搜遍一磚一石，不留一金一銀。

all_cards.name: 最壞的打算
all_cards.text: 查找你牌堆頂部9張卡牌，將其中1張[[武器]]支援卡加入你手牌。混洗你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text: Search the top 9 cards of your deck for a [[Weapon]] asset and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck.

all_cards.name: 荒唐的素描像
all_cards.text:
只能在你所在地點有至少1個線索時打出。
抽取3張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Play only if there is a clue on your location.
Draw 3 cards.

all_cards.name: 高等教育
all_cards.text:
永久。
只要你有至少5張手牌，高等教育獲得：
"[free]花費1資源：這次技能檢定中你+2[willpower]。
[free]花費1資源：這次技能檢定中你+2[intellect]。"
all_cards.real_text:
Permanent.
While you have 5 or more cards in your hand, Higher Education gains:
"[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +2 [willpower] for this skill test.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +2 [intellect] for this skill test."

all_cards.name: 孤狼
all_cards.text:
每位調查員限制1張。
[reaction]在你回合開始時，如果你所在地點沒有其他調查員：獲得1個資源。
all_cards.real_text:
Limit 1 per investigator.
[reaction] When your turn begins, if there are no other investigators at your location: Gain 1 resource.
all_cards.flavor: "我不介意單獨行動，這樣子才高效。"

all_cards.name: 街頭浪子
all_cards.text:
永久。
[free]花費2資源：這次技能檢定中你+3[intellect]。
[free]花費2資源：這次技能檢定中你+3[agility]。
all_cards.real_text:
Permanent.
[fast] Spend 2 resources: You get +3 [intellect] for this skill test.
[fast] Spend 2 resources: You get +3 [agility] for this skill test.

all_cards.name: 逆反
all_cards.text: 在你為這次檢定抽取混亂標記前，選擇下列一個符號：([skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]或[elder_thing])。在這次檢定中，忽略所選符號的效果(包括其修正值)。
all_cards.real_text: Before revealing chaos tokens for this test, choose one of the following symbols: ([skull], [cultist], [tablet], or [elder_thing]). Ignore the effects of the chosen symbol during this test (including its modifier).

all_cards.name: 隨機應變
all_cards.text: 只能在你執行的技能檢定中投入，且該檢定難度必須比你基礎技能值高出至少2點。
all_cards.real_text: Commit only to a skill test you are performing, and only if the difficulty of that test is at least 2 higher than your base skill value.

all_cards.name: 拳擊家
all_cards.text:
永久。
[free]花費1資源：這次技能檢定中你+1[combat]。
[free]花費1資源：這次技能檢定中你+1[agility]。
all_cards.real_text:
Permanent.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [combat] for this skill test.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [agility] for this skill test.

all_cards.name: 追根究底
all_cards.text: 你所在地點必須有至少1個線索，你才能在技能檢定中投入該卡。
all_cards.real_text: Commit to a skill test only if there is a clue at your location.
all_cards.flavor: 敏而好事，不恥下問。

all_cards.name: 艾麗莎·格雷厄姆
all_cards.text:
你獲得+1[intellect]。
[free]消耗艾麗莎·格雷厄姆：查看遭遇牌堆，或任意玩家牌堆頂部1張卡牌。你可以在艾麗莎·格雷厄姆上放置1個毀滅標記，將察看的卡牌放到對應牌堆底部。
all_cards.real_text:
You get +1 [intellect].
[fast] Exhaust Alyssa Graham: Look at the top card of either the encounter deck or any player deck. You may then add 1 doom to Alyssa Graham to place the looked-at card on the bottom of its deck.

all_cards.name: 閃電槍
all_cards.text: 使用(3子彈)。 [action]花費1子彈：攻擊。這次攻擊中你+5[combat]。這次攻擊造成+2傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (3 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +5 [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +2 damage.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 槍械

all_cards.name: 芝加哥機關槍
all_cards.text: 使用(4子彈)。 [action]花費1子彈：攻擊。這次攻擊造成+2傷害。你可以為這次攻擊額外花費行動，每花費1個行動(包括本次行動)，這次攻擊中你+2[combat]。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (4 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You may spend any number of additional actions when you perform this attack. You get +2 [combat] for this attack for each action being spent (including this ability's [action] cost). This attack deals +2 damage.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 槍械. 違法

all_cards.name: 黃金懷表
all_cards.text: 卓越。 [reaction]在一個階段開始時，將黃金懷表移出遊戲：跳過該階段。 [reaction]在一個階段結束後，將黃金懷表移出遊戲：再執行這個階段一次。(FAQ, v1.2)
all_cards.real_text:
Exceptional.
[reaction] When a phase begins, remove The Gold Pocket Watch from the game: Skip this phase.
[reaction] After a phase ends, remove The Gold Pocket Watch from the game: Repeat that phase.

all_cards.name: "我見過更糟的……"
all_cards.text:
快速。在你受到傷害和/或恐懼時打出。
取消你這次受到的最多5點傷害和/或恐懼。然後獲得同等數量的資源。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when you are dealt damage and/or horror.
Cancel up to 5 damage and/or horror just dealt to you. Then, gain that many resources.

all_cards.name: 殺手鐧
all_cards.text:
卓越。快速。只能在你的回合中打出。
該回合中，你可以額外進行3個行動。
all_cards.real_text:
Exceptional. Fast. Play only during your turn.
You may take an additional 3 actions this turn.

all_cards.name: 蘿拉·海耶斯
all_cards.text: 強制 - 你抽取起始手牌後：選擇一個角色([survivor]、[guardian]、[seeker]、[rogue]、[mystic]或中立)。 你打出、投入或觸發能力的卡牌只限於中立卡和你所選角色的卡牌。 [free]：切換你的角色。(每輪限制1次。) [elder_sign]效果：+2。你可以切換角色。
all_cards.real_text: Forced - After you draw your opening hand: Choose a role ([survivor], [guardian], [seeker], [rogue], [mystic], or Neutral). You can only play, commit, or trigger abilities on Neutral cards or cards of your role. [fast]: Switch your role. (Limit once per round.) [elder_sign] effect: +2. You may switch roles.

deck_options.error: You must have at least 7 cards from 3 different factions

all_cards.flavor: 也許這次是她東山再起的最好時機。
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：35。 牌組構建選項：求生者、守衛者、探求者、流浪者和潛修者卡([survivor]、[guardian]、[seeker]、[rogue]、[mystic])等級0-3，中立卡牌等級0-5。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：2張即興表演、2張身分危機、1張隨機基礎弱點。 其它需求：你的牌組必須包含3個不同職階([survivor]、[guardian]、[seeker]、[rogue]、[mystic])，每個職階至少7張卡牌。
all_cards.back_flavor: 蘿拉在全球各地出演劇目時，門票每每都被搶購一空，但沒有一部劇像《黃衣之王》一般不祥而詭異。就連排練期間，戲班子都連遭厄運。一天，與她聯袂出演的米里亞姆被人發現浮屍於塞納河上，她終於崩潰了，提筆寫下辭職信，告訴導演下一場就是自己的告別演出。現在她回到自己的家鄉阿卡姆，準備最後一次演出，她也希望這一次能永遠告別這齣可怕的戲劇。

all_cards.name: 即興表演
all_cards.text:
蘿拉·海耶斯牌組專用。
快速。只能在你回合中打出。
切換你的角色。你回合結束前，你所選角色的下一張卡牌資源費用降低3點。抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Lola Hayes deck only.
Fast. Play only during your turn.
Switch your role. Until the end of your turn, reduce the resource cost of the next card you play of your role by 3. Draw 1 card.

all_cards.name: 身份危機
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 丟棄你控制的所有你當前角色的卡牌。然後，丟棄你牌堆頂的1張卡牌。將你的角色切換到該丟棄的卡牌職階(如果丟棄的卡牌是弱點，切換為中立角色)。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Discard all cards you control of your current role. Then, discard the top card of your deck. Switch your role to the class of the discarded card (if the discarded card is a weakness, switch your role to neutral).
all_cards.flavor: "我演過那麼多角色，就算瘋了也是正常的。"

all_cards.name: "如果它會流血……"
all_cards.text:
快速。在你擊敗一名[[怪物]]敵人後打出。
你所在地點的每位調查員，各治癒等同於該敵人恐懼值的恐懼。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play after you defeat a [[Monster]] enemy.
Each investigator at your location heals horror equal to that enemy's horror value.
all_cards.flavor: 小小慰藉，足以安心。

all_cards.name: 春田M1903
all_cards.text: 使用(3子彈)。 [action]花費1子彈：攻擊。這次攻擊中你+3[combat]，並+2傷害。不能用於攻擊與你交戰的敵人。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (3 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +3 [combat] and deal +2 damage for this attack. Cannot be used to attack enemies engaged with you.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 槍械

all_cards.name: 暴露弱點
all_cards.text:
快速。在任何[free]玩家時間段中打出。
選擇你所在地點的一名敵人。檢定[intellect](X)，X為該敵人攻擊值。你每超過難度1點，該階段中，下一次攻擊該敵人時，其攻擊值降低1點。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play during any [fast] player window.
Choose an enemy at your location. Test [intellect] (X), where X is that enemy's fight value. For each point you succeed by, reduce that enemy's fight value by 1 for the next attack performed against it this phase.

all_cards.name: 幸運骰子
all_cards.text: 卓越。 [reaction]在你抽出1個非[auto_fail]的混亂標記時，花費2資源：忽略該標記，並再抽1個標記結算。如果新抽出的標記為[auto_fail]符號，將幸運骰子移出遊戲(不能被忽略或取消)。(FAQ, v1.1)
all_cards.real_text:
Exceptional.
[reaction] When you reveal a non-[auto_fail] chaos token, spend 2 resources: Ignore that chaos token and reveal another one to resolve. If that token has a [auto_fail] symbol, remove Lucky Dice from the game (cannot be ignored/canceled).

all_cards.name: 機會主義者
all_cards.text:
只能在你執行的技能檢定中投入。
如果你成功且超過難度至少2點，在檢定後不丟棄機會主義者，改為將其返回你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Commit only to a skill test you are performing.
If you succeed by 2 or more, return Opportunist to your hand after this test instead of discarding it.

all_cards.name: 黑馬
all_cards.text:
每位調查員限制1張。
在補給階段，你可以選擇不獲得資源。
只要你的資源池中沒有資源，你獲得+1[willpower]，+1[intellect]，+1[combat]和+1[agility]。
all_cards.real_text:
Limit 1 per investigator.
During the upkeep phase, you may choose to not gain resources.
While you have no resources in your resource pool, you get +1 [willpower], +1 [intellect], +1 [combat], and +1 [agility].

all_cards.name: 求生本能
all_cards.text: 如果躲避嘗試期間這次技能檢定成功，躲避的調查員可以立即躲避與其交戰的每個其他敵人，並可以移動到一個連接地點。
all_cards.real_text: If this test is successful during an evasion attempt, the evading investigator may immediately evade each other enemy engaged with him or her, and may move to a connecting location.

all_cards.name: 安奎娜
all_cards.text: [reaction]在敵人攻擊你時，消耗安奎娜並對她造成1點恐懼：將攻擊造成的傷害轉移給你所在地點的一名敵人。(你依然受到攻擊造成的恐懼。)
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] When an enemy attacks you, exhaust Aquinnah and deal 1 horror to her: Deal that enemy's damage to any enemy at your location, instead. (You still take horror dealt by the attack.)
all_cards.flavor: "不要怕你看到的東西。真正可怕的是那些你看不到的。"

all_cards.name: 奧魯斯的珠寶
all_cards.text: [reaction]在你所在地點發生的技能檢定中，抽出[skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]、[elder_thing]或[auto_fail]標記後，消耗奧魯斯的珠寶：抽取1張卡牌，或獲得2個資源。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] After a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol is revealed during a skill test at your location, exhaust Jewel of Aureolus: Draw 1 card or gain 2 resources.

all_cards.name: 有膽有識
all_cards.text:
快速。場上限制1張[[沉穩]]。
非直接恐懼必須分配給有膽有識後才能分配給你的調查員卡。
[free]花費1資源：這次技能檢定中你+1[willpower]。
[free]花費1資源：這次技能檢定中你+1[intellect]。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Limit 1 [[Composure]] in play.
Non-direct horror must be assigned to Plucky before it can be assigned to your investigator card.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [willpower] for this skill test.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [intellect] for this skill test.

all_cards.name: 絕命奔逃
all_cards.text:
每次技能檢定最多投入1張。
你剩餘神智值為3點或更少時才可投入技能檢定。
all_cards.real_text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
Commit to a skill test only if you have 3 or fewer remaining sanity.

all_cards.name: 無所畏懼
all_cards.text: 如果該次檢定成功，治癒1點恐懼(如果超過難度至少2點，則改為治癒2點恐懼)。
all_cards.real_text: If this skill test is successful, heal 1 horror (2 horror instead if it succeeds by 2 or more).
all_cards.flavor: 只有在黑暗面前站穩腳步，才能看到明天的太陽。

all_cards.name: 喘息時間
all_cards.text: 只有在你所在地點沒有敵人時才能打出。治癒3點恐懼，並抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Play only if there are no enemies at your location.
Heal 3 horror and draw 1 card.

all_cards.name: 領導力
all_cards.text: 當領導力被投入另一位調查員的技能檢定時，領導力獲得[willpower][wild]。
all_cards.real_text: While Leadership is committed to a skill test being performed by another investigator, Leadership gains [willpower] [wild].

all_cards.name: 奇怪的溶液
all_cards.text: 研究。(FAQ, v2.0) 使用(4補給)。 [action]花費1補給：治癒你所在地點一位調查員2點傷害。
all_cards.real_text:
Researched. Uses (4 supplies).
[action] Spend 1 supply: Heal 2 damage from an investigator at your location.

all_cards.name: 奇怪的溶液
all_cards.text: 研究。(FAQ, v2.0) 使用(3補給)。 [action]花費1補給：攻擊。該次攻擊[combat]基礎值視為6。這次攻擊造成+2傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Researched. Uses (3 supplies). [action] Spend 1 supply: Fight. Attack with a base [combat] skill of 6. This attack deals +2 damage.

all_cards.name: 奇怪的溶液
all_cards.text: 研究。(FAQ, v2.0) 使用(4補給)。 [action]花費1補給：躲避。該次躲避[agility]基礎值視為6。
all_cards.real_text: Researched. Uses (4 supplies). [action] Spend 1 supply: Evade. Evade with a base [agility] skill of 6.

all_cards.name: 喬伊"老鼠"弗吉爾
all_cards.text: [free]花費1資源：選擇你手中1張[[道具]]支援卡並打出(仍需支付卡牌費用)。
all_cards.real_text: [fast] Spend 1 resource: Choose an [[Item]] asset from your hand and play it (paying its cost).
all_cards.flavor:
"墨菲，只要肯付錢，不管是誰、什麼時間、什麼地點，老鼠都能完成任務。"
<cite>《詭鎮奇談》調查員Jason Marker</cite>

all_cards.name: 月光儀式
all_cards.text: 將你控制的1張卡上，所有毀滅標記移除。
all_cards.real_text: Remove all doom from 1 card you control.

all_cards.name: 不期而遇
all_cards.text: 選擇任意玩家棄牌堆中的一張[[盟友]]支援。將該支援放置入場，置於你的控制之下。當一輪結束時，如果該支援卡依然在場，將其丟棄。
all_cards.real_text: Choose an [[Ally]] asset in any player's discard pile. Put that asset into play under your control. At the end of the round, if that asset is still in play, discard it.

all_cards.name: 鴻運當頭
all_cards.text:
只能在你執行的技能檢定中投入。
在該次檢定抽出混亂標記後，你可以放逐鴻運當頭。如果你這麼做，該次檢定自動成功(除非抽出[auto_fail]標記)。
all_cards.real_text:
Commit only to a skill test you are performing.
After revealing chaos tokens for this test, you may choose to exile Stroke of Luck. If you do, this test is automatically successful (unless a [auto_fail] token was revealed).

all_cards.name: 華服
all_cards.text: 你在執行"談判"行動時執行的技能檢定難度降低2。
all_cards.real_text: Reduce the difficulty of skill tests you perform during 'parley' actions by 2.
all_cards.flavor: 絲綢的觸感簡直妙不可言。

all_cards.name: 戴紅手套的男子
all_cards.text: 快速。 [reaction]在戴紅手套的男子入場後：選擇你的2項技能。只要戴紅手套的男子在場，所選技能的基礎值變為6。 強制 - 當神秘階段結束時：丟棄戴紅手套的男子。
all_cards.real_text: Fast. [reaction] After The Red-Gloved Man enters play: Choose two of your skills. While The Red-Gloved Man is in play, raise the base value of each of those skills to 6. Forced - At the end of the mythos phase: Discard The Red-Gloved Man.

all_cards.name: 致命打擊
all_cards.text: 如果攻擊中的這次技能檢定成功，則該次攻擊造成+1傷害(如果超過難度至少2點，改為造成+2傷害)。
all_cards.real_text: If this skill test is successful during an attack, that attack deals +1 damage (+2 damage instead if it succeeds by 2 or more).
all_cards.flavor: 大斧砸在肉上，發出令人作嘔的響聲，他停不住地反覆打擊著那個怪物，直到它再也無法動彈為止。

all_cards.name: 屠怪勇士
all_cards.text: 攻擊。如果這次攻擊目標為1個非[[精英]]敵人並成功，立刻擊敗該敵人。
all_cards.real_text: Fight. If this attack succeeds against a non-[[Elite]] enemy, defeat that enemy.

all_cards.name: 威廉·T·瑪律森博士
all_cards.text: [reaction]在你從遭遇牌堆抽取1張遭遇卡時，消耗威廉·T·瑪律森博士，並將你的1個線索放在所在地點上：取消該次抽牌，並將抽出的牌與遭遇牌堆混洗。然後，抽取1張遭遇卡。(FAQ, v1.2)
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] When you draw an encounter card from the encounter deck, exhaust Dr. William T. Maleson and place 1 of your clues on your location: Cancel the drawing of that card and shuffle it back into the encounter deck. Then, draw a new card from the top of the encounter deck.
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 米斯卡塔尼克

all_cards.name: 揭開現實的面紗
all_cards.text: 調查。該次技能檢定難度，等同於場上已揭示的地點中，最高的隱藏值。如果成功，從場上每個已揭示地點各發現1個線索。
all_cards.real_text: Investigate. The difficulty of this skill test is equal to the highest shroud value among revealed locations in play. If you succeed, discover 1 clue from each revealed location in play.

all_cards.name: 皺縮術
all_cards.text: 使用(4充能)。 [action]花費1充能：攻擊。這次攻擊不使用[combat]，改為使用[willpower]。這次攻擊中你+3[willpower]，並造成+2傷害。如果攻擊中抽出[skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]、[elder_thing]或[auto_fail]標記，受到2點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (4 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Fight. This attack uses [willpower] instead of [combat]. You get +3 [willpower] and deal +2 damage for this attack. If a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol is revealed during this attack, take 2 horror.

all_cards.name: 守護結界
all_cards.text:
快速。在你抽出一張非弱點的遭遇卡時打出。
取消該卡的所有效果，並將其丟棄。然後受到1點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when you draw a non-weakness encounter card. 
Cancel all of that card's effects and discard it. Then, take 1 horror.

all_cards.name: 反覆嘗試
all_cards.text: [reaction]在一次技能檢定失敗後，如果你擁有的一張技能卡被投入該次檢定中，消耗反覆嘗試：將那張技能卡返回你手中。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] After a skill test is failed, if a skill card you own is committed to that test, exhaust Try and Try Again: Return that skill card to your hand.

all_cards.name: 馬克·哈里根
all_cards.text: 你開始遊戲時把索菲(深切的思念)放置到場上。 [reaction]有傷害放置到你控制的卡牌上後：抽取1張卡牌。(每個階段限制一次。) [elder_sign]效果：馬克·哈里根身上每有一點傷害，+1。
all_cards.real_text: You begin the game with Sophie (In Loving Memory) in play. [reaction] After damage is placed on a card you control: Draw 1 card. (Limit once per phase.) [elder_sign] effect: +1 for each damage on Mark Harrigan.
all_cards.flavor: 如果有必要，他可以燒了整座城，但他不會讓那些怪物奪走任何人的生命。
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：守衛者卡([guardian])等級0-5，中立卡牌等級0-5，[[策略]]卡牌等級0。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：保衛後方、砲彈休克、索菲、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 有無數人拖著殘缺的身體和受傷的心靈從戰場回到家鄉。但馬克·哈里根見證的恐怖卻是他無法解釋的。但他寫信回家時，把自己的見聞告訴了他心愛的索菲，她對此深信不疑——殘殺人類的不是人類，而是些不明生物。他回家看她時，終於發現為什麼她那麼相信自己了：這種生物就寄宿在她體內，從內部啃食著她，從她體內破肚而出。在無助和恐懼之下，馬克看著那個生物享用完它的美餐，看著索菲尖叫著消失在空氣之中。現在所有人都覺得馬克·哈里根瘋了。也許他是瘋了，但他知道那些怪物是真實存在的，除非消滅那些怪物，否則他永遠不會罷手。

all_cards.name: 潘明
all_cards.text:
[reaction]你所在地點的調查員在技能檢定中投入一張卡牌後：在此次技能檢定結束前，該卡牌獲得1個[wild]圖標。(每位調查員每輪限制1次。)
[elder_sign]效果：+1。本次技能檢定結束後，你可以選擇投入本次技能檢定的一張技能卡返回其所有者的手牌。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] After an investigator at your location commits a card to a skill test: That card gains a [wild] icon until the end of the test. (Limit once for each investigator per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1. You may choose a skill card committed to this skill test to return to its owner's hand after this test ends.
all_cards.flavor: "相信我，我可以帶你穿越未知的領域。"
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：探求者卡([seeker])等級0-5，中立卡牌等級0-5，求生者卡([survivor])等級0-2。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：縝密分析、黃衣之王(第一幕)、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 潘明感覺自己從未融入美國。在移居之前，她居住在日本統治下的韓國，那時作為越南人的她生活更為艱難。她始終不忘自己的父母做出了多大犧牲才舉家遷來美國，於是她勤奮學習，考取了大學文憑。終於有一天，她父親結識了一位來自阿卡姆的托馬斯先生，對方邀請她來自己公司工作。起初托馬斯先生對她非常和善——但自從他開始閱讀《黃衣之王》後，他性情大變。他把書借給潘明，但她看完第一章後就始終不敢繼續閱讀。三個星期後，人們發現托馬斯先生自殺身亡……而真相就隱藏在這本《黃衣之王》中。

all_cards.name: 保衛後方
all_cards.text:
馬克·哈里根牌組專用。
如果攻擊中的這次技能檢定成功，將馬克·哈里根身上的1點傷害移動到受到攻擊的敵人身上。
all_cards.real_text:
Mark Harrigan deck only.
If this skill test is successful during an attack, move 1 damage from Mark Harrigan to the attacked enemy.
all_cards.flavor: 真正的戰爭現在才開始。

all_cards.name: 砲彈休克
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 你身上每有2點傷害，受到1點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - For every 2 damage on you, take 1 horror.
all_cards.flavor: 戰爭永遠不會改變。

all_cards.name: 索菲
all_cards.text: 馬克·哈里根牌組專用。 索菲不能離場。 [free]受到1點直接傷害：這次技能檢定你+2技能值。 強制 - 如果馬克·哈里根身上有5點或更多傷害：將索菲翻面。
all_cards.real_text: Mark Harrigan deck only. Sophie cannot leave play. [fast] Take 1 direct damage: You get +2 to your skill value for this skill test. Forced - If Mark Harrigan has 5 or more damage on him: Flip Sophie.
all_cards.back_text: 索菲不能離場。 你每項技能-1。 強制 - 如果馬克·哈里根身上有4點或更少傷害：將索菲翻面。

linked_card.name: 索菲
linked_card.text:
索菲不能離場。

你每項技能-1。

強制 - 如果馬克·哈里根身上有4點或更少傷害：將索菲翻面。
linked_card.real_text: Sophie cannot leave play. You get -1 to each of your skills. Forced - If Mark Harrigan has 4 or less damage on him: Flip Sophie.

all_cards.name: 縝密分析
all_cards.text:
潘明牌組專用。
每次其它地點的調查員進行技能檢定時，你都可以投入1張卡牌。
[reaction]你在技能檢定中投入正好1張卡牌後，消耗縝密分析：抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Minh Thi Phan deck only.
You may commit 1 card to each skill test performed by an investigator at another location.
[reaction] After you commit exactly 1 card to a skill test, exhaust Analytical Mind: Draw 1 card.

all_cards.name: 黃衣之王
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 將黃衣之王放置入你的威脅區域。除非通過以下[reaction]能力，否則它不能離場。 你不能在技能檢定中投入正好1或2張卡牌。 [reaction]技能檢定成功且潘明投入至少6個與該次檢定對應的技能圖標後：丟棄黃衣之王。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Put The King in Yellow into play in your threat area. It cannot leave play except through the [reaction] ability below. You cannot commit exactly 1 or 2 cards to a skill test. [reaction] After a skill test is successful in which Minh Thi Phan has committed at least 6 matching skill icons for that test: Discard The King in Yellow.

all_cards.name: 勇氣過人
all_cards.text: 你所在地點的其他調查員受到的傷害可以分配給勇氣過人。
all_cards.real_text: True Grit may be assigned damage dealt to other investigators at your location.
all_cards.flavor: 只是輕傷。

all_cards.name: "放著我來！"
all_cards.text:
快速。另一位調查員抽取了1張非禍害遭遇卡後，結算該卡牌效果前打出。
改為你被視為抽取了該遭遇卡。結算該卡牌的顯現效果時，你每項技能+2。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play after another investigator draws a non-peril encounter card, but before resolving that card's effects.
You are considered to have drawn that encounter card, instead. You get +2 to each of your skills while resolving that card's revelation effect.

all_cards.name: 殫精竭慮
all_cards.text: 選擇你所在地點的一位調查員。該調查員在其牌堆頂部的6張卡牌中查找並抽取1張卡牌，並且混洗自己的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text: Choose an investigator at your location. That investigator searches the top 6 cards of his or her deck for a card, draws it, and shuffles his or her deck.

all_cards.name: 掌握內幕
all_cards.text: 使用(3秘密)。 [action]花費1秘密：調查。調查任意一個已揭示的地點，視為你在該地點中。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (3 secrets). [action] Spend 1 secret: Investigate. Investigate any revealed location in play as if you were at that location.

all_cards.name: 賽菲娜·盧梭
all_cards.text: 強制 - 在你將要抽取起始手牌時：改為抽取13張卡牌。選擇最多5張事件卡放在本卡牌下，並保留8張卡牌作為你的起始手牌。丟棄其餘卡牌。(你不能換牌。) [action]：選擇並抽取本卡牌下方的一張事件卡。不會引起趁亂攻擊。 [elder_sign]效果：+3。你可以選擇並抽取本卡牌下的一張事件卡。
all_cards.real_text: Forced - When you would draw your opening hand: Draw 13 cards, instead. Choose up to 5 events to place beneath this card and keep 8 cards as your opening hand. Discard the rest. (You cannot mulligan.) [action]: Choose an event beneath this card and draw it. Does not provoke attacks of opportunity. [elder_sign] effect: +3. You may choose an event beneath this card and draw it.
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：33。 牌組構建選項：流浪者卡([rogue])等級0-5，中立卡牌等級0-5，潛修者卡([mystic])等級0-2。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：3張畫中世界、畢宿星團、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 從小開始，賽菲娜漂亮的畫就吸引了許多人的目光。後來，一位巴黎的藝術收藏家來到塔西提島，發現了賽菲娜，給了她一份工作，但要求她為他繪製贗品。賽菲娜敏銳的眼光和穩健的巧手讓她成為這份工作不二的人選，而她也發現造假工藝遠比她想像中更能激發她的熱情。最近一位腰纏萬貫的匿名陌生人給了她一份差事，要她重繪出一座奇怪的異星城市的全景圖。當她完成最後一筆時，她猛地被拖入了畫中的世界。筋疲力竭之下，她昏厥了過去，差一點當場暴斃。她醒來時，已身處自己的畫室，這時她知道，一切都是真實的。

all_cards.name: 阿喀琦·奧耶莉
all_cards.text:
你帶有"使用(充能)"的支援卡入場時帶有額外1點充能。
[elder_sign]效果：+1。你控制的一張帶有"使用(充能)"的支援卡增加1點充能。
all_cards.real_text:
Your assets with "uses (charges)" enter play with 1 additional charge on them.
[elder_sign] effect: +1. Add 1 charge to an asset with "uses (charges)" you control.
all_cards.flavor: "我會渡越彼岸。我不懼怕它們。"
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：潛修者卡([mystic])等級0-5，中立卡牌等級0-5，帶有"使用(充能)"的卡牌等級0-4，[[密教]]卡牌等級0。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：靈言者、怒靈、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 阿喀琦來自奈及利亞，她從小就和他人格格不入。她經常與空氣對話，也不和其他孩子一起玩耍，所以村裡人覺得她瘋了。而村民迪比亞第一個發現了她的潛力。他相信神靈選中了阿喀琦是需要她去成就大事，於是他教會了她如何發揮潛力與神靈交流。在他的教導下，阿喀琦迅速成長為一名年輕睿智的領袖，不僅她所在的村子，所有她幫助過的社群都對她尊敬有加。現在她要踏上征途，運用她獨有的知識去解決那些只有她能解決的非自然問題。

all_cards.name: 畫中世界
all_cards.text:
賽菲娜·盧梭牌組專用。
不能放在賽菲娜·盧梭下。
打出畫中世界時，將其作為賽菲娜·盧梭下的一張非卓越事件卡。不要丟棄畫中世界，改為將其從遊戲中移除。
all_cards.real_text:
Sefina Rousseau deck only.
Cannot be placed beneath Sefina Rousseau.
Play The Painted World as an exact copy of a non-exceptional event that is beneath Sefina Rousseau. Remove The Painted World from the game instead of discarding it.

all_cards.name: 畢宿星團
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 隨機選擇賽菲娜·盧梭下的一張事件卡，將其從遊戲中移除。如果你不能這麼做，受到1點傷害和1點恐懼。如果你的牌組有5張或以上卡牌，不要丟棄畢宿星團，改為將其重洗回你的牌組。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Randomly choose an event beneath Sefina Rousseau and remove it from the game. If you cannot, take 1 damage and 1 horror. If your deck has 5 or more cards in it, shuffle Stars of Hyades back into your deck instead of discarding it.

all_cards.name: 靈言者
all_cards.text: 阿喀琦·奧耶莉牌組專用。 [free]消耗靈言者：選擇你控制的一張帶有"使用(充能)"的支援卡。該支援卡返回你的手牌，或者將該支援卡上所有的充能(作為資源)移動到你的資源池並丟棄該支援卡。
all_cards.real_text: Akachi Onyele deck only. [fast] Exhaust Spirit-Speaker: Choose an asset you control with "uses (charges)." Either return that asset to your hand, or move all charges from that asset to your resource pool (as resources) and discard that asset.

all_cards.name: 怒靈
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 將怒靈放置入你的威脅區域。 [free]消耗1張[[法術]]支援卡：將該支援卡上的1個充能移動到怒靈上。 強制 - 在遊戲結束時，如果怒靈上的充能少於4個：你受到1點肉體創傷。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Put Angered Spirits into play in your threat area. [fast] Exhaust a [[Spell]] asset: Move 1 charge from that asset to Angered Spirits. Forced - When the game ends, if Angered Spirits has fewer than 4 charges on it: You suffer 1 physical trauma.

all_cards.name: 古代雕文
all_cards.text: [action]丟棄手牌中1張含有至少1個[intellect]技能圖標的卡牌：從供應堆拿取1資源放到古代雕文上，作為秘密。 強制 - 第3個祕密放到古代雕文上後：丟棄古代雕文並獲得5資源。在你的冒險日誌上記錄下"你翻譯出了雕文。"
all_cards.real_text: [action] Discard a card with at least 1 [intellect] skill icon from your hand: Place 1 resource on Archaic Glyphs from the token pool, as a secret. Forced - After the third secret is placed on Archaic Glyphs: Discard Archaic Glyphs and gain 5 resources. Record in your Campaign Log that "you have translated the glyphs."
all_cards.traits: 道具. 密教. 書籍

all_cards.name: 障眼戲法
all_cards.text: 快速。只能在你回合中打出。將手牌中的一張[[道具]]支援卡放置入場。當你回合結束時，如果該支援卡還在場上，將其收回你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play only during your turn.
Put an [[Item]] asset into play from your hand. At the end of your turn, if that asset is still in play, return it to your hand.

all_cards.name: 藝高膽大
all_cards.text:
快速。在你技能檢定將要成功時打出。
這次技能檢定你+2技能值。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when you would succeed at a skill test.
You get +2 skill value for this test.
all_cards.flavor:
"麥克格倫，你想讓我們兩個都送命嗎？"
"這次不會了，夥計。這次不會了。"

all_cards.name: 煉金轉化
all_cards.text:
使用(3充能)。
[action]消耗煉金轉化，花費1充能：檢定[willpower](1)。你成功時每超過難度1點，獲得1個資源(上限3個)。如果本次檢定中抽出[skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]、[elder_thing]或[auto_fail]標記，受到1點傷害。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (3 charges).
[action] Exhaust Alchemical Transmutation, spend 1 charge: Test [willpower] (1). For each point you succeed by, gain 1 resource (to a maximum of 3). If a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol is revealed during this test, take 1 damage.

all_cards.name: 解錮靈魂
all_cards.text: 打出你手牌中一張[[法術]]或[[儀式]]，其資源費用降低3點。
all_cards.real_text: Play a [[Spell]] or [[Ritual]] card from your hand, reducing its resource cost by 3.
all_cards.flavor:
力量攫獲了她，讓她渾身戰慄，痙攣。
能量與她融為一體，
然後，她睜開了雙眼……

all_cards.name: 星界旅行
all_cards.text: 移動。移動到任意一個已揭示的地點並從混亂袋中隨機抽取1個標記。如果抽出[skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]、[elder_thing]或[auto_fail]標記，你必須丟棄一張你控制的[[道具]]或[[盟友]]支援卡(如果你不能這麼做，則受到1點傷害)。
all_cards.real_text: Move. Move to any revealed location and reveal a random token from the chaos bag. If you reveal a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol, you must discard an [[Item]] or [[Ally]] asset you control (if you cannot, take 1 damage).
all_cards.flavor: 跨維度的旅行存在著風險，這他很清楚。但誰能抗拒那超越時空的疆域呢?

all_cards.name: 隨行鬼影
all_cards.text: 生成 - 離你最遠的地點。 獵物 - 僅對承受者。 獵手。 強制 - 在隨行鬼影將要被擊敗時：改為將其洗入承受者的牌組。
all_cards.real_text: Spawn - Location farthest from you. Prey - Bearer only. Hunter. Forced - When The Thing That Follows would be defeated: Instead shuffle it into its bearer's deck.
all_cards.flavor: 無論天涯海角，始終不離不棄。

all_cards.name: 頭腦發熱
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 抽取遭遇牌堆頂上的1張卡牌。該卡牌獲得湧動。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Draw the top card of the encounter deck. That card gains surge.
all_cards.flavor: "不要擔心，現在局勢完全在我掌控之下！"

all_cards.name: 塗繪印記
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 將塗繪印記放置入你的威脅區域。 你的手牌上限降低5張。(FAQ, v1.6) [action][action]：丟棄塗繪印記。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Put Drawing the Sign into play in your threat area. Your maximum hand size is reduced by 5. [action] [action]: Discard Drawing the Sign.

all_cards.name: 威廉·約里克
all_cards.text: [reaction]在你擊敗敵人後：從你的棄牌堆(支付其費用)打出一張支援卡。(每輪限制1次。) [elder_sign]效果：+2。如果本次檢定成功，將你棄牌堆中的1張卡牌返回你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] After you defeat an enemy: Play an asset from your discard pile (paying its cost). (Limit once per round.) [elder_sign] effect: +2. If this test is successful, return 1 card from your discard pile to your hand.
all_cards.flavor: "我不過是這場劇中的一個演員，但我很幸運，我會活著看到落幕。"
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：求生者卡([survivor])等級0-5，中立卡牌等級0-5，守衛者卡([guardian])等級0-2。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：挖土深埋、墓地食屍鬼、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 威廉·約里克從沒想過要當一個挖墓人。他早年學習演藝，在波士頓當了多年演員，承接所有角色。莎士比亞的戲劇當然精彩，但是過了多年卻沒有接到幾個角色的他也不得不承認舞臺不是他的歸宿。掘墓是一件沉悶的工作，但死者卻是最好的觀眾，而威廉最喜歡的就是戲劇獨白。但當他發現一群墮落的生物正在啃食墓地裡的屍體時，一切又變得不同了。自從那一晚起，為了保護死者，約里克用盡了各種手段驅趕那些生物。

all_cards.name: 挖土深埋
all_cards.text: 威廉·約里克牌組專用。 快速。你所在地點中1個非[[精英]]敵人被擊敗後打出。 將該敵人(與本卡牌)放入勝利牌區。
all_cards.real_text: William Yorick deck only. Fast. Play after a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location is defeated. Add that enemy (and this card) to the victory display.
all_cards.flavor:
"這些雖然是瘋話，卻有深意在內。"
<cite>《哈姆雷特》，威廉·莎士比亞著</cite>

all_cards.name: 墓地食屍鬼
all_cards.text: 獵物 - 僅限威廉·約里克。 獵手。 墓地食屍鬼與你交戰時，你棄牌堆中的卡牌不能離開棄牌堆。
all_cards.real_text: Prey - William Yorick only. Hunter. While Graveyard Ghouls is engaged with you, cards cannot leave your discard pile.
all_cards.traits: 類人. 怪物. 食屍鬼
all_cards.flavor:
"地獄空蕩蕩，魔鬼在人間。"
<cite>《暴風雨》，威廉·莎士比亞著</cite>

all_cards.name: 提燈
all_cards.text: [action]：調查。本次調查中你所在地點-1隱藏值。 [action]丟棄提燈：對你所在地點的一個敵人造成1點傷害。本行動不會引起趁亂攻擊。
all_cards.real_text: [action]: Investigate. Your location gets -1 shroud for this investigation. [action] Discard Lantern: Deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

all_cards.name: 挖墓人的鏟子
all_cards.text: [action]：攻擊。這次攻擊中你+2[combat]。 [action]丟棄挖墓人的鏟子：發現你所在地點的1個線索。
all_cards.real_text: [action]: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. [action] Discard Gravedigger's Shovel: Discover 1 clue at your location.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 工具. 武器. 近戰
all_cards.flavor: 我知道我不應該再挖了，但我就是停不下來。

all_cards.name: .32柯爾特手槍
all_cards.text: 使用(6子彈)。 [action]花費1子彈：攻擊。這次攻擊造成+1傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (6 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You deal +1 damage for this attack.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 槍械
all_cards.flavor: 雖然發明了半自動槍械，但許多警官和私有槍枝持有者仍然相信左輪手槍更為可靠。

all_cards.name: 時刻警惕
all_cards.text: 每次1張，打出你手牌中最多3張支援卡，每張資源費用減少1點。
all_cards.real_text: One at a time, play up to 3 assets from your hand, reducing the resource cost of each by 1.
all_cards.flavor:
不得不說，
洛根這傢伙對世界末日真的留了一手。

all_cards.name: 實地調查
all_cards.text: [reaction]你移動到一個地點後，如果該地點至少有1個線索，消耗實地調查：本階段中你下一次技能檢定+2技能值。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] After you move to a location, if that location has at least 1 clue on it, exhaust Fieldwork: You get +2 skill value for the next skill test you perform this phase.
all_cards.flavor: 要是這都不能讓吉尼進入探險家俱樂部，那就沒可能了。

all_cards.name: 潛行
all_cards.text: [action]消耗潛行：躲避。本次躲避嘗試所選敵人-2躲避。如果你成功躲避該敵人，它解除交戰狀態但不消耗。你回合結束前，該敵人不能與你交戰。
all_cards.real_text: [action] Exhaust Stealth: Evade. The chosen enemy gets -2 evade for this evasion attempt. If you successfully evade the enemy, disengage with it but do not exhaust it. Until the end of your turn, that enemy cannot engage you.

all_cards.name: 撬鎖工具
all_cards.text: 使用(3補給)。如果撬鎖工具上沒有補給，將其丟棄。 [action]消耗撬鎖工具：調查。這次調查中將你的[agility]數值加入你的技能值。如果你沒有成功並超過難度至少2點，移除撬鎖工具上的1補給。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (3 supplies). If Lockpicks has no supplies, discard it. [action] Exhaust Lockpicks: Investigate. Add your [agility] value to your skill value for this investigation. If you do not succeed by at least 2, remove 1 supply from Lockpicks.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 工具. 違法

all_cards.name: 靈力祭祀刀
all_cards.text: [free]進行[[法術]]卡上的技能檢定時，消耗靈力祭祀刀：這次技能檢定你+2技能值。 [action]消耗靈力祭祀刀：攻擊。這次攻擊中你+2[combat]。
all_cards.real_text: [fast] During a skill test on a [[Spell]] card, exhaust Spirit Athame: You get +2 skill value for this test. [action] Exhaust Spirit Athame: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 遺物. 武器. 近戰

all_cards.name: 藏身地點
all_cards.text: 快速。將藏身地點疊加到一個任意地點。 被疊加地點上每名非[[精英]]敵人獲得冷漠。 強制 - 當敵軍階段結束時，如果該地點上有準備的敵人：丟棄藏身地點。
all_cards.real_text: Fast. Attach Hiding Spot to any location. Each non-[[Elite]] enemy at attached location gains aloof. Forced - At the end of the enemy phase, if a ready enemy is at attached location: Discard Hiding Spot.
all_cards.flavor: 一隻羊、兩隻羊……

all_cards.name: 急中生智
all_cards.text: 如果本次技能檢定成功，選擇你棄牌堆中一張標題不是急中生智的[survivor]卡牌。將選中的卡牌加入你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text: If this skill test is successful, choose a [survivor] card not named Resourceful in your discard pile. Add the chosen card to your hand.

all_cards.name: .45自動手槍
all_cards.text: 使用(4子彈)。 [action]花費1子彈：攻擊。這次攻擊中你+2[combat]。這次攻擊造成+1傷害。這次攻擊忽略反擊關鍵詞。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (4 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage. Ignore the retaliate keyword for this attack.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 槍械

all_cards.name: 扒竊
all_cards.text:
快速。
[reaction]在你躲避一名敵人後，消耗扒竊：抽取1張卡牌或獲得1資源。如果你成功並超過難度2點或以上，改為執行以上兩項。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast.
[reaction] After you evade an enemy, exhaust Pickpocketing: Draw 1 card or gain 1 resource. If you succeeded by 2 or more, do both instead.

all_cards.name: 查爾斯·羅斯大人
all_cards.text:
你可以花費資源來支付你所在地點中其他調查員打出的[[道具]]支援卡。
[free]消耗查爾斯·羅斯大人：你所在地點的調查員打出的下一張[[道具]]支援卡的費用降低1點。
all_cards.real_text:
You may spend resources to pay for [[Item]] assets played by other investigators at your location.
[fast] Exhaust Charles Ross, Esq.: Reduce the cost of the next [[Item]] asset played by an investigator at your location by 1.

all_cards.name: 預先警告
all_cards.text:
快速。在你抽出一張非弱點詭計卡時打出。
將你的1個線索放置到你所在地點上。然後，取消該卡牌的顯現效果。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when you draw a non-weakness treachery card.
Place 1 of your clues on your location. Then, cancel that card's revelation effect.
all_cards.flavor: 知己知彼者，百戰不殆。

all_cards.name: 達里奧·埃爾阿明
all_cards.text:
如果你有10點或以上資源，你獲得+1[willpower]和+1[intellect]。
[action]如果你所在地點沒有敵人，消耗達里奧·埃爾阿明：獲得2資源。
all_cards.real_text:
While you have 10 or more resources, you get +1 [willpower] and +1 [intellect].
[action] If there are no enemies at your location, exhaust Dario El-Amin: Gain 2 resources.

all_cards.name: 意志考驗
all_cards.text:
快速。在你所在地點的一位調查員抽出一張非弱點詭計卡時打出。
取消該卡牌的顯現效果。放逐意志考驗。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when an investigator at your location draws a non-weakness treachery card.
Cancel that card's revelation effect. Exile A Test of Will.
all_cards.flavor: 無論是否看得到希望，你所能做的只有抵抗。

all_cards.name: 英勇救援
all_cards.text: 快速。在一個非[[精英]]敵人將要攻擊你所在地點的另一位調查員時打出。改為與該敵人交戰並結算它對你的攻擊。然後，對其造成1點傷害。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when a non-[[Elite]] enemy would attack another investigator at your location.
Engage that enemy and resolve its attack against you instead. Then, deal it 1 damage.

all_cards.name: 戰鬥訓練
all_cards.text:
快速。場上限制1張[[沉穩]]。
非直接恐懼必須分配給戰鬥訓練後才能分配給你的調查員卡。
[free]花費1資源：這次技能檢定中你+1[combat]。
[free]花費1資源：這次技能檢定中你+1[agility]。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Limit 1 [[Composure]] in play.
Non-direct horror must be assigned to Combat Training before it can be assigned to your investigator card.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [combat] for this skill test.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [agility] for this skill test.

all_cards.name: 解剖圖表
all_cards.text:
快速。在任意調查員的回合中打出。你剩餘神智值為5點或以上時才可打出。
選擇你所在地點中一個非[[精英]]敵人。在當前調查員回合結束前，該敵人-2攻擊並-2躲避。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play during any investigator's turn. Play only if you have 5 or more remaining sanity.
Choose a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location. Until the end of the active investigator's turn, that enemy gets -2 fight and -2 evade.
all_cards.flavor: 它們再怎樣也只是動物。但那只是我們的想法。

all_cards.name: 科學理論
all_cards.text:
快速。場上限制1張[[沉穩]]。
非直接恐懼必須分配給科學理論後才能分配給你的調查員卡。
[free]花費1資源：這次技能檢定中你+1[intellect]。
[free]花費1資源：這次技能檢定中你+1[combat]。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Limit 1 [[Composure]] in play.
Non-direct horror must be assigned to Scientific Theory before it can be assigned to your investigator card.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [intellect] for this skill test.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [combat] for this skill test.

all_cards.name: 指節銅環
all_cards.text: [action]：攻擊。這次攻擊造成+1傷害。這次攻擊中被攻擊的敵人獲得反擊。
all_cards.real_text: [action]: Fight. This attack deals +1 damage. The attacked enemy gains retaliate for this attack.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 近戰. 違法
all_cards.flavor: 近距離貼身肉搏：娜奧米的最愛。

all_cards.name: 剛毅果敢
all_cards.text:
快速。場上限制1張[[沉穩]]。
非直接恐懼必須分配給剛毅果敢後才能分配給你的調查員卡。
[free]花費1資源：這次技能檢定中你+1[willpower]。
[free]花費1資源：這次技能檢定中你+1[agility]。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Limit 1 [[Composure]] in play.
Non-direct horror must be assigned to Moxie before it can be assigned to your investigator card.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [willpower] for this skill test.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [agility] for this skill test.

all_cards.name: 大衛·倫費爾德
all_cards.text:
只要大衛·倫費爾德身上有至少1個毀滅標記，你獲得+1[willpower]。
[fast]消耗大衛·倫費爾德：你可以在大衛·倫費爾德身上放置1個毀滅標記。大衛·倫費爾德身上每有一個毀滅標記，獲得1資源。
all_cards.real_text:
While David Renfield has at least 1 doom on him, you get +1 [willpower].
[fast] Exhaust David Renfield: You may place 1 doom on David Renfield. Gain 1 resource for each doom on David Renfield.

all_cards.name: 情緒穩定
all_cards.text:
快速。場上限制1張[[沉穩]]。
非直接恐懼必須分配給情緒穩定後才能分配給你的調查員卡。
[free]進行[[法術]]卡上的技能檢定時，花費1資源：這次技能檢定中你+1技能值。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Limit 1 [[Composure]] in play.
Non-direct horror must be assigned to Grounded before it can be assigned to your investigator card.
[fast] During a skill test on a [[Spell]] card, spend 1 resource: You get +1 skill value for this test.

all_cards.name: 珍愛紀念
all_cards.flavor: 帕特森先生一直告訴溫蒂一切都會好起來的。但帕特森先生終究只是一隻泰迪熊，它什麼都不懂。

all_cards.name: 臨危禱告
all_cards.text:
每次技能檢定最多投入1張。
你剩餘神智值為3點或更少時才可投入技能檢定。
all_cards.real_text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
Commit to a skill test only if you have 3 or fewer remaining sanity.

all_cards.name: 冥思苦想
all_cards.text:
每次技能檢定最多投入1張。
你剩餘神智值為3點或更少時才可投入技能檢定。
all_cards.real_text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
Commit to a skill test only if you have 3 or fewer remaining sanity.

all_cards.name: 拚死出擊
all_cards.text:
每次技能檢定最多投入1張。
你剩餘神智值為3點或更少時才可投入技能檢定。
all_cards.real_text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
Commit to a skill test only if you have 3 or fewer remaining sanity.

all_cards.name: 靈力風暴
all_cards.text: 攻擊。這次攻擊不使用[combat]，改為使用[willpower]。如果你成功，這次攻擊不造成基礎傷害，而是對被攻擊敵人所在地點的每名敵人造成2點傷害(所有額外傷害只對受到攻擊的敵人造成)。(FAQ, v2.0)如果這次攻擊中抽出[skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]、[elder_thing]或[auto_fail]標記，對所在地點每位調查員造成1點傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Fight. This attack uses [willpower] instead of [combat]. If you succeed, instead of its standard damage, this attack deals 2 damage to each enemy at the attacked enemy's location (any additional damage is dealt to the attacked enemy). If a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] token is revealed during this attack, deal 1 damage to each investigator at the attacked enemy's location.

all_cards.name: Jenny Barnes
all_cards.text:
You collect 1 additional resource during each upkeep phase.
[elder_sign] effect: +1 for each resource you have.
all_cards.real_text:
You collect 1 additional resource during each upkeep phase.
[elder_sign] effect: +1 for each resource you have.

deck_options.error: You cannot have more than 5 cards that are not Rogue or Neutral

all_cards.flavor: "No more 'Miss Barnes' from you. My friends call me Jenny."
all_cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Rogue cards ([rogue]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5, up to five other level 0 cards from any other class. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Jenny's Twin .45s, Searching for Izzie, 1 random basic weakness.
all_cards.back_flavor: Jenny Barnes has spent the majority of her young life in pursuit of creature comforts, fine dining, and the latest fashions. That all changed when she received a letter from her sister, Isabelle. In this letter, Isabelle confessed that mysterious forces were aligning against her and that she feared she may fall victim to some paranormal threat. It was the last letter Jenny received from her beloved sister. Jenny has since returned to the States to track down and investigate all occult occurrences she can find. Hardly a wilting flower, she has proven herself a crack shot as well as a fearless and clever investigator of the unknown. Until Isabelle's disappearance is explained, Jenny will never relent in her search.

all_cards.name: Green Man Medallion
all_cards.text:
Jenny Barnes deck only. Replacement.
[free] Spend up to 3 resources and exhaust Green Man Medallion: Place those resources on it, as offerings.
[reaction] When you resign or the game ends: For every 6 offerings on Green Man Medallion, reduce the experience cost of the next card you purchase before the next scenario by 1.
all_cards.real_text:
Jenny Barnes deck only. Replacement.
[fast] Spend up to 3 resources and exhaust Green Man Medallion: Place those resources on it, as offerings.
[reaction] When you resign or the game ends: For every 6 offerings on Green Man Medallion, reduce the experience cost of the next card you purchase before the next scenario by 1.

all_cards.name: Sacrificial Beast
all_cards.text: Jenny Barnes deck only. Replacement. Spawn - Location farthest from you. Jenny Barnes cannot gain resources via card effects.
all_cards.real_text: Jenny Barnes deck only. Replacement. Spawn - Location farthest from you. Jenny Barnes cannot gain resources via card effects.
all_cards.flavor: Thick limbs like wet branches yearned skyward, high above the platform. They swayed, whether in agony or exaltation Jenny could not tell. - Dave Gross, Hour of the Huntress

all_cards.name: 奧術洞察
all_cards.text:
使用(3充能)。
[free]一位調查員進行自己回合時，花費1充能：本回合結束前你所在地點-2隱藏值。(每回合限制1次。)
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (3 charges).
[fast] While an investigator is taking his or her turn, spend 1 charge: Your location gets -2 shroud until the end of this turn. (Limit once per turn.)

all_cards.name: 建議
all_cards.text: 使用(3充能)。 [action]消耗建議：躲避。本次躲避嘗試將你的[willpower]數值加入你的技能值。如果你沒有成功並超過難度至少2點，移除建議上的1充能。 [reaction]在一個非[[精英]]敵人將要攻擊你時，花費1充能：取消該次攻擊。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (3 charges). [action] Exhaust Suggestion: Evade. Add your [willpower] value to your skill value for this evasion attempt. If you do not succeed by at least 2, remove 1 charge from Suggestion. [reaction] When a non-[[Elite]] enemy would attack you, spend 1 charge: Cancel that attack.

all_cards.name: 新晉術士
all_cards.text: 強制 - 在新晉術士入場後：在該卡牌上放置1個毀滅標記或2點恐懼。 [free]消耗新晉術士：在你牌堆頂部3張卡牌中查找並抽取1張[[法術]]卡。混洗你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text: Forced - After Arcane Initiate enters play: Place 1 doom or 2 horror on it. [fast] Exhaust Arcane Initiate: Search the top 3 cards of your deck for a [[Spell]] card and draw it. Shuffle your deck.

all_cards.name: "放馬過來！"
all_cards.text:
你與敵人交戰時才可投入技能檢定。
你每與一個敵人交戰，"放馬過來！"獲得[willpower][combat][agility]。
all_cards.real_text:
Commit to a skill test only if you are engaged with an enemy.
For each enemy engaged with you, "Not without a fight!" gains [willpower] [combat] [agility].

all_cards.name: 先身士卒
all_cards.text: 如果本次技能檢定成功，準備你所在地點的一張[[盟友]]支援卡並為其治癒1點傷害或1點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text: If this skill test is successful, ready an [[Ally]] asset at your location and heal 1 damage or 1 horror from it.
all_cards.flavor: "安德森對手下確實狠。他平時把蘭姆酒都鎖起來，還經常天一亮就把我們叫起來。但現在，在這種不毛之地，我就希望他能打頭陣。"

all_cards.name: 應急物品
all_cards.text: 獲得4資源，或者將4補給標記分配給你所在地點的調查員控制的支援卡，或者以任意形式組合，分配的補給標記總數為4。
all_cards.real_text: Gain 4 resources or place 4 supply tokens among assets controlled by investigators at your location, or any combination thereof.
all_cards.flavor: 俗話說多多益善。

all_cards.name: 雙刃短刀
all_cards.text: 你執行交戰行動時不會引起趁亂攻擊。 [action]：攻擊。這次攻擊中你+X[combat]。其中X為與你交戰的敵人數量。
all_cards.real_text: Engage actions you perform do not provoke attacks of opportunity. [action]: Fight. You get +X [combat] for this attack. X is the number of enemies engaged with you.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 近戰
all_cards.flavor: 它經歷的暴力事件比大部分人一輩子見過的都要多。

all_cards.name: 埋伏
all_cards.text: 疊加到你所在地點。 如果被疊加的地點沒有調查員，丟棄埋伏。 強制 - 有敵人生成在被疊加的地點後：對該敵人造成2點傷害並丟棄埋伏。
all_cards.real_text: Attach to your location. If there are no investigators at attached location, discard Ambush. Forced - After an enemy spawns at attached location: Deal 2 damage to that enemy and discard Ambush.

all_cards.name: 偷襲
all_cards.text: 對你所在地點的一個未與你交戰的敵人造成2點傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Deal 2 damage to an enemy not engaged with you at your location.

all_cards.name: 影之書
all_cards.text: [action]消耗影之書並花費1資源：你控制的一張[[法術]]支援卡增加1充能。
all_cards.real_text: [action] Exhaust Book of Shadows and spend 1 resource: Add 1 charge to a [[Spell]] asset you control.

all_cards.name: 戰鬥或逃跑
all_cards.text:
快速。只能在你回合中打出。
直到本輪結束，你獲得+X[combat]和+X[agility]，其中X等於你身上的恐懼數量。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play only during your turn.
Until the end of the round, you get +X [combat] and +X [agility], where X is the amount of horror on you.

all_cards.name: 吉人天相
all_cards.text:
快速。在你受到傷害和/或恐懼時打出。
取消最多10點你剛才受到的傷害和/或恐懼。放逐吉人天相。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when you are dealt damage and/or horror.
Cancel up to 10 damage and/or horror just dealt to you. Exile Devil's Luck.
all_cards.flavor: "那可是我最喜歡的帽子！"

all_cards.name: 施恩求報
all_cards.text: 選擇一張你控制的[[盟友]]支援卡並將其返回你的手牌。然後，在你牌堆頂部9張卡牌中查找並打出一張[[盟友]]支援卡，其費用降低X點，其中X為返回你手牌的[[盟友]]支援卡的費用。混洗你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text: Choose an [[Ally]] asset you control and return it to your hand. Then, search the top 9 cards of your deck for an [[Ally]] asset and play it, reducing its cost by X. X is the cost of the [[Ally]] asset returned to your hand. Shuffle your deck.
all_cards.flavor: "接線員，你先不要掛，等我一下。"

all_cards.name: 羅蘭·班克斯
all_cards.text:
[reaction]在你擊敗一名敵人後：發現所在地點的一個線索。(每輪限制1次)
[elder_sign]效果：你所在地點每個線索，+1。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] After you defeat an enemy: Discover 1 clue at your location. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1 for each clue on your location.
all_cards.flavor: 所有的書在我眼中跟兒歌無異。它們過去可能有用，但現在，需要一種全新的解釋了。
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：守衛者([guardian])等級0-5，探求者([seeker])等級0-2，中立卡牌等級0-5。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：羅蘭的.38特製手槍、掩蓋罪證、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 羅蘭總能在規則和命令中找到一種安全感。作為聯邦探員之一，他在遇上任何狀況的時候總能找到應對的辦法。但對於近來他碰到的事件來說，他的聯邦探員手冊完全沒幫上忙，尤其是在面對那些奇怪生物、時空之門、魔法咒文之時。如果不是親眼所見，他永遠不會相信這些奇聞……他確信，自己的上司只會把這些事情當做是都市怪談。這次，他要完全靠自己來行動了。

all_cards.name: Mysteries Remain
all_cards.text: Roland Banks deck only. Replacement. Fast. Play only during your turn. Either place 1 clue (fron the token bank) on your location, or discover 1 clue at your location. Remove Mysteries Remain from the game.
all_cards.real_text: Roland Banks deck only. Replacement. Fast. Play only during your turn. Either place 1 clue (from the token bank) on your location, or discover 1 clue at your location. Remove Mysteries Remain from the game.

all_cards.name: The Dirge of Reason
all_cards.text: Roland Banks deck only. Replacement. Revelation - Place 2 of your clues on your location. If you cannot, place all of your clues on your location, take 1 horror, and shuffle The Dirge of Reason back into your deck.
all_cards.real_text: Roland Banks deck only. Replacement. Revelation - Place 2 of your clues on your location. If you cannot, place all of your clues on your location, take 1 horror, and shuffle The Dirge of Reason back into your deck.
all_cards.flavor: ...was the music a part of the dream, or the dream a part of the music? - Graeme Davis, The Dirge of Reason

all_cards.name: Norman Withers
all_cards.text: Play with the top card of your deck revealed. Once per round, you may play the top card of your deck as if it were in your hand, at -1 resource cost. Forced - After a weakness is revealed while on top of your deck: Draw it. [elder_sign] effect: +X. You may swap the top card of your deck with a card in your hand. X is the resource cost of the top card of your deck.
all_cards.real_text: Play with the top card of your deck revealed. Once per round, you may play the top card of your deck as if it were in your hand, at -1 resource cost. Forced - After a weakness is revealed while on top of your deck: Draw it. [elder_sign] effect: +X. You may swap the top card of your deck with a card in your hand. X is the resource cost of the top card of your deck.

deck_options.error: You cannot have more than 5 level 0 Mystic cards

all_cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Seeker cards ([seeker]) level 0, Mystic cards ([mystic]) level 1-5, Neutral cards level 0-5, up to 5 other Mystic cards ([mystic]) level 0. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Livre d'Eibon, The Harbinger, 1 random basic weakness.
all_cards.back_flavor: Nobody believes him, and why should they? How could six stars vanish from sight all at once, never to reappear? Astronomer and Miskatonic University professor Norman Withers had all but given up on regaining his colleagues' esteem when a protege of the renowned Albert Einstein comes to speak on campus. The visiting physicist, with unsettling theories about the curvature of space-time, may hold the key to helping Norman explain the phenomenon of the vanishing stars...

all_cards.name: Split the Angle
all_cards.text:
Norman Withers deck only. Replacement.
[action]: Reveal the top card of the encounter deck.
[free] Exhaust Split the Angle and discard the top card of your deck: Discard the top card of the encounter deck.
all_cards.real_text:
Norman Withers deck only. Replacement.
[action]: Reveal the top card of the encounter deck.
[fast] Exhaust Split the Angle and discard the top card of your deck: Discard the top card of the encounter deck.
all_cards.flavor: ...another spell, likewise rendered phonetically, for "splitting the angle" and walking through time in the flesh.

all_cards.name: Vengeful Hound
all_cards.text: Norman Withers deck only. Replacement. Prey - Norman Withers. While Vengeful Hounds is engaged with you, you cannot draw or reveal cards via player card effects.
all_cards.real_text: Norman Withers deck only. Replacement. Prey - Norman Withers. While Vengeful Hounds is engaged with you, you cannot draw or reveal cards via player card effects.
all_cards.flavor: "On those rare occasions when a man escapes the Hounds, he doesn't always stay escaped. Sooner or later, they're apt to come after him." - Richard Lee Byers, Ire of the Void

all_cards.name: "同歸於盡！"
all_cards.text: 擊敗與你交戰的每個非[[精英]]敵人。你被擊敗並承受1點肉體創傷。本行動不會引起趁亂攻擊。
all_cards.real_text: Each non-[[Elite]] enemy engaged with you is defeated. You are defeated and suffer 1 physical trauma. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
all_cards.flavor: 他點燃了打火機，內心平靜了下來。

all_cards.name: 邏輯推理
all_cards.text:
你至少擁有1個線索時才可打出。
選擇你所在地點的一位調查員。該調查員治癒2點恐懼或丟棄其威脅區域中的1張[[恐怖]]卡。
all_cards.real_text:
Play only if you have at least 1 clue.
Choose an investigator at your location. That investigator either heals 2 horror or discards a [[Terror]] card from his or her threat area.
all_cards.flavor:
"我是活著的最智慧的人，因為我知道一件事，那就是我知道我一無所知。"
<cite>《理想國》，柏拉圖著</cite>

all_cards.name: 古代雕文
all_cards.text: 研究。(FAQ, v2.0) 使用(3充能)。 [action]花費1充能：調查。你每超出難度2點，發現你所在地點的額外1個線索。
all_cards.real_text: Researched. Uses (3 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Investigate. For every 2 points you succeed by, discover 1 additional clue at your location.

all_cards.name: 古代雕文
all_cards.text: 研究。(FAQ, v2.0) 使用(3充能)。 [action]花費1充能：調查。如果你成功，你可以自動躲避一個與你交戰的敵人。本行動不會引起趁亂攻擊。
all_cards.real_text: Researched. Uses (3 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Investigate. If you succeed, you may automatically evade an engaged enemy. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

all_cards.name: 暗中偷襲
all_cards.text: 攻擊。本次攻擊中將你的[agility]數值加入你的技能值。如果你成功且超過難度2點或以上，自動躲避本次攻擊的敵人。
all_cards.real_text: Fight. Add your [agility] value to your skill value for this attack. If you succeed by 2 or more, automatically evade the attacked enemy.
all_cards.flavor: "瞄準眼睛。"他們這麼告訴我的。

all_cards.name: 量子通量
all_cards.text: 將你的棄牌堆洗入你的牌堆並抽取1張卡牌。從遊戲中移除量子通量。
all_cards.real_text: Shuffle your discard pile into your deck and draw 1 card. Remove Quantum Flux from the game.

all_cards.name: 重新充能
all_cards.text: 選擇你所在地點的一位調查員控制的1張[[法術]]或[[遺物]]支援卡，並從混亂袋中隨機抽取1個混亂標記。如果抽出[skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]、[elder_thing]或[auto_fail]標記，丟棄選擇的支援卡。否則，為選擇的支援卡增加3充能。
all_cards.real_text: Choose a [[Spell]] or [[Relic]] asset controlled by an investigator at your location and reveal a random chaos token from the chaos bag. If you reveal a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol, discard the chosen asset. Otherwise, add 3 charges to the chosen asset.

all_cards.name: 拉布蘭奇夫人
all_cards.text:
[free]如果你手牌中沒有卡牌，消耗拉布蘭奇夫人：抽取1張卡牌。
[free]如果你沒有資源，消耗拉布蘭奇夫人：獲得1資源。
all_cards.real_text:
[fast] If you have no cards in your hand, exhaust Madame Labranche: Draw 1 card.
[fast] If you have no resources, exhaust Madame Labranche: Gain 1 resource.

all_cards.name: 誘捕陷阱
all_cards.text: 疊加到你所在地點。每個地點限制1張。 強制 - 在1名非[[精英]]敵人進入被疊加地點後：消耗該敵人，解除它與所有調查員的交戰狀態，並對其疊加誘捕陷阱。 強制 - 在被疊加的敵人將要準備時：改為丟棄誘捕陷阱。
all_cards.real_text: Attach to your location. Limit 1 per location. Forced - After a non-[[Elite]] enemy enters attached location: Exhaust that enemy, disengage it from all investigators, and attach Snare Trap to it. Forced - When attached enemy would ready: Instead, discard Snare Trap.

all_cards.name: "吃槍子吧！"
all_cards.text: 快速。在你啟動[[槍械]]支援卡上的攻擊能力時打出。 你可以花費該支援卡上的額外X子彈。本次攻擊中，在你抽取混亂標記時，抽取額外X個混亂標記。選擇其中一個結算並忽略其餘標記。
all_cards.real_text: Fast. Play when you activate the Fight ability on a [[Firearm]] asset. You may spend X additional ammo tokens from that asset. When you reveal chaos tokens for this attack, reveal X additional chaos tokens. Choose one to resolve and ignore the rest.

all_cards.name: 殫精竭慮
all_cards.text:
快速。在任何[free]玩家時間段中打出。
選擇你所在地點的一位調查員。該調查員在其牌堆中查找並抽取1張卡牌，並且混洗自己的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play during any [fast] player window.
Choose an investigator at your location. That investigator searches his or her deck for a card, draws it, and shuffles his or her deck.

all_cards.name: 死裡逃生
all_cards.text: 快速。在你將要被擊敗時打出。你解除交戰狀態，丟棄你威脅區域中所有卡牌，治癒2點恐懼和2點傷害，並移動到任意一個沒有敵人的已揭示地點。如果這是你的回合，結束你的回合。從遊戲中移除死裡逃生。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when you would be defeated.
Disengage from each enemy engaged with you, discard all cards in your threat area, heal 2 horror and 2 damage, and move to any revealed location with no enemies. If it is your turn, end your turn. Remove Cheat Death from the game.

all_cards.name: 單打獨鬥
all_cards.text:
只可作為你的第一個行動打出。
對與你交戰的一個敵人造成1點傷害。此行動不會引起趁亂攻擊。
all_cards.real_text:
Play only as your first action.
Deal 1 damage to an enemy engaged with you. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

all_cards.name: 急救
all_cards.text:
使用(4補給)。如果急救沒有補給，將其丟棄。
[action]花費1補給：治癒你所在地點一位調查員或一張[[盟友]]支援卡的1點傷害和1點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (4 supplies). If First Aid has no supplies, discard it.
[action] Spend 1 supply: Heal 1 damage and 1 horror from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset in your location.

all_cards.name: 重大發現
all_cards.text: 如果本次技能檢定成功，執行本次檢定的調查員查找其牌堆頂的3張卡牌，抽取其中1張並混洗其牌堆。
all_cards.real_text: If this skill test is successful, the investigator performing this test searches the top 3 cards of his or her deck for a card, draws it, and shuffles his or her deck.

all_cards.name: 捷徑
all_cards.text: 快速。只能在你回合中打出。 疊加到你所在地點。被疊加的地點獲得："[free]消耗捷徑：移動(到一個連接地點)，位於該地點的所有調查員均可觸發此能力。"(FAQ, v1.4)
all_cards.real_text: Fast. Play only during your turn. Attach to your location. Attached location gains: "[fast] Exhaust Shortcut: Move (to a connecting location). Any investigator at this location may trigger this ability."
all_cards.flavor: 你對這小鎮瞭如指掌。

all_cards.name: "吃我一招！"
all_cards.text:
只能投入你正在進行的技能檢定。將"吃我一招！"投入技能檢定時，花費最多3資源作為額外費用。
如果你成功且超過難度至少1點，獲得同等花費數量的兩倍的資源。
all_cards.real_text:
Commit only to a skill test you are performing. As an additional cost to commit "Watch this!" to a skill test, spend up to 3 resources.
If you succeed by 1 or more, gain twice that many resources.
all_cards.flavor: 赤裸裸的炫耀。

all_cards.name: .41短口手槍
all_cards.text: 使用(3子彈)。 [action]花費1子彈：攻擊。這次攻擊中你+2[combat]。如果你成功且超過難度至少1點，這次攻擊造成+1傷害。每回合一次，如果你成功並超過難度3點或以上，你本回合可以進行額外一次行動。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (3 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. If you succeed by 1 or more, this attack deals +1 damage. Once per turn, if you succeed by 3 or more, you may take an additional action this turn.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 槍械. 違法

all_cards.name: 力量洪流
all_cards.text:
將力量洪流投入技能檢定時，從你控制的支援卡上花費最多3充能作為額外費用。
每以此方式花費1點充能，力量洪流獲得[willpower][wild]。
all_cards.real_text:
As an additional cost to commit Torrent of Power to a skill test, spend up to 3 charges from among assets you control.
For each charge spent in this way, Torrent of Power gains [willpower] [wild].

all_cards.name: 探知術
all_cards.text:
使用(3充能)。
[free]消耗探知術並花費1充能：查看任意一位調查員牌堆或遭遇牌堆頂部的3張卡牌。將它們按任意順序放回其牌堆頂。如果查看的卡牌中有[[恐怖]]或[[徵兆]]，受到1點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (3 charges).
[fast] Exhaust Scrying and spend 1 charge: Look at the top 3 cards of any investigator's deck, or the encounter deck. Return them to the top of that deck, in any order. If a [[Terror]] or [[Omen]] card is among the looked-at cards, take 1 horror.

all_cards.name: 中途伏擊
all_cards.text: 選擇你所在地點一個消耗的非[[精英]]敵人並檢定[agility](X)，其中X為該敵人的躲避值。如果你成功，擊敗該敵人。
all_cards.real_text: Choose an exhausted non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location and test [agility] (X), where X is that enemy's evade value. If you succeed, defeat that enemy.
all_cards.flavor: "結……結束了嗎？"她跪倒在地，雙手顫抖不止，"終於結束了嗎？"

all_cards.name: 不期而遇
all_cards.text: 選擇任意玩家棄牌堆中的一張打印資源費用為X的[[盟友]]支援。將該支援放置入場，置於你的控制之下。
all_cards.real_text: Choose an [[Ally]] asset with printed resource cost X in any player's discard pile. Put that asset into play under your control.

all_cards.name: 杰克·威廉斯
all_cards.text:
厄休拉·唐斯牌組專用。
你每個回合執行的第一個移動或調查行動不會引起趁亂攻擊。
[reaction]在你翻開一張地點卡或放置一張新的地點卡入場後，消耗傑克·威廉斯：抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Ursula Downs deck only.
The first move or investigate action you perform each turn does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
[reaction] After you reveal a location or put a new location into play, exhaust Jake Williams: Draw 1 card.

all_cards.name: 未知的呼喚
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 將未知的呼喚放置到你的威脅區域。 強制 - 當你回合開始時：選擇你所在地點以外的一個地點。在你回合結束時，如果本回合你沒能成功調查所選地點，受到2點恐懼並將未知的呼喚洗回你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Put Call of the Unknown into play in your threat area. Forced - At the beginning of your turn: Choose a location other than your location. When your turn ends, if you did not successfully investigate the chosen location this turn, take 2 horror and shuffle Call of the Unknown back into your deck.

all_cards.name: 追獵行動
all_cards.text: 快速。在神話階段你將要抽取一張遭遇卡時打出。 改為在遭遇牌堆頂上的9張卡牌中查找一個敵人，生成該敵人並與它交戰(代替原有的生成地點)，並混洗遭遇牌堆。如果你不能這麼做，抽取遭遇牌堆頂上的1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text: Fast. Play when you would draw an encounter card during the mythos phase. Instead, search the top 9 cards of the encounter deck for an enemy, spawn it engaged with you (instead of its normal spawn location), and shuffle the encounter deck. If you cannot, draw the top card of the encounter deck.

all_cards.name: 原定計劃
all_cards.text: 永久。卓越。 [reaction]在你抽取起始手牌前：在你的牌堆中查找最多3張不同的[[策略]]和/或[[供給]]事件卡，將其面朝下疊加到原定計劃。(FAQ, v2.0)混洗你的牌堆。 疊加到原定計劃的卡牌可以視為你的手牌打出。消耗原定計劃作為打出疊加卡牌的額外費用。
all_cards.real_text:
Permanent. Exceptional.
[reaction] Before you draw your opening hand: Search your deck for up to 3 different [[Tactic]] and/or [[Supply]] events, and attach them facedown to Stick to the Plan. Shuffle your deck.
Cards attached to Stick to the Plan may be played as if they were in your hand. As an additional cost to play an attached card, exhaust Stick to the Plan.

all_cards.name: 指導
all_cards.text: 選擇你所在地點的另一位本輪尚未進行其回合的調查員。該調查員可以在本輪自己回合中進行額外一次行動。
all_cards.real_text: Choose another investigator at your location who has yet to take his or her turn this round. That investigator may take an additional action during his or her turn this round.

all_cards.name: 僥倖逃脫
all_cards.text:
快速。在敵人對你進行趁亂攻擊時打出。
取消該次攻擊。本回合中你下一次技能檢定+2技能值。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when an enemy makes an attack of opportunity against you.
Cancel that attack. You get +2 skill value for the next skill test you perform this turn.
all_cards.flavor: "下次讓我來開車！"

all_cards.name: 聖胡伯的鑰匙
all_cards.text:
你獲得+1[willpower]，+1[intellect]，並-2神智值。
[reaction]在你將要因為恐懼被擊敗時，丟棄聖胡伯的鑰匙：立即治癒2點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text:
You get +1 [willpower], +1 [intellect], and -2 sanity.
[reaction] When you would be defeated by horror, discard St. Hubert's Key: Immediately heal 2 horror.

all_cards.name: 守護結界
all_cards.text:
快速。在任意地點的調查員抽出一張非弱點詭計卡時打出。
取消該卡牌的顯現效果。然後，受到1點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when an investigator at any location draws a non-weakness treachery card.
Cancel that card's revelation effect. Then, take 1 horror.

all_cards.name: 求生高手
all_cards.text: 將你棄牌堆中的3張[[天性]]技能卡返回你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text: Return 3 [[Innate]] skills from your discard pile to your hand.

all_cards.name: 時間曲折
all_cards.text: 快速。你所在地點的一位調查員在其回合結算完畢一次行動之後，你立即打出本卡。撤銷該行動(遊戲返回到該行動執行之前的狀態，但仍然視作你打出了時間曲折，且本卡牌打出的費用不會返還)。(FAQ, v1.4)
all_cards.real_text: Fast. Play immediately after an investigator at your location finishes resolving an action during his or her turn. Undo that action (return the game state to exactly the way it was before that action was performed, except for the playing of Time Warp and its costs).

all_cards.name: 老練分析
all_cards.text: 永久。每副牌組限制1張。 每當你升級帶有(未鑒定)或(未翻譯)副標題的卡牌時，你可以多升級1張該卡牌，而不用花費經驗值。如果你這麼做，從可用選項中隨機選擇該卡牌的2張升級版本。(你仍須滿足牌組構建的所有要求。)
all_cards.real_text: Permanent. Limit 1 per deck. Anytime you upgrade a card with the (Unidentified) or (Untranslated) subtitle, you may upgrade a second copy of that card at no experience cost. If you do, the two upgraded versions are chosen at random from among the eligible options. (You must still meet all deckbuilding restrictions.)

all_cards.name: 奧術研究
all_cards.text:
永久。
在你購買奧術研究時，受到1點精神創傷。
在一個劇本的每場冒險結束後，在下一場冒險之前，你升級的第一張[[法術]]卡牌經驗值費用減少1點。
all_cards.real_text:
Permanent.
When you purchase Arcane Research, suffer 1 mental trauma.
After each scenario of a campaign, reduce the experience cost of the first [[Spell]] card you upgrade before the next scenario by 1.

all_cards.name: 阿登護甲
all_cards.text: [reaction]在分配傷害給阿登護甲時，消耗阿登護甲：取消該次傷害中的1點。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] When damage is assigned to Armor of Ardennes, exhaust Armor of Ardennes: Cancel 1 of that damage.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 護甲. 遺物

all_cards.name: 遺覺記憶
all_cards.text: 將遺覺記憶作為任意一個調查員棄牌堆中一張[[洞察]]事件卡打出(包括其資源費用)。從遊戲中移除該事件卡。不要丟棄遺覺記憶，改為將其從遊戲中移除。
all_cards.real_text: Play Eidetic Memory as an exact copy of an [[Insight]] event in any investigator's discard pile (including its resource cost). Remove that event from the game. Remove Eidetic Memory from the game instead of discarding it.

all_cards.name: 卡戎的銀幣
all_cards.text: 永久。卓越。 在冒險結局中獲得經驗時，如果你該次冒險中沒有被擊敗，你獲得額外2點經驗。如果你該次冒險中被擊敗，你陣亡。
all_cards.real_text: Permanent. Exceptional. When earning experience during the resolution of a scenario, if you were not defeated during that scenario, you earn 2 additional experience. If you were defeated during that scenario, you are killed.

all_cards.name: 短管獵槍
all_cards.text: 使用(2子彈)。 打出短管獵槍不會引起趁亂攻擊。 [action]花費1子彈：攻擊。這次攻擊中你+1[combat]並造成+1傷害。如果短管獵槍本回合中入場，這次攻擊中你額外+1[combat]並造成額外+1傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (2 ammo). Playing Lupara does not provoke attacks of opportunity. [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +1 [combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack. If Lupara entered play this turn, you get an additional +1 [combat] and deal an additional +1 damage for this attack.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 槍械. 違法

all_cards.name: 遠古印記封印
all_cards.text:
本次檢定中不要從混亂袋中抽取混亂標記。本次檢定抽出的混亂標記視為[elder_sign]。
在本次檢定結束時，從遊戲中移除遠古印記封印。
all_cards.real_text:
Do not reveal chaos tokens from the chaos bag for this test. Treat the chaos token revealed for this test as an [elder_sign].
When this test ends, remove Seal of the Elder Sign from the game.

all_cards.name: 報紙
all_cards.text:
只要你沒有線索，調查時你獲得+2[intellect]。
[reaction]在你將要發現你所在地點的1個或以上線索時，如果你沒有線索：發現你所在地點的額外1個線索。
all_cards.real_text:
You get +2 [intellect] while investigating if you have no clues.
[reaction] When you would discover 1 or more clues at your location, if you have no clues: Discover an additional clue at your location.
all_cards.flavor: 新聞頭條裡絲毫沒有提到你目擊的恐怖事件。但訃告欄裡的名字卻多得讓人心中發怵。

all_cards.name: 內訌
all_cards.text: 快速。敵軍階段開始時打出。取消本階段所有非[[精英]]敵人對你的攻擊。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play after the enemy phase begins.
Cancel all attacks made by non-[[Elite]] enemies against you this phase.

all_cards.name: 伊蘇之匙
all_cards.subname: 讓暴風雨來得更猛烈些吧
all_cards.text: 伊蘇之匙上每有1點恐懼你每項技能+1。 強制 - 在任意數量的恐懼將要放置到你身上時：將其中1點恐懼放置到伊蘇之匙上。 強制 - 在伊蘇之匙離場時：丟棄你牌堆頂的10張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text: You get +1 to each of your skills for each horror on Key of Ys. Forced - When any amount of horror would be placed on you: Place 1 of that horror on Key of Ys. Forced - When Key of Ys leaves play: Discard the top 10 cards of your deck.

all_cards.name: 佔據先機
all_cards.text:
只能在你執行的技能檢定中投入。
任何調查員在本階段每完成1個行動，佔據先機失去[wild]。
all_cards.real_text:
Commit only to a skill test you are performing.
Take the Initiative loses [wild] for each action that has been completed by any investigator this phase.

all_cards.name: 一目十行
all_cards.text: [free]將你的1個線索放在所在地點上，並消耗一目十行：這次技能檢定你的技能值+3。
all_cards.real_text: [fast] Place 1 of your clues on your location and exhaust Quick Study: You get +3 skill value for this skill test.

all_cards.name: 追憶未來
all_cards.text: [reaction]在你正在執行的技能檢定開始時，如果追憶未來為準備狀態，聲明一個混亂標記：如果這次技能檢定中抽出了聲明的混亂標記，消耗追憶未來。然後，這次技能檢定你的技能值+2。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] When a skill test you are performing begins, if Recall the Future is ready, name a chaos token: If the named chaos token is revealed during this skill test, exhaust Recall the Future. Then, you get +2 skill value for this skill test.

all_cards.name: 加爾文·懷特
all_cards.text:
每有1點恐懼在你身上，你獲得+1[willpower]和+1[intellect]。
每有1點傷害在你身上，你獲得+1[combat]和+1[agility]。
[elder_sign]效果：+0。你可以治癒1點傷害或恐懼，或受到1點直接傷害或直接恐懼。
all_cards.real_text:
You get +1 [willpower] and +1 [intellect] for each horror on you.
You get +1 [combat] and +1 [agility] for each damage on you.
[elder_sign] effect: +0. You may either heal 1 damage or horror, or take 1 direct damage or direct horror.
all_cards.flavor: "你要是傷了他，我就殺了你。"
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：求生者([survivor])等級0-5，[[勇氣]]卡牌等級0-3，中立卡牌等級0-5。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：時間盡頭、信使之聲、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 有的時候，生活會讓你作選擇：接受被安排的命運，或者為自我和信仰而堅持。加爾文選擇後者。當他倒在泥路邊上，血流不止，瀕臨死亡時，他看見了幻象——地球變得四分五裂，令人膽顫，而他的畢生摯愛——喬亞在熊熊烈火的漩渦中化為灰燼。隨後，加爾文作了另一個決定。他伸手觸及黑暗，將其引入自己體內。他不會死，至少今天不會。世界需要他，喬亞也是。

all_cards.name: 時間盡頭
all_cards.text:
加爾文·懷特牌組專用。
可將直接傷害或直接恐懼分配到時間盡頭上。
all_cards.real_text:
Calvin Wright deck only.
Direct damage and direct horror may be assigned to Until the End of Time.
all_cards.flavor:
他堅決反抗自己的命運，
不屈不撓，永不妥協。

all_cards.name: 信使之聲
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 你必須作出決定(選擇以下一項): - 受到1點直接傷害，受到1點肉體創傷。 - 受到1點直接恐懼，受到1點精神創傷。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - You must either (choose one): - Take 1 direct damage and suffer 1 physical trauma. - Take 1 direct horror and suffer 1 mental trauma.

all_cards.name: 卡洛琳·弗恩
all_cards.text:
[reaction]在你一張卡牌效果治癒一位調查員或一張[[盟友]]支援卡的恐懼後：被治癒的卡牌的控制者獲得1資源。
[elder_sign]效果：+1。你可以治癒你所在地點的一位調查員或一張[[盟友]] 支援卡的1點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] After one of your card effects heals horror from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset: The healed card's controller gains 1 resource.
[elder_sign] effect: +1. You may heal 1 horror from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset at your location.

deck_options.error: You cannot have more than 15 level 0-1 Seeker and/or Mystic cards

all_cards.flavor: 心靈本身是脆弱的，但是通過理解，我們就能對它加以保護。
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：守衛者([guardian])等級0-3，中立卡牌等級0-5，帶有"治癒……恐懼"字樣的卡牌等級0-5，最多15張其它的探求者卡牌和/或潛修者卡牌等級0-1([seeker]和/或[mystic])。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：催眠療法、理性思考、1張隨機基礎弱點。 附加限制：無等級1-5的[[武器]]卡牌。
all_cards.back_flavor: 卡洛琳·弗恩以他人心房為居。她使用一種特殊的療法，通過患者的夢境來研究他們的心理。在此類療法實踐的過程中，她見過也聽過許多令人不安的事物。一些患者曾聲稱自己在睡夢中會去到其它的領域，或告訴她有可怕的生物出沒於自己的夢境。他的研究將她導向一樁又一樁離奇事件，然而對於周遭世界的恐懼，她似乎沒並沒有更多地真正了解。即便如此，卡羅琳不會停下研究，除非自己發現了這一切瘋狂的根源。

all_cards.name: Foolishness
all_cards.text:
Carolyn Fern deck only. Replacement.
Foolishness enters play with 3 horror on him. Horror on him may be healed as if it were on Carolyn Fern. While Foolishness has no horror on him, you get +1 to all skills.
all_cards.real_text:
Carolyn Fern deck only. Replacement.
Foolishness enters play with 3 horror on him. Horror on him may be healed as if it were on Carolyn Fern. While Foolishness has no horror on him, you get +1 to all skills.
all_cards.flavor: "Will we need to save you again?" Foolishness flicked his tail back and forth. "Perhaps. Perhaps I'll do the saving."

all_cards.name: To Fight the Black Wind
all_cards.text: Carolyn Fern deck only. Replacement. Revelation - Attach To Fight the Black Wind to the current agenda. Carolyn Fern takes 1 direct horror. Forced - At the end of the round, if any amount of horror was assigned to an investigator this round and it was not healed: Place 1 doom on attached agenda.
all_cards.real_text: Carolyn Fern deck only. Replacement. Revelation - Attach To Fight the Black Wind to the current agenda. Carolyn Fern takes 1 direct horror. Forced - At the end of the round, if any amount of horror was assigned to an investigator this round and it was not healed: Place 1 doom on attached agenda.

all_cards.name: 背包
all_cards.text:
[reaction]在背包入場後：在你牌堆頂部6張卡牌中查找最多3張非弱點的[[道具]]或[[供給]]卡牌，並將這些卡牌面朝下疊加到背包。混洗你的牌堆。
可以打出疊加到背包的卡牌，如同這些卡牌在你的手牌中。如果沒有卡牌疊加到背包，則將其丟棄。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] After Backpack enters play: Search the top 6 cards of your deck for up to 3 non-weakness [[Item]] or [[Supply]] cards, and attach them facedown to Backpack. Shuffle your deck.
Cards attached to Backpack may be played as if they were in your hand. If there are no cards attached to Backpack, discard it.

all_cards.name: 蘿拉·桑提亞哥
all_cards.text:
你獲得+1[intellect]和+1[agility]。
[free]消耗蘿拉·桑提亞哥並花費X資源：發現你所在地點的1個線索。X為你所在地點的隱藏值。
all_cards.real_text:
You get +1 [intellect] and +1 [agility].
[fast] Exhaust Lola Santiago and spend X resources: Discover 1 clue at your location. X is the shroud value of your location.
all_cards.flavor: "我從事的行業會碰上許多所謂的'詛咒'。我不想討論這個話題。"

all_cards.name: 奧利芙·麥克布萊德
all_cards.text: [reaction]在你將要抽出混亂標記時，消耗奧利芙·麥克布萊德：改為抽出3個混亂標記，而不是1個。選出其中2個標記來結算，忽略其餘標記。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] When you would reveal a chaos token, exhaust Olive McBride: Reveal 3 chaos tokens instead of 1. Choose 2 of those tokens to resolve, and ignore the other.
all_cards.flavor: 你必須對每種法術全情投入。有時就是字面的意思。

all_cards.name: 勇鬥異劫
all_cards.text:
快速。在你執行一次技能檢定，且該檢定的難度高於你的基礎技能值時打出。
為本次技能檢定額外抽出X個混亂標記。選出其中1個標記來結算，忽略其餘標記。X為本次檢定難度和你基礎技能值的差值。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when you perform a skill test with a difficulty higher than your base skill value.
Reveal X additional chaos tokens for this skill test. Choose one to resolve and ignore the rest. X is the difference between the test's difficulty and your base skill value.

all_cards.name: 馬泰奧神父
all_cards.text: [reaction]在一位調查員抽出[auto_fail]混亂標記時：取消該標記並將它視為[elder_sign]標記。(FAQ, v1.4)(每場遊戲限制一次。) [elder_sign]效果：你自動成功。在本次檢定結束後，選擇以下一項： - 抽取1張卡牌並獲得1資源。 - 如果此時是你的回合，本回合你可以進行額外一個行動。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] When an investigator reveals an [auto_fail] chaos token: Cancel that token and treat it as an [elder_sign] token, instead. (Limit once per game.)
[elder_sign] effect: You automatically succeed. After this test ends, either (choose one):
 - Draw 1 card and gain 1 resource.
 - If it is your turn, you may take an additional action this turn.
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：潛修者([mystic])等級0-5，[[祝福]]卡牌等級0-3，中立卡牌等級0-5。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：古代抄本、伊格蛇族、1張隨機基礎弱點。 額外經驗值：劇本開始時你額外擁有5點經驗值(這不影響你在冒險模式所需拿取的弱點卡數量)。
all_cards.back_flavor: 馬泰奧·卡斯提爾自從成為神父後，日子一直都不好過。近十年來，墨西哥深受動亂與衝突之苦。馬泰奧神父一面希望守住自己的信仰，一面為了佈道，有時不得不忽視法律，但這並不是馬泰奧信仰動搖的主要原因。如他所料，周圍發生的凶殺案和綁架案，其動機與政治因素無關。在這場精心醞釀的紛爭背後，一個可怕而恐怖的邪教逐漸壯大。馬泰奧想知道，仁慈而可親的上帝怎能容許他那晚所見的事情發生呢？

all_cards.name: 古代抄本
all_cards.text: 馬泰奧神父牌組專用。封印([elder_sign])。 只要有標記被封印於此，你獲得+1[willpower]。 [reaction]在你將要從混亂袋中抽出1個混亂標記時，丟棄古代抄本：結算封印在此的[elder_sign]標記，視為剛剛從混亂袋中抽出該標記(而不是從混亂袋中抽出一個標記)。
all_cards.real_text: Father Mateo deck only. Seal ([elder_sign]). You get +1 [willpower] while there is a token sealed here. [reaction] When you would reveal a chaos token from the chaos bag, discard The Codex of Ages: Resolve the [elder_sign] token that was sealed here as if it were just revealed from the chaos bag (instead of revealing a token from the chaos bag).
all_cards.traits: 道具. 遺物. 書籍. 祝福

all_cards.name: 伊格蛇族
all_cards.text: 獵物 - 僅限馬泰奧神父。 獵手。 顯現 - 從混亂袋中找出[elder_sign]混亂標記，將它封印在伊格蛇族上。
all_cards.real_text: Prey - Father Mateo only. Hunter. Revelation - Search the chaos bag for the [elder_sign] chaos token and seal it on Serpents of Yig.
all_cards.traits: 類人. 怪物. 蛇族
all_cards.flavor:
"我不知道伊格是什麼，但我知道我傷了牠的子嗣。"
<cite>馬泰奧神父，《詭鎮奇談調查員》</cite>

all_cards.name: 鑽地魔蟲之石
all_cards.text: 封印([skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]或[elder_thing])。 強制 - 在你在技能檢定中抽出[auto_fail]標記後：將鑽地魔蟲之石返回手牌。
all_cards.real_text: Seal ([skull], [cultist], [tablet], or [elder_thing]). Forced - After you reveal an [auto_fail] symbol during a skill test: Return The Chthonian Stone to your hand.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 遺物. 詛咒縈繞
all_cards.flavor: 它的留存必定基於某種目的。

all_cards.name: 里奧·安德森
all_cards.text:
[reaction]在你回合開始後：打出一張[[盟友]]支援卡，其費用減1。
[elder_sign]效果：+2。在你牌堆頂部3張卡牌中查找並抽取1張[[盟友]]支援卡。混洗你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] After your turn begins: Play an [[Ally]] asset, reducing its cost by 1.
[elder_sign] effect: +2. Search the top 3 cards of your deck for an [[Ally]] asset and draw it. Shuffle your deck.
all_cards.flavor: "繼續前進。要死就自己死去，別誤了大夥。"
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：守衛者([guardian])等級0-5，流浪者([rogue])等級0-2，中立卡牌等級0-5。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：米奇·布朗、血的代價、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 里奧·安德森窮極一生，出入於地球上最為凶險、隱蔽之地。在這一路上，他曾失去夥伴。他常常質疑自己，這樣的學術追求是否值得付出生命的代價。他最近一次探險是前往南馬都爾尋找奧盧索爾曆書，那是一場不幸的探險，結局簡直是場災難。他的探險小隊只有米奇活了下來，或者換句話說，只有他仍保有人性。里奧再也不願埋葬夥伴的屍身，他們生前是那麼地信任里奧。但現在他知道探險並不僅是出自學術目的——在完成使命之前，他絕不卻步。

all_cards.name: 厄休拉·唐斯
all_cards.text:
[reaction]在你移動到一個地點後：進行一次調查行動。(每輪限制1次。)
[elder_sign]效果：+1。在本次檢定結束後，你可以移動到一個連接地點。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] After you move to a location: Take an investigate action. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1. After this test ends, you may move to a connecting location.
all_cards.flavor: "發現易，領悟難。"
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：探求者([seeker])等級0-5，[[遺物]]卡牌等級0-4，中立卡牌等級0-5。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：傑克·威廉斯、未知的呼喚、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 沒多少人能說自己攀登過每一塊大陸的高山，能說自已曾從食人族部落裡偷走黃金神像的人就更少了。在男性佔主導地位的社會中，厄休拉是唯一能夠發出如此豪言的女性。當她還是個小女孩的時候，厄休拉就已打破了規限自己的條條框框，她爬樹、在泥地裡玩耍、到森林裡探索，做許多"年輕女孩不該做的事情"。在波士頓取得考古學學位後，她一直在世界各地找尋失落的文明。

all_cards.name: 芬恩·愛德華茲
all_cards.text:
在你回合期間，你可以進行額外一個行動，該行動只能用於躲避。
[elder_sign]效果：場上每有1個已消耗的敵人，+1。如果你成功且超過難度至少2點，你可以發現所在地點的1個線索。
all_cards.real_text:
You may take an additional action during your turn, which can only be used to evade.
[elder_sign] effect: +1 for each exhausted enemy in play. If you succeed by 2 or more, you may discover 1 clue at your location.

deck_options.error: You cannot have more than 5 Seeker and/or Survivor cards

all_cards.flavor: "別忘了給自己留條後路，也別把貨給忘了。"
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：[[違法]]卡牌等級0-5，流浪者([rogue])等級0-3，中立卡牌等級0-5，最多5張其它的等級0探求者卡牌和/或求生者卡牌([seeker]和/或[survivor])。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：走私貨物、芬恩可靠的.38手槍、當場抓獲、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 對於芬恩·愛德華茲而言，禁酒令簡直是天賜良機。在實施禁酒令之前，他的生活漂泊無定，到處打些零工。但在那以後，人們對酒精的渴望臻至狂熱，他便通過規避法律來滿足人們的需求，賴以為生。他嶄新的活法恰恰與他的個性不謀而合，在刀尖上過活，賺得盆滿缽滿。他從來不會被抓，也不會弄丟一趟貨。現在他被捲入了某種超自然的陰謀之中，但最終他還是堅守著一貫的原則：安全走貨，免遭逮捕。

all_cards.name: 米奇·布朗
all_cards.text:
里奧·安德森牌組專用。
你擁有2個額外的盟友槽位，只能用來放置非獨特的盟友。
all_cards.real_text:
Leo Anderson deck only.
You have 2 additional ally slots, which can only be used to hold non-unique allies.
all_cards.flavor:
"你得帶上我，里奧，
所以不妨跟我說說發生了什麼事。"

all_cards.name: 血的代價
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 你必須從場上丟棄你控制的一張[[盟友]]支援卡，或丟棄手牌中的所有[[盟友]]支援卡。如果沒有支援卡藉由本效果被丟棄，將血的代價洗回你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - You must either discard an [[Ally]] asset you control from play, or discard each [[Ally]] asset from your hand. If no assets are discarded by this effect, shuffle Bought in Blood back into your deck.
all_cards.flavor: 我們為自己獲得的知識付出了慘痛的代價。那值得嗎？

all_cards.name: 走私貨物
all_cards.text:
芬恩·愛德華茲牌組專用。
你所在地點沒有處於準備狀態的敵人才能打出。
從你的棄牌堆或牌堆頂部9張卡牌中查找並抽取1張[[違法]]卡牌。如果你查找了你的牌堆，將走私貨物洗回你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text:
Finn Edwards deck only.
Play only if there are no ready enemies at your location.
Search either your discard pile or the top 9 cards of your deck for an [[Illicit]] card and draw it. If you searched your deck, shuffle Smuggled Goods into your deck.

all_cards.name: 芬恩可靠的.38手槍
all_cards.text: 芬恩·愛德華茲牌組專用。快速。使用(3子彈)。 [action]花費1子彈：攻擊。這次攻擊中你+2[combat]。如果你攻擊的敵人未與你交戰，這次攻擊造成+1傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Finn Edwards deck only. Fast. Uses (3 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. If the attacked enemy is not engaged with you, you deal +1 damage for this attack.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 槍械. 違法
all_cards.flavor: 這是一把舊槍——有磨損與劃痕，用了好一陣子——但這桿槍從來沒讓他失望。

all_cards.name: 當場抓獲
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 準備你所在地點或一個連接地點的所有敵人。在連接地點的每個獵手敵人向你移動1個地點。如果本效果沒有導致敵人移動，將當場抓獲洗回你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Ready each enemy at your location or a connecting location. Each hunter enemy at a connecting location moves 1 location toward you. If no enemies move as a result of this effect, shuffle Caught Red-Handed back into your deck.

all_cards.name: 求生匕首
all_cards.text: [action]：攻擊。這次攻擊中你+1[combat]。 [reaction]在一個敵人在敵軍階段攻擊你並對你造成傷害後，消耗求生匕首：攻擊。這次攻擊將剛剛發動攻擊的敵人作為目標。這次攻擊中你+2[combat]並造成+1傷害。
all_cards.real_text: [action]: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack. [reaction] After an enemy attack deals damage to you during the enemy phase, exhaust Survival Knife: Fight. This attack targets the attacking enemy. You get +2 [combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 近戰

all_cards.name: 冒險家
all_cards.text:
使用(3補給)。
[free]花費1補給並消耗冒險家：將1補給或子彈放在你所在地點的一位調查員控制的一張支援卡上。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (3 supplies).
[fast] Spend 1 supply and exhaust Venturer: Place 1 supply or ammo on an asset controlled by an investigator at your location.

all_cards.name: 肝膽相照
