[reaction]在你打出幫個小忙時，提升其費用2點：將"你所在地點"變為"1個與你所在地點之間連接次數不超過2的地點"
all_cards.real_text:
Deal 1 damage to a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location.
[reaction] When you play Small Favor, increase its cost by 2: Change "Deal 1 damage" to "Deal 2 damage."
[reaction] When you play Small Favor, increase its cost by 2: Change "at your location" to "at a location up to 2 connections away."

all_cards.name: 恐怖揭露
all_cards.text: 發現你所在地點的3個線索。將你任意數量的線索交給其他一位調查員，或將你任意數量的線索放置在任意一個地點上。你被擊敗並受到1點精神創傷。此行動不會引起趁亂攻擊。
all_cards.real_text: Discover 3 clues at your location. Give any number of your clues to another investigator, or place any number of your clues on any location. You are defeated and suffer 1 mental trauma. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

all_cards.name: 苦心鑽研
all_cards.text:
永久。
你每場遊戲開始時的起始手牌中擁有額外1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Permanent.
You begin each game with 1 additional card in your opening hand.
all_cards.flavor:
或許吉爾曼不該那樣努力地鑽研。
<cite>H. P. 洛夫克拉夫特《女巫夢中之夢》</cite>

all_cards.name: 幹一天活計拿一天錢
all_cards.text:
永久。
你每場遊戲開始時擁有額外2資源。
all_cards.real_text:
Permanent.
You begin each game with 2 additional resources.
all_cards.flavor: 重要的東西盯緊點。

all_cards.name: 偷樑換柱
all_cards.text: 選擇以下一項： - 躲避。如果你成功且該敵人為非[[精英]]，躲避該敵人並將其移動到一個連接地點。 - 躲避。只能對連接地點的一名非[[精英]]敵人使用，如果你成功，躲避並與該敵人交換地點。
all_cards.real_text: Either (choose one): - Evade. If you succeed and the enemy is non-[[Elite]], evade the enemy and move it to a connecting location. - Evade. Use only on a non-[[Elite]] enemy at a connecting location. If you succeed, evade that enemy and switch locations with it.

all_cards.name: 托尼·摩爾根
all_cards.text:
在你的回合中你可以進行一次額外的行動，該行動只能用於攻擊一名帶有賞金的敵人或與其交戰。
[elder_sign]效果：+2。在賞金合約上放置1賞金。
all_cards.real_text:
You may take an additional action during your turn, which can only be used to engage or fight an enemy with 1 or more bounties on it.
[elder_sign] effect: +2. Place 1 bounty on Bounty Contracts.
all_cards.flavor: "等我找到那隻怪物，我就把牠徹底幹掉。"
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 次級職階選擇：構築牌組時，選擇守衛者([guardian])、探求者([seeker])或求生者([survivor])。 牌組構建選項：流浪者([rogue])等級0-5，中立卡牌等級0-5，最多10張你所選次級職階的等級0-1事件卡和/或技能卡。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：賞金合約、2張托尼的.38柯爾特長管手槍、托尼的獵物、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 托尼能把卑鄙的人渣從世上任何一個骯髒的角落裡揪出來，但他卻從來沒想到，自己會在印斯茅斯殺死那樣的傢伙。那傢伙的長相與人類有幾分相似，但全身都佈滿了惹人生惡的鱗片和黏液，像是某種恐怖的深海生物。牠的氣味混雜著海水、爛魚和血液的味道。托尼本該在牠跳下水後就放手不管，但他從來不會讓賞金打了水漂，而且他當時也不打算這麼做。在那之後，他的賞金獵物又多了一種——可能是普通匪徒，也可能是怪物。只要有人付錢……他定會把目標解決。

all_cards.name: 賞金合約
all_cards.text: 永久。托尼·摩爾根牌組專用。使用(6賞金)。 [reaction]在一名敵人入場後：將1-3賞金從賞金合約移動到該敵人，最多放置該敵人生命值的賞金。 強制 - 在你擊敗一名帶有賞金的敵人後：將其賞金移動到你的資源池，作為資源。
all_cards.real_text: Permanent. Tony Morgan deck only. Uses (6 bounties). [reaction]: After an enemy enters play: Move 1-3 bounties from Bounty Contracts to that enemy, to a maximum of that enemy's health. Forced - After you defeat an enemy with 1 or more bounties on it: Move its bounties to your resource pool, as resources.

all_cards.name: 托尼的.38柯爾特長管手槍
all_cards.text: 托尼·摩爾根牌組專用。使用(3子彈)。 [reaction]：在你打出托尼的.38柯爾特長管手槍後：從你手牌中免費打出另一張托尼的.38柯爾特長管手槍。 [action]花費1子彈：攻擊。被攻擊的敵人上每有1賞金，你+1[combat]。這次攻擊造成+1傷害。如果這次攻擊擊敗一名帶有賞金的敵人，在賞金合約上放置1賞金。
all_cards.real_text: Tony Morgan deck only. Uses (3 ammo). [reaction] After you play Tony's .38 Long Colt: Play another Tony's .38 Long Colt from your hand, at no cost. [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for each bounty on the attacked enemy. This attack deals +1 damage. If this attack defeats an enemy with 1 or more bounties on it, place 1 bounty on Bounty Contracts.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 槍械

all_cards.name: 托尼的獵物
all_cards.text: 生成 - 離托尼·摩爾根最遠的地點。 冷漠。 強制 - 在托尼的獵物入場後：在其上放置1個毀滅標記。然後，(從供應堆)放置1資源在其上，作為賞金。
all_cards.real_text: Spawn - Location farthest from Tony Morgan. Aloof. Forced - After Tony's Quarry enters play: Place 1 doom on it. Then, place 1 resource on it (from the token pool), as a bounty.
all_cards.traits: 類人. 怪物. 深潛者

all_cards.name: "你欠我一次！"
all_cards.text: 查看另一位調查員的手牌。你可以打出該調查員手牌中的一張非弱點卡牌，置於你的控制之下。如果你這麼做，你和該調查員每人抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text: Look at another investigator's hand. You may play a non-weakness card in that investigator's hand, under your control. If you do, you and that investigator each draw 1 card.
all_cards.flavor: "對對，當然了。你之前三次也是這麼說的。"

all_cards.name: 美滿結局
all_cards.text:
快速。在你技能檢定中抽出1個會令你的技能值減少到零的混亂標記時打出(包括[auto_fail]標記)。
取消該標記並改為將其視為[elder_sign]標記。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when you reveal a chaos token that would reduce your skill value to 0 during a skill test (including the [auto_fail] token).
Cancel that token and treat it as an [elder_sign] token, instead.

all_cards.name: 聖化之鏡
all_cards.text: 每副牌組限制1張。 強制 - 在聖化之鏡入場後：在你的綁定卡牌中查找3張舒緩旋律。將其中1張加入你的手牌並將其餘2張混洗入你的牌堆。在聖化之鏡離場時，找出所有的舒緩旋律(不論其是否在場)並將其放在一邊，位於場外。(FAQ, v2.0)
all_cards.real_text: Limit 1 per deck. Forced - After Hallowed Mirror enter play: Search your bonded cards for 3 copies of Soothing Melody. Add 1 to your hand and shuffle the other 2 into your deck. When Hallowed Mirror leaves play, find each of those copies of Soothing Melody (even if they are out of play) and set them aside, out of play.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 遺物. 密教. 祝福

all_cards.name: 舒緩旋律
all_cards.text:
綁定(聖化之鏡)。
治癒你所在地點的調查員和/或[[盟友]]支援卡的2點傷害或2恐懼(或者以任意方式組合，總計2點)。抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Bonded (Hallowed Mirror).
Heal 2 damage or 2 horror (or any combination thereof) from among investigators and/or [[Ally]] assets at your location. Draw 1 card.
all_cards.flavor:
……他們的歌聲融入月光，
融入那淒美靜謐的夜光……
<cite>保羅·魏爾倫，《月光》</cite>

all_cards.name: "我見過更糟的……"
all_cards.text:
快速。在你受到傷害和/或恐懼時打出。
取消你這次受到的最多2點傷害和/或恐懼。然後，獲得同等數量的資源。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when you are dealt damage and/or horror.
Cancel up to 2 damage and/or horror just dealt to you. Then, gain that many resources.

all_cards.name: 窺看不思議之事
all_cards.text: 將你手牌中任意數量的非弱點卡牌混洗入你的牌堆。抽取卡牌，直到手牌數量達到上限。將窺看不思議之事移出遊戲。
all_cards.real_text: Shuffle any number of non-weakness cards from your hand into your deck. Draw cards until you reach your maximum hand-size. Remove Glimpse the Unthinkable from the game.
all_cards.flavor: Ignorance is a bliss you cannot afford.

all_cards.name: 超級加倍
all_cards.text:
卓越。
[reaction]在你打出一張事件卡後，消耗超級加倍：再次打出該事件卡，如同其在你手牌中。
all_cards.real_text:
Exceptional.
[reaction] After you play an event, exhaust Double, Double: Play that event again as if it were in your hand.
all_cards.flavor:
怪鳥在鳴嘯："時候到了，時候到了。"
<cite>威廉·莎士比亞，《麥克白》</cite>

all_cards.name: 凋零術
all_cards.text: [action]：攻擊。這次攻擊不使用[combat]，改為使用[willpower]。這次攻擊你+2[willpower]。如果這次攻擊抽出[skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]或[elder_thing]符號，受到攻擊的敵人在本回合剩餘時間內-1攻擊、-1生命值、-1躲避(最低減至1)。
all_cards.real_text: [action]: Fight. This attack uses [willpower] instead of [combat]. You get +2 [willpower] for this attack. If a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], or [elder_thing] symbol is revealed during this attack, the attacked enemy gets -1 fight, -1 health, and -1 evade for the remainder of the turn (to a minimum of 1).

all_cards.name: 誘敵深入
all_cards.text: 疊加到你所在地點或一個連接地點。 在敵人階段中，每名敵人不以正常移動方向移動，改為以最短路現朝向疊加地點移動。 強制 - 疊加狀態下，當一輪結束時：丟棄誘敵深入。
all_cards.real_text: Attach to your location or to a connecting location. During the enemy phase, each enemy that moves does so along the shortest path toward the attached location, instead of to where it would normally move. Forced - While attached, at the end of the round: Discard Lure.

all_cards.name: 頭班守夜
all_cards.text:
快速。在神話階段的"抽取遭遇卡"步驟將要開始時打出。
不結算該步驟，改為查看遭遇牌堆頂部X張卡牌，其中X等於調查員人數。在任意調查員之間分發那些卡牌，你以外的每位調查員最多分發1張卡牌。然後，每位調查員依序抽取分發給他們的卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when the "draw encounter cards" step of the mythos phase would begin.
Instead of resolving that step, look at the top X cards of the encounter deck, where X is the number of investigators. Deal those cards among the investigators as you wish, dealing no more than 1 card to each investigator other than yourself. Then, one at a time, each investigator draws the card(s) dealt to them.

all_cards.name: 預言卷軸
all_cards.text:
使用(4秘密)。
[action]花費1秘密：選擇你所在地點的一位調查員。該調查員抽取3張卡牌，然後丟棄其1張手牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (4 secrets).
[action] Spend 1 secret: Choose an investigator at your location. That investigator draws 3 cards, then discards 1 card from their hand.
all_cards.flavor: ……過去如是，將來亦如是。

all_cards.name: 傑西卡·海德
all_cards.text:
你獲得+1[combat]。
傑西卡·海德入場時，其上帶有2點傷害。
[reaction]在你的回合結束後：治癒傑西卡·海德1點傷害。
all_cards.real_text:
You get +1 [combat].
Jessica Hyde enters play with 2 damage on her.
[reaction] After your turn ends: Heal 1 damage from Jessica Hyde.
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 旅人. 詛咒縈繞
all_cards.flavor: 我警告過你離我遠一點，限在我們都被困在這裡了。

all_cards.name: .32柯爾特手槍
all_cards.text: 使用(6子彈)。 [action]花費1子彈：攻擊。這次攻擊造成+1傷害。 [free]花費1資源：將.32柯爾特手槍返回你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (6 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You deal +1 damage for this attack. [fast] Spend 1 resource: Return .32 Colt to your hand.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 槍械

all_cards.name: "吃槍子吧！"
all_cards.text: 快速。在你啟動[[槍械]]支援卡上的攻擊能力時打出。 花費該支援卡上的額外1子彈。本次攻擊中，在你抽取混亂標記時，抽取額外1個混亂標記。選擇其中一個結算並忽略其餘標記。
all_cards.real_text: Fast. Play when you activate the Fight ability on a [[Firearm]] asset. Spend 1 additional ammo token from that asset. When you reveal chaos tokens for this attack, reveal 1 additional chaos token. Choose one to resolve and ignore the other.

all_cards.name: 邏輯推理
all_cards.text: 你每有1個線索(最多3個)，治癒你所在地點的一位調查員的2點恐懼，或丟棄你所在地點的1張[[恐怖]]卡牌。
all_cards.real_text: For each clue you have (to a maximum of 3), either heal 2 horror from an investigator at your location or discard a [[Terror]] card at your location.
all_cards.flavor:
"我是活著的最智慧的人，因為我知道一件事，那就是我知道我一無所知。"
<cite>《理想國》，柏拉圖著</cite>

all_cards.name: 古代雕文
all_cards.text: 研究。(FAQ, v2.0) 使用(3充能)。 [action]花費1充能：調查。如果你成功，你可以將手牌中1張打印費用最多為X的支援卡放置入場，其中X為你超過難度的點數。
all_cards.real_text: Researched. Uses (3 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Investigate. If you succeed, you may put an asset with printed cost of X or lower into play from your hand. X is the amount you succeeded by.

all_cards.name: 潛行
all_cards.text: [free]在你回合中，消耗潛行：躲避。本次躲避嘗試所選敵人-2躲避。如果你成功躲避該敵人，它解除交戰狀態但不消耗。你回合結束前，該敵人不能與你交戰。
all_cards.real_text: [fast] During your turn, exhaust Stealth: Evade. The chosen enemy gets -2 evade for this evasion attempt. If you successfully evade the enemy, disengage with it but do not exhaust it. Until the end of your turn, that enemy cannot engage you.

all_cards.name: 建議
all_cards.text: 使用(3充能)。如果建議沒有充能，則將其丟棄。 [action]消耗建議：躲避。本次躲避嘗試將你的[willpower]數值加入你的技能值。如果你沒有成功並超過難度至少2點，移除建議上的1充能。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (3 charges). If Suggestion has no charges, discard it. [action] Exhaust Suggestion: Evade. Add your [willpower] value to your skill value for this evasion attempt. If you do not succeed by at least 2, remove 1 charge from Suggestion.

all_cards.name: 煉金轉化
all_cards.text:
使用(4充能)。
[action]消耗煉金轉化，花費1充能：檢定[willpower](0)。你成功時每超過難度1點，獲得1個資源(上限4個)。如果本次檢定中抽出[skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]、[elder_thing]或[auto_fail]標記，受到1點傷害。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (4 charges).
[action] Exhaust Alchemical Transmutation, spend 1 charge: Test [willpower] (0). For each point you succeed by, gain 1 resource (to a maximum of 4). If a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol is revealed during this test, take 1 damage.

all_cards.name: 靈力風暴
all_cards.text: 攻擊。這次攻擊不使用[combat]，改為使用[willpower]。你這次攻擊獲得+2[willpower]。如果你成功，這次攻擊不造成基礎傷害，而是對被攻擊敵人所在地點的每個敵人造成3點傷害(所有額外傷害只對受到攻擊的敵人造成)。(FAQ, v2.0)如果這次攻擊中抽出[skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]、[elder_thing]或[auto_fail]標記，對所在地點每位調查員造成2點傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Fight. This attack uses [willpower] instead of [combat]. You get +2 [willpower] for this attack. If you succeed, instead of its standard damage, this attack deals 3 damage to each enemy at the attacked enemy's location (any additional damage is dealt to the attacked enemy). If a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] token is revealed during this attack, deal 2 damage to each investigator at the attacked enemy's location.

all_cards.name: 提燈
all_cards.text: [action]：調查。本次調查中你所在地點-1隱藏值。 [action]丟棄提燈：對你所在地點的一個敵人造成1點傷害(或者改為造成2點傷害，並將提燈從遊戲中移除)。本行動不會引起趁亂攻擊。
all_cards.real_text: [action]: Investigate. Your location gets -1 shroud for this investigation. [action] Discard Lantern: Deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location (or remove Lantern from the game to deal 2 damage, instead). This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

all_cards.name: 挖墓人的鏟子
all_cards.text: [action]：攻擊。你這次攻擊+2[combat]。 [action]丟棄挖墓人的鏟子：發現你所在地點的1個線索(或者改為發現2個線索，並將挖墓人的鏟子從遊戲中移除)。
all_cards.real_text: [action]: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. [action] Discard Gravedigger's Shovel: Discover 1 clue at your location (or remove Gravedigger's Shovel from the game to discover 2 clues, instead).
all_cards.traits: 道具. 工具. 武器. 近戰
all_cards.flavor: 我知道我不應該再挖了，但我就是停不下來。

all_cards.name: 邪穢誓約
all_cards.text: 劇本模式專用。禍害。隱私。 顯現 - 將本卡牌秘密地加入你的手牌。 強制 - 在遊戲結束或你退場時，如果本卡牌仍在你手牌中：你少獲得2點經驗。 [reaction]在你對一個敵人造成過量傷害時：從你手牌中丟棄本卡牌。
all_cards.real_text: Campaign Mode only. Peril. Hidden. Revelation - Secretly add this card to your hand. Forced - When the game ends or you are eliminated, if this card is in your hand: You earn 2 fewer experience. [reaction] When you deal damage to an enemy in excess of its remaining health: Discard this card from your hand.

all_cards.name: 邪穢誓約
all_cards.text: 劇本模式專用。禍害。隱私。 顯現 - 將本卡牌秘密地加入你的手牌。 強制 - 在遊戲結束或你退場時，如果本卡牌仍在你手牌中：你少獲得2點經驗。 [reaction]在你成功調查一個沒有線索的地點後：從你手牌中丟棄本卡牌。
all_cards.real_text: Campaign Mode only. Peril. Hidden. Revelation - Secretly add this card to your hand. Forced - When the game ends or you are eliminated, if this card is in your hand: You earn 2 fewer experience. [reaction] After you successfully investigate a location with no clues on it: Discard this card from your hand.

all_cards.name: 邪穢誓約
all_cards.text: 劇本模式專用。禍害。隱私。 顯現 - 將本卡牌秘密地加入你的手牌。 強制 - 在遊戲結束或你退場時，如果本卡牌仍在你手牌中：你少獲得2點經驗。 [action]：躲避。對象僅限你所在地點處於消耗且未交戰狀態的敵人。如果你成功，從你手牌中丟棄本卡牌。
all_cards.real_text: Campaign Mode only. Peril. Hidden. Revelation - Secretly add this card to your hand. Forced - When the game ends or you are eliminated, if this card is in your hand: You earn 2 fewer experience. [action]: Evade. Use only on an exhausted unengaged enemy at your location. If you succeed, discard this card from your hand.

all_cards.name: 托米·馬爾登
all_cards.text:
[reaction]在你控制的一張支援卡被擊敗時：獲得X資源，X為該支援卡上的傷害和恐懼的總和。將該支援卡混洗入你的牌堆。
[elder_sign]效果：+2。你可以將托米·馬爾登上的最多2點傷害和/或恐懼移動到你控制的1張支援卡上，或將你控制的1張支援卡上的最多2點傷害和/或恐懼移動到托米·馬爾登上。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] When an asset you control is defeated: Gain X resources, where X is the total amount of damage and horror on that asset. Shuffle that asset into your deck.
[elder_sign] effect: +2. You may move up to 2 damage and/or horror from Tommy Muldoon to an asset you control, or vice versa.
all_cards.flavor: "保持警戒，托米。"
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：守衛者([guardian])等級0-5，中立卡牌等級0-5，求生者cards([survivor])等級0-2。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：貝基、低級錯誤、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 馬爾登家族裡的大多數人都或多或少於波士頓警署任職。不久之前，馬爾登家族最小的弟弟托米也得到了自己的警徽。托米有敏銳的洞察力、過人的膽識，還有一把可靠的步槍"貝基"，他願獻身於執法事業……但當他被借調到阿卡姆的警察局之後，他發現自己對這座詭異小城裡層出不窮的怪事一點心理準備都沒有。即便如此，不管罪案現場是煙霧繚繞的地下酒吧，還是血跡斑駁的聖壇，托米都不會停下追查的步子，直到將罪犯繩之以法。

all_cards.name: 派翠斯·海瑟薇
all_cards.text:
你的手牌上限減少3張。
每個補給階段中，不抽取1張卡牌，改為丟棄你手牌中的所有非弱點卡牌，並抽取卡牌直到你有5張手牌。
[elder_sign]效果：+1。在這次檢定結束後，你可以留下棄牌堆中的1張卡牌並將其餘卡牌混洗回你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text:
Your maximum hand size is reduced by 3.
During each upkeep phase, instead of drawing 1 card, discard all non-weakness cards in your hand and draw until you have 5 cards in hand.
[elder_sign] effect: +1. After this test ends, you may shuffle all but 1 card from your discard pile into your deck.
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：42。 牌組構建選項：求生者([survivor])等級0-5，潛修者([mystic])等級0-2，中立卡牌等級0-5。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：派翠斯的小提琴、異次元監視者、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 派翠斯畢生都在為音樂而活。悠揚的奏鳴曲、曼妙的詠嘆調、低沉洪亮的進行曲，永遠都是她最親密的夥伴。但有的時候，當派翠斯拉起小提琴，，她能感覺到有個超出認知的怪異存在正監視且等待著她，心急如焚。在過去的一個月裡，牠出現得越發頻繁，派翠斯的情緒也日漸緊繃，已開始影響她拉琴的表現。她再也無法忍受。她在阿卡姆沃德劇院舉辦最後一場演奏會之後，終於決定要採取行動。

all_cards.name: 貝基
all_cards.text: 托米·馬爾登牌組專用。使用(2子彈)。 從托米·馬爾登的[reaction]能力獲得的資源可以改為放置在貝基上，作為子彈。 [action]花費1子彈：攻擊。這次攻擊你+2[combat]並造成+1傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Tommy Muldoon deck only. Uses (2 ammo). Each resource gained from Tommy Muldoon's [reaction] ability may instead be placed on Becky, as ammo. [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +2 [combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 槍械

all_cards.name: 低級錯誤
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 丟棄你控制的帶有傷害或恐懼的每張支援卡。如果沒有支援卡被此效果丟棄，將低級錯誤混洗回你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Discard each asset you control with damage or horror on it. If no assets are discarded by this effect, shuffle Rookie Mistake back into your deck.

all_cards.name: 派翠斯的小提琴
all_cards.text:
派翠斯·海瑟薇牌組專用。
[fast]選擇並丟棄你1張手牌，並消耗派翠斯的小提琴：選擇你所在地點的一位調查員，其獲得1資源或抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Patrice Hathaway deck only.
[fast] Choose and discard 1 card from your hand and exhaust Patrice's Violin: Choose an investigator at your location to either gain 1 resource or draw 1 card.

all_cards.name: 異次元監視者
all_cards.text: 禍害。隱私。獵手。 顯現 - 祕密地將本敵人加入你的手牌。 只要本敵人在你的手牌中，你可以攻擊或躲避它(如同其在你所在地點)。如果你成功，將其從你手牌中丟棄。如果你失敗，將其生成並與你交戰。 強制 - 在你牌堆的卡牌耗盡時，如果本敵人在你的手牌中：其(從你的手牌中)攻擊你。
all_cards.real_text: Peril. Hidden. Hunter. Revelation - Secretly add this enemy to your hand. You may fight or evade this enemy while it is in your hand (as if it were at your location). If you succeed, discard it from your hand. If you fail, spawn it engaged with you. Forced - When your deck runs out of cards, if this enemy is in your hand: It attacks you (from your hand).

all_cards.name: 渴血之刃
all_cards.text: 每副牌組限制1張。作為打出本卡牌的額外的費用，你必須在你的綁定卡牌中查找3張嗜血，並將其混洗入你的牌堆。(FAQ, v1.9) [action]：攻擊。每疊加1張嗜血，這次攻擊你+1[combat]。這次攻擊造成+1傷害。如果這次攻擊擊敗了一名敵人，(從供應堆)放置1資源在本卡牌上，作為貢品。
all_cards.real_text: Limit 1 per deck. As an additional cost to play this card, you must search your bonded cards for 3 copies of Bloodlust and shuffle them into your deck. [action]: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack for each attached copy of Bloodlust. This attack deals +1 damage. If this attack defeats an enemy, place 1 resource on this card (from the token bank), as an offering.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 近戰. 遺物. 詛咒縈繞

all_cards.name: 嗜血
all_cards.text: 綁定(渴血之刃)。 顯現 - 從渴血之刃移除2貢品來疊加嗜血到其上。如果你不能這麼做，受到1點恐懼並將嗜血混洗回你的牌堆。 [free]用渴血之刃攻擊時，將嗜血混洗入你的牌堆：這次攻擊你造成+1傷害。(每次攻擊最多一次。)
all_cards.real_text: Bonded (The Hungering Blade). Revelation - Remove 2 offerings from The Hungering Blade to attach Bloodlust to it. If you cannot, take 1 horror and shuffle Bloodlust back into your deck. [fast] While attacking with The Hungering Blade, shuffle Bloodlust into your deck: You deal +1 damage for this attack. (Max once per attack.)

all_cards.name: 莊嚴立誓
all_cards.text:
多重。快速。
打出莊嚴立誓到你所在地點另一位調查員的控制之下。
[fast]如果莊嚴立誓的所有者位於你所在地點，消耗莊嚴立誓：將你控制的卡牌上的1點傷害或恐懼移動到該調查員控制的卡牌上。
all_cards.real_text:
Myriad. Fast.
Play Solemn Vow under the control of another investigator at your location.
[fast] If the owner of Solemn Vow is at your location, exhaust Solemn Vow: Move 1 damage or horror from a card you control to a card that investigator controls.

all_cards.name: 一瓣縞瑪瑙
all_cards.text:
多重。快速。
[free]如果你場上有3張一瓣縞瑪瑙：將它們放在一邊，位於場外。在你的綁定卡牌中查找並將皇后的掛墜放置入場。
all_cards.real_text:
Myriad. Fast.
[fast] If you have 3 copies of Segment of Onyx in play: Set them aside, out of play. Search your bonded cards for Pendant of the Queen and put it into play.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 遺物. 密教

all_cards.name: 皇后的掛墜
all_cards.text:
綁定(一瓣縞瑪瑙)。使用(3充能)。如果本卡牌沒有充能，將其放在一邊，位於場外，並將放在一邊的3張一瓣縞瑪瑙混洗入你的牌堆。
[free]消耗皇后的掛墜並花費1充能：選擇一個已揭示地點並選擇以下一項 - 移動到該地點、發現該地點的1個線索、自動躲避該地點的一名敵人。
all_cards.real_text:
Bonded (Segment of Onyx). Uses (3 charges). If this card has no charges, set it aside, out of play, and shuffle 3 set-aside copies of Segment of Onyx into your deck.
[fast] Exhaust Pendant of the Queen and spend 1 charge: Choose a revealed location and select one - move to that location, discover 1 clue at that location, or automatically evade an enemy at that location.

all_cards.name: 仰望星空
all_cards.text:
每場遊戲最多兩次。
遭遇牌堆有10張以上卡牌時才能打出。
在你的綁定卡牌中查找1張群星正確之時，並將其混洗入遭遇牌堆頂部10張卡牌中。
all_cards.real_text:
Max twice per game.
Play only if there are 10 or more cards in the encounter deck.
Search your bonded cards for 1 copy of The Stars Are Right and shuffle it into the top 10 cards of the encounter deck.

all_cards.name: 群星正確之時
all_cards.text: 綁定(仰望星空)。 顯現 - 將群星正確之時移出遊戲。選擇一位調查員。該調查員抽取1張卡牌，獲得1資源，並且可以立即進行一次行動，如同在自己回合(本行動不計入該調查員每回合可進行的行動數)。
all_cards.real_text: Bonded (Stargazing). Revelation - Remove The Stars Are Right from the game. Choose an investigator. That investigator draws 1 card, gains 1 resource, and may take an immediate action as if it were their turn (this action does not count toward the number of actions that investigator can take each turn).

all_cards.name: 開啟大門
all_cards.text:
多重。 快速。
只能在你的回合中打出。
疊加到你所在地點。團隊在場上限制3張。
調查員可以在任何2個疊加開啟大門的地點之間移動，如同兩地點連接。
all_cards.real_text:
Myriad. Fast.
Play only during your turn.
Attach to your location. Group limit 3 in play.
Investigators may move between any two locations with an attached Open Gate as if the locations were connected.

all_cards.name: 道爾女士
all_cards.text: 每副牌組限制1張。 強制 - 在道爾女士入場後：在你的綁定卡牌中查找希望、熱誠和預見。隨機選擇1張放置入場，並將其餘2張混洗入你的牌堆。在道爾女士離場時，找出這幾張支援卡(不論其是否在場)，並將其放在一邊，位於場外。(FAQ, v2.0)
all_cards.real_text: Limit 1 per deck. Forced - After Miss Doyle enters play: Search your bonded cards for Hope, Zeal, and Augur. Randomly choose 1 to put into play and shuffle the other 2 into your deck. When Miss Doyle leaves play, find each of those assets (even if they are out of play) and set them aside, out of play.
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 生物. 幻夢境

all_cards.name: 希望
all_cards.text: 綁定(道爾女士)。快速。 強制 - 在希望入場後：丟棄熱誠和預見。 [action]如果希望已準備，將其消耗或丟棄：躲避。以5點基礎[agility]值嘗試躲避。(如果你丟棄希望，這次檢定自動成功。然後，你可以將希望混洗入你的牌堆來將熱誠或預見從你的棄牌堆放置入場。)
all_cards.real_text: Bonded (Miss Doyle). Fast. Forced - After Hope enters play: Discard Zeal and Augur. [action] If Hope is ready, exhaust or discard him: Evade. Attempt to evade with a base [agility] value of 5. (If you discarded Hope, this test is automatically successful. Then, you may shuffle Hope into your deck to put Zeal or Augur into play from your discard pile.)
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 生物. 幻夢境

all_cards.name: 熱誠
all_cards.text: 綁定(道爾女士)。快速。 強制 - 在熱誠入場後：丟棄希望和預見。 [action]如果熱誠已準備，將其消耗或丟棄：攻擊。以5點基礎[combat]值攻擊。(如果你丟棄熱誠，這次檢定自動成功。然後，你可以將熱誠混洗入你的牌堆來將希望或預見從你的棄牌堆放置入場。)
all_cards.real_text: Bonded (Miss Doyle). Fast. Forced - After Zeal enters play: Discard Hope and Augur. [action] If Zeal is ready, exhaust or discard her: Fight. Fight with a base [combat] value of 5. (If you discarded Zeal, this test is automatically successful. Then, you may shuffle Zeal into your deck to put Hope or Augur into play from your discard pile.)
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 生物. 幻夢境

all_cards.name: 預見
all_cards.text: 綁定(道爾女士)。快速。 強制 - 在預見入場後：丟棄希望和熱誠。 [action]如果預見已準備，將其消耗或丟棄：調查。以5點基礎[intellect]值調查。(如果你丟棄預見，這次檢定自動成功。然後，你可以將預見混洗入你的牌堆來將希望或熱誠從你的棄牌堆放置入場。)
all_cards.real_text: Bonded (Miss Doyle). Fast. Forced - After Augur enters play: Discard Hope and Zeal. [action] If Augur is ready, exhaust or discard her: Investigate. Investigate with a base [intellect] value of 5. (If you discarded Augur, this test is automatically successful. Then, you may shuffle Augur into your deck to put Hope or Zeal into play from your discard pile.)
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 生物. 幻夢境

all_cards.name: 曼蒂·湯普森
all_cards.text:
[reaction] 在一位調查員在你所在地點將要在其牌堆或遭遇牌堆中查找並結算某一效果時：該調查員可以查找額外3張卡牌，或該次查找多結算1個目標。(每輪限制一次)
[elder_sign]效果：+0。在你的牌堆頂部3張卡牌中查找一張卡牌，並將其抽取或投入這次檢定(如果可能)。混洗你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] When an investigator at your location would search their deck or the encounter deck: They may either search 3 additional cards or resolve 1 additional target of the search. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +0. Search the top 3 cards of your deck for a card and either draw it or commit it to this test, if able. Shuffle your deck.
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30、40或50(構築牌組時選擇)。 次級職階選擇：構築牌組時，選擇潛修者([mystic])、流浪者([rogue])或求生者([survivor])。 牌組構建選項：探求者([seeker])等級0-5，中立卡牌等級0-5，最多10張你所選次級職階的等級0-1事件卡和/或技能卡。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：1張神秘證據(如果你的卡牌張數為40，改為2張；如果你的卡牌張數為50，改為3張)、驚人的發現、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 曼蒂打從小時候開始，睡不著就會看書。許多夜晚都是如此度過的。她過目不忘，擅長聯繫事物找出真相，因此她得到了米斯卡塔尼克大學的一份寶貴工作——研究員。她曾花上數小時翻閱那些古老的禁書，細細閱讀書中的褻瀆內容。在閱讀過程中，她發現字裡行間在有規律地暗示著一場大亂即將來臨。她是不是得了妄想症？還是說真有一場災難或是動亂將要發生？

all_cards.name: 盧克·羅賓遜
all_cards.text:
你以門之匣在場開始遊戲。
你每回合可以視為你位於一個連接地點並與該地點的每名敵人交戰下，打出一張事件卡。
[elder_sign]效果：+1。在門之匣上放置1充能。
all_cards.real_text:
You begin the game with Gate Box in play.
You may play one event each turn as if you were at a connecting location and engaged with each enemy at that location.
[elder_sign] effect: +1. Place 1 charge on Gate Box.
all_cards.traits: 入夢者. 漂泊者. 旅人
all_cards.flavor: "通往幻夢境的鑰匙就在我們每個人心中。"
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：潛修者([mystic])等級0-5，探求者([seeker])等級0-2，中立卡牌等級0-5。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：門之匣、脫離現實，1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 在多年之前，盧克發現了幻夢境的入口。從他叔叔留給他的禮物——不同尋常的盒子中，他掌握了進出夢境之門的方法。從那以後，他大部分的時間都在夢境裡徘徊，尋歷奇遇。從賽勒菲斯的街道到充滿無窮謎團的魔幻森林，他信步徘徊，揭開夢境和居住在此的入夢者背後的祕密。如今，古老的混沌威脅著，不僅要毀滅現實世界，還要毀滅他的夢中世界。盧克絕不允許此事發生。

all_cards.name: 神秘證據
all_cards.text:
曼蒂·湯普森牌組專用。
將神秘證據混洗回你的牌堆。
[reaction]在你查找你的牌堆時若神秘證據在被查找卡牌中，將其揭示：將其抽取並發現你所在地點的1個線索。(每次查找最多使用一次[[研究]]能力。)
all_cards.real_text:
Mandy Thompson deck only.
Shuffle Occult Evidence into your deck.
[reaction] When you search your deck and Occult Evidence is among the searched cards, reveal it: Draw it and discover 1 clue at your location. (Max one [[Research]] ability per search.)

all_cards.name: 驚人的發現
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 將驚人的發現混洗回你的牌堆。(如果你不能，改為將其丟棄並抽取遭遇牌堆頂部的卡牌。) 強制 - 在你查找你的牌堆時若此卡牌在被查找卡牌中：將其丟棄。取消該次查找以及其所有效果。混洗被查找的牌堆。抽取遭遇牌堆頂部的卡牌。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Shuffle Shocking Discovery back into your deck. (If you cannot, discard it and draw the top card of the encounter deck, instead.) Forced - When you search your deck and this card is among the searched cards: Discard it. Cancel the search and all of its effects. Shuffle the searched deck. Draw the top card of the encounter deck.

all_cards.name: 門之匣
all_cards.text: 盧克·羅賓遜牌組專用。 使用(3充能)。 [fast]消耗門之匣並花費1充能：與每名與你交戰的敵人解除交戰，在你的綁定卡牌中查找並放置夢境之門(奇妙旅程)入場，並移動到該地點。
all_cards.real_text: Luke Robinson deck only. Uses (3 charges). [fast] Exhaust Gate Box and spend 1 charge: Disengage from each enemy engaged with you, search your bonded cards for Dream-Gate (Wondrous Journey), put it into play, and move to it.

all_cards.name: 脫離現實
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 如果夢境之門 (奇妙旅程)已經在場，將其翻面。否則，在你的綁定卡牌中查找並放置夢境之門(無謂現實)入場。不論哪種情況，與每名與你交戰的敵人解除交戰，並移動到夢境之門。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - If Dream-Gate (Wondrous Journey) is already in play, flip it over. Otherwise, search your bonded cards for Dream-Gate (Pointless Reality) and put it into play. In either case, disengage from each enemy engaged with you and move to Dream-Gate.

all_cards.name: 夢境之門
all_cards.text: 綁定(門之匣)。 夢境之門與其它每個已揭示地點互相連接。敵人和盧克·羅賓遜以外的調查員不能進入夢境之門。 強制 - 當調查員階段結束時：將夢境之門放在一邊，位於場外。(如果盧克·羅賓遜在這裡，將他移動到任一已揭示地點。)
all_cards.real_text: Bonded (Gate Box). Dream-Gate is connected to each other revealed location, and vice versa. Enemies and investigators other than Luke Robinson cannot enter Dream-Gate. Forced - At the end of the investigation phase: Set Dream-Gate aside, out of play. (If Luke Robinson is here, move him to any revealed location.)

linked_card.name: 夢境之門
linked_card.text:
綁定(脫離現實)。

敵人和盧克·羅賓遜以外的調查員不能進入夢境之門。

在你成功調查夢境之門後：將其翻面。

強制 -當調查員階段結束時：將夢境之門放在一邊，位於場外。(如果盧克·羅賓遜在這裡，將他移動到任一已揭示地點，並受到2點恐懼。)
linked_card.real_text: Bonded (Detached from Reality). Enemies and investigators other than Luke Robinson cannot enter Dream-Gate. [reaction] After you successfully investigate Dream-Gate: Flip it. Forced - At the end of the investigation phase: Set Dream-Gate aside, out of play. (If Luke Robinson is here, move him to any revealed location, and he takes 2 horror.)

all_cards.name: 夢境之門
all_cards.text: 綁定(脫離現實)。 敵人和盧克·羅賓遜以外的調查員不能進入夢境之門。 [reaction]在你成功調查夢境之門後：將其翻面。 強制 -當調查員階段結束時：將夢境之門放在一邊，位於場外。(如果盧克·羅賓遜在這裡，將他移動到任一已揭示地點，並受到2點恐懼。)
all_cards.real_text: Bonded (Detached from Reality). Enemies and investigators other than Luke Robinson cannot enter Dream-Gate. [reaction] After you successfully investigate Dream-Gate: Flip it. Forced - At the end of the investigation phase: Set Dream-Gate aside, out of play. (If Luke Robinson is here, move him to any revealed location, and he takes 2 horror.)

all_cards.name: 駭人真相
all_cards.text:
多重。
不能打出駭人真相。
[reaction]在你查找你的牌堆時若駭人真相在被查找卡牌中，將其丟棄：獲得2資源或在你控制的支援卡上放置1秘密。(每次查找最多使用一次[[研究]]能力。)
all_cards.real_text:
Myriad.
Astounding Revelation cannot be played.
[reaction] When you search your deck and Astounding Revelation is among the searched cards, discard it: Either gain 2 resources or place 1 secret on an asset you control. (Max one [[Research]] ability per search.)

all_cards.name: 夢境結晶器
all_cards.text: 作為打出本卡牌的額外費用，你必須在你的綁定卡牌中查找1張結晶器守衛，並將其混洗入你的牌堆。(FAQ, v1.9) [reaction]在你打出一張事件卡後：不將其丟棄，改為將其正面朝下疊加到夢境結晶器(最多疊加5張事件卡)。可以將疊加的事件卡投入技能檢定，如同其為你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text:
As an additional cost to play this card, you must search your bonded cards for 1 copy of Guardian of the Crystallizer and shuffle it into your deck.
[reaction] After you play an event: Attach it facedown to Crystallizer of Dreams instead of discarding it (to a maximum of 5 attached events). Attached events may be committed to skill tests as if they were in your hand.

all_cards.name: 結晶器守衛
all_cards.text: 綁定(夢境結晶器)。獵手。 獵物 -僅對有夢境結晶器的調查員。 結晶器守衛以消耗狀態入場。 強制 - 如果場上沒有夢境結晶器：將結晶器守衛放在一邊，位於場外。
all_cards.real_text: Bonded (Crystallizer of Dreams). Hunter. Prey - Investigator with a Crystallizer of Dreams only. Guardian of the Crystallizer enters play exhausted. Forced - If there is no Crystallizer of Dreams in play: Set Guardian of the Crystallizer aside, out of play.

all_cards.name: 冤大頭
all_cards.text:
多重。
獲得2資源並抽取1張卡牌。
[reaction]在你打出冤大頭後：從你手牌中免費打出另一張冤大頭。
all_cards.real_text:
Myriad.
Gain 2 resources and draw 1 card.
[reaction] After you play Easy Mark: Play another Easy Mark from your hand, at no cost.

all_cards.name: 意外的發現
all_cards.text: 多重。 X為你棄牌堆中其餘的意外的發現張數。 調查。這次調查你+X[intellect]。如果你成功，額外發現你所在地點的X個線索。
all_cards.real_text: Myriad. X is the number of other copies of Fortuitous Discovery in your discard pile. Investigate. You get +X [intellect] for this investigation. If you succeed, discover X additional clues at your location.

all_cards.name: 自私自利
all_cards.text: 多人遊戲專用。 顯現 - 將自私自利放置入你的威脅區域。 你不能投入卡牌到其他調查員的技能檢定，或用玩家卡效果影響其他調查員(造成傷害或恐懼的效果除外)。 [action] [action]：丟棄自私自利。
all_cards.real_text: Multiplayer only. Revelation - Put Self-Centered into play in your threat area. You cannot commit cards to other investigators' skill tests or affect other investigators with player card effects (except aspects that cause damage or horror). [action] [action]: Discard Self-Centered.

all_cards.name: 偷竊癖
all_cards.text: 多人遊戲專用。 顯現 - 將偷竊癖放置入你的遊戲區域。 [action]：控制你所在地點另一位調查員的一個[[道具]]支援卡或2資源。然後，將偷竊癖混洗入你的牌堆。 強制 - 當你回合結束時：受到1點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text: Multiplayer only. Revelation - Put Kleptomania into play in your play area. [action]: Take control of an [[Item]] asset or 2 resources from another investigator at your location. Then, shuffle Kleptomania into your deck. Forced - At the end of your turn: Take 1 horror.

all_cards.name: 嗜睡症
all_cards.text: 多人遊戲專用。 顯現 - 將嗜睡症放置入你的威脅區域。 你不能進行行動、觸發能力或打出卡牌。 [action]："醒醒！"丟棄嗜睡症。 強制 - 在你受到傷害或恐懼後：丟棄嗜睡症。
all_cards.real_text: Multiplayer only. Revelation - Put Narcolepsy into play in your threat area. You cannot take actions, trigger abilities, or play cards. [action]: "Wake up!" Discard Narcolepsy. Forced - After you take damage or horror: Discard Narcolepsy.

all_cards.name: 最可怕的噩夢
all_cards.text: 多人遊戲專用。 獵手。 獵物 - 僅對承受者。 最可怕的噩夢的承受者不能對其攻擊、造成傷害或將其擊敗。
all_cards.real_text: Multiplayer only. Hunter. Prey - Bearer only. The bearer of Your Worst Nightmare cannot attack, damage, or defeat it.

all_cards.name: 清醒夢
all_cards.text: 選擇你遊戲區域的一張卡牌，或揭示你的一張手牌。在你的牌堆中查找並抽取另一張該卡牌的同名卡牌。混洗你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text: Choose a card in your play area or reveal a card in your hand. Search your deck for another copy of that card and draw it. Shuffle your deck.
all_cards.flavor:
"……所有這些生命都僅僅只是大腦的一串圖像，這些圖像不管是來自真實，還是來自內在夢境，他們之間並無區別……"
——H. P. 洛夫克拉夫特《銀鑰匙》

all_cards.name: 渾身是膽
all_cards.text: 只能投入到攻擊或嘗試躲避敵人的技能檢定中。該敵人在這次技能期間檢定獲得反擊和警戒。在這次檢定結束後，抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text: Commit only to a skill test during an attack or evasion attempt against an enemy. That enemy gains retaliate and alert for the duration of this skill test. After this test ends, draw 1 card.

all_cards.name: 夢境日記
all_cards.text:
[action]：在你的綁定卡牌中查找夢的本質，並將其加入你的手牌。
[reaction]在你投入夢的本質的技能檢定中成功並超過難度至少3點後：在你的冒險日誌中記錄"你洞悉了夢境"。
all_cards.real_text:
[action]: Search your bonded cards for Essence of the Dream and add it to your hand.
[reaction] After you succeed by 3 or more during a skill test to which Essence of the Dream is committed: Record in your Campaign Log that "you have interpreted the dreams."
all_cards.traits: 道具. 書籍. 守護

all_cards.name: 夢的本質
all_cards.text:
綁定(夢境日記)。
在夢的本質將要進入你的棄牌堆或被混洗入你的牌堆時，不將其放入，改為將其放在一邊，位於場外 (與你的綁定卡牌一起)。
all_cards.real_text:
Bonded (Dream Diary).
When Essence of the Dream would enter your discard pile or be shuffled into your deck, instead set Essence of the Dream aside, out of play (with your bonded cards).

all_cards.name: 跟蹤
all_cards.text: 調查。選擇你所在地點的一名敵人。所選敵人上每有1點傷害，這次調查你+1[intellect](最多+5[intellect])。如果你成功，在此地點發現額外1個線索。此行動不會引起所選敵人的趁亂攻擊。
all_cards.real_text: Investigate. Choose an enemy at your location. You get +1 [intellect] for this investigation for each damage on the chosen enemy (to a maximum of +5 [intellect]). If you succeed, discover 1 additional clue at this location. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity from the chosen enemy.

all_cards.name: 勢不可擋
all_cards.text: 如果這次技能檢定成功，本階段你執行的下次技能檢定難度降低X，其中X為這次技能檢定超過難度的點數(最多為3)。
all_cards.real_text: If this skill test is successful, reduce the difficulty of the next skill test you perform this phase by X, where X is the amount this skill test succeeded by (to a maximum of 3).
all_cards.flavor: 你從不走陽關道。

all_cards.name: 解讀秘符
all_cards.text: 調查。將你的[willpower]值加入你這次調查的技能值。你可以忽略在這次調查中將在你所在地點觸發的任意效果或關鍵詞。如果你成功，在此地點發現額外1個線索。
all_cards.real_text: Investigate. Add your [willpower] value to your skill value for this investigation. You may ignore any effect or keyword on your location which would trigger during this investigation. If you succeed, discover 1 additional clue at this location.
all_cards.flavor:
可怕的未來就在你眼前。
你是要轉頭就跑，還是對它敞開胸懷？

all_cards.name: 虎口拔牙
all_cards.text: 在你投入虎口拔牙到技能檢定後，從你的牌堆頂部揭示卡牌，直到你揭示了能投入到這次檢定的[rogue]技能卡。將其投入。將其它每張已揭示卡牌混洗回你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text: After you commit Daredevil to a skill test, reveal cards from the top of your deck until you reveal a [rogue] skill you can commit to this test. Commit it. Shuffle each other revealed card back into your deck.
all_cards.flavor:
"你是個瘋子，溫妮！"
"我知道，這難道不是件好事嗎？"

all_cards.name: 希望微光
all_cards.text: 多重。 只能從你的棄牌堆打出希望微光。 將你棄牌堆中所有希望微光加入你的手牌(包括本卡牌)。
all_cards.real_text: Myriad. A Glimmer of Hope can only be played from your discard pile. Add all copies of A Glimmer of Hope in your discard pile to your hand (including this copy).

all_cards.name: 異界手稿
all_cards.text:
使用(3秘密)。
[action]消耗異界手稿並花費1秘密：在遭遇牌堆頂部9張卡牌中查找並從中選擇一張非[[精英]]卡牌。丟棄場上一張與所選卡牌同名的卡牌。將所有查找的卡牌混洗回遭遇牌堆。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (3 secrets).
[action] Exhaust Otherworld Codex and spend 1 secret: Search the top 9 cards of the encounter deck and choose a non-[[Elite]] card among them. Discard a copy of the chosen card from play. Shuffle all of the searched cards back into the encounter deck.

all_cards.name: "讓上帝分辨去吧……"
all_cards.text:
只能在你擊敗了總計生命值至少6點的敵人的回合中打出。
將"讓上帝分辨去吧……"加入勝利牌區，並立即結束你的回合。在這場冒險結局中獲得經驗值時，你獲得額外1點經驗值。
all_cards.real_text:
Play only during one of your turns in which you defeated enemies with a total of 6 or more health.
Add "Let God sort them out..." to the victory display and immediately end your turn. When earning experience during the resolution of this scenario, you earn 1 additional experience.

all_cards.name: 飄渺靈體
all_cards.text: 躲避。將你的[willpower]值加入你這次躲避嘗試的技能值。如果你成功，與每名與你交戰的其餘敵人解除交戰，並且本輪接下來的時間裡，你視為無形(敵人不能與你交戰，且你不能攻擊或對敵人造成傷害)。
all_cards.real_text: Evade. Add your [willpower] value to your skill value for this evasion attempt. If you succeed, disengage from each other enemy engaged with you, and for the remainder of the round, you are ethereal (enemies cannot engage or be engaged with you, and you cannot attack or deal damage to enemies).

all_cards.name: 多才多藝
all_cards.text:
永久。
你的牌組卡牌張數+5。
你的調查員的牌組構建選項獲得："1張任何職階([guardian]、[seeker]、[rogue]、[mystic]或[survivor])的其它0級卡牌。"
all_cards.real_text:
Permanent.
You get +5 Deck Size.
Your investigator's Deckbuilding Options gain: "one other level 0 card from any class ([guardian], [seeker], [rogue], [mystic], or [survivor])."
all_cards.flavor: "不搶風頭"不代表你沒做好準備。

all_cards.name: 受召獵犬
all_cards.text: 作為打出受召獵犬的額外費用，你必須在你的綁定卡牌中查找1張脫韁野獸，並將其混洗入你的牌堆。 [free]在你的回合中，除了行動中以外，消耗受召獵犬：攻擊/調查。以基礎值5點的[combat]技能攻擊，或用基礎值5點的[intellect]技能調查。
all_cards.real_text: As an additional cost to play Summoned Hound, you must search your bonded cards for 1 copy of Unbound Beast and shuffle it into your deck. [fast] During your turn, except during an action, exhaust Summoned Hound: Fight/Investigate. Either attack with a base [combat] skill of 5, or investigate with a base [intellect] skill of 5.

all_cards.name: 脫韁野獸
all_cards.text: 綁定 (受召獵犬)。 獵物 - 承受者。 獵手。反擊。 顯現 - 如果場上沒有受召獵犬，將脫韁野獸放在一邊，位於場外。否則，將一位調查員的受召獵犬放在一邊，位於場外，並且生成脫韁野獸並與該調查員交戰。
all_cards.real_text: Bonded (Summoned Hound). Prey - Bearer. Hunter. Retaliate. Revelation - If there is no copy of Summoned Hound in play, set Unbound Beast aside, out of play. Otherwise, set an investigator's Summoned Hound aside, out of play, and spawn Unbound Beast engaged with the same investigator.
all_cards.traits: 怪獸. 異次元. 廷達洛斯

all_cards.name: 背水一戰
all_cards.text:
如果你的資源少於5，獲得資源，直到你有5資源。
如果你手牌少於5張，抽取卡牌，直到你有5張手牌。
將背水一戰移出遊戲。
all_cards.real_text:
If you have fewer than 5 resources, gain resources until you have 5 resources.
If you have fewer than 5 cards in your hand, draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand.
Remove Nothing Left to Lose from the game.

all_cards.name: 森哲夫
all_cards.text:
對你所在地點其他調查員造成的傷害和/或恐懼，可以分配給森哲夫。
[reaction]在森哲夫被擊敗時：選擇你所在地點的一位調查員。該調查員在其棄牌堆或牌堆頂部9張卡牌中查找一張[[道具]]支援卡，並加入其手牌。如果查找了牌堆，將其混洗。
all_cards.real_text:
Tetsuo Mori may be assigned damage and/or horror dealt to other investigators at your location.
[reaction] When Tetsuo Mori is defeated: Choose an investigator at your location. That investigator searches either their discard pile or the top 9 cards of their deck for an [[Item]] asset and adds it to their hand. Shuffle their deck if it is searched.

all_cards.name: "吃一塹……"
all_cards.text:
快速。在你結算一張詭計卡的任何效果後，將要丟棄該卡牌時打出。
將"吃一塹……"放置入你的遊戲區域，並疊加該詭計卡到其上。
[reaction]在任一調查員抽取到一張與疊加的詭計卡同名的卡牌時，丟棄"吃一塹……"：取消該卡牌的顯現效果。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when you would discard a treachery card after resolving any of its effects.
Put "Fool me once..." into play in your play area and attach that treachery to it.
[reaction] When any investigator draws a copy of the attached treachery card, discard "Fool me once...": Cancel that card's revelation effect.

all_cards.name: 自我犧牲
all_cards.text:
只能投入到你所在地點的另一位調查員執行的(任何類型的)技能檢定中。
如果這次檢定失敗，檢定失敗的所有效果不由執行檢定的調查員結算，改為必須由你結算。然後，你或執行檢定的調查員抽取2張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Commit only to a skill test (of any type) being performed by another investigator at your location.
If this test fails, you must resolve all effects from the failed test, instead of the performing investigator. Then, either you draw 2 cards, or the performing investigator draws 2 cards.

all_cards.name: 強夢血清
all_cards.text:
你手牌中的每張同名卡牌，於檢查手牌上限時其只算作1張。
[reaction]在你抽取到一張與你的手牌同名的卡牌後，揭示這兩張卡牌，並消耗強夢血清：抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Only the first copy of each card in your hand counts toward your maximum hand size.
[reaction] After you draw a copy of a card that is already in your hand, reveal both copies and exhaust Dream-Enhancing Serum: Draw 1 card.

all_cards.name: 快速裝填
all_cards.text:
快速。只能在你的回合中打出。
選擇你控制的一張子彈標記數量少於其"使用(X)"中的X的[[槍械]]支援卡。在該支援卡上放置子彈，直到其子彈等於其"使用(X)"中的X。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play only during your turn.
Choose a [[Firearm]] asset you control with fewer ammo tokens than its uses (X) value. Place ammo on that asset until it has ammo equal to its uses (X) value.

all_cards.name: 格雷戈里·葛利
all_cards.text:
使用(9資源)。
[reaction]在你發起技能檢定時，花費格雷戈里·葛利的最多3資源：如果這次技能檢定成功且至少超過該資源數量，獲得同等數量的資源。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (9 resources).
[reaction] When you initiate a skill test, spend up to 3 resources from Gregory Gry: If this test succeeds by at least that amount, gain that many resources.
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 罪犯. 入夢者
all_cards.flavor: 這小子在拿到自己的第一張手牌之前，只靠打量就能猜出對方下注的理由。

all_cards.name: 治癒真言
all_cards.text:
使用(3充能)。
[action]花費1充能：治癒你所在地點一位調查員的1點傷害。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (3 charges).
[action] Spend 1 charge: Heal 1 damage from an investigator at your location.
all_cards.flavor: 你不是必須相信密教之言，只是你別無選擇。

all_cards.name: 搜刮補給
all_cards.text: 選擇你棄牌堆中一張0級卡牌。將所選卡牌加入你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text: Choose a level 0 card in your discard pile. Add the chosen card to your hand.
all_cards.flavor:
你掰開屍體的手把東西拿了下來。
反正他也不會發牢騷。

all_cards.name: 蠻力
all_cards.text:
每次技能檢定最多投入1張。
只要在基礎攻擊行動中投入蠻力，其獲得[combat][combat]和以下文本："如果這次檢定成功且超過難度至少2點，這次攻擊造成+2傷害。"
all_cards.real_text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
While Brute Force is committed during a basic fight action, it gains [combat][combat] and the text: "If this test is successful by 2 or more, this attack deals +2 damage."

all_cards.name: 真理之眼
all_cards.text:
如果這次技能檢定是詭計卡上的檢定，且檢定成功，將該詭計卡加入勝利牌區，並疊加真理之眼到其上。
只要真理之眼疊加到詭計卡，其技能圖標會投入到該卡牌的同名卡牌的所有技能檢定。
all_cards.real_text:
If this skill test is on a treachery and the test is successful, add that treachery to the victory display and attach The Eye of Truth to it.
While attached, The Eye of Truth contributes its skill icons to all tests on copies of the attached treachery.
all_cards.flavor: 它會一直看著你。

all_cards.name: 短管霰彈槍
all_cards.text: 使用(2子彈)。 [action]花費1子彈：攻擊。這次攻擊不造成其基礎傷害，改為你每成功且超過難度1點，造成1點傷害(最小為1，最大為6)。如果你檢定失敗並且將要對另一名調查員造成傷害，這次攻擊你每失敗且低於難度1點，造成1點傷害(最小為1，最大為6)。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (2 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. Instead of its standard damage, this attack deals 1 damage for each point you succeed by (to a minimum of 1, to a maximum of 6). If you fail and would damage another investigator, this attack deals 1 damage for each point you fail by (to a minimum of 1, to a maximum of 6).
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 槍械. 違法

all_cards.name: .35溫徹斯特步槍
all_cards.text: 使用(5子彈)。 [action]花費1子彈：攻擊。(FAQ, v1.7)這次攻擊你+2[combat]。如果這次攻擊中抽出+1、0或[elder_sign]混亂標記，這次攻擊造成+2傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (5 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. If a +1, 0, or [elder_sign] chaos token is revealed during this attack, this attack deals +2 damage.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 槍械

all_cards.name: 安全護衛
all_cards.text: [reaction]在另一位調查員的回合中，消耗安全護衛：該調查員的回合接下來的時間裡，其從你所在地點移動到連接地點時，你也可以移動到該地點。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] During another investigator's turn, exhaust Safeguard: For the remainder of that investigator's turn, as they move from your location to a connecting location, you may move to that location as well.
all_cards.flavor: 她告訴我，當心別碰上麻煩。我翻了個白眼。麻煩事可從來沒消停過。

all_cards.name: 熟能生巧
all_cards.text:
快速。在你所在地點的技能檢定中打出。
在你的牌堆頂部9張卡牌中查找一張[[精通]]技能卡，並將其投入這次技能檢定(如可能)。將其餘卡牌混洗回你的牌堆。在這次檢定結束後，如果檢定成功，不將該技能卡丟棄，改為將其加入你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play during a skill test at your location.
Search the top 9 cards of your deck for a [[Practiced]] skill and commit it to this skill test, if able. Shuffle the remaining cards back into your deck. After this test ends, if it was successful, add that skill to your hand instead of discarding it.

all_cards.name: 海量研究
all_cards.text:
你每有1張其它手牌，降低海量研究的打出費用1點。
發現你所在地點的2個線索。
all_cards.real_text:
Reduce the cost to play Extensive Research by 1 for each other card in your hand.
Discover 2 clues at your location.
all_cards.flavor:
"這兒也沒發現。我們還差多少沒查？"
"……瞧瞧你背後這面牆？"

all_cards.name: 三條A
all_cards.text: 多重。 如果你將3張三條A投入到一次技能檢定，該次檢定自動成功(不要從混亂袋抽出混亂標記)。然後，抽取3張卡牌並獲得3資源(本效果每次檢定最多一次)。
all_cards.real_text: Myriad. If you commit 3 copies of Three Aces to a skill test, that test automatically succeeds (do not reveal chaos tokens from the chaos bag). Then draw 3 cards and gain 3 resources (max once per test).

all_cards.name: 夜盜
all_cards.text: [action]消耗夜盜：調查。如果你成功，不發現線索，改為獲得2資源，你每成功且超過難度1點，額外獲得+1資源(最大+3資源)。
all_cards.real_text: [action] Exhaust Burglary: Investigate. If you succeed, instead of discovering clues, gain 2 resources, +1 additional resource for each point you succeed by (to a maximum of +3 resources).

all_cards.name: 幽靈利刃
all_cards.text: 攻擊。將你的[willpower]值加入這次攻擊的技能值。在這次攻擊前，你可以立即與被攻擊的敵人交戰。這次攻擊造成+1傷害(如果該敵人為非[[精英]]，改為+2傷害)。
all_cards.real_text: Fight. Add your [willpower] value to your skill value for this attack. Immediately before this attack, you may engage the attacked enemy. This attack deals +1 damage (+2 damage instead if the enemy is non-[[Elite]]).

all_cards.name: 命令真言
all_cards.text: 聲名一張[[法術]]卡牌。在你的牌堆中查並抽取1張聲名的卡牌。混洗你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text: Name a [[Spell]] card. Search your deck for 1 copy of the named card and draw it. Shuffle your deck.
all_cards.flavor:
為明視野，要有光。
為暖體膚，要有熱。
為救靈魂，要有火。

all_cards.name: 月石
all_cards.text: 你獲得+1[willpower]和+1[agility]。 你不能將月石從你的手牌中打出或投入檢定。 [reaction]在你從手牌中丟棄月石後：將其打出(支付其費用)。
all_cards.real_text: You get +1 [willpower] and +1 [agility]. You cannot play or commit Moonstone from your hand. [reaction] After you discard Moonstone from your hand: Play it (paying its cost).
all_cards.traits: 道具. 遺物. 幻夢境

all_cards.name: 目力敏銳
all_cards.text:
每次技能檢定最多投入1張。
只要在基礎調查行動中投入目力敏銳，其獲得[intellect][intellect]和以下文本："如果這次檢定成功且超過難度至少2點，在此地點發現額外1個線索。"
all_cards.real_text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
While Sharp Vision is committed during a basic investigate action, it gains [intellect] [intellect] and the text: "If this test is successful by 2 or more, discover 1 additional clue at this location."

all_cards.name: 英勇救援
all_cards.text:
快速。在一名非[[精英]]敵人將要攻擊你所在地點或連接地點的另一位調查員時打出。
如果你此時不在該地點，移動到那裡。該敵人改為與你交戰，並對你結算該次攻擊。然後，對其造成1點傷害。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when a non-[[Elite]] enemy would attack another investigator at your location or a connecting location.
Move to that location if you are not already there. Engage that enemy and resolve its attack against you instead. Then, deal it 1 damage.

all_cards.name: 領導力
all_cards.text:
只要領導力被投入到另一位調查員執行的技能檢定，領導力獲得[willpower][wild]。
如果這次檢定成功，獲得2資源。如果領導力被投入到另一位調查員執行的技能檢定，該調查員也獲得2資源。
all_cards.real_text:
While Leadership is committed to a skill test being performed by another investigator, Leadership gains [willpower] [wild].
If this test is successful, gain 2 resources. If Leadership is committed to a skill test being performed by another investigator, that investigator also gains 2 resources.

all_cards.name: 夢境日記
all_cards.text: 研究。(FAQ, v2.0) 只要你在隱藏值至少4的地點，你的夢的本質獲得[wild][wild]。 [reaction]在你的回合開始時：在你的綁定卡牌中查找夢的本質，並將其加入你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Researched.
While you are at a location with at least 4 shroud, your Essence of the Dream gains [wild][wild].
[reaction] When your turn begins: Search your bonded cards for Essence of the Dream and add it to your hand.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 書籍. 守護

all_cards.name: 夢境日記
all_cards.text: 研究。(FAQ, v2.0) 只要你與敵人交戰，你的夢的本質獲得[wild][wild]。 [reaction]在你的回合開始時：在你的綁定卡牌中查找夢的本質，並將其加入你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Researched.
While you are engaged with an enemy, your Essence of the Dream gains [wild][wild].
[reaction] When your turn begins: Search your bonded cards for Essence of the Dream and add it to your hand.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 書籍. 守護

all_cards.name: 夢境日記
all_cards.text: 研究。(FAQ, v2.0) 只要你有至少8張手牌，你的夢的本質獲得[wild][wild]。 [reaction]在你的回合開始時：在你的綁定卡牌中查找夢的本質，並將其加入你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Researched.
While you have at least 8 cards in hand, your Essence of the Dream gains [wild][wild].
[reaction] When your turn begins: Search your bonded cards for Essence of the Dream and add it to your hand.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 書籍. 守護

all_cards.name: 快手
all_cards.text: 每位調查員限制1張。 [reaction]在你連續執行同一種行動兩次後，消耗快手：再進行一次該種行動(行動種類包括啟動、交戰、躲避、攻擊、調查、移動、打出、資源和抽取)。
all_cards.real_text: Limit 1 per investigator. [reaction] After you perform the same type of action twice in a row, exhaust Haste: Take another action of that type again (types include activate, engage, evade, fight, investigate, move, play, resource, and draw).

all_cards.name: 增強自我
all_cards.text: 多重。每副牌組限制1張增強自我(毅力)。 一個法術槽位可以有最多3張增強自我卡牌。 每當有卡牌效果要求你不使用[combat]，改為使用[willpower] 改為 of ，你可以忽略此類效果。 [fast]消耗增強自我：這次檢定你+2[combat]。
all_cards.real_text: Myriad. Limit 1 Empower Self (Stamina) per deck. Up to 3 Empower Self cards take up a single arcane slot. Anytime a card effect requires you to use [willpower] instead of [combat], you may ignore that aspect of the effect. [fast] Exhaust Empower Self: You get +2 [combat] for this test.

all_cards.name: 增強自我
all_cards.text: 多重。每副牌組限制1張增強自我(迅捷)。 一個法術槽位可以有最多3張增強自我卡牌。 每當有卡牌效果要求你不使用[agility]，改為使用[willpower]，你可以忽略此類效果。 [fast] 消耗增強自我：這次檢定你+2[agility]。
all_cards.real_text: Myriad. Limit 1 Empower Self (Alacrity) per deck. Up to 3 Empower Self cards take up a single arcane slot. Anytime a card effect requires you to use [willpower] instead of [agility], you may ignore that aspect of the effect. [fast] Exhaust Empower Self: You get +2 [agility] for this test.

all_cards.name: 增強自我
all_cards.text: 多重。每副牌組限制1張增強自我(敏銳)。 一個法術槽位可以有最多3張增強自我卡牌。 每當有卡牌效果要求你不使用[intellect]，改為使用[willpower]，你可以忽略此類效果。 [fast]消耗增強自我：這次檢定你+2[intellect]。
all_cards.real_text: Myriad. Limit 1 Empower Self (Acuity) per deck. Up to 3 Empower Self cards take up a single arcane slot. Anytime a card effect requires you to use [willpower] instead of [intellect], you may ignore that aspect of the effect. [fast] Exhaust Empower Self: You get +2 [intellect] for this test.

all_cards.name: 特薇拉·凱瑟琳·普萊斯
all_cards.text: [reaction]在你花費一張[[法術]]支援卡的充能後，消耗特薇拉·凱瑟琳·普萊斯：在該支援卡上放置1充能。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] After you spend 1 or more charges from a [[Spell]] asset, exhaust Twila Katherine Price: Place 1 charge on that asset.
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 藝術家. 入夢者
all_cards.flavor: "有時……我會希望我永遠都不要回到這個世界來。"

all_cards.name: 迅速撤退
all_cards.text:
每次技能檢定最多投入1張。
只要在躲避行動中投入迅速撤退，其獲得[agility][agility]和以下文本："如果這次檢定成功且超過難度至少2點，你可以自動躲避你所在地點的另一名敵人。"
all_cards.real_text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
While Expeditious Retreat is committed during a basic evade action, it gains [agility][agility] and the text: "If this test is successful by 2 or more, you may automatically evade another enemy at your location."

all_cards.name: 摒絕雜念
all_cards.text:
多重。
[fast]從你的手牌丟棄一張摒絕雜念：治癒本摒絕雜念的所有傷害和恐懼。
all_cards.real_text:
Myriad.
[fast] Discard a copy of Spiritual Resolve from your hand: Heal all damage and horror from this copy of Spiritual Resolve.

all_cards.name: 阿比蓋爾·福爾曼
all_cards.text:
[fast]：將你的遊戲區域中一張[[書籍]]支援卡疊加到阿比蓋爾·福爾曼，或將你遊戲區域中的一張[[書籍]]支援卡與已疊加的支援卡互換。疊加到她的支援卡不佔手部槽位(疊加的支援卡限制1張)。
[reaction]在你結算此疊加的[[書籍]]支援卡上的[action]能力後，消耗阿比蓋爾·福爾曼：再次結算其效果。
all_cards.real_text:
[fast]: Attach a [[Tome]] asset in your play area to Abigail Foreman, or switch a [[Tome]] asset in your play area with an attached asset. The asset attached to her takes up no hand slots. (Limit 1 attached asset.)
[reaction] After you resolve an [action] ability on the attached [[Tome]] asset, exhaust Abigail Foreman: Resolve its effects again.
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 米斯卡塔尼克

all_cards.name: 喬伊"老鼠"弗吉爾
all_cards.text:
[free]花費1資源：從你的手牌選擇一張[[道具]]支援卡並將其打出(支付其費用)。
[free]從場上丟棄一張[[道具]]支援卡：獲得2資源。
all_cards.real_text:
[fast] Spend 1 resource: Choose an [[Item]] asset from your hand and play it (paying its cost).
[fast] Discard an [[Item]] asset from play: Gain 2 resources.
all_cards.flavor:
"莫菲，只要肯付錢，不管是誰、什麼時間、什麼地點，老鼠都能完成任務。"
——《詭鎮奇談》調查員Jason Marker

all_cards.name: 神識之眼
all_cards.text:
多重。使用(3秘密)。
[reaction]在你將要檢定你的[intellect]、[combat]或[agility]時，花費1秘密：改為檢定你的[willpower]。
[fast]從你的手牌丟棄一張神識之眼：在本神識之眼上放置2秘密。
all_cards.real_text:
Myriad. Uses (3 secrets).
[reaction] When you would test your [intellect], [combat], or [agility], spend 1 secret: Test your [willpower] instead.
[fast] Discard a copy of Mind's Eye from your hand: Place 2 secrets on this copy of Mind's Eye.

all_cards.name: 閃耀的偏方三八面體
all_cards.text: [reaction]在你將要支付一張[[法術]]卡牌的費用時，消耗閃耀的偏方三八面體：改為檢定[willpower](X)，其中X為該卡牌的資源費用。如果你成功，其資源費用被視為你已支付。如果你失敗，取消打出該卡牌，並且不支付其任何費用(包括其行動費用)。本輪接下來的時間裡，你不能打出該卡名的卡牌。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] When you would pay the cost of a [[Spell]] card, exhaust Shining Trapezohedron: Instead, test [willpower] (X), where X is the card's resource cost. If you succeed, its resource cost is considered paid. If you fail, cancel the playing of that card without paying any of its costs (including its action cost). For the remainder of the round, you cannot play copies of that card.

all_cards.name: 噩夢球
all_cards.text: 每副牌組限制1張。 強制 - 在噩夢球入場後：在你的綁定卡牌中查找3張夢境寄生物，並將其疊加到噩夢球。在噩夢球離場時，將疊加的每張夢境寄生物放在一邊，位於場外。 [reaction] 在你抽出一個[auto_fail]混亂標記時，將一張疊加的夢境寄生物混洗入你的牌堆：取消該標記。
all_cards.real_text: Limit 1 per deck. Forced - After Nightmare Bauble enters play: Search your bonded cards for 3 copies of Dream Parasite and attach them to Nightmare Bauble. When Nightmare Bauble leaves play, set each attached Dream Parasite aside, out of play. [reaction] When you reveal an [auto_fail] chaos token, shuffle an attached Dream Parasite into your deck: Cancel that token.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 守護. 詛咒縈繞

all_cards.name: 夢境寄生物
all_cards.text:
綁定(噩夢球)。
只要夢境寄生物在你手牌中，你必須將其投入到你執行的下一次技能檢定(如可能)。
你的技能值不加上此技能卡的圖標，改為減去。
如果這次技能檢定失敗，受到1點傷害和1點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text:
Bonded (Nightmare Bauble).
While Dream Parasite is in your hand, you must commit it to the next skill test you perform, if able.
This skill's icons subtract from your skill value instead of adding to it.
If this skill test fails, take 1 damage and 1 horror.

all_cards.name: 拾荒
all_cards.text: [reaction]在你成功調查並且超過難度至少2點後，消耗拾荒：選擇你棄牌堆中一張[[道具]]卡牌，將其加入你的手牌或者打出(支付其費用)。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] After you successfully investigate by 2 or more, exhaust Scavenging: Choose an [[Item]] card in your discard pile and either add it to your hand or play it (paying its cost).

all_cards.name: 空虛項鍊
all_cards.text:
每副牌組限制1張。使用(0充能)。
[reaction]在你擊敗一名敵人後：在空虛項鍊上放置充能。
[fast]如果空虛項鍊上有至少3充能：在你的綁定卡牌中查找食願項鍊，並將其與空虛項鍊交換，將空虛項鍊上的所有充能移動到食願項鍊上。
all_cards.real_text:
Limit 1 per deck. Uses (0 charges).
[reaction] After you defeat an enemy: Place 1 charge on Empty Vessel.
[fast] If there are at least 3 charges on Empty Vessel: Search your bonded cards for Wish Eater and swap it with Empty Vessel, moving all charges from Empty Vessel to Wish Eater.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 遺物. 祝福

all_cards.name: 食願項鍊
all_cards.text: 綁定(空虛項鍊)。 [reaction]你在技能檢定中抽出一個[skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]或[elder_thing]混亂標記時，花費1充能：取消該標記。治癒1點傷害和1點恐懼。 強制 - 如果食願項鍊沒有充能：在你的綁定卡牌中查找空虛項鍊，並將其與食願項鍊交換。
all_cards.real_text: Bonded (Empty Vessel). [reaction] When you reveal a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], or [elder_thing] chaos token during a skill test, spend 1 charge: Cancel that token. Heal 1 damage and 1 horror. Forced - If Wish Eater has no charges: Search your bonded cards for Empty Vessel and swap it with Wish Eater.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 遺物. 祝福

all_cards.name: 驚喜的發現
all_cards.text:
多重。
[reaction]在你查找你的牌堆時若驚喜的發現在被查找卡牌中：將其放置入你的遊戲區域。你必須將其投入到你執行的下一次能將其投入的技能檢定。如果該檢定成功，抽取1張卡牌。(每次查找最多使用一次[[研究]]能力。)
all_cards.real_text:
Myriad.
[reaction] When you search your deck and Surprising Find is among the searched cards: Put it into play in your play area. You must commit it to the next eligible skill test you perform. If that test is successful, draw 1 card. (Max one [[Research]] ability per search.)

all_cards.name: 智慧古書
all_cards.text:
使用(2秘密)。
[action] 消耗智慧古書：選擇你所在地點的一位調查員。該調查員在其牌堆頂部3張卡牌中查找並抽取一張卡牌，並混洗其牌堆。然後，你可以花費1秘密來使該調查員立即以-2費用打出該卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (2 secrets).
[action] Exhaust Old Book of Lore: Choose an investigator at your location. That investigator searches the top 3 cards of their deck for a card, draws it, and shuffles their deck. Then, you may spend 1 secret to have that investigator immediately play that card, reducing its cost by 2.

all_cards.name: 絞喉索
all_cards.text: [fast]在你的回合中，消耗絞喉索：攻擊。這次攻擊你+2[combat]。只能對剩餘1點生命值的敵人使用此能力。
all_cards.real_text: [fast] During your turn, exhaust Garrote Wire: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. Use only on an enemy with exactly 1 remaining health.

all_cards.name: 黛利拉·歐魯爾克
all_cards.text:
你獲得+1[combat]和+1[agility]。
[fast]消耗黛利拉·歐魯爾克並花費X資源：選擇你所在地點的一名敵人。對所選敵人造成1點傷害(如果該敵人已消耗，改為2點傷害)。X為所選敵人的躲避值。
all_cards.real_text:
You get +1 [combat] and +1 [agility].
[fast] Exhaust Delilah O'Rourke and spend X resources: Choose an enemy at your location. Deal 1 damage to the chosen enemy (2 damage instead if that enemy is exhausted). X is the chosen enemy's evade value.
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 罪犯. 犯罪團夥
all_cards.flavor: "謝爾頓？歐巴尼恩？我才不管他們是誰。只要能拿到報酬就行。"

all_cards.name: 黑貓
all_cards.text:
每當你在技能檢定中抽出[tablet]、[elder_thing]或[elder_sign]符號，你可以不使用該圖標的效果，改為選擇使用以下效果：
[tablet]：-1。黑貓受到1點直接傷害。
[elder_thing]：-1。黑貓受到1點直接恐懼。
[elder_sign]：+5。治癒黑貓的所有傷害和恐懼。
all_cards.real_text:
Anytime you reveal a [tablet], [elder_thing], or [elder_sign] symbol during a skill test, you may choose to use the following effects instead of that symbol's normal effects:
[tablet]: -1. The Black Cat takes 1 direct damage.
[elder_thing]: -1. The Black Cat takes 1 direct horror.
[elder_sign]: +5. Heal all damage and horror from The Black Cat.
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 化身. 幻夢境

all_cards.name: 神秘啟示
all_cards.text:
你的手牌上限增加1張。
你擁有額外1個手部槽位，只能用來放置一張[[書籍]]支援卡。
all_cards.real_text:
Your maximum hand size is increased by 1.
You have 1 additional hand slot, which can only be used to hold a [[Tome]] asset.
all_cards.flavor: 大腦增廣後能夠整本地記憶大量書籍。

all_cards.name: 昴星團斷章
all_cards.text:
只要你有……
- ……至少5張手牌，你獲得+1[intellect]。
- ……至少10張手牌，你獲得+1[willpower]。
- ……至少15張手牌，你獲得+1[intellect]。
all_cards.real_text:
While you have...
- ...5 or more cards in hand, you get +1 [intellect].
- ...10 or more cards in hand, you get +1 [willpower].
- ...15 or more cards in hand, you get +1 [intellect].

all_cards.name: 神秘筆跡
all_cards.text:
獲得3個資源(如果你手牌中有至少10張其它卡牌，改為4個資源)。
[reaction]在你自己回合抽取神秘筆跡後：將其打出。
all_cards.real_text:
Gain 3 resources (4 resources instead if you have 10 or more other cards in hand).
[reaction] After you draw Cryptic Writings during your turn: Play it.
all_cards.flavor:
"……相比之下，還有少量書籍是以我無法理解的語言寫說的。"
<cite>H. P. 洛夫克拉夫特，《倫道夫·卡特的供述》</cite>

all_cards.name: 心勝於物
all_cards.text:
快速。只能在你回合中打出。
直到本輪結束，將你的[intellect]分別增加到[combat]和[agility]。抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play during your turn.
Until the end of the round, add your [intellect] to your [combat] and [agility]. Draw 1 card.

all_cards.name: 預見手鏡
all_cards.text: 使用(4秘密)。 [reaction]在你所在地點的技能檢定開始後，消耗預見手鏡並花費1秘密：這次檢定的"抽出混亂標記"步驟改為在此時(投入卡牌之前)執行，而不在投入卡牌後執行。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (4 secrets). [reaction] After a skill test at your location begins, exhaust Scrying Mirror and spend 1 secret: Perform the "reveal chaos token" step of the test now (before committing cards), instead of after committing cards.

all_cards.name: 藍焰術
all_cards.text: 使用(4充能)。 [action]花費1充能：攻擊。這次攻擊不使用[combat]，改為使用[willpower]並造成+1傷害。如果這次攻擊期間抽出[elder_sign]、"+1"或"0"標記，受到1點傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (4 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Fight. This attack uses [willpower] instead of [combat] and deals +1 damage. If an [elder_sign], "+1," or "0" token is revealed during this attack, take 1 damage.

all_cards.name: 預知術
all_cards.text: 使用(3充能)。 [action]花費1充能：調查。這次調查不使用[intellect]，改為使用[willpower]。如果你成功，額外發現此地點的1個線索。如果這次調查期間抽出[elder_sign]、"+1"或"0"標記，受到1點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (3 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Investigate. Investigate using [willpower] instead of [intellect]. If you succeed, discover 1 additional clue at this location. If an [elder_sign], "+1," or "0" token is revealed during this investigation, take 1 horror.

all_cards.name: 水晶靈擺
all_cards.text:
你獲得+1[willpower]。
[reaction]在你所在地點開始技能檢定後，消耗水晶靈擺：聲明一個數字。如果這次檢定成功且超過的點數為該數字，或者失敗且低於的點數為該數字，抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
You get +1 [willpower].
[reaction] After a skill test at your location begins, exhaust Crystal Pendulum: Name a number. If this test succeeds by that number or fails by that number, draw 1 card.

all_cards.name: 永夜長袍
all_cards.text: [reaction]在你打出一張[[法術]]卡牌時，消耗永夜長袍：該卡牌的費用減1。打出該卡牌不會引起趁亂攻擊。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] When you play a [[Spell]] card, exhaust Robes of Endless Night: Reduce the cost of that card by 1. Playing that card does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
all_cards.flavor: 黑暗是意外的深淵。光明是內心的深淵。

all_cards.name: 難述真相
all_cards.text: 使用(3充能)。 [action]花費1充能：躲避。這次躲避嘗試不使用[agility]，改為使用[willpower]。這次躲避嘗試你+2[willpower]。如果你成功，對你躲避的敵人造成1點傷害。如果這次躲避嘗試期間抽出[elder_sign]、"+1"或"0"標記，失去1資源。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (3 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Evade. This evasion attempt uses [willpower] instead of [agility]. You get +2 [willpower] for this evasion attempt. If you succeed, deal 1 damage to the evaded enemy. If an [elder_sign], "+1," or "0" token is revealed during this evasion attempt, lose 1 resource.

all_cards.name: 重新充能
all_cards.text: 選擇你所在地點的調查員控制的一張[[法術]]或[[遺物]]支援卡，從混亂袋中隨機抽出1個標記。如果抽出[skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]、[elder_thing]或[auto_fail]符號，所選支援卡增加1充能。否則，所選支援卡增加4充能。
all_cards.real_text: Choose a [[Spell]] or [[Relic]] asset controlled by an investigator at your location and reveal a random chaos token from the chaos bag. If you reveal a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol, add 1 charge to the chosen asset. Otherwise, add 4 charges to the chosen asset.

all_cards.name: 拳擊手套
all_cards.text:
你攻擊時+1[combat]。
[reaction]在你擊敗一名敵人後，消耗拳擊手套：在你牌堆頂部6張卡牌中查找1張[[勇氣]]事件卡，將其加入你的手牌。混洗你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text:
You get +1 [combat] while fighting.
[reaction] After you defeat an enemy, exhaust Boxing Gloves: Search the top 6 cards of your deck for a [[Spirit]] event and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck.

all_cards.name: 幹掉他們
all_cards.text: 攻擊。在這次行動開始時，獲得2資源。
all_cards.real_text: Fight. When this action begins, gain 2 resources.
all_cards.flavor: 該緊緊螺絲了。

all_cards.name: 還擊
all_cards.text: 快速。在一名敵人攻擊你後打出，不論該次攻擊是否被取消。 攻擊。這次攻擊將剛剛發動攻擊的敵人作為目標。
all_cards.real_text: Fast. Play after an enemy attacks you, even if that attack was canceled. Fight. This attack targets the attacking enemy.

all_cards.name: 一二連擊
all_cards.text: 攻擊。這次攻擊中你+1[combat]。如果你成功，你可以再次攻擊該敵人。該次攻擊中你+2[combat]並造成+1傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack. If you succeed, you may fight that enemy again. You get +2 [combat] and deal +1 damage for that attack.
all_cards.flavor: 納撒尼爾以他左手迅速的刺拳、還有他右手標誌性的後手重拳著稱。

all_cards.name: "到這兒來！"
all_cards.text: 快速。在任何[free]時間段中打出。 交戰。攻擊。選擇一名與你所在地點之間最多相隔2個地點的非[[精英]]敵人。將該敵人移動到你所在地點，與其交戰，並攻擊該敵人。
all_cards.real_text: Fast. Play during any [fast] window. Engage. Fight. Choose a non-[[Elite]] enemy up to 2 locations away. Move that enemy to your location, engage it, and attack it.

all_cards.name: 吸取教訓
all_cards.text:
快速。在你受到一名敵人攻擊造成的傷害後打出。
發現你所在地點的2個線索。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play after you take damage from an enemy attack.
Discover 2 clues at your location.

all_cards.name: .18大口徑短口手槍
all_cards.text: 使用(2子彈)。 [action]花費1子彈：攻擊。這次攻擊中你+2[combat]並造成+1傷害。如果你失敗，將1子彈放置在.18大口徑短口手槍上。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (2 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +2 [combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack. If you fail, place 1 ammo on .18 Derringer.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 槍械. 違法

all_cards.name: 格林童話
all_cards.text:
使用(4秘密)。
[reaction]在你所在地點的調查員技能檢定失敗且低於難度至少2點後，消耗格林童話並花費1秘密: 治癒該調查員的1點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (4 secrets).
[reaction] After an investigator at your location fails a skill test by 2 or more, exhaust Grimm's Fairy Tales and spend 1 secret: Heal 1 horror from that investigator.

all_cards.name: 陳舊的鑰匙圈
all_cards.text: 使用(2鑰匙)。如果陳舊的鑰匙圈上沒有鑰匙，則將其丟棄。 [action]：調查。這次調查中，你所在地點隱藏值-2。如果你成功，移除陳舊的鑰匙圈上的1鑰匙。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (2 keys). If there are no keys on Old Keyring, discard it. [action]: Investigate. Your location gets -2 shroud for this investigation. If you succeed, remove 1 key from Old Keyring.

all_cards.name: 咬緊牙關
all_cards.text:
快速。在你技能檢定失敗後打出。
在本輪接下來的時間裡，你每項技能+1。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play after you fail a skill test.
You get +1 to each of your skills for the remainder of the round.

all_cards.name: .18大口徑短口手槍
all_cards.text: 使用(3子彈)。 [action]花費1子彈：攻擊。這次攻擊中你+2[combat]並造成+1傷害。如果你失敗，放置1子彈在.18大口徑短口手槍上，並且本輪你下一次觸發本能力時，該次攻擊中你額外+1[combat]。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (3 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +2 [combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack. If you fail, place 1 ammo on .18 Derringer and the next time you trigger this ability this round, you get an additional +1 [combat] for that attack.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 槍械. 違法

all_cards.name: 奧恩奶奶
all_cards.text:
你獲得+1[willpower]和+1[intellect]。
[reaction]在你所在地點的調查員的技能檢定將要失敗時，消耗奧恩奶奶：該調查員該次檢定的技能值+1或-1。
all_cards.real_text:
You get +1 [willpower] and +1 [intellect].
[reaction] When an investigator at your location would fail a skill test, exhaust Granny Orne: That investigator either gets +1 skill value or -1 skill value for that test.

all_cards.name: 一點就通
all_cards.text:
永久。
在你每回合的第一次行動中，或在你回合期間第一次行動前，你執行的每次技能檢定難度+1。
在你每回合的第三次行動中，或在你回合期間第三次行動後，你執行的每次技能檢定難度-1。
all_cards.real_text:
Permanent.
During or before your first action of each of your turns, each skill test you perform gets +1 difficulty.
During or after your third action of each of your turns, each skill test you perform gets -1 difficulty.

all_cards.name: 溫妮弗雷德·哈巴默克
all_cards.text:
[free]如果在這次技能檢定中，你投入了自己控制的2張不同的非弱點卡牌：抽取1張卡牌。(每次檢定限制1次。)
[elder_sign]效果：+1。在這次檢定結束後，你每成功超過難度2點，將你本次檢定投入的1張卡牌返回自己手中。
all_cards.real_text:
[fast] If 2 different non-weakness cards you control are committed to this skill test: Draw 1 card. (Limit once per test.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1. After this test ends, for every 2 points you succeeded by, return a card you committed to this test to your hand.
all_cards.flavor: "我能飛得更高。"
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：流浪者([rogue])等級0-5，中立卡牌等級0-5。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數限制)：你能做得更好、囂張、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 溫妮弗雷德——她父母叫她溫特爾，朋友們都叫她溫妮——在就讀的保留地學校裡，她是最聰明的孩子之一。但是，她做事不顧後果，不將權威放在眼中，常常因此陷入麻煩。有一天，她從一個農夫的車庫裡發現了一架陳舊的雙翼飛機，決定"把它開上天兜一圈。"她的人生軌跡從此徹底改變。曾是一戰飛行員的飛機主人被溫妮的天賦給折服，主動提出要將自己的所有技藝傳授給她。現在，溫妮在全國各地巡迴表演，炫耀自己的技術，大家都知道她是個"無所畏懼的女人"。但她的無畏在一場表演當中受到了挑戰，她發現了一種自己差點沒法描述的生物：牠有著皮質的翅膀和一隻鼓著膿皰的眼睛。

all_cards.name: 你能做得更好
all_cards.text:
溫妮弗雷德·哈巴默克牌組專用。
只能在你執行的技能檢定中投入。
all_cards.real_text:
Winifred Habbamock deck only.
Commit only to a skill test you are performing.
all_cards.flavor: "我跟你說過的。"

all_cards.name: 囂張
all_cards.text:
你執行的技能檢定若能投入囂張，則必須將其投入。
你的技能值改為減去本卡牌上的技能圖標，而不是加上。
如果這次技能檢定成功，將本技能卡返回手牌。
all_cards.real_text:
You must commit Arrogance to each eligible skill test you perform.
This skill's icons subtract from your skill value instead of adding to it.
If this test succeeds, return this skill to your hand.

all_cards.name: 毛瑟C96手槍
all_cards.text: 使用(5子彈)。 [action]消耗毛瑟C96手槍並花費1子彈：攻擊。這次攻擊中你+1[combat]並造成+1傷害。如果你成功且超過難度至少2點，你可以準備毛瑟C96手槍或獲得1資源。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (5 ammo). [action] Exhaust Mauser C96 and spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +1 [combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack. If you succeed by 2 or more, either ready Mauser C96 or gain 1 resource.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 槍械. 違法

all_cards.name: 身手矯捷
all_cards.text: 這次技能檢定成功且每超過難度1點，在本次檢定結算後你可以立即移動到一個連接地點(最多移動3次)。
all_cards.real_text: For each point this skill test succeeds by, after it resolves, you may immediately move to a connecting location (to a maximum of 3 times).

all_cards.name: 心靈手巧
all_cards.text:
每次技能檢定最多投入1張。
如果這次技能檢定成功，抽取1張卡牌(如果超過難度至少2點，改為抽取2張卡牌)。
all_cards.real_text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
If this test is successful, draw 1 card (2 cards instead if it succeeds by 2 or more).
all_cards.flavor: 易如反掌。

all_cards.name: 學人精
all_cards.text: 在你將學人精投入到技能檢定後，在另一位調查員的棄牌堆中查找並投入一張你能夠投入到這次檢定中的技能卡。這次檢定結束後，將該卡放到其所有者的牌堆底部。
all_cards.real_text: After you commit Copycat to a skill test, search the discard pile of another investigator for a skill you can commit to this test, and commit it. After this test ends, place that card on the bottom of its owner's deck.

all_cards.name: 貝雷塔M1918衝鋒槍
all_cards.text: 使用(4子彈)。 [action]消耗貝雷塔M1918衝鋒槍並花費1子彈：攻擊。這次攻擊中你+4[combat]並造成+1傷害。如果你成功且超過難度至少2點，執行以下一項：準備貝雷塔M1918衝鋒槍，或者這次攻擊額外造成+1傷害(如果你成功且超過難度至少4點，則改為執行兩項)。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (4 ammo). [action] Exhaust Beretta M1918 and spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +4 [combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack. If you succeed by 2 or more, either ready Beretta M1918, or this attack deals an additional +1 damage (if you succeed by 4 or more, do both).
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 槍械. 違法

all_cards.name: 哈維·沃爾特斯
all_cards.text:
[reaction]調查階段中，在你所在地點的一位調查員從其牌堆抽取至少1張卡牌後：該調查員抽取1張卡牌。(每輪限制1次。)
[elder_sign]效果：+1。抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] After an investigator at your location draws 1 or more cards from their deck during the investigation phase: That investigator draws 1 card. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1. Draw 1 card.
all_cards.flavor: "我在處理這類恐怖事件上有經驗。"
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：探求者([seeker])等級0-5，中立卡等級0-5。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數限制)：知識寶庫、該死的好奇心、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 沃爾特斯教授本來熱衷於神秘與晦澀的事物，但是在多年之後他發現，自己積累的關於古語言、褻瀆古物和怪異儀式的知識，對於解決當代危機至關重要。他既是一位狂熱收藏家，熱衷於收集史前曾出現的東西；他又是一口知識的源泉，了解那些最初的、崇拜上億年前的恐怖神明的宗教。仍然在世並且沒有陷入瘋狂的人當中，沒有誰能比哈維更了解神祕事物。當有超自然事件發生，沃爾特斯教授就會用他大量的資源和經驗來擔起責任。

all_cards.name: 知識寶庫
all_cards.text:
哈維·沃爾特牌組專用。
你的手牌上限增加2張。
[reaction]在你調查成功後，消耗知識寶庫並選擇你所在地點的一位調查員：該調查員抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Harvey Walters deck only.
Your maximum hand size is increased by 2.
[reaction] After you successfully investigate, exhaust Vault of Knowledge and choose an investigator at your location: That investigator draws 1 card.

all_cards.name: 該死的好奇心
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 你每有3張手牌：受到1點傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - For every 3 cards in your hand: Take 1 damage.
all_cards.flavor:
"……我只希望我的描述能讓那些完全信任我的人保持理智和謹慎，而不是勾起他們的好奇心。"
<cite>H. P. 洛夫克拉夫特，《瘋狂山脈》</cite>

all_cards.name: 傑奎琳·法恩
all_cards.text:
[reaction]在你所在地點的一位調查員將要抽出任意數量的混亂標記時：抽出2個額外的標記。從抽出的標記中選擇並取消2個非[auto_fail]標記，或取消1個[auto_fail]標記。(每輪限制1次。)
[elder_sign]效果：+1。如果本效果被取消或忽略，抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] When an investigator at your location would reveal any number of chaos tokens: Reveal 2 additional tokens. Of the revealed tokens, choose and cancel 2 non-[auto_fail] tokens, or 1 [auto_fail] token. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1. If this effect is canceled or ignored, draw 1 card.
all_cards.flavor: "未來是可以改寫的。"
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：潛修者([mystic])等級0-5，中立卡牌等級0-5。 牌組構建需求 (不計入卡牌張數限制)：命運決定者、黑暗未來、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 鮮血。火焰。毀滅。每個晚上，傑奎琳的夢裡總是充滿了還未發生的情景。一開始，她認為這些夢是一種可怕的詛咒。但是，當她開始控制自己的靈視，仔細觀察夢中的事件時，她現在明白這不是詛咒，而是一種召喚。世界將會陷入長達千年、難以言名的混沌，而這預兆只有她一個人得知。她夢境的預示從未出錯，但不能讓這夜夜縈繞的噩夢成為現實。

all_cards.name: 命運決定者
all_cards.text:
傑奎琳·法恩牌組專用。
[reaction]在你使用傑奎琳·法恩的[reaction]能力時，消耗命運決定者：這次使用不計入她能力的使用次數限制。
all_cards.real_text:
Jacqueline Fine deck only.
[reaction] When you use Jacqueline Fine's [reaction] ability, exhaust Arbiter of Fates: This use of her ability does not count towards its limit.
all_cards.flavor: 我能看見命運之線，知道它們何時會斷裂。

all_cards.name: 黑暗未來
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 將黑暗未來放置入你的威脅區域。 你不能取消也不能忽略[elder_sign]、[skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]、[elder_thing]、[auto_fail]標記。 強制 - 當你回合結束時：從混亂袋隨機抽出5個混亂標記。如果抽出了[elder_sign]符號，丟棄黑暗未來。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Put Dark Future into play in your threat area. You cannot cancel or ignore [elder_sign], [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], and [auto_fail] tokens. Forced - At the end of your turn: Reveal 5 random tokens from the chaos bag. If an [elder_sign] symbol is revealed, discard Dark Future.

all_cards.name: 納撒尼爾·曹
all_cards.text:
[reaction]在你藉由事件卡，或事件卡上的攻擊能力對一名敵人造成傷害時：造成額外1點傷害。(每階段限制1次。)
[elder_sign]效果：+1。如果這次攻擊中這次技能檢定成功，將你棄牌堆的1張事件卡返回你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] When you deal damage to an enemy by an event or a fight ability on an event: Deal 1 additional damage. (Limit once per phase.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1. If this skill test is successful during an attack, return an event from your discard pile to your hand.
all_cards.flavor: "我必須繼續戰鬥。"
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：守衛者([guardian])等級0-5，中立卡牌等級0-5。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數限制)：蘭道爾·曹、湯米·馬洛伊、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 前途無量的拳擊手納撒尼爾·曹，曾有人以重金邀請他參加一場拳賽，爭奪冠軍，那時他以為自己終於要成功了。但納撒尼爾·曹的經紀人竟是臭名昭著的歐巴尼恩幫成員，他常常逼迫納撒尼爾·曹在拳擊台上假裝倒下，捏造賽果。他出言拒絕，導致自己的哥哥蘭道爾出了"意外"。這群黑幫匪徒每晚都在危害著阿卡姆市民的安全，納撒尼爾再也無法容忍他們的所為。現在他將自己的拳頭用在正途，在街道上巡邏，保護他人不受傷害。但他很快就發現，阿卡姆的陰影之下危機四伏，不僅僅是黑幫……

all_cards.name: 蘭道爾·曹
all_cards.text: 納撒尼爾·曹牌組專用。 [reaction]在蘭道爾·曹入場後：治癒3點傷害，或者在你的牌堆及棄牌堆中查找一張[[武器]]支援卡，將其打出(支付其費用)，並混洗你的牌堆。(FAQ, v1.8)
all_cards.real_text: Nathaniel Cho deck only. [reaction] After Randall Cho enters play: Heal 3 damage or search your deck and discard pile for a [[Weapon]] asset, play it (paying its cost), and shuffle your deck.
all_cards.flavor: "你別幹了，納撒尼爾。早晚你會把自己的命也給搭進去。"

all_cards.name: 湯米·馬洛伊
all_cards.text: 獵物 - 僅對納撒尼爾·曹。 獵手。 強制 - 在湯米·馬洛伊將要受到任意數量的傷害時：該傷害數量減至1。
all_cards.real_text: Prey - Nathaniel Cho only. Hunter. Forced - When Tommy Malloy would take any amount of damage: Reduce that amount to 1.
all_cards.traits: 類人. 罪犯. 犯罪團夥
all_cards.flavor:
他們都管他叫"大傻"。
納撒尼爾稱呼他為人渣。

all_cards.name: 斯特拉·克拉克
all_cards.text:
[reaction]在你技能檢定失敗後：你本輪可以在自己回合期間進行額外一次行動。(每輪限制1次。)
[elder_sign]效果：+1。你可以改為選擇讓該次技能檢定自動失敗，來治癒1點傷害和1點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] After you fail a skill test: You may take an additional action during your turn this round. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1. You may instead choose to automatically fail this skill test to heal 1 damage and 1 horror.
all_cards.flavor: "我能聽見它的聲音。那它聽得見我說話嗎？"
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：求生者([survivor])等級0-5、中立卡牌等級0-5。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數限制)：3張不畏雨雪、1張霧之召喚、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 打從斯特拉在阿卡姆郵局當差以來，她很清楚兩件事。第一，她的父母錯將她叫做兒子，還給他取了一個男孩名字。第二是，在深夜裡——國王港懸崖上的小屋曾低聲念出了她的真名——她為自己挑選的名字："斯特拉"。斯特拉每週六不論天氣如何都會派送郵件，這不是一件易事，但她只要想到自己在維繫人們之間的聯繫，變對這份工作滿懷熱忱。隨後她就開始翻找信件。每次她派送到最後，包裡總是會多出來一個信封。信封上的收件人一直是她，蓋有國王港的郵戳。信封裡只有一封信，信上是印刷的一個詞："斯特拉"。

all_cards.name: 不畏雨雪
all_cards.text:
斯特拉·克拉克牌組專用。
如果這次技能檢定失敗，取消這次檢定失敗的所有效果。
all_cards.real_text:
Stella Clark deck only.
If this skill test fails, cancel all effects of the failed test.
all_cards.flavor: ……即便是夜色昏暗，郵差也不會受困，迅速地完成派件任務。

all_cards.name: 霧之召喚
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 將霧之召喚放置入你的威脅區域。 強制 - 在你發動難度值至少4點的技能檢定後：受到1點傷害。 [action][action]：丟棄霧之召喚。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Put Called by the Mists into play in your threat area. Forced - After you initiate a skill test with a difficulty of 4 or higher: Take 1 damage. [action] [action]: Discard Called by the Mists.

all_cards.name: 戴克斯特‧德雷克
all_cards.text:
[free]在你的回合中，丟棄一張你控制的支援卡：從你手牌打出一張不同名稱的支援卡，其費用減1(每輪限制一次)。
[elder_sign]效果：+2。你可以將你遊戲區域的一張支援卡返回你的手牌。然後，抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
[fast] During your turn, discard an asset you control: Play an asset with a different title from your hand, reducing its cost by 1. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +2. You may return an asset from your play area to your hand. Then, draw 1 card.
all_cards.flavor: "想看看真正的魔法嗎？"
all_cards.back_text: 牌組卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：潛修者卡牌([mystic])等級0-5，流浪者卡牌([rogue])等級0-2，中立卡牌等級0-5。 牌組構建需求(不計入牌組卡牌張數)：精湛手法、密教殘頁、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 戴克斯特‧德雷克從大戰退役後成了一名優秀的魔術師，總能用精巧的幻象和別出心裁的舞台技巧迷惑觀眾。儘管他聲名鵲起，戴克斯特還是想發現真正的魔法。他為自己在戰爭中找的的密教文本著了魔，儘管這是一節火燒過的斷章，但它也卻是臭名招著的《死靈之書》中的一節。戴克斯特用自己的財富尋找古代典籍之後的真相，但他的發現卻叫人毛骨悚然。他知道，除了自己，可能再沒人能阻止邪惡吞噬整個世界。

all_cards.name: Molly Maxwell
all_cards.text:
Dexter Drake deck only. Replacement.
[free] Exhaust Molly Maxwell and deal her 1 horror: Name any trait. One at a time, reveal cards from the top of your deck until an asset with the named trait is revealed. Draw that asset. Shuffle each other revealed card back into your deck.
all_cards.real_text:
Dexter Drake deck only. Replacement.
[fast] Exhaust Molly Maxwell and deal her 1 horror: Name any trait. One at a time, reveal cards from the top of your deck until an asset with the named trait is revealed. Draw that asset. Shuffle each other revealed card back into your deck.

all_cards.name: Yaztaroth
all_cards.text: Dexter Drake deck only. Replacement. Revelation - Put Yaztaroth into play in your threat area. You cannot put assests into play. [action] [action]: Discard Yaztaroth.
all_cards.real_text: Dexter Drake deck only. Replacement. Revelation - Put Yaztaroth into play in your threat area. You cannot play assets or put assets into play. [action] [action]: Discard Yaztaroth.

all_cards.name: 神射手
all_cards.text:
[reaction]在你使用[[槍械]]支援卡的攻擊能力時，消耗神射手：選擇以下一項或兩項： - 
- 這次攻擊不使用[combat]，改為使用[agility]。你的[combat]修正值改為修正你的[agility]。
- 對於本次攻擊中受到攻擊的敵人，不使用其攻擊值，改為使用其躲避值。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] When you use a fight ability on a [[Firearm]] asset, exhaust Sharpshooter: Choose one, or both - 
- This attack uses [agility] instead of [combat]. All modifiers to your [combat] for this attack modify your [agility] instead.
- Use the attacked enemy's evade value for this attack, instead of their fight value.

all_cards.name: 惠頓·格林
all_cards.text:
只要你有控制[[書籍]]或[[遺物]]支援卡，你獲得+1[intellect]。
[reaction]在你翻開一張地點卡或將一個新地點放置入場後，消耗惠頓·格林：在你牌堆頂部6張卡牌中查找並抽取1張[[書籍]]或[[遺物]]支援卡。混洗你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text:
While you control a [[Tome]] or [[Relic]] asset, you get +1 [intellect].
[reaction] After you reveal a location or put a new location into play, exhaust Whitton Greene: Search the top 6 cards of your deck for a [[Tome]] or [[Relic]] asset and draw it. Shuffle your deck.
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 米斯卡塔尼克

all_cards.name: 米斯卡塔尼克考古基金
all_cards.text: 永久。每副牌組限制1張。 你擁有額外2個盟友槽位，只能用來放置[[米斯卡塔尼克]]支援卡。 強制 - 在你每次受到傷害或恐懼時：不能分配超過1點傷害/恐懼到[[米斯卡塔尼克]]支援卡。
all_cards.real_text: Permanent. Limit 1 per deck. You have 2 additional ally slots, which can only be used to hold [[Miskatonic]] assets. Forced - When you take damage or horror: No more than 1 of that damage/horror can be assigned to a [[Miskatonic]] asset.

all_cards.name: 死靈之書
all_cards.subname: 彼得魯斯·德·達西亞譯本
all_cards.text:
使用(6秘密)。每副牌組限制1張。
[free]花費1秘密：這次技能檢定你的技能值+2。
[free]花費2秘密：抽取2張卡牌。
[free]花費3秘密：發現任意地點的1個線索。
[free]花費4秘密：對與你交戰的一名敵人造成3點傷害。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (6 secrets). Limit 1 per deck.
[fast] Spend 1 secret: You get +2 skill value for this skill test.
[fast] Spend 2 secrets: Draw 2 cards.
[fast] Spend 3 secrets: Discover 1 clue at any location.
[fast] Spend 4 secrets: Deal 3 damage to an enemy engaged with you.

all_cards.name: 瑪麗修女
all_cards.text:
在設置期間，加入2個[bless]標記到混亂袋。
[reaction]在一輪結束時：加入1個[bless]標記到混亂袋。
[elder_sign]效果：+1。如果你成功，加入1個[bless]標記到混亂袋。
all_cards.real_text:
During setup, add 2 [bless] tokens to the chaos bag.
[reaction] When the round ends: Add 1 [bless] token to the chaos bag.
[elder_sign] effect: +1. If you succeed, add 1 [bless] token to the chaos bag.
all_cards.flavor: "主看護我的道路。我以信為冑。"
all_cards.back_text: 牌組卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：守衛者卡牌([guardian])等級0-5，中立卡牌等級0-5，潛修者卡牌([mystic])等級0-2。 牌組構建需求 (不計入牌組卡牌張數)：守護天使、信仰危機、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 瑪麗修女堅信，越是有詭奇奧義的力量在世上作怪，自己就越要在這條道路上抵禦那些力量，只要有可能，無論有多遠，都要保護無辜之人。儘管除了教會的罩袍和堅定的信仰之外別無他物，但瑪麗修女只要一從同儕那裏聽聞超自然的威脅作祟，必然挺身前往一探究竟。教會中其他成員對此不屑一顧，以為這些都是中世紀的無知妄言。但瑪麗修女知道，這些陰影中潛藏著真實的邪惡——他還知道這些邪惡如果聽之任之，會給主創造的一切都帶來毀滅和恐怖。

all_cards.name: 阿曼達‧夏普
all_cards.text: 強制 - 當調查階段開始時：抽取1張卡牌。丟棄阿曼達‧夏普底下的卡牌。選擇你的一張手牌放置在她底下。 強制 - 當你執行的技能檢定開始時：如果可能，投入阿曼達‧夏普底下的卡牌。在檢定結束時不要將其丟棄。(FAQ, v1.8) [elder_sign]效果：+0。這次檢定你可以將阿曼達‧夏普底下的卡牌的技能圖標數量翻倍。
all_cards.real_text: Forced - At the start of the investigation phase: Draw 1 card. Discard the card beneath Amanda Sharpe. Choose a card from your hand and place it beneath her. Forced - At the start of a skill test you are performing: Commit the card beneath Amanda Sharpe, if able. Do not discard it when the test ends. [elder_sign] effect: +0. For this test, you may double the number of skill icons on the card beneath Amanda Sharpe.
all_cards.traits: 米斯卡塔尼克. 學者
all_cards.back_text: 牌組卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：探求者卡牌([seeker])等級0-5，中立卡牌等級0-5，[[精通]]技能卡等級0-3。 牌組構建需求(不計入牌組卡牌張數)：晦澀研究、深海低語、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 阿曼達‧夏普眼看就要成為米大最傑出的畢業生。但自從她看見一幅詭奇的繪畫之後，課業就受到了影響。畫上是一個龐然巨物從深海湧起。她的夢境中全是一座巨大的沉沒之城，還有不明語言的低語。她繼續埋頭研究，但目標已不是以兼職生的身分畢業，而是她定要找到現實之間潛藏的異教秘密究竟有何含義。

all_cards.name: 守護天使
all_cards.text:
瑪麗修女牌組專用。
你所在地點和連接地點的其他調查員受到的傷害可以分配給守護天使。
[reaction]在任意數量的傷害分配給守護天使時：加入同等數量的[bless]標記到混亂袋。
all_cards.real_text:
Sister Mary deck only.
Guardian Angel may be assigned damage dealt to other investigators at your location and connecting locations.
[reaction] When any amount of damage is assigned to Guardian Angel: Add that many [bless] tokens to the chaos bag.

all_cards.name: 信仰危機

all_cards.real_text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
