all_cards.name: 一二連擊

all_cards.real_text: Fight. You automatically succeed and deal +1 damage for this attack. You may fight again. You get +3 [combat] and deal +2 damage for that attack.
all_cards.flavor: 納撒尼爾以他左手迅速的刺拳、還有他右手標誌性的後手重拳著稱。

all_cards.real_text:
Permanent.
In between two scenarios of a campaign, reduce the experience cost to repurchase up to 3 cards that you exiled during the last scenario by 1 each.
all_cards.flavor: 你之前沒見過這個嗎？

all_cards.real_text: After you commit Daredevil to a skill test, discard cards from the top of your deck until you discard a [rogue] skill you can commit to this test. Commit it. Shuffle each weakness that was discarded by this effect back into your deck.
all_cards.flavor:
"你是個瘋子，溫妮！"
"我知道！這難道不是件好事嗎？"

[elder_sign] effect: +1. You may return a [[Tome]] asset from your discard pile to your hand.

deck_options.error: You cannot have more than 5 Guardian and/or Mystic cards

all_cards.flavor: "我可以闔上書本，但我永遠無法忘掉它的內容。"
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：[[書籍]]卡牌等級0-5，探求者([seeker])等級0-3，中立卡牌等級0-5，最多5張守衛者和/或潛修者卡牌([guardian]和/或[mystic])的其他等級0卡牌。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：黛西的手提包、死靈之書(約翰·迪伊譯本)、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 作為米斯卡塔尼克大學中一位受人尊敬的圖書館員，黛西一直把書當作人生最重要的一部分。她在書裡尋找著現實中不存在的恐懼與刺激感。直到有一天，她找到約翰·迪伊翻譯的《死靈之書》。書中充滿了各種邪惡和褻瀆的內容。她試圖用社會學的相關知識來解析這本書，漸漸地，她意識到書中的內容可能比現實更為真實。她決定踏入奧恩圖書館的深處，探索那些被深藏的禁書⋯⋯

Then, if The Necronomicon has no horror on it, discard it.

all_cards.name: 柯爾特袖珍手槍
all_cards.text: 使用(5子彈)。 [action]花費1子彈：攻擊。這次攻擊中你+2[combat]。這次攻擊造成+1傷害。 強制 - 當本輪結束時，如果你觸發過柯爾特袖珍手槍的"[action]"能力：丟棄柯爾特袖珍手槍。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (5 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage. Forced - At the end of the round, if you triggered Colt Vest Pocket's "[action]" ability: Discard it.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 槍械. 違法

all_cards.name: 拉萊耶迷霧
all_cards.text: 使用(5充能)。 [action]花費1充能：躲避。這次躲避嘗試不使用[agility]，改為使用[willpower]。這次躲避嘗試你+1[willpower]。如果你成功，在躲避所選敵人後，你可以移動到一個連接地點。如果在本次躲避嘗試期間抽出[skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]、[elder_thing]或[auto_fail]符號，從你手牌中選擇並丟棄1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (5 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Evade. This evasion attempt uses [willpower] instead of [agility]. You get +1 [willpower] for this evasion attempt. If you succeed, after evading the chosen enemy, you may move to a connecting location. If a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol is revealed during this evasion attempt, choose and discard a card from your hand.

all_cards.name: 鑽地魔蟲之石
all_cards.text: 封印([skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]或[elder_thing])。使用(3充能)。如果鑽地魔蟲之石沒有充能，則將其返回手牌。 強制 - 在你在技能檢定中抽出[auto_fail]標記後：移除鑽地魔蟲之石的1充能。
all_cards.real_text: Seal ([skull], [cultist], [tablet], or [elder_thing]). Uses (3 charges). If The Chthonian Stone has no charges, return it to your hand. Forced - After you reveal an [auto_fail] symbol during a skill test: Remove 1 charge from The Chthonian Stone.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 遺物. 詛咒縈繞

all_cards.name: 改變命運
all_cards.text: 選擇並丟棄場上一張沒有疊加到[[精英]]敵人的非弱點詭計卡。
all_cards.real_text: Choose and discard from play a non-weakness treachery that is not attached to an [[Elite]] enemy.
all_cards.flavor: 我們的命運由自己書寫。

all_cards.name: 自食其力
all_cards.text: 卓越。永久。 你的調查員獲得："牌組構建限制：無佔用盟友槽的支援卡。" [reaction]在你打出一張[survivor]事件時，消耗自食其力：該事件費用減少2點。
all_cards.real_text: Exceptional. Permanent. Your investigator gains: "Deckbuilding Restrictions: No assets that take up an ally slot." [reaction] When you play a [survivor] event, exhaust On Your Own: Reduce that event's cost by 2.

all_cards.name: 背包
all_cards.text:
[reaction]在背包入場後：查找你牌堆頂部12張卡牌，找出最多3張非弱點的[[道具]]或[[供給]]卡牌，並將這些卡牌面朝下疊加到背包。混洗你的牌堆。
可以打出疊加到背包的卡牌，如同這些卡牌在你的手牌中。如果沒有卡牌疊加到背包，則將其丟棄。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] After Backpack enters play: Search the top 12 cards of your deck for up to 3 non-weakness [[Item]] or [[Supply]] cards, and attach them facedown to Backpack. Shuffle your deck.
Cards attached to Backpack may be played as if they were in your hand. If there are no cards attached to Backpack, discard it.

all_cards.name: 植形變異
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 將植形變異放置到你的威脅區域。植形變異上沒有傷害時，其不能離場。 [fast]受到1點直接傷害：對植形變異造成1點傷害。 卡牌由植物學家設計於阿卡姆之夜2018。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Put Dendromorphosis into play in your threat area. It cannot leave play while it has no damage on it. [fast] Take 1 direct damage: Deal 1 damage to Dendromorphosis. Card design by the Botanists at Arkham Nights 2018.
all_cards.flavor: "植物！"

all_cards.name: 附加條款
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 失去7個資源。如果你不能這麼做，改為將附加條款從你的牌組移除，並查找收藏中的出賣靈魂，將其加入你的棄牌堆。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Lose 7 resources. If you cannot, instead remove Fine Print from your deck, search the collection for Sell Your Soul, and place it in your discard pile.
all_cards.flavor: 你鮮紅的簽名從它表面滴落。

all_cards.name: 出賣靈魂
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 失去10個資源。如果你不能這麼做，黑暗資助人將你的意識從身體裡剝離了出去。你立刻發瘋。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Lose 10 resources. If you cannot, your dark patron tears your consciousness from your body. You are driven insane.
all_cards.flavor: 債務無論如何終將被償還。

all_cards.name: 你無法拒絕的條件
all_cards.text: 劇本模式專用。 在你成為本弱點卡的承受者時，獲得2經驗。 顯現 - 失去5個資源。如果你不能這麼做，改為將無法拒絕的提案從你的牌組移除，並查找收藏中的附加條款，將其加入你的棄牌堆。
all_cards.real_text: Campaign Mode only. When you become the bearer of this weakness, gain 2 experience. Revelation - Lose 5 resources. If you cannot, instead remove Offer You Cannot Refuse from your deck, search the collection for Fine Print, and place it in your discard pile.

all_cards.name: "倒霉蛋"奧圖爾
all_cards.text:
[fast]花費最多3資源：進行一次基礎技能值為3的檢定，檢定難度等於你花費的資源數量。如果你成功，獲得所花資源兩倍數量的資源。只有[agility]和[wild]技能圖標可以被投入到此檢定中。(每輪限制一次。)
[elder_sign]效果：+1。在你的棄牌堆中選擇1張等級2或以下的卡牌。將該卡加入你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text:
[fast] Spend up to 3 resources: Test a base skill value of 3 against a difficulty equal to the amount of resources just spent. If you succeed, gain twice the number of spent resources. Only [agility] and [wild] skill icons may be committed to this test. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1. Choose a level 2 or less card in your discard pile. Add the chosen card to your hand.
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：25。 牌組構建選項：流浪者([rogue])等級0-5，[[幸運]]卡牌等級0-3，[[局勢]]卡牌等級0-3，中立卡牌等級0-5。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：在逃中、醫院債務、1張隨機基礎弱點。 額外選項：當你升級[[幸運]]或[[局勢]]卡牌時，你可以改為支付較高等級卡牌的全額經驗值，並將較低等級卡牌保留在你的牌組中(該卡不計入你的牌組卡牌張數，或你牌組中的同名卡牌數量)。
all_cards.back_flavor: 奧圖爾一開始就沒打算做一輩子的罪犯，但有時做正確的事情意味著會弄髒自己的雙手。他的獄友布拉德·霍林每晚都無聲地嘶喊著"舊日支配者"什麼的。奧圖爾並未將這放在心上，直到一天夜裡他醒來時看到他的獄友渾身著火。當奧圖爾被釋放時，他決定回到阿卡姆，尋找答案。

all_cards.name: 在逃中
all_cards.text:
"倒霉蛋"奧圖爾牌組專用。進階。
快速。在任何[fast]時間段打出。
直到本輪結束，非[[精英]]敵人不能攻擊你。當一輪結束時，你可以與每個交戰的敵人解除交戰狀態並移動到一個連接次數不超過2的地點。
all_cards.real_text:
"Skids" O'Toole deck only. Advanced.
Fast. Play during any [fast] window.
Until the end of the round, non-[[Elite]] enemies cannot attack you. At the end of the round, you may disengage from each engaged enemy and move up to 2 locations away.
all_cards.flavor: 我可不會再進監獄了。

all_cards.name: 醫院債務
all_cards.text: 進階。顯現 - 將醫院債務放置入你的威脅區域。 [fast]：將你資源池一個資源移動到醫院債務上。(每輪限制3次。) 強制 - 在遊戲結束時，如果醫院債務上資源數量少於9個：你這次冒險少獲得2點經驗。
all_cards.real_text: Advanced. Revelation - Put Hospital Debts into play in your threat area. [fast]: Move 1 resource from your resource pool to Hospital Debts. (Limit three times per round.) Forced - When the game ends, if Hospital Debts has fewer than 9 resources on it: You earn 2 fewer experience for this scenario.

all_cards.name: 成聖儀式
all_cards.text:
封印(最多5[bless])。如果成聖儀式上沒有封印的標記，將其丟棄。
[reaction]你所在地點一位調查員在打出一張卡牌時，消耗成聖儀式並釋放其上封印的一個混亂標記：該卡牌費用降低2。
all_cards.real_text:
Seal (up to 5 [bless]). If Rite of Sanctification has no tokens sealed on it, discard it.
[reaction] When an investigator at your location plays a card, exhaust Rite of Sanctification and release a chaos token sealed on it: Reduce the cost of that card by 2.

all_cards.name: 劍杖
all_cards.text: 打出劍杖不會引起趁亂攻擊。 [reaction]在劍杖入場後：立即觸發其"[action]"能力，不支付其費用。 [action]消耗劍杖：攻擊/躲避。這次攻擊或躲避嘗試你可以不使用你的[combat]或[agility]，改為使用你的[willpower]。
all_cards.real_text: Playing Sword Cane does not provoke attacks of opportunity. [reaction] After Sword Cane enters play: Immediately trigger its "[action]" ability without paying its cost. [action] Exhaust Sword Cane: Fight/Evade. You may use your [willpower] in place of your [combat] or [agility] for this attack or evasion attempt.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 遺物. 武器. 近戰

all_cards.name: 過分癡迷
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 將過分癡迷放置入你的威脅區域。 強制 - 在你回合開始時：隨機丟棄你手牌中的1張非弱點卡牌。 [action][action]：丟棄過分癡迷。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Put Obsessive into play in your threat area. Forced - When your turn begins: Discard 1 non-weakness card at random from your hand. [action] [action]: Discard Obsessive.

all_cards.name: 伊察姆納圓盤
all_cards.text: [reaction]在非[[精英]]敵人生成於你所在地點時，丟棄伊察姆納圓盤：自動躲避該敵人或對其造成2點傷害。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] When a non-[[Elite]] enemy spawns at your location, discard Disc of Itzamna: Automatically evade that enemy or deal it 2 damage.
all_cards.flavor: 他們究竟是害怕護符對他們產生影響？還是害怕護符對你產生影響？

all_cards.name: 百科全書
all_cards.text:
使用(5秘密)。
[action]消耗百科全書並花費1秘密：選擇你所在地點的一位調查員。直到本階段結束，該調查員的一項你指定的技能+2。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (5 secrets).
[action] Exhaust Encyclopedia and spend 1 secret: Choose an investigator at your location. That investigator gets +2 to a skill of your choice until the end of the phase.

all_cards.name: 養神術
all_cards.text:
使用(3秘密)。
[action]消耗養神術並花費1秘密：檢定[intellect](1)。你成功且每超過難度1點(最多3點)，抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (3 secrets).
[action] Exhaust Feed the Mind and spend 1 secret: Test [intellect] (1). For each point you succeed by (to a maximum of 3), draw 1 card.

all_cards.name: 禁忌之書
all_cards.text:
使用(5秘密)。
[action]消耗禁忌之書並花費1秘密：抽取1張卡牌。然後，如果你有至少10張手牌，且禁忌之書上沒有秘密，你可以將其丟棄並在冒險日誌記錄"你翻譯了這本書籍。"
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (5 secrets).
[action] Exhaust Forbidden Tome and spend 1 secret: Draw 1 card. Then, if you have 10 or more cards in your hand and there are no secrets on Forbidden Tome, you may discard it to record in your Campaign Log that "you have translated the tome."
all_cards.traits: 道具. 遺物. 書籍

all_cards.name: 高等教育
all_cards.text:
只要你有至少5張手牌，高等教育獲得：
"[free]花費1資源：這次技能檢定中你+1[willpower]。
[free]花費1資源：這次技能檢定中你+1[intellect]。"
all_cards.real_text:
While you have 5 or more cards in your hand, Higher Education gains:
"[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [willpower] for this skill test.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [intellect] for this skill test."

all_cards.name: 曉燭夜深
all_cards.text: 調查。在這次行動開始時，獲得2資源。
all_cards.real_text: Investigate. When this action begins, gain 2 resources.
all_cards.flavor: 至死方入眠

all_cards.name: 神秘筆跡
all_cards.text:
獲得2資源。
[reaction]在你自己回合抽到神秘筆跡後：將其打出。
all_cards.real_text:
Gain 2 resources.
[reaction] After you draw Cryptic Writings during your turn: Play it.
all_cards.flavor:
"……相比之下，還有少量書籍是以我無法理解的語言寫說的。"
<cite>H. P. 洛夫克拉夫特，《倫道夫·卡特的供述》</cite>

all_cards.name: 海量研究
all_cards.text:
你每有1張其它手牌，海量研究的打出費用減少1點。
發現你所在地點的2個線索。
all_cards.real_text:
Reduce the cost to play Extensive Research by 1 for each other card in your hand.
Discover 2 clues at your location.
all_cards.flavor:
"這兒也沒發現。我們還差多少沒查？"
"……瞧瞧你背後這面牆？"

all_cards.name: 祕法禱言
all_cards.text: 作為打出祕法禱言的額外費用，丟棄你最多2張手牌。 攻擊。這次攻擊不使用[combat]，改為使用[intellect]。支付本卡牌費用時你每丟棄1張手牌，在這次攻擊中你+1[intellect]並造成+1傷害。
all_cards.real_text: As an additional cost to play Occult Invocation, discard up to 2 cards from your hand. Fight. This attack uses [intellect] instead of [combat]. You get +1 [intellect] and deal +1 damage for this attack for each card discarded as part of this card's cost.

all_cards.name: 圖書館講解員
all_cards.text: [reaction]在圖書館講解員入場後，將一張你控制的[[書籍]]支援卡返回其所有者的手中：打出你手牌中的另一張(名稱不同的)[[書籍]]支援卡，其資源費用減2。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] After Library Docent enters play, return a [[Tome]] asset you control to its owner's hand: Play a different [[Tome]] asset (by title) from your hand, reducing its cost by 2.
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 米斯卡塔尼克

all_cards.name: 窺看不思議之事
all_cards.text: 抽取1張卡牌。將你手牌中任意數量的非弱點卡牌洗入你的牌堆。然後，抽取同等數量的卡牌。
all_cards.real_text: Draw 1 card. Shuffle any number of non-weakness cards from your hand into your deck. Then, draw that many cards.
all_cards.flavor: 無知是福，但你無福消受。

all_cards.name: 絕密地圖集
all_cards.text:
使用(4秘密)。
[action]花費1秘密：選擇1個與你所在地點的連接次數不超過3的已揭示地點。移動到該地點。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (4 secrets).
[action] Spend 1 secret: Choose a revealed location up to 3 connections away from your location. Move to that location.

all_cards.name: 惠頓·格林
all_cards.text:
只要你有控制[[書籍]]或[[遺物]]支援卡，你獲得+1[willpower]和+1[intellect]。
[reaction]在你翻開一張地點卡或將一個新地點放置入場後，消耗惠頓·格林：在你牌堆頂部9張卡牌中查找並抽取1張[[書籍]]或[[遺物]]支援卡。混洗你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text:
While you control a [[Tome]] or [[Relic]] asset, you get +1 [willpower] and +1 [intellect].
[reaction] After you reveal a location or put a new location into play, exhaust Whitton Greene: Search the top 9 cards of your deck for a [[Tome]] or [[Relic]] asset and draw it. Shuffle your deck.
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 米斯卡塔尼克

all_cards.name: "我有個計劃！"
all_cards.text: 攻擊。這次攻擊不使用[combat]，改為使用[intellect]。這次檢定中你+2[intellect]。你每持有1個線索，這次攻擊造成+1傷害(最大+3傷害)。
all_cards.real_text: Fight. This attack uses [intellect] instead of [combat]. You get +2 [intellect] for this test. You deal +1 damage for this attack for each clue you have (max +3 damage).
all_cards.flavor: "這應該是我聽過最爛的計畫了。好吧，那麼還蹭什麼？快動手吧！"

all_cards.name: 尋找答案
all_cards.text: 調查。如果你成功，不發現所在地點的一個線索，改為發現你所在地點和連接地點的總計2個線索。(FAQ, v1.9)
all_cards.real_text: Investigate. If you succeed, instead of discovering a clue at your location, discover 2 total clues from among your location and connecting locations.
all_cards.flavor: 有些人會不惜一切代價來找到真相。但是有些真相卻能傷人。

all_cards.name: 洞察力
all_cards.text:
每次技能檢定最多投入1張。
如果這次檢定成功，抽取1張卡牌(如果超過難度至少2點，改為抽取2張卡牌)。
all_cards.real_text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
If this test is successful, draw 1 card (2 cards instead if it succeeds by 2 or more).
all_cards.flavor: 總算找到了！

all_cards.name: 禁忌之書
all_cards.text: 研究。(FAQ, v2.0) [action][action][action][action]消耗禁忌之書：將你所在地點的一張玩家卡上的1點傷害移動到你所在地點的一名敵人上。你每有4張手牌，本能力費用減1行動(最低減至[action])。
all_cards.real_text:
Researched.
[action] [action] [action] [action] Exhaust Forbidden Tome: Move 1 damage from a player card at your location to an enemy at your location. Reduce this ability's cost by 1 action for every 4 cards in your hand (to a minimum of [action]).
all_cards.traits: 道具. 遺物. 書籍

all_cards.name: 禁忌之書
all_cards.text: 研究。(FAQ, v2.0) [action][action][action][action]消耗禁忌之書：你可以移動到一個連接地點。發現你所在地點的一個線索。你每有4張手牌，本能力費用減1行動(最低減至[action])。
all_cards.real_text:
Researched.
[action] [action] [action] [action] Exhaust Forbidden Tome: You may move to a connecting location. Discover 1 clue at your location. Reduce this ability's cost by 1 action for every 4 cards in your hand (to a minimum of [action]).
all_cards.traits: 道具. 遺物. 書籍

all_cards.name: 遠見
all_cards.text: [fast]在你回合中，如果你有至少8張手牌，消耗遠見：打出一張事件卡(支付其費用)。
all_cards.real_text: [fast] During your turn, if you have 8 or more cards in your hand, exhaust Farsight: Play an event from your hand (paying its cost).
all_cards.flavor: 超越時間的任何一刻。超越空間的任何一隅。超越現世的曲折蜿蜒。

all_cards.name: 虛無主義
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 將虛無主義放置入你的威脅區域。 強制 - 在你抽出、取消或忽略一個[auto_fail]標記後：受到1點傷害和1點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Put Nihilism into play in your threat area. Forced - After you reveal, cancel, or ignore an [auto_fail] token: Take 1 damage and 1 horror. [action][action]: Discard Nihilism.

all_cards.name: 難述真相
all_cards.text: 使用(3充能)。 [action]花費1充能：躲避。這次躲避嘗試不使用使用[agility]，改為使用[willpower]。如果你成功，對你躲避的敵人造成1點傷害。如果這次躲避嘗試期間抽出[elder_sign]、"+1"或"0"標記，失去1資源。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (3 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Evade. This evasion attempt uses [willpower] instead of [agility]. If you succeed, deal 1 damage to the evaded enemy. If an [elder_sign], "+1," or "0" token is revealed during this evasion attempt, lose 1 resource.

all_cards.name: 幽靈魔寵
all_cards.text: 你擁有額外1個法術槽位，只能用來放置一張[[法術]]支援卡。
all_cards.real_text: You have 1 additional arcane slot, which can only be used to hold a [[Spell]] asset.
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 生物. 召喚
all_cards.flavor: "汝全然不配。但從現在開始，吾將侍奉汝。"

all_cards.name: 永夜長袍
all_cards.text: [reaction]在你打出一張[[法術]]卡牌時，消耗永夜長袍：該卡牌的費用減1。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] When you play a [[Spell]] card, exhaust Robes of Endless Night: Reduce the cost of that card by 1.
all_cards.flavor: 黑暗是意外的深淵。光明是內心的深淵。

all_cards.name: 平行命運
all_cards.text: 查看遭遇牌堆頂部的4張卡牌。從混亂袋隨機抽出1個標記。如果抽出[skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]、[elder_thing]或[auto_fail]符號，將這些卡牌混洗入遭遇牌堆。否則，將它們以任意順序放回遭遇牌堆頂部。
all_cards.real_text: Look at the top 4 cards of the encounter deck. Reveal a random token from the chaos bag. If it has a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol, shuffle those cards into the encounter deck. Otherwise, return them to the top of the encounter deck in any order.
all_cards.flavor: "如果我說，在你瀕死之際我才會把你的命運告訴你，你還想知道嗎？"

all_cards.name: 太陽神之音
all_cards.text: 獲得1個資源。從混亂袋隨機抽出3個標記。每抽出1個[skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]、[elder_thing]或[auto_fail]符號，額外獲得2個資源。
all_cards.real_text: Gain 1 resource. Reveal 3 random tokens from the chaos bag. For each [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol revealed, gain an additional 2 resources.

all_cards.name: 恐怖靈感
all_cards.text:
快速。在你將要結算一張[mystic]卡牌的效果，且該效果有以下觸發條件時打出：在混亂標記抽出時，如果抽出混亂標記，在混亂標記抽出後。
取消該效果或額外結算一次該效果。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when you would resolve an effect on a [mystic] card that triggers "when," "if," or "after" a chaos token is revealed.
Either cancel that effect, or resolve it an additional time.

all_cards.name: 詭秘石像
all_cards.text:
使用(3充能)。如果詭秘石像沒有充能，則將其丟棄。
[reaction]在你將要抽出1個混亂標記時，花費1充能：改為抽出2個混亂標記而不是1個。選擇其中1個標記結算，並忽略其餘標記。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (3 charges). If Grotesque Statue has no charges, discard it.
[reaction] When you would reveal a chaos token, spend 1 charge: Reveal 2 chaos tokens instead of 1. Choose one of those tokens to resolve, and ignore the other.

all_cards.name: 催眠術
all_cards.text:
快速。在一名敵人攻擊你所在地點的調查員時打出。
取消該次攻擊。然後，從混亂袋隨機抽出1個標記。如果抽出[skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]、[elder_thing]或[auto_fail]符號，對進行攻擊的敵人造成傷害，傷害點數等於其傷害值或恐懼值。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when an enemy attacks an investigator at your location.
Cancel that attack. Then, reveal a random token from the chaos bag. If it has a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol, deal damage to the attacking enemy equal to its damage or horror.

all_cards.name: 膽識
all_cards.text:
每次技能檢定最多投入1張。
如果這次檢定成功，抽取1張卡牌(如果超過難度至少2點，改為抽取2張卡牌)。
all_cards.real_text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
If this test is successful, draw 1 card (2 cards instead if it succeeds by 2 or more).
all_cards.flavor: 退後！我會搞定的。

all_cards.real_text: Uses (4 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Fight. This attack uses [willpower] instead of [combat]. You get +2 [willpower] and deal +1 damage for this attack. If an [elder_sign], "+1," or "0" token is revealed during this attack, take 1 damage.

all_cards.real_text: Uses (3 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Investigate. Investigate using [willpower] instead of [intellect]. You get +2 [willpower] for this investigation. If you succeed, discover 1 additional clue at this location. If an [elder_sign], "+1," or "0" token is revealed during this investigation, take 1 horror.

all_cards.text: 使用(4充能)。 [action]花費1充能：攻擊。這次攻擊不使用[combat]，改為使用[willpower]。這次攻擊你+3[willpower]並造成+2傷害。如果這次攻擊期間抽出[elder_sign]、"+1"或"0"標記，受到2點傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (4 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Fight. This attack uses [willpower] instead of [combat]. You get +3 [willpower] and deal +2 damage for this attack. If an [elder_sign], "+1," or "0" token is revealed during this attack, take 2 damage.

all_cards.real_text: Uses (3 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Evade. This evasion attempt uses [willpower] instead of [agility]. You get +3 [willpower] for this evasion attempt. all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Put Self-Destructive into play in your threat area. Forced - When you deal 1 or more damage to an enemy: Take 1 damage. [action] [action]: Discard Self-Destructive.

all_cards.text:
使用(4充能)。
[reaction]在你受到敵人攻擊造成的傷害和/或恐懼時，消耗血肉結界並花費1充能：取消該次攻擊造成的1點傷害或1點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (4 charges).
[reaction] When you are dealt damage and/or horror from an enemy attack, exhaust Flesh Ward and spend 1 charge: Cancel 1 damage or horror just dealt from that attack.

all_cards.text:
你獲得+1[combat]。

all_cards.real_text:
You get +1 [combat].
[reaction] After you defeat an enemy, exhaust Grete Wagner and deal 1 damage to her: Discover 1 clue at your location.
all_cards.flavor: "生命之所需：水火鐵鹽麵，蜜奶酒衣油。而我只需前四件。"

all_cards.name: 無情

all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] When you deal excess damage to an enemy, exhaust Relentless: Place that excess damage on Relentless.
[fast] Discard Relentless: Gain resources equal to the amount of damage on it.

all_cards.name: 安全護衛

all_cards.real_text: [reaction] After another investigator moves from your location to a connecting location, exhaust Safeguard: Move to that location.
all_cards.flavor: 她告訴我，當心別碰上麻煩。我翻了個白眼。麻煩事可從沒消停過。

all_cards.name: "到這兒來！"

all_cards.real_text: Engage. Fight. Choose a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location or a connecting location. Move that enemy to your location, engage it, and attack it.

快速。在你擊敗一名敵人後打出。

Fast. Play after you defeat an enemy.
Draw 2 cards.

all_cards.real_text: Choose another investigator at your location. Both you and that investigator gain 2 resources.

Fast. Play after you defeat an enemy.

只可作為你的第一個行動打出。
對與你交戰的一個敵人造成2點傷害。此行動不會引起趁亂攻擊。
all_cards.real_text:

Deal 2 damage to an enemy engaged with you. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

all_cards.text:
每次技能檢定最多投入1張。
如果這次檢定成功，抽取1張卡牌(如果超過難度至少2點，改為抽取2張卡牌)。

Max 1 committed per skill test.
If this test is successful, draw 1 card (2 cards instead if it succeeds by 2 or more).

你攻擊時+2[combat]。

all_cards.real_text:
You get +2 [combat] while fighting.

你獲得+1[combat]和+1[intellect]。

快速。在任何[free]時間段中打出。

Engage any number of enemies at your location. For each enemy engaged this way, deal it 1 damage and draw 1 card.

快速。在你所在地點的一位調查員抽取出一張非弱點詭計卡時打出。

Fast. Play after you fail a skill test by 3 or less during an evasion attempt against a non-[[Elite]] enemy.

all_cards.name: 運氣好！
all_cards.text:
快速。在你所在地點的調查員的技能檢定將要失敗時打出。
該調查員該次檢定的技能值+3。該調查員抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when an investigator at your location would fail a skill test.
They get +3 to their skill value for that test. That investigator draws 1 card.

all_cards.name: 電鋸
all_cards.text: 使用(3補給)。 [action]花費1補給：攻擊。這次攻擊中你+2[combat]並造成+2傷害。如果這次攻擊失敗，在電鋸上放置1補給，或者對受到攻擊的敵人造成1點傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (3 supplies). [action] Spend 1 supply: Fight. You get +2 [combat] and deal +2 damage for this attack. If this attack fails, either place 1 supply on Chainsaw or deal 1 damage to the attacked enemy.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 工具. 武器. 近戰

all_cards.name: 不顧後果
all_cards.text: 只能在你執行的未投入其它卡牌的(任意類型的)技能檢定中投入。該次技能檢定不能投入其它卡牌。 如果這次檢定失敗，將本技能卡返回手牌。 強制 - 如果你回合結束時不顧後果在你手牌中：將其揭示並失去2資源。
all_cards.real_text: Commit only to a skill test you are performing (of any type) that has no other cards committed to it. Other cards cannot be committed to this skill test. If this test fails, return this skill to your hand. Forced - If Reckless is in your hand at the end of your turn: Reveal it and lose 2 resources.

all_cards.name: 撬鎖工具
all_cards.text: [action]消耗撬鎖工具：調查。這次調查中將你的[agility]數值加入你的技能值。如果你沒有成功並超過難度至少2點，丟棄撬鎖工具。
all_cards.real_text: [action] Exhaust Lockpicks: Investigate. Add your [agility] value to your skill value for this investigation. If you do not succeed by at least 2, discard Lockpicks.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 工具. 違法

all_cards.name: 朗尼·里特納
all_cards.text:
你獲得+1[combat]。
[fast]消耗朗尼·里特納並花費1資源：選擇你所在地點的調查員控制的一張[[道具]]支援卡。治癒該支援卡的1點傷害和朗尼·里特納的1點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text:
You get +1 [combat].
[fast] Exhaust Lonnie Ritter and spend 1 resource: Choose an [[Item]] asset controlled by an investigator at your location. Heal 1 damage from that asset and 1 horror from Lonnie Ritter.

all_cards.name: 皮夾克
all_cards.text: 快速。
all_cards.real_text: Fast.
all_cards.flavor:
"你是不是覺得自己穿上這衣服看起來酷斃了？"
"不呀。我一直覺得自己酷斃了。這身衣服只是讓別人也知道了這一點。"

all_cards.name: 街頭浪子
all_cards.text:
[free]花費2資源：這次技能檢定中你+2[intellect]。
[free]花費2資源：這次技能檢定中你+2[agility]。
all_cards.real_text:
[fast] Spend 2 resources: You get +2 [intellect] for this skill test.
[fast] Spend 2 resources: You get +2 [agility] for this skill test.

all_cards.name: 小偷小摸
all_cards.text: 調查。這次調查不使用[intellect]，改為使用[agility]。如果你成功，額外發現你所在地點2個線索。
all_cards.real_text: Investigate. This investigation uses [agility] instead of [intellect]. If you succeed, discover 2 additional clues at your location.

all_cards.name: 悄然溜過
all_cards.text: 躲避。在這次行動開始時，獲得2資源。
all_cards.real_text: Evade. When this action begins, gain 2 resources.
all_cards.flavor: 別人都勸你別做的事情，溫妮弗雷德會示意你按計畫執行。

all_cards.name: 酒膽
all_cards.text:
使用(4補給)。
[action]花費1補給：選擇你所在地點的一位調查員，治癒1點恐懼。然後，該調查員檢定[willpower](2)。如果檢定成功，該調查員抽取1張卡牌。如果檢定失敗，該調查員治癒額外1點恐懼，隨機丟棄其1張手牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (4 supplies).
[action] Spend 1 supply: Choose an investigator at your location to heal 1 horror. Then, that investigator tests [willpower] (2). If the test succeeds, they draw 1 card. If the test fails, they heal 1 additional horror and discard 1 card at random from their hand.

all_cards.name: 毛瑟C96手槍
all_cards.text: 使用(5子彈)。 [action]消耗毛瑟C96手槍並花費1子彈：攻擊。這次攻擊中你+2[combat]並造成+1傷害。如果你成功且超過難度至少2點，執行以下一項：準備毛瑟C96手槍或者獲得1資源(如果你成功且超過難度至少4點，則改為執行兩項)。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (5 ammo). [action] Exhaust Mauser C96 and spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +2 [combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack. If you succeed by 2 or more, either ready Mauser C96 or gain 1 resource (if you succeed by 4 or more, do both).
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 槍械. 違法

all_cards.name: 藝高膽大
all_cards.text:
快速。在你的技能檢定將要成功時打出。
這次技能檢定你的技能值+3。抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when you would succeed at a skill test.
You get +3 skill value for this test. Draw 1 card.
all_cards.flavor:
"麥克格倫，你想讓我們兩個都送命嗎？"
"這次不會了，夥計。這次不會了。"

all_cards.name: 暗中偷襲
all_cards.text: 攻擊。這次攻擊中將你的[agility]加入你的技能值。如果你成功且超過難度至少1點，自動躲避受到本次攻擊的敵人。如果你成功且超過難度至少3點，當你回合結束時將暗中偷襲返回你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text: Fight. Add your [agility] value to your skill value for this attack. If you succeed by 1 or more, automatically evade the attacked enemy. If you succeed by 3 or more, return Cheap Shot to your hand at the end of your turn.
all_cards.flavor: "瞄準眼睛。"他們這麼告訴我的。

all_cards.name: 悄然遁去
all_cards.text: 躲避。這次躲避嘗試將你的[intellect]加入你的技能值。如果你成功且超過難度至少1點，且被躲避的敵人非[[精英]]，該敵人在下一個補給階段不進入準備狀態。如果你成功且超過難度至少3點，當你回合結束時將悄然遁去返回你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text: Evade. Add your [intellect] to your skill value for this evasion attempt. If you succeed by 1 or more and the evaded enemy is non-[[Elite]], it does not ready during the next upkeep phase. If you succeed by 3 or more, return Slip Away to your hand at the end of your turn.

all_cards.name: 幸運煙盒
all_cards.text: [reaction]在你技能檢定成功且超過難度至少1點後，消耗幸運煙盒：在你牌堆頂部X張卡牌中查找並抽取1張卡牌，並將其餘卡牌混洗入你的牌堆。其中X為你超過的點數。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] After you succeed at a skill test by 1 or more, exhaust Lucky Cigarette Case: Search the top X cards of your deck for a card, draw it, and shuffle the remaining cards into your deck. X is the amount you succeeded by.

all_cards.name: 小偷小摸
all_cards.text: 調查。這次調查不使用[intellect]，改為使用[agility]。如果你成功，額外發現你所在地點的2個線索。如果你成功且超過難度至少2點，當你回合結束時將小偷小摸返回你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text: Investigate. This investigation uses [agility] instead of [intellect]. If you succeed, discover 2 additional clues at your location. If you succeed by 2 or more, return Pilfer to your hand at the end of your turn.

all_cards.name: 背刺
all_cards.text: 攻擊。這次攻擊不使用[combat]，改為使用[agility]。這次攻擊造成+2傷害。如果你成功且超過難度至少2點，當你回合結束時將背刺返回你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text: Fight. This attack uses [agility] instead of [combat]. This attack deals +2 damage. If you succeed by 2 or more, return Backstab to your hand at the end of your turn.

all_cards.name: 查克·費格斯
all_cards.text:
[reaction]在你打出一張[[策略]]或[[技巧]]事件卡時，消耗查克·費格斯：選擇以下兩項：
- 該卡牌獲得快速。
- 該事件的打出費用減少2資源。
- 你在該事件結算期間執行檢定時技能值+2。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] When you play a [[Tactic]] or [[Trick]] event, exhaust Chuck Fergus: Choose two -
- That event gains fast.
- That event costs 2 fewer resources to play.
- You get +2 skill value while performing a skill test during the resolution of that event.

all_cards.name: 驚悚賢人
all_cards.text:
使用(3秘密)。
[fast]：消耗驚悚賢人：將你控制的支援卡上的1個秘密或充能移動到你所在地點調查員控制的另一張支援卡上。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (3 secrets).
[fast] Exhaust Eldritch Sophist: Move 1 secret or charge from an asset you control to another asset controlled by an investigator at your location.
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 米斯卡塔尼克
all_cards.flavor: 一旦你放非自己的假想，一切皆有可能。

all_cards.name: 褻瀆聖約
all_cards.text:
永久。每副牌組限制1張[[聖約]]。
[reaction]你所在地點的調查員在技能檢定中抽出一個[curse]標記時，消耗褻瀆聖約：將將該標記的修正值改為視為+1。在這次檢定結束後，將該標記返回混亂袋。
all_cards.real_text:
Permanent. Limit 1 [[Covenant]] per deck.
[reaction] When an investigator at your location reveals a [curse] token during a skill test, exhaust Blasphemous Covenant: Treat that token's modifier as +1 instead of its normal modifier. After this test ends, return that token to the chaos bag.

all_cards.name: 無神論者
all_cards.text: 這次技能檢定中，將每個[bless]和[curse]標記的修正值改為視為+1。
all_cards.real_text: During this skill test, treat the modifier of each [bless] and each [curse] token as +1 instead of its normal modifier.
all_cards.flavor: "哦，別這樣。最壞還能發生什麼事呢？"

all_cards.name: 混亂之眼
all_cards.text: 使用(3充能)。 [action] 花費1充能：調查。不使用[intellect]，改為使用[willpower]調查。如果你成功，發現此地點的額外1個線索。如果這次調查中抽出[curse]標記，你可以發現連接地點的1個線索，或在混亂之眼上放置1充能。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (3 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Investigate. Investigate using [willpower] instead of [intellect]. If you succeed, discover 1 additional clue at this location. If a [curse] token is revealed during this investigation, you may discover 1 clue at a connecting location or place 1 charge on Eye of Chaos.

all_cards.name: 古代聖約
all_cards.text:
永久。每副牌組限制1張[[聖約]]。
[reaction]在你所在地點的調查員的技能檢定期間結算一個[bless]標記時，消耗古代聖約：不要為此[bless]標記的效果抽出另一個標記。
all_cards.real_text:
Permanent. Limit 1 [[Covenant]] per deck.
[reaction] When an investigator at your location resolves a [bless] token during a skill test, exhaust Ancient Covenant: Do not reveal another token as part of this [bless] token's effect.

all_cards.name: 宗教信物
all_cards.text: [reaction]在抽出了至少1個[curse]或[auto_fail]標記的技能檢定結束後，消耗宗教信物：加入同等數量的[bless]標記到混亂袋。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] After a skill test ends in which 1 or more [curse] or [auto_fail] tokens were revealed, exhaust Token of Faith: Add that many [bless] tokens to the chaos bag.

all_cards.name: 驚駭詛咒
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 加入5個[curse]標記到混亂袋。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Add 5 [curse] tokens to the chaos bag.
all_cards.flavor:
我們都有翅膀，但卻毫無用處。要是能私下翅膀，我們就會這麼幹。
──弗朗茨‧卡夫卡《藍色八開筆記本》

all_cards.name: 蒙福之刃
all_cards.text: [action]如果蒙福之刃已準備：攻擊。這次攻擊你+1[combat]。如果這次攻擊中抽出[bless]或[elder_sign]標記，這次攻擊造成+1傷害。這次攻擊在抽出混亂標記前，你可以消耗蒙福之刃，來加入1個[bless]標記到混亂袋。
all_cards.real_text: [action] If Blessed Blade is ready: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack. If a [bless] or [elder_sign] token is revealed during this attack, this attack deals +1 damage. Before revealing chaos token(s) for this attack, you may exhaust Blessed Blade to add 1 [bless] token to the chaos bag.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 近戰. 祝福

all_cards.name: 眼花撩亂
all_cards.text:
快速。使用(3充能)。
[reaction]在一名敵人對你進行趁亂攻擊時，花費1充能：取消該次攻擊。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Uses (3 charges).
[reaction] When an enemy makes an attack of opportunity against you, spend 1 charge: Cancel that attack.

all_cards.name: 允諾力量
all_cards.text: 在你投入允諾力量到技能檢定後，加入1個[curse]標記到混亂袋。如果你不能，改為受到2點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text: After you commit Promise of Power to a skill test, add 1 [curse] token to the chaos bag. If you cannot, take 2 horror instead.

all_cards.name: 索菲
all_cards.text: 索菲不能離場。 你每項技能-1。 強制 - 如果馬克·哈里根身上有4點或更少傷害：將索菲翻面。
all_cards.real_text: Sophie cannot leave play. You get -1 to each of your skills. Forced - If Mark Harrigan has 4 or less damage on him: Flip Sophie.

all_cards.name: 命運之手
all_cards.text:
快速。在一名敵人攻擊你所在地點一位調查員時打出。
取消該次攻擊。然後，加入數量等同於該攻擊敵人的傷害值和恐懼值總和的[bless]標記到混亂袋。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when an enemy attacks an investigator at your location.
Cancel that attack. Then, add [bless] tokens to the chaos bag equal to the attacking enemy's total combined damage and horror values.

all_cards.name: 行動計劃
all_cards.text:
如果這次技能檢定在本回合的第一個行動中或之前，行動計劃獲得[willpower][agility]。
如果這次技能檢定在本回合的第一個和第三個行動之間且成功，抽取1張卡牌。
如果這次技能檢定在本回合的第三個行動中或之後，行動計劃獲得[combat][intellect]。
all_cards.real_text:
If this skill test is during or before the first action of this turn, Plan of Action gains [willpower] [agility].
If this skill test is between the first and third actions of this turn, draw 1 card if it succeeds.
If this skill test is during or after the third action of this turn, Plan of Action gains [combat] [intellect].

all_cards.name: 耀燦一擊
all_cards.text: 攻擊。這次攻擊你可以不使用[combat]，改為使用[willpower]。在你發動這次攻擊時，在混亂袋中查找最多3個[bless]標記，並將其封印在此。耀燦一擊上每有一個封印的[bless]標記，這次攻擊你+1技能值並造成+1傷害。如果這次攻擊擊敗被攻擊的敵人，將封印的標記返回供應堆。否則，將其釋放。
all_cards.real_text: Fight. You may use [willpower] instead of [combat] for this attack. When you initiate this attack, search the chaos bag for up to 3 [bless] tokens, and seal them here. For each [bless] token sealed on Radiant Smite, you get +1 skill value and deal +1 damage for this attack. If this attack defeats the attacked enemy, return the sealed tokens to the token pool. Otherwise, release them.
all_cards.traits: 法術. 勇氣. 祝福

all_cards.name: 真相的呼喚
all_cards.text: 只能在你未與敵人交戰時打出。 移動。選擇一個未揭示地點。朝向該地點最短的路徑移動(一次一個地點)，直到你進入該地點。如果你翻開了地點，或與敵人交戰，或你的移動被阻擋，結束此效果。
all_cards.real_text: Play only if you are not engaged with an enemy. Move. Choose an unrevealed location. Move (one location at a time) along the shortest path toward that location, until you enter that location. End this effect if you reveal a location, if an enemy engages you, or if your movement is blocked.

all_cards.name: 沃科施的凝視
all_cards.text: 從混亂袋隨機抽出7個。對你所在地點的敵人造成總計為1+抽出的[curse]和[auto_fail]標記數量的傷害。這個行動不會引起趁亂攻擊。
all_cards.real_text: Reveal 7 random chaos tokens from the chaos bag. Deal a total of 1 damage plus 1 additional damage for each [curse] or [auto_fail] token revealed, divided as you choose among enemies at your location. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

all_cards.name: 事不過三
all_cards.text:
快速。在你所在地點技能檢定開始時打出。
這次檢定中兩次，在調查員抽出混亂標記時，可以將其取消，返回混亂袋，並抽出一個新的混亂標記。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when a skill test at your location begins.
Twice during this test, when an investigator reveals a chaos token, they may cancel it, return it to the chaos bag, and reveal a new chaos token.

all_cards.name: 操縱命運
all_cards.text:
從混亂袋抽出標記，直到你抽出一個[curse]、[auto_fail]、[bless]或[elder_sign]標記。如果你抽出……
- ……[curse]或[auto_fail]標記，對你所在地點一名敵人造成2點傷害。
- ……[bless]或[elder_sign]標記，治癒你所在地點一位調查員或[[盟友]]支援卡2點傷害。
這個行動不會引起趁亂攻擊。
all_cards.real_text:
Reveal tokens from the chaos bag until you reveal a [curse], [auto_fail], [bless], or [elder_sign] token. If you revealed...
- ...a [curse] or [auto_fail] token, deal 2 damage to an enemy at your location.
- ...a [bless] or [elder_sign] token, heal 2 damage from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset at your location.
This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

all_cards.name: 特里希‧斯卡波羅
all_cards.text:
[reaction]你在有敵人的地點發現線索後：發現該地點的額外1個線索，或自動躲避該敵人(每輪限制一次)。
[elder_sign]效果：+2。如果是調查檢定，你可以選擇任一已揭示地點；改為如同你正在該地點調查。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] After you discover 1 or more clues at a location with an enemy: Either discover 1 additional clue at that location, or automatically evade that enemy. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +2. If this is an investigation, you may choose any revealed location; you are now investigating as if you were at that location instead.
all_cards.back_text: 牌組卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：流浪者卡牌([rogue])等級0-5，中立卡牌等級0-5，探求者卡牌([seeker])等級0-2。 牌組構建需求(不計入牌組卡牌張數)：潛於陰影、影子特工、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 特里希向來文武雙全，她堅定不移，追求卓越，無所畏懼，敢打敢拚，讓她屢屢馬到成功。鑒於她智體皆優的畢業紀錄，人人都指望她再幹一番大事業。但特里希卻去了一家商業密碼公司。她的工作實在平平，旁人最初的驚訝也都消磨，一度被寄予重塑的特里希‧斯卡波羅已經泯然眾人。但這卻很適合特里希，也讓旁人更難發現真相：她日常的工作不過是一種偽裝，真實身分卻是黑室這一官方解碼特工組織的間諜。

all_cards.name: 戴克斯特‧德雷克
all_cards.text:
[free]在你的回合中，丟棄一張你控制的支援卡：從你手牌打出一張不同名稱的支援卡，其費用減1(每輪限制一次)。
[elder_sign]效果：+2。你可以將你遊戲區域的一張支援卡返回你的手牌。然後，抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
[fast] During your turn, discard an asset you control: Play an asset with a different title from your hand, reducing its cost by 1. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +2. You may return an asset from your play area to your hand. Then, draw 1 card.
all_cards.flavor: "想看看真正的魔法嗎？"
all_cards.back_text: 牌組卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：潛修者卡牌([mystic])等級0-5，流浪者卡牌([rogue])等級0-2，中立卡牌等級0-5。 牌組構建需求(不計入牌組卡牌張數)：精湛手法、密教殘頁、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 戴克斯特‧德雷克從大戰退役後成了一名優秀的魔術師，總能用精巧的幻象和別出心裁的舞台技巧迷惑觀眾。儘管他聲名鵲起，戴克斯特還是想發現真正的魔法。他為自己在戰爭中找的的密教文本著了魔，儘管這是一節火燒過的斷章，但它也卻是臭名招著的《死靈之書》中的一節。戴克斯特用自己的財富尋找古代典籍之後的真相，但他的發現卻叫人毛骨悚然。他知道，除了自己，可能再沒人能阻止邪惡吞噬整個世界。

all_cards.name: 賽拉斯‧馬什
all_cards.text:
[reaction]你在你執行的技能檢定中抽出混亂標記後：將你投入到此檢定的一張技能卡返回你的手牌(每輪限制一次)。
[elder_sign]效果：+0。你可以將你棄牌堆的一張技能卡投入這次檢定。這次檢定結束後，不丟棄該技能卡，改為將其返回你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] After you reveal a chaos token during a skill test you are performing: Return a skill you committed to this test to your hand. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +0. You may commit a skill from your discard pile to this test. After this test ends, return that skill to your hand instead of discarding it.
all_cards.flavor: "出海了就別怕，小子。"
all_cards.back_text: 牌組卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：求生者卡牌([survivor])等級0-5，中立卡牌等級0-5，[[天性]]技能卡等級0-2。 牌組構建需求(不計入牌組卡牌張數)：駭變魚叉、賽拉斯的漁網、海妖之喚、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 自打在海岸灘塗上蹣跚學步，賽拉斯‧馬什就深深愛上了大海。他不假思索就決定要做一名水手。他體格健壯，對天氣有著超凡的感知，這讓他名聲在外，出海的每條船都認得。只有一件事困擾著賽拉斯：他一次次地夢到浪濤之下惱人的城市，還有棲息其中的古怪生物。這些夢境在召幻他，擾動他內心深處的一些東西，那些他以為已經留在家鄉印斯茅斯的東西。

all_cards.name: 潛於陰影
all_cards.text:
特里希‧斯卡波羅牌組專用。
快速。在你的回合開始後打出。
與每名與你交戰的敵人解除交戰。直到本輪結束，敵人不能與你交戰，且你不能對敵人造成傷害。
all_cards.real_text:
Trish Scarborough deck only.
Fast. Play after your turn begins.
Disengage from each enemy engaged with you. Until the end of the round, enemies cannot engage you and you cannot deal damage to enemies.

all_cards.name: 影子特工
all_cards.text: 獵物 - 僅對特里希‧斯卡波羅。 獵手。 只要影子特工與你交戰，你除了調查外不能發現線索。 強制 - 在躲避影子特工後：將其丟棄。
all_cards.real_text: Prey - Trish Scarborough only. Hunter. While Shadow Agents is engaged with you, you cannot discover clues except by investigating. Forced - After Shadow Agents is evaded: Discard it.

all_cards.name: 精湛手法

all_cards.real_text:
Dexter Drake deck only.
[reaction] After an asset enters play under your control: Until the end of the round, you get +2 to each of your skills while resolving a triggered ability on that asset.

只要密教殘頁在場，你獲得-1[willpower]。
all_cards.real_text:

While Occult Scraps is in your hand, you get -2 [willpower].
While Occult Scraps is in play, you get -1 [willpower].

all_cards.real_text: Silas Marsh deck only. [action]: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack. If you committed 1 or more skills to this skill test, this attack deals +1 damage. When this skill test ends, you may return Sea Change Harpoon to your hand to return all of your committed skill cards to your hand instead of discarding them.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 近戰

all_cards.name: 賽拉斯的漁網

all_cards.real_text: Silas Marsh deck only. [action]: Evade. You get +1 [agility] for this evasion attempt. If you succeed and you committed 1 or more skills to this skill test, you may automatically evade another enemy engaged with you. When this skill test ends, you may return Silas's Net to your hand to return all of your committed skill cards to your hand instead of discarding them.

all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Put Siren Call into play in your threat area. As an additional cost to commit 1 or more cards to a skill test, you must pay 1 resource for each matching skill icon those cards have. [action][action]: Discard Siren Call.

all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Attach Day of Reckoning to the current agenda. Then, search the chaos bag for an [elder_sign] token and seal it on Day of Reckoning. Card design inspired by the events of Arkham Nights 2018.

all_cards.name: 虛假聖約
all_cards.text:
永久。每副牌組限制1張[[聖約]]。
[reaction]你所在地點的調查員在技能檢定中抽出一個[curse]標記時，消耗虛假聖約：取消該混亂標記，將其返回供應堆，並抽出另一個標記。
all_cards.real_text:
Permanent. Limit 1 [[Covenant]] per deck.
[reaction] When an investigator at your location reveals a [curse] token during a skill test, exhaust False Covenant: Cancel that chaos token, return it to the token pool, and reveal another token.

all_cards.flavor: "你要是再吹一下，我就讓你把它吃下去。"

all_cards.name: 正義獵殺
all_cards.text: 交戰。選擇一名最多2個連接地點遠的敵人。移動(一次一個地點)到該敵人的地點，與其交戰，並加入等於該敵人的恐懼值數量的[bless]標記到混亂袋。
all_cards.real_text: Engage. Choose an enemy up to 2 locations away. Move (one location at a time) to that enemy's location, engage it, and add [bless] tokens to the chaos bag equal to that enemy's horror value.
all_cards.flavor: 麗塔眼睛瞇起，手上攥緊。牠們逃不掉了。這次一定。不會失手。

all_cards.name: 莊嚴聖約

永久。每副牌組限制1張[[聖約]]。

all_cards.real_text:
Permanent. Limit 1 [[Covenant]] per deck.

all_cards.real_text: Investigate. Add your [agility] value to your skill value for this investigation. If you succeed by 2 or more, you may automatically evade an enemy at this location. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

all_cards.name: 哈米吉多頓
all_cards.text: 使用(3充能)。 [action]花費1充能：攻擊。這次攻擊不使用[combat]，改為使用[willpower]，並造成+1傷害。如果這次攻擊中抽出[curse]標記，你可以對你所在地點的一名敵人造成1點傷害，或在哈米吉多頓上放置1充能。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (3 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Fight. This attack uses [willpower] instead of [combat] and deals +1 damage. If a [curse] token is revealed during this attack, you may deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location or place 1 charge on Armageddon.

all_cards.name: 暗影遁形
all_cards.text: 使用(3充能)。 [action]花費1充能：躲避。這次躲避不使用[agility]，改為使用[willpower]。如果你成功，且躲避的敵人非[[精英]]，你可以移動該敵人到連接地點。如果這次躲避嘗試期間抽出[curse]標記，你可以移動到連接地點，或在暗影遁形上放置1充能。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (3 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Evade. This evasion attempt uses [willpower] instead of [agility]. If you succeed and the evaded enemy is non-[[Elite]], you may move that enemy to a connecting location. If a [curse] token is revealed during this evasion attempt, you may move to a connecting location or place 1 charge on Shroud of Shadows.

all_cards.real_text: Permanent. Limit 1 [[Covenant]] per deck. [reaction] After an investigator at your location performs the "reveal the chaos token" step of a skill test, if both a [bless] token and a [curse] token were revealed during that test, exhaust Paradoxical Covenant: This test automatically succeeds. (Remove each [bless] and [curse] token revealed from the chaos bag after this test ends.)
all_cards.traits: 聖約. 祝福. 詛咒縈繞

all_cards.name: Gloria Goldberg
all_cards.text:
You choose the investigator order during the mythos phase.
[reaction] When you look at 1 or more cards from the encounter deck: Look at 1 additional card and choose 1 non-[[Elite]] card among them. Either discard it, put it on top of the encounter deck, or place it facedown beneath Gloria Goldberg (max 3 cards beneath her).
[elder_sign] effect: +1. Look at the top card of the encounter deck.
all_cards.real_text:
You choose the investigator order during the mythos phase.
[reaction] When you look at 1 or more cards from the encounter deck: Look at 1 additional card and choose 1 non-[[Elite]] card among them. Either discard it, put it on top of the encounter deck, or place it facedown beneath Gloria Goldberg (max 3 cards beneath her).
[elder_sign] effect: +1. Look at the top card of the encounter deck.
all_cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Secondary Class Choice: At deck creation, choose Guardian ([guardian]), Seeker ([seeker]), or Rogue ([rogue]). Deckbuilding Options: Mystic cards ([mystic]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5, up to 10 level 0-1 events and/or skills of your chosen secondary class. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): 3 copies of Psychic Sensitivity, 3 copies of Prophecy of the End (shuffled into the encounter deck), 1 random basic weakness.
all_cards.back_flavor: Nightmares and apocalyptic visions have plagued novelist Gloria Goldberg her entire life. Although she learned to exorcise her terrors onto the page, she has never revealed the inspiration for her weird tales, not even to fellow author Jamie Galbraith. One day, she is struck by a vision of Jamie begging her to help finish what he started. Moments later, she receives word of his sudden death. As Gloria reads Jamie's unfinished book, the story takes hold of her, and the words on the page begin to bleed into reality.

all_cards.name: 蝴蝶效應
all_cards.text: 快速。在你所在地點的技能檢定中抽出帶有符號的混亂標記時打出(在結算其效果之前)。 你或執行檢定的調查員可投入一張卡牌到這次技能檢定，或將其投入到這次檢定的一張卡牌返回其手牌。
all_cards.real_text: Fast. Play when a chaos token with a symbol is revealed during a skill test at your location (before resolving its effects). You or the performing investigator may either commit a card to this skill test, or return a card they committed to this test to their hand.
all_cards.traits: 悖論. 祝福. 詛咒縈繞

all_cards.name: 雙面神父

all_cards.real_text: [reaction] After Priest of Two Faiths enters play: Add 3 [bless] tokens to the chaos bag. Forced - At the end of the upkeep phase: You must either add 1 [curse] token to the chaos bag or discard Priest of Two Faiths.
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 祝福. 詛咒縈繞

all_cards.name: 密切監視
all_cards.text: 疊加到你所在地點。每個地點限制1張。 強制 - 在一名非[[精英]]敵人進入疊加地點後，丟棄密切監視：自動躲避該敵人並在疊加地點發現1個線索。該敵人在下一個補給階段中不準備。
all_cards.real_text: Attach to your location. Limit 1 per location. Forced - After a non-[[Elite]] enemy enters attached location, discard Under Surveillance: Automatically evade that enemy and discover 1 clue at attached location. That enemy does not ready during the next upkeep phase.

all_cards.name: 附魔護甲
all_cards.text: 打出附魔護甲，置於你所在地點任意調查員控制之下。 強制 - 在放置傷害和/或恐懼到附魔護甲上後：附魔護甲檢定的所有者檢定[willpower](X)，其中X為附魔護甲上的傷害和恐懼的總量。如果檢定失敗，丟棄附魔護甲並將剛剛放置在其上的傷害和/或恐懼分配到別處。
all_cards.real_text: Play Enchanted Armor under the control of any investigator at your location. Forced - After damage and/or horror is placed on Enchanted Armor: The owner of Enchanted Armor tests [willpower] (X), where X is the total amount of damage and horror on it. If the test fails, discard Enchanted Armor and assign the damage and/or horror just placed on it elsewhere.

all_cards.name: 狂怒畸變
all_cards.text: 攻擊。在你發動這次攻擊時，加入最多3個[curse]標記到混亂袋。每以此方式加入1個[curse]標記到混亂袋，你這次攻擊+1[combat]並造成+1傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Fight. When you initiate this attack, add up to 3 [curse] tokens to the chaos bag. For each [curse] token added to the chaos bag in this way, you get +1 [combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack.

all_cards.flavor:
"我的魔法與生俱來。
流淌在我的血管中。
隨著我的心跳搏動。"
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：25。 牌組構建選項：潛修者([mystic])等級0-5，[[法術]]卡牌等級0-3，[[密教]]卡牌等級0-3，中立卡牌等級0-5。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：希波利爾傳家寶、黑暗回憶、1張隨機基礎弱點。 額外選項：當你升級[[法術]]卡牌時，你可以改為支付較高等級卡牌的全額經驗值，並將較低等級卡牌保留在你的牌組中(該卡不計入你的牌組卡牌張數，或你牌組中的同名卡牌數量)。
all_cards.back_flavor: 艾格尼絲·貝克或許只是個默默無名的侍應，但是在前世，她是一個無比強力的女巫。這一切都要從一把鑰匙說起，她在自己的小閣樓裡，家傳的一個首飾盒中找到了它。當她拿起鑰匙，記憶突然如同洪水般湧入，伴隨著一個詞："希波利爾"。

[fast] Exhaust Spirit of Humanity and add 2 [curse] tokens to the chaos bag: Heal 1 damage and 1 horror.
all_cards.traits: 儀式. 祝福. 詛咒縈繞

all_cards.name: 恢復和諧
all_cards.text: 在混亂袋中查找X個[curse]標記，並將其返回供應堆。X為混亂袋內[bless]標記的數量。每以此方式移除一個[curse]標記，獲得1資源。
all_cards.real_text: Search the chaos bag for X [curse] tokens and return them to the token pool. X is the number of [bless] tokens in the chaos bag. Gain 1 resource for each [curse] token removed in this way.
all_cards.flavor: 糾葛的命運之線亦可解開，即便只是片刻。

all_cards.name: 幸運兔腳
all_cards.text: [reaction]在你技能檢定失敗後，消耗幸運兔腳：抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] After you fail a skill test, exhaust Rabbit's Foot: Draw 1 card.
all_cards.flavor: 他們都說這不會帶來任何好運。我倒是覺得寧信其有，不信其無。

all_cards.name: 狗屎運
all_cards.text:
快速。躲避嘗試一個非[[精英]]敵人期間，在你失敗且低於難度2點以內後打出。
將該敵人放到遭遇牌堆頂。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play after you fail a skill test by 2 or less during an evasion attempt against a non-[[Elite]] enemy.
Place that enemy on top of the encounter deck.
all_cards.flavor: 傻人有傻福。

all_cards.name: 學無止境
all_cards.text: 快速。在你技能檢定失敗且完畢後(結算該次檢定的所有效果後)打出。 再次嘗試該次檢定。你本次檢定+2技能值。
all_cards.real_text: Fast. Play after a skill test you failed ends (after resolving all effects from the failed test). Attempt that test again. You get +2 skill value for this test.

all_cards.name: "看看我發現了什麼！"
all_cards.text:
快速。在你調查失敗，並且低於難度2點及以內後打出。
發現你所在地點的2個線索。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play after you fail a skill test by 2 or less while investigating.
Discover 2 clues in your location.

all_cards.name: 哎呀！
all_cards.text:
快速。在你攻擊與你交戰的敵人失敗，並且低於難度2點及以內後打出。
對你所在地點的不同敵人造成該次攻擊的傷害。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play after you fail a skill test by 2 or less while attacking an enemy engaged with you.
Deal this attack's damage to a different enemy at your location.

all_cards.name: 重拾信念
all_cards.text:
每次技能檢定最多投入1張。
你可以在任何類型的檢定中投入重拾信念。
如果這次檢定失敗，執行檢定的調查員抽取2張卡牌並獲得2資源。
all_cards.real_text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
You may commit Take Heart to any type of test.
If this test fails, the performing investigator draws 2 cards and gains 2 resources.

all_cards.name: 星星·XVII
all_cards.text:
你控制的所有有生命值的支援得到+1生命值。
你控制的所有有神智值的支援+1神智值。
[reaction]在遊戲開始時，如果星星·XVII在你起始手牌中：將其放置入場。
all_cards.real_text:
Each asset you control with health gets +1 health.
Each asset you control with sanity gets +1 sanity.
[reaction] When the game begins, if The Star • XVII is in your opening hand: Put it into play.

all_cards.name: 教皇·V
all_cards.text:
你擁有額外1個法術槽。
你的法術槽可以用來攜帶佔用飾品槽位的卡牌，反之亦然。
[reaction]在遊戲開始時，如果教皇·V在你起始手牌中：將其放置入場。
all_cards.real_text:
You have 1 additional arcane slot.
Your arcane slots can be used to hold cards that take up accessory slots, and vice versa.
[reaction] When the game begins, if The Hierophant • V is in your opening hand: Put it into play.

all_cards.name: 月亮掛墜
all_cards.text:
你擁有額外1個塔羅槽位。
你手中或投入到技能檢定中的每張非弱點[[塔羅]]支援獲得[wild][wild]。
[reaction]在遊戲開始時，如果月亮掛墜在你起始手牌中：將其放置入場。
all_cards.real_text:
You have 1 additional tarot slot.
Each non-weakness [[Tarot]] asset in your hand or committed to a skill test gains [wild] [wild].
[reaction] When the game begins, if Moon Pendant is in your opening hand: Put it into play.

all_cards.name: 聖潔
all_cards.text:
作為打出聖潔的額外費用，將混亂袋內或封印在場上卡牌上的總計10個[bless]標記返回供應堆。
移除場上任一卡牌上的1個毀滅標記。
all_cards.real_text:
As an additional cost to play Hallow, return a total of 10 [bless] tokens to the token pool from the chaos bag or sealed on cards in play.
Remove 1 doom from any card in play.
all_cards.flavor: 黑暗至深之處，光明仍會綻放。

all_cards.name: 阿里阿德涅之線
all_cards.text:
使用(0秘密)。
阿里阿德涅之線上的秘密能被花費，如同其在你所在地點調查員控制的任何支援卡上。
[free]消耗阿里阿德涅之線：將1秘密從你控制的支援卡移動到你的資源池，作為資源；或從你的資源池將1資源移動到你控制的支援卡，作為秘密。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (0 secrets).
Secrets on Ariadne's Twine can be spent as if they were on any asset controlled by an investigator at your location.
[fast] Exhaust Ariadne's Twine: Move 1 secret from an asset you control to your resource pool, as a resource, or vice versa.

all_cards.name: 不擇手段
all_cards.text:
你可以投入不擇手段到任何類型的檢定中。
作為投入不擇手段到技能檢定的額外費用，加入數量等於這次檢定難度的[curse]標記到混亂袋。
這次檢定自動成功。
all_cards.real_text:
You may commit Justify the Means to any type of test.
As an additional cost to commit Justify the Means to a skill test, add [curse] tokens to the chaos bag equal to this test's difficulty.
This test automatically succeeds.

all_cards.name: 幸運骰子
all_cards.text:
卓越。
[reaction]在你抽出一個非[curse]、非[auto_fail]的混亂標記時，加入1個[curse]標記到混亂袋：忽略剛剛抽出的混亂標記並抽出另一個結算。如果該標記有[curse]或[auto_fail]符號，將幸運骰子返回你的手牌(不能被忽略/取消)。
all_cards.real_text:
Exceptional.
[reaction] When you reveal a non-[curse], non-[auto_fail] chaos token, add 1 [curse] token to the chaos bag: Ignore the just revealed chaos token and reveal another one to resolve. If that token has a [curse] or [auto_fail] symbol, return Lucky Dice to your hand (cannot be ignored/canceled).

all_cards.name: 實驗室助理
all_cards.text:
你手牌上限+2。
[reaction]在實驗室助理入場後：抽取2張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Your maximum hand size is increased by 2.
[reaction] After Laboratory Assistant enters play: Draw 2 cards.
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 米斯卡塔尼克. 科學

all_cards.name: 荒唐的素描像
all_cards.text:
只能在你所在地點有至少1個線索時打出。
抽取3張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Play only if there is a clue on your location.
Draw 3 cards.

all_cards.name: 推理
all_cards.text: 如果調查一個地點時本技能檢定成功，額外發現該地點的1個線索。
all_cards.real_text: If this skill test is successful while investigating a location, discover 1 additional clue at that location.
all_cards.flavor: 我就知道我看過這個符號。我現在通知其他人還為時不晚！

all_cards.name: 儀式蠟燭
all_cards.text: [reaction]在技能檢定期間，你抽出[skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]或[elder_thing]標記後：你這次檢定技能值+1。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] After a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], or [elder_thing] symbol is revealed during a test you are performing: You get +1 skill value for this test.
all_cards.flavor: 蜂蠟滴落，反射出光澤。火焰舞蹈，彷彿活物般。

all_cards.name: 星界旅行
all_cards.text: 移動。移動到任意一個已揭示的地點並從混亂袋中隨機抽取1個標記。如果抽出[skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]、[elder_thing]或[auto_fail]標記，你必須丟棄一張你控制的[[道具]]或[[盟友]]支援卡(如果你不能這麼做，則受到1點傷害)。
all_cards.real_text: Move. Move to any revealed location and reveal a random token from the chaos bag. If you reveal a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol, you must discard an [[Item]] or [[Ally]] asset you control (if you cannot, take 1 damage).
all_cards.flavor: 跨維度的旅行存在著風險，這他很清楚。但誰能抗拒那超越時空的疆域呢?

all_cards.name: 催眠術
all_cards.text:
快速。在一名敵人攻擊你所在地點的調查員時打出。
取消該次攻擊。然後從混亂袋中抽出1個標記。如果是[skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]、[elder_thing]或[auto_fail]標記，將敵人的傷害轉移給敵人自身。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when an enemy attacks an investigator at your location.
Cancel that attack. Then, reveal a random token from the chaos bag. If it has a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol, deal the attacking enemy's damage to itself.

all_cards.name: 黑暗預言
all_cards.text:
快速。在你將要抽出混亂標記時打出。
改為抽出5個混亂標記，而不是1個。從這些標記中選擇1個[skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]、[elder_thing]或[auto_fail]標記來結算，忽略其餘標記。(如果沒有抽出上述標記，從這些標記中選擇任意1個標記來結算，忽略其餘標記。)
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when you would reveal a chaos token.
Reveal 5 chaos tokens instead of 1. Choose one of those tokens with a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol to resolve, and ignore the rest. (If no such token is revealed, choose any one of those tokens to resolve, and ignore the rest.)
all_cards.flavor: 真相就寫在星辰之間。

all_cards.name: 逆反
all_cards.text: 在你為這次檢定抽取混亂標記前，選擇下列一個符號：([skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]或[elder_thing])。在這次檢定中，忽略所選符號的效果(包括其修正值)。
all_cards.real_text: Before revealing chaos tokens for this test, choose one of the following symbols: ([skull], [cultist], [tablet], or [elder_thing]). Ignore the effects of the chosen symbol during this test (including its modifier).

all_cards.name: 體能訓練
all_cards.text:
[free]花費1資源：這次技能檢定期間你+1[willpower]。
[free]花費1資源：這次技能檢定期間你+1[combat]。
all_cards.real_text:
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [willpower] for this skill test.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [combat] for this skill test.

all_cards.name: 閃躲
all_cards.text:
快速。在一名敵人攻擊你所在地點的一位調查員時打出。
取消那次攻擊。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when an enemy attacks an investigator at your location.
Cancel that attack.

all_cards.name: 致命打擊
all_cards.text: 如果攻擊期間的這次技能檢定成功，則該次攻擊造成+1傷害。
all_cards.real_text: If this skill test is successful during an attack, that attack deals +1 damage.
all_cards.flavor: 大斧砸在肉上，發出令人作嘔的響聲，他停不住地反覆打擊著那個怪物，直到它再也無法動彈為止。

all_cards.name: 彈簧刀
all_cards.text: 快速。 [action]：攻擊。如果你成功且超過難度至少2點，該次攻擊造成+1傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Fast. [action]: Fight. If you succeed by 2 or more, this attack deals +1 damage.

all_cards.name: 幸運煙盒
all_cards.text: [reaction]在你技能檢定成功且超過難度至少2點後，消耗幸運煙盒：抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] After you succeed at a skill test by 2 or more, exhaust Lucky Cigarette Case: Draw 1 card.
all_cards.flavor: "其實沒那麼幸運，只是想抽根煙。"

all_cards.name: 暗中偷襲
all_cards.text: 攻擊。本次攻擊中將你的[agility]數值加入你的技能值。如果你成功且超過難度2點或以上，自動躲避本次攻擊的敵人。
all_cards.real_text: Fight. Add your [agility] value to your skill value for this attack. If you succeed by 2 or more, automatically evade the attacked enemy.
all_cards.flavor: "瞄準眼睛。"他們這麼告訴我的。

all_cards.name: 藝高膽大
all_cards.text:
快速。在你技能檢定將要成功時打出。
這次技能檢定你+2技能值。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when you would succeed at a skill test.
You get +2 skill value for this test.
all_cards.flavor:
"麥克格倫，你想讓我們兩個都送命嗎？"
"這次不會了，夥計。這次不會了。"

all_cards.name: 悄然遁去
all_cards.text: 躲避。本次躲避嘗試將你的[intellect]加入你的技能值。如果你成功且超過難度至少2點，且被躲避的敵人非[[精英]]，該敵人在下一個補給階段不進入準備狀態。
all_cards.real_text: Evade. Add your [intellect] to your skill value for this evasion attempt. If you succeed by 2 or more and the evaded enemy is non-[[Elite]], it does not ready during the next upkeep phase.

all_cards.name: 機會主義者
all_cards.text:
只能在你執行的技能檢定中投入。
如果你成功且超過難度至少3點，在檢定後不丟棄機會主義者，改為將其返回你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Commit only to a skill test you are performing.
If you succeed by 3 or more, return Opportunist to your hand after this test instead of discarding it.

all_cards.name: 附魔武器
all_cards.text: 疊加到你所在地點調查員控制的一張[[武器]]支援卡。每張支援卡限制一張。 疊加支援卡獲得[[遺物]]關鍵詞，並且額外佔用一個法術槽位。 [reaction]在你使用疊加支援卡執行攻擊行動時，消耗此卡牌：這次攻擊將此卡牌所有者的[willpower]加入你的[combat]。這次攻擊造成+1傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Attach to a [[Weapon]] asset controlled by an investigator at your location. Limit 1 per asset. Attached asset gains the [[Relic]] trait and takes up an arcane slot in addition to its other slots. [reaction] When you perform a Fight action using attached asset, exhaust this card: Add the owner of this card's [willpower] to your [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage.

all_cards.name: 誓願
all_cards.text: 卓越。 你獲得+1[willpower]、+1[intellect]、+1[combat]和+1[agility]。 強制 - 在誓願入場後：使用以下格式做出承諾——"在我的每個回合中，我不會(抽取/打出/投入)任何卡牌。" 。如果誓願在場時你打破承諾，將其丟棄並加入10個[curse]標記到混亂袋。
all_cards.real_text: Exceptional. You get +1 [willpower], +1 [intellect], +1 [combat], and +1 [agility]. Forced - After Geas enters play: Make a promise using the following formula - "I shall not (draw/play/commit) any cards during each of my turns." If you break this promise while Geas is in play, discard it and add 10 [curse] tokens to the chaos bag.

使用(2資源)。當每輪開始時重新補滿這些資源。

all_cards.real_text:

[reaction] When an investigator at your location draws a basic weakness, exhaust Ikiaq: Cancel that weakness's effects and place it facedown beneath Ikiaq. Its owner must draw it if Ikiaq leaves play.

作為打出警戒和平的額外費用，在混亂袋和/或場上的卡牌中查找總共5個[bless]標記，並將其返回供應堆。
快速。在神話階段的"抽取遭遇卡"步驟(步驟1.4)將要開始時打出。跳過神話階段的此步驟。

all_cards.name: 淨化腐敗

Card design by the Impure at Arkham Nights 2019.

all_cards.real_text: [action]: Fight. You get +2 [combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack. When you initiate this ability, you may release a [bless] token sealed on Holy Spear. [action] Search the chaos bag for 2 [bless] tokens and seal them on Holy Spear: Fight. You get +4 [combat] and deal +2 damage for this attack.

all_cards.text: 當牌組構建時，選擇3張不同的指令支援卡加入牌組。 [fast]：將1張指令支援卡翻面(忽略其永久關鍵詞)。(每場遊戲限制1次)。 [elder_sign]效果：+2。選擇1張指令支援卡。在這一輪中，你可以忽略其守則能力。

all_cards.flavor: "如果我惹是生非，警長，那是因為已有是非。"
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：守衛者([guardian])等級0-3，[[洞察]]卡牌等級0-3，[[策略]]卡牌等級0-3，中立卡牌等級0-5。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：羅蘭的.38特製手槍、掩蓋罪證、1張隨機基礎弱點。 額外經驗值：劇本開始時你額外擁有5點經驗值(這不影響你在冒險模式所需拿取的弱點卡數量)。
all_cards.back_flavor: 羅蘭總能在規則和命令中找到一種安全感。作為聯邦探員之一，他在遇上任何狀況的時候總能找到應對的辦法。但對於近來他碰到的事件來說，他的聯邦探員手冊完全沒幫上忙，尤其是在面對那些奇怪生物、時空之門、魔法咒文之時。如果不是親眼所見，他永遠不會相信這些奇聞……他確信，自己的上司只會把這些事情當做是都市怪談。

all_cards.name: 觀測
all_cards.text:
永久。每位調查員限制1張。
在每場遊戲設置前，從塔羅牌堆抽取3張隨機塔羅牌並選擇其中1張。將選擇的牌以正位放在你的面前。其他每位調查員忽略該牌效果。將其餘牌洗回塔羅牌堆。
all_cards.real_text:
Permanent. Limit 1 per investigator.
Before setting up each game, draw 3 random cards from the tarot deck and choose 1. Place the chosen card in front of you, in the upright position. Each other investigator ignores its effects. Shuffle the rest back into the tarot deck.

all_cards.name: 詛咒纏身
all_cards.text:
永久。
在每場遊戲設置前，從塔羅牌堆抽取1張隨機塔羅牌，將其以逆位放在你的面前。其他每位調查員忽略該牌效果。
all_cards.real_text:
Permanent.
Before setting up each game, draw a random card from the tarot deck and place the chosen card in front of you, in the reverse position. Each other investigator ignores its effects.

all_cards.name: 惡魔·XV
all_cards.text: 惡魔·XV在你手中時，你不能打出除了惡魔·XV以外的支援。 如果冒險設置期間你抽取了惡魔·XV作為你起始手牌(不論在換牌機會之前或之後)，你不能將其替換。本卡牌必須留在你的起始手牌中。
all_cards.real_text: You cannot play assets other than The Devil • XV while it is in your hand. If The Devil • XV is drawn in your opening hand during setup (before or after taking a mulligan), you cannot replace it. It must stay in your opening hand.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 諾曼·威瑟斯
all_cards.text: 你牌堆頂部的卡牌始終揭示。 每輪1次，你可以-1資源費用打出你牌堆頂部的卡牌，如同其為你的手牌。 強制 - 在你的牌堆頂部揭示弱點後：將其抽取。 [elder_sign]效果：+X。你可以用你1張手牌交換你牌堆頂部的卡牌。X為你牌堆頂部卡牌的資源費用。
all_cards.real_text: Play with the top card of your deck revealed. Once per round, you may play the top card of your deck as if it were in your hand, at -1 resource cost. Forced - After a weakness is revealed while on top of your deck: Draw it. [elder_sign] effect: +X. You may swap the top card of your deck with a card in your hand. X is the resource cost of the top card of your deck.

deck_options.error: You cannot have more than 5 level 0 Mystic cards

all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：探求者([seeker])等級0，潛修者([mystic])等級1-5，中立卡牌等級0-5，最多5張其它的潛修者卡牌([mystic])等級0。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：伊波恩之書，預示者、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 星星裡藏有很多秘密，而諾曼從不會忽略任何蛛絲馬跡。某日當六顆星星從天上消失時，諾曼簡直無法接受——儘管他的同事都告訴他，那一切只是他的幻想罷了。他花費了好幾年，終於在行將就木之時從古籍裡找到了答案：書中描述了星星以及它們消失的順序，和確切的日期和時間，裡頭還提及這是萬物中將迎來結局的一個訊號：他預示了一隻龐大的野獸，將會撕碎人類所創造的一切。諾曼不知道該怎麼做來阻止野獸摧毀世界，但如果星星知道諭示，他將會找到答案。

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 伊波恩之書
all_cards.text:
諾曼·威瑟斯牌組專用。
[fast]消耗伊波恩之書：用你1張手牌交換你牌堆頂部的卡牌。
[fast]消耗伊波恩之書：將你牌堆頂部的卡牌投入到你所在地點調查員執行的符合條件的技能檢定中。
all_cards.real_text:
Norman Withers deck only.
[fast] Exhaust Livre d'Eibon: Swap the top card of your deck with a card in your hand.
[fast] Exhaust Livre d'Eibon: Commit the top card of your deck to an eligible skill test performed by an investigator at your location.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 遺物. 書籍

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 預示者
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 將本卡牌放置於你的牌堆頂部。 只要你的牌堆頂部揭示了預示者，除了下方能力外，你牌堆內的卡牌不能被查找、抽取、或以任何方式操縱。 [action] [action]：丟棄預示者。只要預示者在你的牌堆頂部就可以啟動本能力，如同其在你的威脅區域。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Place this card on top of your deck. While The Harbinger is revealed and on top of your deck, cards in your deck cannot be searched, drawn, or manipulated in any way except by the below ability. [action] [action]: Discard The Harbinger. This ability may be activated while The Harbinger is on top of your deck, as if it were in your threat area.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 蒙特雷·傑克
all_cards.text:
[reaction]當你的回合結束時，如果你本輪開始時的地點與你現在地點的連接次數為1：獲得1資源或抽取1張卡牌(如果連接次數至少為2，改為執行兩項)。
[elder_sign]效果：+1。如果你本輪開始時的地點與你現在地點的連接次數至少為1，獲得1資源或抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] At the end of your turn, if you started this round 1 location away from your current location: Either gain 1 resource or draw 1 card (if you started this round 2 or more locations away, do both instead).
[elder_sign] effect: +1. If you started this round 1 or more locations away from your current location, gain 1 resource or draw 1 card.

deck_options.error: You cannot have more than 5 level 0 Seeker cards

all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項流浪者([rogue])等級0，探求者([seeker])等級1-5，中立卡牌等級0-5，最多5張探求者卡牌([seeker])等級0。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：可靠的長鞭、被埋葬的秘密、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 年輕的傑克跟隨他父親一起考古探險、巡遊世界，如今他已是遍歷全球的尋寶獵人，同時也是一個出色的考古學家，"蒙特雷"跟隨父親的腳步，保護著古代文明和失落文化的寶藏。但當蒙特雷發現了一個熟悉又陌生符號的銀色吊墜後，他決定探索自己蒙著灰的過去。多年前，他的父親被殺害時，額頭上留下這個相同的符號。至此之後，那個驚悚的畫面一直停留在蒙特雷的夢境裡，時不時反覆出現。不過，他已經快接近真相了；在找出殺害他父親的兇手前，他是不會停下邁進的步伐……無論需要付出多少代價。

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 可靠的長鞭
all_cards.text: 快速。蒙特雷·傑克牌組專用。 [action]：攻擊。這次攻擊不使用[combat]，改為使用[agility]。如果這次攻擊成功，你可以消耗可靠的長鞭，以自動躲避被攻擊的敵人或這次攻擊造成+1傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Fast. Monterey Jack deck only. [action]: Fight. This attack uses [agility] instead of [combat]. If this attack succeeds, you may exhaust Trusty Bullwhip to either automatically evade the attacked enemy or deal +1 damage for this attack.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 近戰

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 被埋葬的秘密
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 將被埋葬的秘密放置入你的威脅區域。 如果你所在地點可以被調查，除了冒險卡牌效果外，你不能移動。 [action]：調查。如果你成功，不發現線索，改為丟棄被埋葬的秘密。如果你失敗，你可以受到2點恐懼來將其混洗入你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Put Buried Secrets into play in your threat area. If your location can be investigated, you cannot move except by scenario card effects. [action]: Investigate. If you succeed, instead of discovering clues, discard Buried Secrets. If you fail, you may take 2 horror to shuffle it into your deck.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 陳麗麗
all_cards.text:
遊戲開始時將你牌組裡每張演武放置入場，[[運功]]面朝上。
[elder_sign]效果：+2。這次檢定結束後，將你控制的1張[[破功]]演武翻轉至其[[運功]]面。
all_cards.real_text:
You begin the game with each Discipline in your deck in play, [[Unbroken]] side faceup.
[elder_sign] effect: +2. After this test ends, flip a [[Broken]] Discipline you control to its [[Unbroken]] side.

deck_options.error: You cannot have more than 5 level 0 Guardian cards

all_cards.flavor: "我此生都在準備迎面這個邪魔。吾意已決。"
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項潛修者([mystic])等級0，守衛者([guardian])等級1-5，中立卡牌等級0-5，最多5張守衛者卡牌([guardian])等級0。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：每張演武支援卡搭配1張命運重擔(見下方)、1張隨機基礎弱點。 牌組構建限制：無[[槍械]]支援卡。 其它需求：當構建牌庫時，選擇一張演武支援卡加入你的牌庫。其被視為你牌組構建需求的一部分。你每擁有15點經驗值，你可以選擇加入一張不同的演武支援卡到你的牌組。
all_cards.back_flavor: 陳麗麗不是一個多話的人，不過一但開口，必定是倍加思量的金玉良言。在經歷一生的嚴格訓練，她的每個武術動作都優雅而乾淨俐落。養育她的高僧曾經說過，她的出生是為了與一個強大的惡魔抗衡；現在，他們深信惡魔即將到來，而她是唯一一個能夠阻止邪惡的人。

all_cards.text: 顯現 - 你必須做出決定(選擇一項)： -將一張你控制的演武翻轉至其[[破功]]面。該卡牌本輪不能被翻回來。 - 受到1點傷害和1點恐懼。

all_cards.flavor: "我連自己都無能為力，如何去拯救他人？

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 鮑勃·詹金斯
all_cards.text:
在任何時候，你所在地點的調查員可以向你揭示其手中的[[道具]]支援卡。
在你回合中，你可以進行一個額外行動，該行動只能用於打出你所在地點調查員手中的一張[[道具]]支援卡，置於該調查員控制之下(雙方調查員都可以花費資源來支付其費用)。
[elder_sign]效果：你每控制1張[[道具]]支援卡，+1。
all_cards.real_text:
At any time, an investigator at your location may reveal to you the [[Item]] assets in their hand.
You may take an additional action during your turn, which can only be used to play an [[Item]] asset from the hand of an investigator at your location, under their control. (Both investigators may spend resources to pay its cost).
[elder_sign] effect: +1 for each [[Item]] asset you control.

deck_options.error: You cannot have more than 5 level 0 Rogue cards

all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：求生者([survivor])等級0，流浪者([rogue])等級1-5，中立卡牌等級0-5，最多5張其它流浪者卡牌([rogue])等級0。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：精明的交易、貪婪、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 鮑勃認為，推銷員的成功取決於自身堅持不懈的性格：你只需要一遍又一遍地告知別人他們想要的是什麼。最近，鮑勃擁有幾枚"詛咒縈繞"的金幣，他希望自己一向的堅持能夠發現金幣的起源與出現的緣由，如果他不出一點差錯的話，這將是一大成就。也許幹完這票，他終於能夠退休，買下自己夢寐以求的那艘船，在熱帶天堂釣魚度過餘生。也許到最後，鮑勃會發現那些閃閃發亮的光芒，其實並不是他所認為的黃金。

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 精明的交易

[reaction]在你打出一張[[道具]]支援卡時：將其置於你所在地點任一位調查員的控制之下。

Bob Jenkins deck only.
Reduce the cost of each [[Item]] asset you play by 1.
[reaction] When you play an [[Item]] asset: Play it under the control of any investigator at your location.
all_cards.flavor: "你說'末日'要來了，我只聽到'商機要來了'。"

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
