all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Take 1 horror. If you have... - ...10 or fewer resources, take 1 additional horror. - ...5 or fewer resources, take 1 additional horror. - ...0 resources, take 1 additional horror.
all_cards.flavor: 也許有人會說，自有信徒拜金。

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 21點
all_cards.text:
依次從混亂袋隨機抽出標記，直到你選擇停下。將每個[skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]或[elder_thing]視為5；[auto_fail]視為10；[elder_sign]視為1或11。如果這些標記的總和(忽略+/-)為……
- ……18或更少，獲得4資源。
- ……19，獲得5資源。
- ……20，獲得6資源。
- ……21，獲得9資源。
all_cards.real_text:
One at a time, reveal random tokens from the chaos bag until you choose to stop. Treat each [skull], [cultist], [tablet], or [elder_thing] as a 5; the [auto_fail] as a 10; and the [elder_sign] as either a 1 or an 11. If the combined value of those tokens (ignoring +/-) is...
- ...18 or less, gain 4 resources.
- ...19, gain 5 resources.
- ...20, gain 6 resources.
- ...21, gain 9 resources.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 不當交易
all_cards.text: 揭示你手中的一張[[道具]]支援卡。你所在地點的另一位調查員可以打出該支援卡，如同其在他的手牌中。如果他這麼做，你抽取1張卡牌並獲得等於該支援卡打印費用的資源。
all_cards.real_text: Reveal an [[Item]] asset in your hand. Another investigator at your location may play that asset as if it were in their hand. If they do, draw 1 card and gain resources equal to that asset's printed cost.
all_cards.flavor: "真的假的？你現在在跟我討價還價？"

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 紅色鬧鐘
all_cards.text: 卓越。使用(0充能)。 強制 - 在你的回合開始後：在此放置1充能，或取走此處所有充能作為資源。然後，如果其正好有…… - 1充能，下次技能檢定你+3技能值。 - 2充能，你可以移動最多2次。 - 3充能，這回合你可以進行一次額外行動。
all_cards.real_text: Exceptional. Uses (0 charges). Forced - After your turn begins: Either place 1 charge here, or take all charges here, as resources. Then, if it has exactly... - 1 charge, you get +3 skill value for your next skill test. - 2 charges, you may move up to 2 times. - 3 charges, you may take an additional action this turn.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 沙夫納的目錄
all_cards.text:
使用(5秘密)。如果沙夫納的目錄沒有秘密，則將其丟棄。
你可以花費沙夫納的目錄上的秘密作為資源，來支付你所在地點任何調查員打出的[[道具]]支援卡。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (5 secrets). If Schoffner's Catalogue has no secrets, discard it.
You may spend secrets on Schoffner's Catalogue as resources to pay for [[Item]] assets played by any investigator at your location.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 提前偵察
all_cards.text: 移動。移動最多3次。這次移動中敵人不會與你交戰。
all_cards.real_text: Move. Move up to 3 times. Enemies do not engage you during this movement.
all_cards.flavor: "……一種無形的氣息抗拒著我，並讓我遠離這些古老而凶險的秘密，這些秘密不應為人所知，也未曾有人所知。"<cite>H. P. 洛夫克拉夫特，《無名之城》</cite>

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 丹妮拉·雷耶絲
all_cards.text:
[reaction] 在一名敵人攻擊你後(除了你引起的趁亂攻擊外)，即使該攻擊被取消：對該敵人造成1點傷害，或自動躲避它。
[elder_sign]效果：+1。如果你本輪被敵人攻擊過，改為你自動成功。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] After an enemy attacks you (except an attack of opportunity you provoked), even if that attack was canceled: Either deal 1 damage to that enemy, or automatically evade it.
[elder_sign] effect: +1. If you were attacked by an enemy this round, you automatically succeed, instead.

deck_options.error: You cannot have more than 5 level 0 Survivor cards

all_cards.flavor: "別繃著神經，老兄，我來搞定這些。你在那站好我來就行了。"
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：守衛者([guardian])等級0，求生者([survivor])等級1-5，中立卡牌等級0-5，最多5張其它的求生者卡牌([survivor])等級0。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：機修工扳手、黑幫暴徒、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 丹妮拉一直認為自己過得充實而愉快。她有一個可愛、熱鬧非凡的家庭：一份可以自力更生的穩定工作；還有充裕的金錢投資在跑車、漂亮女孩兒、和她的摩托車–加布里埃爾身上。不過好景不常，她的哥哥–拉蒙陷入不小的麻煩中，母親若有所指的警告她要提起警覺心，黑暗將在不久之後降臨於世。由於家人的一番話，丹妮拉在門後放了一杯水——母親小時候教導她，說這樣能抓住惡靈。隔日，當丹妮拉醒來發現四散一地玻璃碎片，心中一股不好的油然而生，她毅然踏上尋找事情的源頭，並解決一切麻煩事，直接而不拖泥帶水，就和過去的她如出一轍。

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 機修工扳手
all_cards.text: 丹妮拉·雷耶絲牌組專用。 [fast]消耗機修工扳手：選擇你所在地點的一名敵人。該敵人攻擊你。 [action]：攻擊。只能對你上回合結束後攻擊過你的敵人使用此能力。你這次攻擊+2[combat]並且這次攻擊造成+1傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Daniela Reyes deck only. [fast] Exhaust Mechanic's Wrench: Choose an enemy at your location. That enemy attacks you. [action]: Fight. Use this ability only against an enemy that has attacked you since the end of your last turn. You get +2 [combat] for this attack and deal +1 damage for this attack.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 工具. 近戰

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 黑幫暴徒
all_cards.text: 獵手。 獵物 - 僅對丹妮拉·雷耶絲。 本敵人的攻擊不能被取消。 本敵人的攻擊造成的傷害/恐懼被視為直接傷害/恐懼。
all_cards.real_text: Hunter. Prey - Daniela Reyes only. This enemy's attacks cannot be canceled. Damage/horror dealt by this enemy's attacks is treated as direct.
all_cards.flavor: 債務也是家務事

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 正面迎擊
all_cards.text: 攻擊。這次攻擊造成+1傷害並自動成功。作為執行這次攻擊的額外費用，所選敵人攻擊你。
all_cards.real_text: Fight. This attack deals +1 damage and is automatically successful. As an additional cost to perform this attack, the chosen enemy makes an attack against you.
all_cards.flavor: 有時候，堅持到底是唯一突破口。

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: "到我身後！"
all_cards.text:
快速。在任何[fast]時間段中打出。
直到本階段結束，任何攻擊你所在地點另一位調查員的敵人，改為攻擊你，然後與你交戰。取消每次因此類攻擊造成的1點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play during any [fast] window.
Until the end of the phase, whenever an enemy would attack another investigator at your location, it attacks you instead, then engages you. Cancel 1 horror dealt by each attack made in this way.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 成群結隊
all_cards.text: 攻擊。你控制的卡牌之中每有一個不同的職階，你這次攻擊+1[combat]並造成+1傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Fight. For each different class among cards you control, you get +1 [combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack.
all_cards.flavor: "你要是惹毛了我們之中的哪一個，就是招惹了我們全部人！"

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 防禦姿態
all_cards.text: 只要防禦姿態在你手中或被投入到技能檢定中，其獲得等於你[agility]的[combat]圖標，以及等於你[combat]的[agility]圖標。
all_cards.real_text: While Defensive Stance is in your hand or committed to a skill test, it gains [combat] icons equal to your [agility], and [agility] icons equal to your [combat].
all_cards.flavor: 你邁開步伐，架好姿勢、深吸一口氣，站穩了身子，周圍敵人無數，而你孤身一人。

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 耶利米·科爾比
all_cards.text:
你獲得+1[intellect]。
[reaction]在耶利米·科爾比入場後，選擇"偶數"或"奇數"：揭示你牌堆頂部的5張卡牌。抽取費用符合你所選擇的每張卡牌。將剩餘卡牌與你的牌堆混洗。
all_cards.real_text:
You get +1 [intellect].
[reaction] After Jeremiah Kirby enters play, choose "even" or "odd:" Reveal the top 5 cards of your deck. Draw each card with a cost that matches the chosen option. Shuffle the remaining cards into your deck.
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 米斯卡塔尼克. 旅人

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 加入馬隊
all_cards.text:
快速。只能在你的回合中打出。你控制的卡牌之中每有一個不同的職階，本卡牌的費用減1。
移動到任一個已揭示地點。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play only during your turn. Reduce the cost of this card by 1 for each different class among cards you control.
Move to any revealed location.
all_cards.flavor: 心之所向才是真正的旅途。

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 地區勘測
all_cards.text: 只要地區勘測在你手中或被投入到技能檢定中，其獲得等於你[agility]的[intellect]圖標，以及等於你[intellect]的[agility]圖標。
all_cards.real_text: While Survey the Area is in your hand or committed to a skill test, it gains [intellect] icons equal to your [agility], and [agility] icons equal to your [intellect].
all_cards.flavor: 不拍進相片上就沒有人會相信你。該死，就算拍了還是不會有人相信你。

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 醫學教科書
all_cards.text: [action]：選擇你所在地點的一位調查員並檢定[intellect](2)。如果你成功，治癒該調查員1點傷害(如果你成功且超過難度至少2點，改為治癒2點傷害)。如果你失敗，你必須消耗醫學教科書或對該調查員造成1點傷害。
all_cards.real_text: [action]: Choose an investigator at your location and test [intellect] (2). If you succeed, heal 1 damage from that investigator (2 damage instead if you succeed by 2 or more). If you fail, you must either exhaust Medical Texts or deal 1 damage to that investigator.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 發掘古物
all_cards.text: 調查。選擇你手中最多2張[seeker]支援卡。這次技能檢定難度等於所選支援卡費用之和。如果你成功，將所選支援卡依次放置入場。每有1張[[遺物]]支援卡通過此能力放置入場，抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text: Investigate. Choose up to 2 [seeker] assets in your hand. The difficulty of this skill test is equal to the combined cost of the chosen assets. If you succeed, put the chosen assets into play, one at a time. For each [[Relic]] asset put into play by this ability, draw 1 card.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 褻瀆預言
all_cards.text:
只要你沒位於座標點，你獲得+1[intellect]和+1[agility]，並且你可以忽略趁亂攻擊。
[reaction]在褻瀆預言入場後：選擇一個已揭示地點。該地點為"座標點"，直到褻瀆預言離場為止。
[action]：移動任一位調查員到座標點。
all_cards.real_text:
While you are not at the locus, you get +1 [intellect], +1 [agility], and you may ignore attacks of opportunity.
[reaction] After Prophesiae Profana enters play: Choose a revealed location. That location is "the locus" until Prophesiae Profana leaves play.
[action]: Move any investigator to the locus.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 遺物. 書籍

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 地下支持
all_cards.text:
永久。每副牌組限制1張。當牌組構建時購買。
你的牌組中每張非弱點、非專屬卡牌最多只能有一張同名卡牌。
你的牌組卡牌張數減5。
all_cards.real_text:
Permanent. Limit 1 per deck. Purchase at deck creation.
Your deck cannot include more than 1 copy of each non-weakness, non-signature card (by title).
Reduce your deck size by 5.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 欺騙制度
all_cards.text:
快速。在任何[fast]時間段中打出。
你控制的卡牌之中每有一個不同的職階，獲得1資源。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play during any [fast] window.
Gain 1 resource for each different class among cards you control.
all_cards.flavor: 要是有事是你不該做的，那它當然不會合法。

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 補給匱乏
all_cards.text: 永久。每副牌組限制1張。當牌組構建時購買。 強制 - 在你遊戲的第一回合開始時：丟棄你牌堆頂部10張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text: Permanent. Limit 1 per deck. Purchase at deck creation. Forced - When your first turn of the game begins: Discard the top 10 cards of your deck.
all_cards.flavor: 你只能祈禱這些夠用。

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 抵擋
all_cards.text:
快速。在一名非[[精英]]敵人在你所在地點生成時打出。
該敵人攻擊你。然後，自動躲避該敵人並將抵擋疊加到它。
被疊加的敵人不能準備。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when a non-[[Elite]] enemy spawns at your location.
That enemy attacks you. Then, automatically evade that enemy and attach Fend Off to it.
Attached enemy cannot ready.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 追蹤
all_cards.text: 選擇你所在地點以外任何地點的一名敵人。朝該敵人移動2次。在每個你因此效果進入的地點各發現1個線索。
all_cards.real_text: Choose an enemy at any location other than yours. Move twice toward that enemy. Discover 1 clue at each location you entered by this effect.
all_cards.flavor: "步步為營！"

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 克圖格亞的烙印
all_cards.text: 使用(6充能)。 [action]：攻擊。這次攻擊你可以不使用[combat]，改為使用[willpower]，並且你+1技能值。如果你成功，花費1或2充能。這次攻擊不造成基礎傷害，改為每花費1充能，造成1點傷害。如果你成功且等於難度，失去1行動。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (6 charges). [action]: Fight. For this attack, you may use [willpower] instead of [combat], and you get +1 skill value. If you succeed, spend 1 or 2 charges. Instead of its standard damage, this attack deals 1 damage for each charge spent. If you succeed by 0, lose 1 action.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 恩科西·馬巴蒂
all_cards.text: [reaction]在恩科西·馬巴蒂入場後：聲名一個非[elder_sign]的符號混亂標記。直到此卡牌離場，聲明的標記為你的"咒印"。 [reaction]在你所在地點的一位調查員抽出一個[cultist]、[tablet]或[elder_thing]符號時，消耗恩科西·馬巴蒂：改為在混亂袋中查找並抽出你的咒印(將其餘標記放回混亂袋)。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] After Nkosi Mabati enters play: Name a non-[elder_sign] chaos token with a symbol. Until this card leaves play, the named symbol is your "sigil." [reaction] When an investigator at your location reveals a [cultist], [tablet], or [elder_thing] symbol, exhaust Nkosi Mabati: Search the chaos bag for your sigil and reveal it, instead (returning the other token to the chaos bag).

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 巨石錘
all_cards.text: [action]：攻擊。這次攻擊將你的[willpower]加入你的技能值。你這次攻擊造成+1傷害。如果你成功且該敵人非[[精英]]，你可以將其移動遠離你1個地點。(如果你成功且超過難度至少3點，改為造成+2傷害，並且你可以將其移動遠離你最多2個地點)
all_cards.real_text: [action]: Fight. Add your [willpower] to your skill value for this attack. You deal +1 damage for this attack. If you succeed and the enemy is non-[[Elite]], you may move it one location away from you. (If you succeed by 3 or more, you instead deal +2 damage and may move the enemy up to two locations away from you.)
all_cards.traits: 道具. 遺物. 武器. 近戰

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 遠古海圖
all_cards.text: 使用(3秘密)。 [fast]在你的回合中，消耗遠古海圖並花費1秘密：從以下行動(移動、躲避或調查)選擇2個不同的行動，並以任意順序進行。(FAQ, v2.1)
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (3 secrets).
[fast] During your turn, exhaust Eon Chart and spend 1 secret: Choose and take two different actions of the following, in any order (move, evade, or investigate).

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 威廉·韋伯教授
all_cards.text:
使用(3秘密)。
[reaction]在你成功調查時，消耗威廉·韋伯教授並花費1秘密：選擇你的棄牌堆中1張[[道具]]卡牌並加入你的手牌。你可以不發現你所在地點的一個線索，改為發現連接地點的一個線索。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (3 secrets).
[reaction] When you successfully investigate, exhaust Professor William Webb and spend 1 secret: Choose an [[Item]] card in your discard pile and add it to your hand. Instead of discovering a clue at your location, you may discover a clue at a connecting location.
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 米斯卡塔尼克

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 身形虛化
all_cards.text: 使用(4充能)。 [action]如果身形虛化還有剩餘充能：躲避。你這次躲避嘗試+2技能值，並且你可以不使用[agility]，改為使用[willpower]。如果你成功，花費1或2充能並且這回合你可以進行等量次數的額外行動。如果你成功且等於難度，受到2點傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (4 charges). [action] If Blur has charges remaining: Evade. For this evasion attempt, you may use [willpower] instead of [agility] and get +2 skill value. If you succeed, spend 1 or 2 charges and you may take that many additional actions this turn. If you succeed by 0, take 2 damage.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 雪橇犬
all_cards.text: 你的牌組裡可以有最多4張雪橇犬。一個盟友槽位可以有最多2張雪橇犬卡牌。 [action]消耗X張雪橇犬：移動。移動X次。 [action]消耗X張雪橇犬：攻擊。你這次攻擊+X[combat]。這次攻擊不造成基礎傷害，改為造成X點傷害。
all_cards.real_text: You may include up to 4 copies of Sled Dog in your deck. Up to 2 Sled Dog cards take up a single ally slot. [action] Exhaust X Sled Dogs: Move. Move X times. [action] Exhaust X Sled Dogs: Fight. You get +X [combat] for this attack. Instead of its standard damage, this attack deals X damage.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 請求支援
all_cards.text:
以任意順序依次結算，如果你控制……
- [rogue]卡牌，你可以移動到連接地點。
- [guardian]卡牌，對你所在地點的一名敵人造成1點傷害。
- [seeker]卡牌，發現你所在地點的1個線索。
- [mystic]卡牌，治癒任意卡牌1點恐懼。
- [survivor]卡牌，治癒任意卡牌1點傷害。
all_cards.real_text:
One at a time, in any order, if you control a...
- [rogue] card, you may move to a connecting location.
- [guardian] card, deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location.
- [seeker] card, discover 1 clue at your location.
- [mystic] card, heal 1 horror from any card.
- [survivor] card, heal 1 damage from any card.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 全副武裝
all_cards.text: 永久。每副牌組限制1張。當牌組構建時購買。 強制 - 在你遊戲的第一回合開始時：一次一張，打出你手牌中任意數量的[[道具]]支援卡，每張費用減少1點。這回合中你減少3次行動。(FAQ, v2.0)
all_cards.real_text: Permanent. Limit 1 per deck. Purchase at deck creation. Forced - When your first turn of the game begins: One at a time, play any number of [[Item]] assets from your hand, reducing the cost of each by 1. During this turn, you have 3 fewer actions to take.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 冥想放空
all_cards.text: 你每有一個法術槽位被佔用，治癒1點傷害或1點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text: For each of your arcane slots that is filled, either heal 1 damage or 1 horror.
all_cards.flavor: 你讓自己的思想沉淪，冰冷而漫無目的，萬物皆空。虛無如歸。

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 先見
all_cards.text:
快速。在一位你所在地點的調查員將要從其牌堆或從遭遇牌堆抽取一張卡牌時打出。
聲明一張卡牌。如果抽取的卡牌是聲明的卡牌，該調查員可以(選擇一項)：
- 取消該卡牌的效果並將其丟棄。
- 立刻-2費用打出該卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when an investigator at your location would draw a card from their deck or from the encounter deck.
Name a card. If the drawn card is the named card, that investigator may either (choose one):
- Cancel that card's effects and discard it.
- Immediately play that card at -2 cost.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 滅火器
all_cards.text: [action]：攻擊。你這次攻擊+1[combat]並造成+1傷害。 [action]丟棄滅火器：躲避。自動躲避所有與你交戰的敵人。你可以改為放逐滅火器來丟棄每名被此效果躲避的非[[精英]]敵人。
all_cards.real_text: [action]: Fight. You get +1 [combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack. [action] Discard Fire Extinguisher: Evade. Automatically evade all enemies engaged with you. You may exile Fire Extinguisher instead of discarding it to discard each non-[[Elite]] enemy evaded by this effect.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 工具. 近戰

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 吉恩·波爾格
all_cards.text:
你獲得+1[intellect]和+1[agility]。
[reaction]在你的回合中，在你移動到一個地點後，消耗吉恩·波爾格：將一個線索或一名非[[精英]]敵人從連接地點移動到你所在地點，或從你所在地點移動到連接地點。
all_cards.real_text:
You get +1 [intellect] and +1 [agility].
[reaction] During your turn, after you move to a location, exhaust Gené Beauregard: Move a clue or a non-[[Elite]] enemy from a connecting location to your location, or vice versa.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 保護魂靈
all_cards.text:
快速。在你所在地點一張[[盟友]]支援卡被卡牌效果丟棄或被擊敗後打出。
將該支援卡返回其所有者的手中，或其所有者抽取3張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play after an [[Ally]] asset at your location is discarded by a card effect or is defeated.
Either return that asset to its owner's hand, or its owner draws 3 cards.
all_cards.flavor: 所有的活物都有著氣息，注意別被他們的氣息詛咒了。

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: "再來一張！"
all_cards.text:
快速。你在技能檢定中抽出混亂標記後打出。
抽出額外一個混亂標記，將其"-"變為"+"。如果該混亂標記是[skull]標記，你自動失敗。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play after you reveal a chaos token during a skill test.
Reveal an additional chaos token, switching its "-" to a "+". If that chaos token is a [skull] token, you automatically fail.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 閃躲
all_cards.text:
快速。在一名敵人攻擊你所在地點一位調查員時打出。
取消該次攻擊。然後，檢定[agility](1)。如果你成功，對該名敵人造成1點傷害。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when an enemy attacks an investigator at your location.
Cancel that attack. Then, test [agility] (1). If you succeed, deal 1 damage to that enemy.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 戰鬥訓練
all_cards.text:
快速。場上限制1張[[沉穩]]在場。
你獲得+1[combat]和+1[agility]。
非直接傷害/恐懼在被分配給你的調查員卡之前，必須先分配給戰鬥訓練。
[fast]花費1資源：你這次技能檢定+1[combat]或+1[agility]。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Limit 1 [[Composure]] in play.
You get +1 [combat] and +1 [agility].
Non-direct damage/horror must be assigned to Combat Training before it can be assigned to your investigator card.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [combat] or +1 [agility] for this skill test.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 追獵行動
all_cards.text: 快速。在神話階段中你將要抽取一張遭遇卡時打出。 改為在遭遇牌堆中查找一名敵人，將其生成並與你交戰(代替其原有的生成地點)，疊加追獵行動到該敵人，並混洗遭遇牌堆。 [reaction]在你擊敗被疊加的敵人時：獲得3資源。
all_cards.real_text: Fast. Play when you would draw an encounter card during the mythos phase. Instead, search the encounter deck for an enemy, spawn it engaged with you (instead of its normal spawn location), attach On the Hunt to it, and shuffle the encounter deck. [reaction] When you defeat attached enemy: Gain 3 resources.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 提爾斯哈之牙
all_cards.text: 攻擊。選擇任何已揭示地點的一名敵人作為這次攻擊的目標。在結算這次攻擊前，你可以移動到該敵人的地點。這次攻擊將你的[agility]加入你的[combat]。這次攻擊造成+3傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Fight. Choose an enemy at any revealed location as the target for this attack. Before resolving this attack, you may move to that enemy's location. Add your [agility] to your [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +3 damage.
all_cards.flavor: 廷達洛斯之牙不會放過任何獵物。

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 蝴蝶對劍
all_cards.text: [action]：攻擊。你這次攻擊+2[combat]。在這次攻擊後，你可以再次攻擊，該攻擊將你的[agility]加入你的技能值。如果兩次攻擊都成功，你可以消耗蝴蝶對劍，使第二次攻擊造成+1傷害。
all_cards.real_text: [action]: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. After this attack, you may fight again, adding your [agility] to your skill value for that attack. If both attacks are successful, you may exhaust Butterfly Swords to have the second attack deal +1 damage.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 近戰

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 強制學習
all_cards.text:
永久。每副牌組限制1張。當牌組構建時購買。
你的牌組卡牌張數加15。
補給階段中，不抽取1張卡牌，改為抽取2張卡牌並丟棄其中1張。
all_cards.real_text:
Permanent. Limit 1 per deck. Purchase at deck creation.
Increase your deck size by 15.
During each upkeep phase, instead of drawing 1 card, draw 2 cards and discard 1 of them.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 通路檔案
all_cards.text:
每副牌組限制1張。作為打出本支援卡的額外費用，在4個不同地點放置1資源，作為靈脈。
[reaction]在你成功調查一個帶有靈脈的地點後，消耗本支援卡：將該靈脈移動到本支援卡上。然後，如果通路檔案上有4靈脈，將其丟棄，取得靈脈作為資源，並在你的冒險日誌中記錄下"你已經確認了前行道路。"
all_cards.real_text:
Limit 1 per deck. As an additional cost to play this asset, place 1 resource on 4 different locations, as leylines.
[reaction] After you successfully investigate a location with a leyline, exhaust this asset: Move that leyline onto this asset. Then, if there are 4 leylines on it, discard it, take its leylines as resources, and record in your Campaign Log that "you have identified the gateway."
all_cards.traits: 道具. 書籍. 密教

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 登山靴
all_cards.text:
每位調查員限制1[[鞋子]]。
你獲得+1[agility]。
[reaction]在你所在地點的最後一個線索被發現後，消耗登山靴：移動到有至少一個線索，或未揭示的連接地點。
all_cards.real_text:
Limit 1 [[Footwear]] per investigator.
You get +1 [agility].
[reaction] After the last clue is discovered from your location, exhaust Hiking Boots: Move to a connecting location with at least 1 clue, or to a connecting unrevealed location.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 服裝. 鞋子

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 科學理論
all_cards.text:
快速。場上限制1張[[沉穩]]。
你獲得+1[intellect]和+1[combat]。
非直接傷害/恐懼在被分配給你的調查員卡之前，必須先分配給科學理論。
[fast]花費1資源：你這次技能檢定+1[intellect]或+1[combat]。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Limit 1 [[Composure]] in play.
You get +1 [intellect] and +1 [combat].
Non-direct damage/horror must be assigned to Scientific Theory before it can be assigned to your investigator card.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [intellect] or +1 [combat] for this skill test.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 通路檔案
all_cards.text:
研究。使用(4靈脈)。每副牌組限制1張。
[fast]：從本支援卡移動1靈脈到一名非[[精英]]敵人。
[action]：選擇一位調查員和一名位於已揭示地點且帶有靈脈的敵人。該調查員移動到該地點。你可以移除此靈脈來對該敵人造成1點傷害。
all_cards.real_text:
Researched. Uses (4 leylines). Limit 1 per deck.
[fast]: Move 1 leyline from this asset to a non-[[Elite]] enemy.
[action]: Choose an investigator, and an enemy with a leyline at a revealed location. That investigator moves to that location. You may remove the leyline to deal 1 damage to that enemy.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 通路檔案
all_cards.text:
研究。使用(4靈脈)。每副牌組限制1張。
[fast]從本支援卡移動1靈脈到一個已揭示地點。
[action]：選擇一位調查員和有一個帶有靈脈的已揭示地點。該調查員移動到該地點。你可以移除此靈脈來使其進行一次調查行動。
all_cards.real_text:
Researched. Uses (4 leylines). Limit 1 per deck.
[fast]: Move 1 leyline from this asset to a revealed location.
[action]: Choose an investigator and a revealed location with a leyline. That investigator moves to that location. You may remove the leyline to have them take an investigate action.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 通路檔案
all_cards.text:
研究。使用(4靈脈)。每副牌組限制1張。
[fast]：從本支援卡移動1靈脈到一名非[[精英]]敵人。
[action]：選擇一位與一名帶有靈脈的敵人交戰的調查員。該調查員與該敵人解除交戰狀態並移動到一個連接地點。你可以移除此靈脈來自動躲避該敵人。本行動不會引起趁亂攻擊。
all_cards.real_text:
Researched. Uses (4 leylines). Limit 1 per deck.
[fast]: Move 1 leyline from this asset to a non-[[Elite]] enemy.
[action]: Choose an investigator engaged with an enemy with a leyline. That investigator disengages from that enemy and moves to a connecting location. You may remove the leyline to automatically evade that enemy. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 通路檔案
all_cards.text:
研究。使用(4靈脈)。每副牌組限制1張。
[fast]從本支援卡移動1靈脈到一位調查員。
[action]：選擇一位帶有靈脈的調查員。該調查員抽取1張卡牌並治癒1點傷害或1點恐懼。你可以移除此靈脈來使其改為抽取2張卡牌並治癒2點傷害或2點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text:
Researched. Uses (4 leylines). Limit 1 per deck.
[fast]: Move 1 leyline from this asset to an investigator.
[action]: Choose an investigator with a leyline. That investigator draws 1 card and heals 1 damage or 1 horror. You may remove the leyline to have them instead draw 2 cards and heal 2 damage or 2 horror.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 反間諜活動
all_cards.text:
快速。在你抽取一張非弱點詭計卡時打出。
取消該卡牌的顯現效果並抽取遭遇牌堆頂部的卡牌。
[reaction]在你打出反間諜活動時，提升其費用2點：將"遭遇牌堆"換成"你的牌堆"。
[reaction]在你打出反間諜活動時，提升其費用2點：將"你"換成"任一位調查員"。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when you draw a non-weakness treachery.
Cancel that card's revelation effect and draw the top card of the encounter deck.
[reaction] When you play Counterespionage, increase its cost by 2: Change "the encounter deck" to "your deck".
[reaction] When you play Counterespionage, increase its cost by 2: Change "you" to "any investigator".

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 行業專家
all_cards.text: 行業專家獲得等於(除正在檢定的技能外)你最低技能值的[wild]圖標。
all_cards.real_text: Savant gains [wild] icons equal to your lowest skill other than the skill being tested.
all_cards.flavor: 五十分的運氣，一百分的實力。

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 金錢萬能
all_cards.text:
快速。在任何地點的調查員發起技能檢定時打出。
這次檢定不是其標示的技能類型([willpower]、[intellect]、[combat]或[agility])，而是改為資源技能檢定。執行這次檢定的調查員的基礎技能值等於你資源池內資源數量的一半(向下取整)。抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when an investigator at any location initiates a skill test.
Instead of the skill type indicated for this test ([willpower], [intellect], [combat], or [agility]), this is a resource skill test. The performing investigator's base skill value for this test is equal to half the number of resources in your resource pool (rounded down). Draw 1 card.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 黑市
all_cards.text:
快速。當調查階段開始時打出。
依次從任一調查員的牌堆頂部揭示卡牌，直到正好揭示5張卡牌。將這些卡牌放在一邊，位於場外。只要這些卡牌放在一邊，任何調查員可以將其視為自己的手牌打出。當下次調查階段開始時，將仍放在一邊的這些卡牌混洗入其所有者的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play at the start of the investigation phase.
One at a time, reveal cards from the top of any investigator deck(s) until exactly 5 cards have been revealed. Set those cards aside, out of play. While set aside, any investigator may play any of those cards as if they were in their hand. At the start of the next investigation phase, shuffle each of those cards still set aside into its owner's deck.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 剛毅果敢
all_cards.text:
快速。場上限制1張[[沉穩]]在場。
你獲得+1[willpower]和+1[agility]。
非直接傷害/恐懼在被分配給你的調查員卡之前，必須先分配給剛毅果敢。
[fast]花費1資源：你這次技能檢定+1[willpower]或+1[agility]。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Limit 1 [[Composure]] in play.
You get +1 [willpower] and +1 [agility].
Non-direct damage/horror must be assigned to Moxie before it can be assigned to your investigator card.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [willpower] or +1 [agility] for this skill test.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 黑色扇子
all_cards.text:
卓越。
只要你有……
- ……10+資源，你獲得+1生命和+1神智。
- ……15+資源，在你回合中你可以進行一次額外行動。
- ……20+資源，你的每項技能+1。
all_cards.real_text:
Exceptional.
While you have...
- ...10+ resources, you get +1 health and +1 sanity.
- ...15+ resources, you may take one additional action during your turn.
- ...20+ resources, you get +1 to each of your skills.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 紅色鬧鐘
all_cards.text: 卓越。使用(0充能)。 強制 - 在你的回合開始後：你可以取走此處所有充能，作為資源。在此放置1充能。如果其正好有…… - 1充能，下次技能檢定你+4技能值。 - 2充能，你可以移動最多3次. - 3充能，這回合你可以進行2個額外行動。
all_cards.real_text: Exceptional. Uses (0 charges). Forced - After your turn begins: You may take all charges here, as resources. Place 1 charge here. If it has exactly... - 1 charge, you get +4 skill value for your next skill test. - 2 charges, you may move up to 3 times. - 3 charges, you may take 2 additional actions this turn.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 掉進兔子洞
all_cards.text:
永久。每副牌組限制1張。當牌組構建時購買。
在一個劇本的每場冒險結束後，在下一場冒險之前，你升級的前2張卡牌經驗值費用減1。
你購買新卡牌的經驗值費用加1。
all_cards.real_text:
Permanent. Limit 1 per deck. Purchase at deck creation.
After each scenario of a campaign, reduce the experience cost of the first 2 cards you upgrade before the next scenario by 1.
Increase the experience cost for you to purchase new cards by 1.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 閉環
all_cards.text:
使用(充能數等於你控制卡牌之中不同的職階數，包含本卡牌)。
[fast]花費1充能並消耗閉環：進行一次基礎行動。該行動期間執行的每次技能檢定，你可以不使用該行動指定的技能，改為使用你的[willpower]。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (1 charge for each class among cards you control, including this one).
[fast] Spend 1 charge and exhaust Close the Circle: Take a basic action. For each skill test performed during that action, you may use your [willpower] instead of the skill indicated for that action.

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 力量之風
all_cards.text:
在你控制的一張支援卡上放置2充能。
[reaction]在你的回合中抽取了力量之風後：將其打出。
all_cards.real_text:
Place 2 charges on an asset you control.
[reaction] After you draw Winds of Power during your turn: Play it.
all_cards.flavor: 願奧雅之息指引吾等。

all_cards.text: 使用(3充能)。 [action]消耗附魔弓：攻擊。你這次攻擊+1技能值，並且必須不使用[combat]，改為使用[willpower]或[agility]。這次攻擊造成+1傷害。作為發動本能力的額外費用，你可以花費1充能來使這次攻擊以連接地點的一名非[[精英]]敵人為目標；如果你這麼做，這次攻擊忽略冷漠和反擊關鍵詞。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (3 charges). [action] Exhaust Enchanted Bow: Fight. You must use either [willpower] or [agility] instead of [combat] and get +1 skill value for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage. As an additional cost to initiate this ability, you may spend 1 charge to have this attack target a non-[[Elite]] enemy at a connecting location; if you do, ignore the aloof and retaliate keywords for this attack.
all_cards.traits: 法術. 祝福. 武器. 遠程

all_cards.pack_name: 闇與地球之界調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 塵世寧靜
all_cards.text:
使用(6充能)。
[action]：檢定[willpower](0)。你成功且每超過難度1點，你可以花費1充能治癒你所在地點一位調查員1點傷害或1點恐懼。如果你成功且等於難度，失去2資源。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (6 charges).
[action]: Test [willpower] (0). For each point you succeed by, you may spend 1 charge to heal 1 damage or 1 horror from an investigator at your location. If you succeed by 0, lose 2 resources.

[fast] During a skill test on a [[Fortune]], [[Spell]], or [[Spirit]] card, spend 1 resource from Prophetic: You get +1 skill value for this test.

Forced - After you take a fight or activate action: You cannot take any of those types of actions for the remainder of the turn.

<cite>H. P. 洛夫克拉夫特，《克蘇魯的呼喚》</cite>
