all_cards.text: 你控制[[科學]]或[[工具]]支援卡的時候，資金充裕獲得[wild](你控制3個以上的[[科學]]和/或[[工具]]支援卡的時候，資金充裕改為獲得[wild][wild])。
all_cards.real_text: While you control a [[Science]] or [[Tool]] asset, Well-Funded gains [wild] (while you control 3 or more [[Science]] and/or [[Tool]] assets, Well-Funded gains [wild] [wild], instead).
all_cards.flavor: 花在這個研究上的每分錢都值得。

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: "我會還你的！"
all_cards.text:
快速。只能在你的回合期間打出。
選擇你所在地點的一位調查員。將該調查員資源池的所有資源移動到你的資源池。當本輪結束時，將你資源池的所有資源移動到該調查員的資源池。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play only during your turn.
Choose another investigator at your location. Move all resources from that investigator's resource pool to your resource pool. At the end of the round, move all resources from your resource pool to that investigator's resource pool.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 乾草叉
all_cards.text: [action]：攻擊。這次攻擊中你+1[combat]並造成+2傷害。如果這次攻擊成功，失去對乾草叉的控制，並將其疊加到你所在地點。你所在地點獲得： "[action]：控制乾草叉。位於乾草叉所在地點的任何調查員均可觸發此能力。"
all_cards.real_text: [action]: Fight. You get +1 [combat] and deal +2 damage for this attack. If this attack is successful, lose control of Pitchfork and attach it to your location. Attached location gains: "[action]: Take control of Pitchfork. Any investigator at Pitchfork's location may trigger this ability."
all_cards.traits: 道具. 工具. 武器. 近戰

all_cards.name: 麻雀面具

每位調查員限制1[[面具]]。
使用(2貢品)。在你受到至少1點傷害和/或恐懼後，補充1貢品。
[fast]花費1供品：這次技能檢定中你+2[willpower]或+2[agility]。(每次檢定限制一次。)
all_cards.real_text:
Limit 1 [[Mask]] per investigator.
Uses (2 offerings). Replenish 1 of these offerings after you take 1 or more damage and/or horror.
[fast] Spend 1 offering: You get +2 [willpower] or +2 [agility] for this skill test. (Limit once per test.)
all_cards.traits: 道具. 守護. 面具

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 物盡其用
all_cards.text: 選擇你棄牌堆中的一張[[武器]]或[[工具]]支援卡。結算該支援卡上的一個[action]能力，忽略所有費用(包含其[action]費用)。 在此效果結算後，將所選支援卡混洗入你的牌堆。 打出此卡牌不會引起趁亂攻擊。
all_cards.real_text: Choose a [[Weapon]] or [[Tool]] asset in your discard pile. Resolve an [action] ability on that asset, ignoring all costs (including its [action] cost). After this effect resolves, shuffle the chosen asset into your deck. Playing this card does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 拖延時間
all_cards.text: 談判。選擇你所在地點的一名敵人。檢定[willpower](X)，其中X為所選敵人的攻擊值或躲避值，取其中較低的數值。如果你成功，消耗所選敵人(但不與其解除交戰). 如果其非[[精英]]，其在下次補給階段期間不準備。如果你失敗，將拖延時間返回你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text: Parley. Choose an enemy at your location. Test [willpower] (X), where X is the chosen enemy's fight or evade value, whichever is lower. If you succeed, exhaust the chosen enemy (but do not disengage from it). If it is non-[[Elite]], it does not ready during the next upkeep phase. If you fail, return Stall for Time to your hand.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 對的時間，錯的地點
all_cards.text:
作為打出對的時間，錯的地點的額外費用，花費一個行動。
將你調查員上的最多5點傷害和/或恐懼移動到你所在地點調查員控制的支援卡上。每有一張支援卡因此效果被擊敗，抽取1張卡牌。將對的時間，錯的地點從遊戲中移除。
all_cards.real_text:
As an additional cost to play Wrong Place, Right Time, spend an action.
Move up to 5 damage and/or horror from your investigator to assets controlled by investigators at your location. For each asset defeated by this effect, draw 1 card. Remove Wrong Place, Right Time from the game.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 百步穿楊
all_cards.text:
你可以投入百步穿楊到你所在地點或連接地點對敵人的攻擊或躲避檢定。
如果這次檢定成功，對該敵人造成1點傷害。
all_cards.real_text:
You may commit Long Shot to a fight or evasion test against an enemy at your location or a connecting location.
If this test is successful, deal 1 damage to that enemy.

all_cards.name: 吉姆·卡爾弗
all_cards.text:
[reaction]在你執行的技能檢定期間，抽出至少1個[skull]或[curse]標記後：在一個你控制的支援上補充1充能。(每輪限制一次。)
[elder_sign]效果：+2。你可以改為將此標記視為[skull]或[curse]標記。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] After you reveal 1 or more [skull] or [curse] tokens during a skill test you are performing: Replenish 1 charge on an asset you control. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +2. You may treat this token as if it were a [skull] or [curse] token instead.

all_cards.flavor: “我知道我能讓亡者起舞。”
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：潛修者卡牌([mystic])等級0-3，[[法術]]和[[詛咒縈繞]]卡牌等級0-4，中立卡牌等級0-5，最多5張其它求生者卡牌([survivor])等級0。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：吉姆的小號、最後的狂想曲、彼端、1張隨機基礎弱點。 靈魂牌組張數：10。 靈魂牌組構建選項：9張不同的任意職階[[盟友]]支援等級0–2，復仇形影。 靈魂牌組指示：將“靈魂牌堆”和你的牌堆分別混洗，將靈魂牌堆面朝下放在彼端支援旁。此牌堆可以使用你未花費的經驗值分別升級。
all_cards.back_flavor: 自從吉姆拿起爸爸的小號開始，爵士樂就只會帶來麻煩。但亡者顯然非常喜歡他的演奏，所以吉姆沒打算放棄。

all_cards.name: 吉姆的小號

吉姆·卡爾弗牌組專用。進階。

all_cards.real_text:
Jim Culver deck only. Advanced.

all_cards.flavor: 當亡者開始談論他們害怕的事情時，就是該仔細聆聽的時候了。

all_cards.name: 彼端
all_cards.text: 吉姆·卡爾弗牌組專用。永久。 每個疊加的靈魂失去所有印刷的屬性並獲得[[靈怪]]屬性。在傷害或恐懼將要被放到疊加的靈魂上時，必須改為將其放到吉姆·卡爾弗上。 強制 – 在你的回合開始時：將靈魂牌堆最頂部的卡牌疊加到彼端，作為靈魂。如果疊加了4個或更多的靈魂，將此卡牌翻面並結算其文本。
all_cards.real_text: Jim Culver deck only. Permanent. Each attached spirit loses all printed traits and gains the [[Geist]] trait. When damage/horror would be placed on an attached spirit, it must be placed on Jim Culver, instead. Forced – When your turn begins: Attach the top card of the spirit deck to The Beyond, as a spirit. If 4 or more spirits are attached, flip this card and resolve its text.

linked_card.name: 彼端
linked_card.text:
強制 – 對於每張疊加到彼端的非弱點靈魂，依次選擇一張並從混亂袋隨機抽出1個標記。如果是……

- ……標記：你可以治癒1點恐懼，或將靈魂牌堆最頂部的卡牌疊加到彼端，作為靈魂。(在結算此效果後，不用再對此靈魂抽出標記。)

- ……標記：丟棄此靈魂。受到1點直接傷害或恐懼。

- ……標記：丟棄此靈魂。治癒1點恐懼。

- ……、、或標記：你必須丟棄此靈魂或受到1點直接傷害。

- ……任何其他標記：丟棄此靈魂。

將此卡牌翻回到其支援面。

提示：疊加到彼端的靈魂在場上，但只保留他們的名字和文字框。靈魂不佔用槽位、沒有生命值或神智值。在一個獨特的靈魂被疊加到彼端時，棄掉其他所有已經在場上的同名支援。靈魂被丟棄時放置到靈魂牌堆的底部。
linked_card.real_text:
Forced – One at a time, choose each non-weakness spirit attached to The Beyond and reveal a random token from the chaos bag. If it is... - ... an [elder_sign] token: You may either heal 1 horror, or attach the top card of the spirit deck to The Beyond, as a spirit. (Do not reveal tokens for the spirit you attach after resolving this effect.) - ... an [auto_fail] token: Discard this spirit. Take 1 direct damage/horror. - ...a [skull] token: Discard this spirit. Heal 1 horror. - ...a [cultist], [elder_thing], [tablet], or [curse] token: You must either discard this spirit or take 1 direct damage. - ...any other token: Discard this spirit. Flip this card back to its asset side.
Reminder: Spirits attached to The Beyond are in play but only retain their names and text boxes. Spirits do not take up slots and do not have health or sanity values. When a unique spirit is attached to The Beyond, any other asset that shares its name and is already in play is discarded. Spirits are always discarded to the bottom of the spirit deck.

all_cards.name: 彼端
all_cards.text:
強制 – 對於每張疊加到彼端的非弱點靈魂，依次選擇一張並從混亂袋隨機抽出1個標記。如果是…… - ……[elder_sign]標記：你可以治癒1點恐懼，或將靈魂牌堆最頂部的卡牌疊加到彼端，作為靈魂。(在結算此效果後，不用再對此靈魂抽出標記。) - ……[auto_fail]標記：丟棄此靈魂。受到1點直接傷害或恐懼。 - ……[skull]標記：丟棄此靈魂。治癒1點恐懼。 - ……[cultist]、[elder_thing]、[tablet]或[curse]標記：你必須丟棄此靈魂或受到1點直接傷害。 - ……任何其他標記：丟棄此靈魂。 將此卡牌翻回到其支援面。
提示：疊加到彼端的靈魂在場上，但只保留他們的名字和文字框。靈魂不佔用槽位、沒有生命值或神智值。在一個獨特的靈魂被疊加到彼端時，棄掉其他所有已經在場上的同名支援。靈魂被丟棄時放置到靈魂牌堆的底部。
all_cards.real_text:
Forced – One at a time, choose each non-weakness spirit attached to The Beyond and reveal a random token from the chaos bag. If it is... - ... an [elder_sign] token: You may either heal 1 horror, or attach the top card of the spirit deck to The Beyond, as a spirit. (Do not reveal tokens for the spirit you attach after resolving this effect.) - ... an [auto_fail] token: Discard this spirit. Take 1 direct damage/horror. - ...a [skull] token: Discard this spirit. Heal 1 horror. - ...a [cultist], [elder_thing], [tablet], or [curse] token: You must either discard this spirit or take 1 direct damage. - ...any other token: Discard this spirit. Flip this card back to its asset side.
Reminder: Spirits attached to The Beyond are in play but only retain their names and text boxes. Spirits do not take up slots and do not have health or sanity values. When a unique spirit is attached to The Beyond, any other asset that shares its name and is already in play is discarded. Spirits are always discarded to the bottom of the spirit deck.

all_cards.name: 復仇形影
all_cards.text: 獵手。獵物 – 僅限吉姆·卡爾弗。 此敵人被疊加到彼端時，你可以攻擊或躲避此敵人(如同其與你交戰)。如果你成功，將其丟棄。如果你失敗，生成該敵人並與你交戰。 強制 – 在你透過其強制效果將一個靈魂疊加到彼端時：復仇形影攻擊你(即使其不在你的地點)。
all_cards.real_text: Hunter. Prey – Jim Culver only. You may fight or evade this enemy while it is attached to The Beyond (as if it were engaged with you). If you succeed, discard it. If you fail, spawn it engaged with you. Forced – When you attach a spirit to The Beyond via its forced effect: Vengeful Shade attacks you (even if it is not at your location).

all_cards.name: 佐伊·薩馬拉斯
all_cards.text:
[reaction]在你對一個敵人造成至少1點傷害後：將1個[bless]標記加入混亂袋。(每階段限制一次。)
[fast]在攻擊期間，你抽出混亂標記前，從混亂袋移除3個[bless]標記：這次攻擊造成+1傷害。(每輪限制一次。)
[elder_sign]效果：混亂袋中每有1個[bless]標記，+1。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] After you deal 1 or more damage to an enemy: Add 1 [bless] token to the chaos bag. (Limit once per phase.)
[fast] Before you reveal chaos tokens during an attack, remove 3 [bless] tokens from the chaos bag: This attack deals +1 damage. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1 for each [bless] token in the chaos bag.

deck_options.error: You cannot have more than 5 Mystic cards.

all_cards.flavor: "神的指示還沒完成。"
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：守衛者([guardian])等級0-3，[[祝福]] and [[守護]]卡牌等級0-4，中立卡牌等級0-5，最多5張其他潛修者([mystic])卡牌等級0。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：佐伊的十字架、擊退邪惡、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 六歲時有一晚，佐伊聽到上帝對她說話，從此她覺得自己是世上獨一無二的。可惜那一天，大火永久帶走了她的父母。上帝告訴她，在世上所有人中，獨有她一人可成為上帝的代理。她必須保護弱者，嚴懲惡徒。無論何時，只要她有困難，上帝將永遠伴著她，給她安慰。現在，佐伊往返於不同城市之間，做著大廚的工作。但在不工作時，她會在深夜的街道行走，受主之命，給予那些惡人無盡的懲罰。

all_cards.name: 佐伊的十字架
all_cards.text:
佐伊·薩馬拉斯牌組專用。進階。
[reaction]在你與一個敵人交戰後，消耗佐伊的十字架並花費1資源：對該敵人造成1點傷害。
[fast]從混亂袋移除2個[bless]標記：與你所在地點的一個敵人交戰。
all_cards.real_text:
Zoey Samaras deck only. Advanced.
[reaction] After you engage an enemy, exhaust Zoey’s Cross and spend 1 resource: Deal 1 damage to that enemy.
[fast] Remove 2 [bless] tokens from the chaos bag: Engage an enemy at your location.

all_cards.name: 擊退邪惡
all_cards.text: 進階。被疊加的敵人得到+2攻擊和+2生命值。 顯現 - 從遭遇牌堆頂棄牌，直到棄掉1張敵人，將其生成在離你最遠的地點上，並將擊退邪惡疊加到該敵人。 強制 - 在遊戲結束時，如果被疊加的敵人在場：佐伊·薩馬拉斯受到1點精神創傷。
all_cards.real_text: Advanced. Attached enemy gets +2 fight and +2 health. Revelation - Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until an enemy is discarded. Attach Smite the Wicked to that enemy and spawn it at the location farthest from you. Forced - When the game ends, if attached enemy is in play: Zoey Samaras suffers 1 mental trauma.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 威爾森‧理查德
all_cards.text:
每輪你打出的第一張[[工具]]支援卡的費用減1。
在[[工具]]支援卡上的技能檢定期間，你+1技能值。
[elder_sign]效果：+0。你可以將你玩家區域中的1個[[工具]]支援卡與你手牌中的1張印刷費用相等或更低的[[工具]]支援卡交換。
all_cards.real_text:
Reduce the resource cost of the first [[Tool]] asset you play each round by 1.
You get +1 skill value during skill tests on [[Tool]] assets.
[elder_sign] effect: +0. You may swap a [[Tool]] asset in your play area with a [[Tool]] asset in your hand with equal or lower printed cost.
all_cards.back_text: 牌組卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：[[工具]]卡牌等級0-5，守衛者卡牌([guardian])等級0-4，中立卡牌等級0-5，最多5張其它[[臨時製品]]和/或[[升級]]卡牌等級0-1。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：特製工具、粗製濫造、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 威爾森以他的工作為傲，無論什麼場合，他都有稱手的工具。水管漏水？水管鉗；樹倒了？手鋸；室內裝修？大鐵鎚。但最近他在阿卡姆附近接到的工作越發奇怪。破裂的地板下出現迷宮般的隧道、屋頂的破洞不像是坍塌，而像是從裡而外炸開。威爾森的工作是解決麻煩，但當這些麻煩跟奇異恐怖的生物，還有無法解釋的現象沾上邊時，他只好發揮創意，善用手邊有的東西。

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 特製工具
all_cards.text:
威爾森‧理查德牌組專用。
疊加特製工具到你控制的一張[[工具]]或[[武器]]支援卡。
[reaction]在結算被疊加的支援卡上的一個[action]能力後，消耗特製工具並從你手牌丟棄一張[[工具]]或[[武器]]支援卡：結算被丟棄支援卡上的一個[action]能力，忽略全部費用。
all_cards.real_text:
Wilson Richards deck only.
Attach Ad Hoc to a [[Tool]] or [[Weapon]] asset you control.
[reaction] After resolving an [action] ability on attached asset, exhaust Ad Hoc and discard a [[Tool]] or [[Weapon]] asset from your hand: Resolve an [action] ability on the discarded asset, ignoring all costs.
all_cards.flavor: "幹得真漂亮。"

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 粗製濫造
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 將粗製濫造放置入你的威脅區域。 觸發你控制的支援卡上的能力的時候，將你的基礎技能值設為0。 [action][action]：丟棄粗製濫造。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Put Hasty Repairs into play in your threat area. While triggering abilities on assets you control, set your base skill value to 0. [action] [action]: Discard Hasty Repairs.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 亞莉珊卓‧佐爾齊
all_cards.text:
你可以在你的回合期間進行一個額外行動，該行動只能用於談判。
[elder_sign]效果：+2。如果你成功，選擇你所在地點，或已揭示連接地點的一名非[[精英]]敵人。自動躲避該敵人。
all_cards.real_text:
You may take an additional action during your turn, which can only be used to parley.
[elder_sign] effect: +2. If you succeed, choose a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location or at a revealed connecting location. Automatically evade that enemy.
all_cards.flavor: "我愛盛大的派對。"
all_cards.back_text: 牌組卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：流浪者卡牌([rogue])等級0-5，帶有"談判"字樣的卡牌等級0-5，中立卡牌等級0-5。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：3張誘騙、茲馬柯納、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 亞莉珊卓的人生無憂且奢華，她可以在紐約參加豪華晚宴，接著在印度大君的舞會中翩翩起舞，這對她來說再自然不過。從馬拉喀什到芝加哥，伯爵夫人嘗遍所有佳餚美酒，所有上流社會人士也盡在她掌握之中。但這個頭銜只是掩人耳目的幌子，亞莉珊卓在無人發覺的情況下，盜竊畫廊跟銀行，還偷走富人的跟風流浪子的心跟支票。她的舌燦蓮花讓她捲入許多麻煩，同時又全身而退。由於神祕的茲馬柯納交付的工作，她來到了位於麻塞諸塞州的阿卡姆市，她逐漸發現，這裡無論是低調的富人還是張揚的浪子，都跟其它的地方不同，他們背後都隱藏了更深的秘密。

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 誘騙
all_cards.text: 亞莉珊卓‧佐爾齊牌組專用。快速。只能在你的回合期間打出。 將誘騙疊加到你所在地點的非[[精英]]敵人。 [action]：談判。移動被疊加的敵人到一個已揭示的連接地點，或在其所在地點執行一個基礎調查或躲避行動。如果你在結算此能力的時候技能檢定失敗，丟棄誘騙。你可以從任意地點啟動本能力。
all_cards.real_text: Alessandra Zorzi deck only. Fast. Play only during your turn. Attach Beguile to a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location. [action]: Parley. Either move attached enemy to a revealed connecting location, or perform a basic investigate or evade action at its location. If you fail a skill test while resolving this ability, discard Beguile. You may activate this ability from any location.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 茲馬柯納
all_cards.text: 避戰。 生成 - 如果可能，最近的無人地點。 亞莉珊卓‧佐爾齊不能與茲馬柯納談判。 強制 - 亞莉珊卓‧佐爾齊每輪第一次談判時：放置1個毀滅標記在茲馬柯納上。
all_cards.real_text: Elusive. Spawn - Nearest empty location, if able. Alessandra Zorzi cannot parley with Zamacona. Forced - The first time Alessandra Zorzi parleys each round: Place 1 doom on Zamacona.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 鳴上琥珀
all_cards.text: [reaction]當你的回合開始時：將1個[bless]標記或1個[curse]標記加入混亂袋，取決於何種標記數量較少(相等的狀況下，由你選擇)，或從混亂袋中移除2個[bless]標記和2個[curse]標記來在這回合進行一個額外行動。 [elder_sign]效果：+2。將1個[bless]和1個[curse]標記加入混亂袋。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] At the start of your turn: Either add 1 [bless] token or 1 [curse] token to the chaos bag, whichever there are fewer of (in case of a tie, you choose), or remove 2 [bless] tokens and 2 [curse] tokens from the chaos bag to take an additional action this turn. [elder_sign] effect: +2. Add 1 [bless] and 1 [curse] token to the chaos bag.
all_cards.traits: 學者. 祝福. 詛咒縈繞
all_cards.flavor: "何不以欣賞的角度來面對未知，而非以恐懼？"
all_cards.back_text: 牌組卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：[[祝福]]卡牌等級0-5, [[詛咒縈繞]]卡牌等級0-5, [[密教]]卡牌等級0，潛修者卡牌([mystic])等級0-3，中立卡牌等級0-5。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：真實神話紀實、詭泣幽靈、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 阿卡姆歷史學會的所有人都認得琥珀那宏亮的笑聲，大家都聽過他講述那些他童年時期在東京郊外生活時的妖怪故事，還有阿卡姆森林中有奇特生物徘徊的傳說。這位古怪的民俗學家告訴所有人，記述並公開發表這些無法解釋的現象是他一生的志業。直到他與妻子嘉貝兒在家中聽到幽靈的哭聲，他的父親曾經飽受同樣的哭聲折磨。他開始害怕，害怕他"一生的志業"將導致他再也無法安靜入睡。

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 真實神話紀實
all_cards.text: 鳴上琥珀牌組專用。 [reaction]在你所在地點將要抽出一個混亂標記時，消耗真實神話紀實：在混亂袋中查找一個[bless]或[curse]標記，取決於何者數量較多(相等的狀況下，由你選擇)，改為結算它。
all_cards.real_text: Kōhaku Narukami deck only. [reaction] When a chaos token would be revealed at your location, exhaust Book of Living Myths: Search the chaos bag for a [bless] or [curse] token, whichever there are more of (in case of a tie, you choose), and resolve it instead.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 書籍. 祝福. 詛咒縈繞

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 詭泣幽靈
all_cards.text: 冷漠。避戰。獵手。 獵物 - 僅對鳴上琥珀。 強制 - 在詭泣幽靈所在地點的調查員在技能檢定期間抽出[bless]標記或[curse]標記後，如果詭泣幽靈已準備：詭泣幽靈攻擊該調查員。(每次檢定限制一次。)
all_cards.real_text: Aloof. Elusive. Hunter. Prey - Kōhaku Narukami only. Forced - After an investigator reveals a [bless] token or [curse] token during a skill test at Weeping Yurei's location, if it is ready: Weeping Yurei attacks that investigator. (Limit once per test).

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 符咒
all_cards.text:
使用(1充能)。每輪第一次在你所在地點抽出[bless]標記時，補充此充能。
[fast]選擇你所在地點的1名非[[精英]]敵人並花費1充能：該敵人失去警戒、冷漠、避戰和反擊關鍵詞，直到本輪結束。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (1 charge). Replenish this charge the first time a [bless] token is revealed at your location each round.
[fast] Choose a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location and spend 1 charge: That enemy loses the alert, aloof, elusive, and retaliate keywords until the end of the round.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 守護. 祝福

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 修補
all_cards.text:
快速。只能在你的回合期間打出。
疊加修補到你的玩家區域中的[[工具]]支援卡。每張支援卡限制1張。
被疊加的支援卡少佔用1個手部或飾品槽位。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play only during your turn.
Attach Tinker to a [[Tool]] asset in your play area. Limit 1 per asset.
Attached asset takes up 1 fewer hand or accessory slot.
all_cards.flavor: "這還能叫扳手嗎？！"

all_cards.flavor: "You call this archaeology?"
all_cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Rogue cards ([rogue]) level 0-3, [[Charm]] and [[Relic]] cards level 0-4, Neutral cards level 0-5, up to 5 other Seeker cards ([seeker]) level 0. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Trusty Bullwhip, Buried Secrets, 1 random basic weakness.
all_cards.back_flavor: Young Jack traveled the world with his father’s archaeological expeditions. Now a globe-trotting treasure hunter and an accomplished archaeologist in his own right, “Monterey” follows in his father’s footsteps, securing the treasures of ancient civilizations and lost cultures. But after discovering a silver pendant with a familiar symbol on it, Monterey must explore his own past. Years ago, his father was found murdered with the very same sigil carved onto his forehead. The image has haunted Monterey’s dreams ever since. But he’s getting close. He won’t stop until he solves the mystery of his father’s murder... no matter what it takes.

all_cards.name: Trusty Bullwhip
all_cards.text: Fast. Monterey Jack deck only. Advanced. [action]: Fight. This attack uses [agility] instead of [combat]. You get +2 skill value for this attack. If this attack succeeds, you may exhaust Trusty Bullwhip to deal +1 damage for this attack and automatically evade the attacked enemy.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 凱特‧溫斯羅普
all_cards.text: 你以磁通量穩定器 (關閉)面朝上開始遊戲。 [fast]：將1個線索從凱特‧溫斯羅普上移動到你控制的一張上面沒有線索的[[科學]]或[[工具]]支援卡上。 強制 - 在你控制的一張上面有線索的支援卡離場時：將其線索放置在你所在地點上。 [elder_sign]效果：+0。你可以將1個線索從你控制的支援卡上移動回凱特‧溫斯羅普上。
all_cards.real_text: You begin the game with Flux Stabilizer (Inactive) side faceup. [fast]: Move 1 clue from Kate Winthrop to a [[Science]] or [[Tool]] asset you control with no clues on it. Forced - When an asset you control with a clue on it leaves play: Place its clue on your location. [elder_sign] effect: +0. You may move 1 clue from an asset you control back to Kate Winthrop.
all_cards.traits: 米斯卡塔尼克. 學者
all_cards.back_text: 牌組卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：探求者卡牌([seeker])等級0-5，[[科學]]卡牌等級0-4，[[洞察]]卡牌等級0-1，中立卡牌等級0-5。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：磁通量穩定器、實驗失敗、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 凱特‧溫斯羅普長年待在米斯卡尼克大學的科學大樓中，在地下室埋首研究。她對贊助跟學術聲譽都沒有興趣，只專注在自己的研究上。最後她的專心致志終於開花結果，她發明了磁通量穩定器：能引導新型能量的強力裝置。但是，進步是要付出代價的。這項劃時代發明的首次成功實驗中奪走了她的好友兼導師楊教授的生命。自從那時開始，凱特不知疲倦地持續研究，了解更多關於這股外星能量的知識。希望某天能找到逆轉這一切的辦法。

all_cards.back_flavor: 漢克‧薩姆森從小在農場長大，老爸老媽交給他什麼差事他都照辦，包括照顧弟弟妹妹們。當老爸帶他到城市裡，在圍欄中的奇怪生物讓他感到很不自在，但他還是跟著老爸去了。老爸要他在這裡等，他照做了，但老爸卻再也沒有回來。漢克一直沒有放棄尋找他，老爸教過他，家人比什麼都重要，所以他是不會拋棄自己的家人的。

[fast]花費1貢品：你這次技能檢定中+2[combat]或+2[agility]。(每次檢定限制一次。)
all_cards.real_text:
Limit 1 [[Mask]] per investigator.
Uses (2 offerings). Replenish 1 of these offerings after you engage an enemy.
[fast] Spend 1 offering: You get +2 [combat] or +2 [agility] for this skill test. (Limit once per test.)
all_cards.traits: 道具. 守護. 面具

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 赦免
all_cards.text:
從混亂袋隨機抽出3個標記，以及X個額外標記。
每抽出一個非符號標記，就加入1個[bless]標記到混亂袋。每抽出1個[bless]標記，治癒你所在地點一位調查員或一張[[盟友]]支援卡的1點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text:
Reveal 3 random tokens from the chaos bag, along with X additional tokens.
For each non-symbol token revealed, add 1 [bless] token to the chaos bag. For each [bless] token revealed, heal 1 horror from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset at your location.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 信仰引導
all_cards.text: 調查。這次調查你可以不使用[intellect]，改為使用[willpower]。在這次檢定抽出混亂標記前，加入2個[bless]標記到混亂袋。如果這次技能檢定期間抽出[bless]或[elder_sign]標記，發現你所在地點的額外1個線索。
all_cards.real_text: Investigate. You may use [willpower] instead of [intellect] for this investigation. Before revealing chaos tokens for this test, add 2 [bless] tokens to the chaos bag. If a [bless] or [elder_sign] token is revealed during this skill test, discover 1 additional clue at your location.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 別動
all_cards.text: 談判。選擇你所在地點的1名敵人與你手牌中的1張[[道具]]支援卡。對所選敵人執行一次攻擊行動。如果你成功，不造成傷害，改為打出所選支援卡，你每成功且超過難度一點，減少其一點費用。
all_cards.real_text: Parley. Choose an enemy at your location and an [[Item]] asset in your hand. Perform a fight action against the chosen enemy. If you succeed, instead of dealing damage, play the chosen asset, reducing its cost by each point you succeeded by.
all_cards.flavor: "把、把手舉起來！"

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 淨化
all_cards.text:
每次技能檢定最多投入1張。
你可以在任何類型的檢定中投入淨化。
如果這次檢定成功，你每超過難度1點(最多5點)，加入1個[bless]標記到混亂袋，或從混亂袋移除1個[curse]標記。
all_cards.real_text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
You may commit Purified to any type of test.
If this test is successful, for each point you succeeded by (to a maximum of 5), add 1 [bless] token or remove 1 [curse] token from the chaos bag.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 強健雙臂
all_cards.text: 使用[[近戰]]或[[遠程]]支援卡的攻擊中投入強健雙臂的時候，這次攻擊造成+1傷害。這次技能檢定抽出混亂標記後，你可以受到1點傷害來取消該一個混亂標記，將其放回混亂袋，並抽出一個新的標記。(你可以執行任意次。)
all_cards.real_text: While Strong-Armed is committed to an attack using a [[Melee]] or [[Ranged]] asset, this attack deals +1 damage. After revealing chaos token(s) for this skill test, you may take 1 damage to cancel that chaos token, return it to the chaos bag, and reveal a new one. (You may do this any number of times.)

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 老鼠面具
all_cards.text:
每位調查員限制1[[面具]]。
使用(2貢品)。在你翻開一個地點或將一個新地點放置入場後，補充1貢品。
[fast]花費1貢品：這次技能檢定中你+2[willpower]或+2[intellect]。(每次檢定限制一次。)
all_cards.real_text:
Limit 1 [[Mask]] per investigator.
Uses (2 offerings). Replenish 1 of these offerings after you reveal a location or put a new location into play.
[fast] Spend 1 offering: You get +2 [willpower] or +2 [intellect] for this skill test. (Limit once per test.)
all_cards.traits: 道具. 守護. 面具

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: "用書扔牠們！"
all_cards.text: 攻擊。選擇你控制的一張[[書籍]]支援卡。這次攻擊中你+X[combat]，其中X為該支援卡的印刷費用。如果你成功，你可以自動躲避被攻擊的敵人，或在本攻擊結束後，你可以結算所選支援卡上的一個[action]或[fast]能力(忽略其[action]費用，如果有的話)。
all_cards.real_text: Fight. Choose a [[Tome]] asset you control. You get +X [combat] for this attack, where X is that asset's printed cost. If you succeed, you may either automatically evade the attacked enemy, or after the attack ends, you may resolve an [action] or [fast] ability on the chosen asset (ignoring its [action] cost, if any).
all_cards.flavor: "孩子你……你比我意料中的懂得更多。"

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 劇烈突變
all_cards.text: 躲避。這次躲避你可以不使用[agility]，改為使用[intellect]。如果你成功且該敵人非[[精英]]，疊加劇烈突變到該敵人。 被疊加的敵人獲得："龐大。不能移動。 [reaction]在你躲避該敵人後：發現其所在地點的1個線索。(每輪限制一次。)"
all_cards.real_text: Evade. You may use [intellect] instead of [agility] for this evasion attempt. If you succeed and the enemy is non-[[Elite]], attach Transmogrify to it. Attached enemy gains: "Massive. Cannot move. [reaction] After you evade this enemy: Discover 1 clue at its location. (Limit once per round.)"
all_cards.flavor: "我說的是'炸了牠'，不是'<u>變大</u>牠'"

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 精準調校
all_cards.text:
疊加到你控制的[[工具]]或[[科學]]支援卡。每張支援卡限制1張。
[reaction]在被疊加的支援卡消耗後，消耗精準調校：準備被疊加的支援卡。
all_cards.real_text:
Attach to a [[Tool]] or [[Science]] asset you control. Limit 1 per asset.
[reaction] After attached asset exhausts, exhaust Fine Tuning: Ready attached asset.
all_cards.flavor: "我跟你保證沒什麼好怕的！"

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 稜角透鏡
all_cards.text: [action]加入1個[curse]標記到混亂袋：調查。這次調查中你+2技能值。如果這次調查期間抽出了[curse]標記，你可以消耗稜角透鏡來發現你所在地點的額外1個線索。
all_cards.real_text: [action] Add 1 [curse] token to the chaos bag: Investigate. You get +2 skill value for this investigation. If a [curse] token is revealed during this investigation, you may exhaust Prismatic Spectacles to discover 1 additional clue at your location.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 遺物. 詛咒縈繞

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 混淆視聽
all_cards.text: 談判。選擇你所在地點的1名敵人。檢定[intellect](X)，其中X為所選敵人的躲避值。如果你成功，發現你所在地點的2個線索。然後，如果所選敵人非[[精英]]，自動躲避該敵人。該敵人在下個補給階段期間不準備。
all_cards.real_text: Parley. Choose an enemy at your location. Test [intellect] (X), where X is the chosen enemy's evade value. If you succeed, discover 2 clues at your location. Then, if the chosen enemy is non-[[Elite]], automatically evade it. It does not ready during the next upkeep phase.
all_cards.flavor: "赫伯特，這招從來沒成功過。"

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 假證件
all_cards.text: [action]選擇你所在地點的一名敵人並消耗假證件：談判。檢定[intellect](1)。假證件上每有一可疑，這次檢定難度+1。如果你成功，發現你所在地點的1個線索並放置1資源到假證件上，作為可疑。如果你失敗，你必須丟棄假證件，或所選敵人攻擊你。
all_cards.real_text: [action] Choose an enemy at your location and exhaust Fake Credentials: Parley. Test [intellect] (1). This test gets +1 difficulty for each suspicion on Fake Credentials. If you succeed, discover 1 clue at your location and place 1 resource on Fake Credentials, as suspicion. If you fail, you must either discard Fake Credentials, or the chosen enemy attacks you.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 象牙護符
all_cards.text: [action]加入1─3個[curse]標記到混亂袋並消耗象牙護符：獲得1資源。每加入一個標記，獲得額外1資源。
all_cards.real_text: [action] Add 1-3 [curse] tokens to the chaos bag and exhaust Scrimshaw Charm: Gain 1 resource. For each token added, gain 1 additional resource.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 守護. 詛咒縈繞
all_cards.flavor: "讓信念蒙蔽真相；讓幻想取代記憶；我向內心深深推進，堅定篤信。" - 赫爾曼‧梅爾維爾，<u>《白鯨記》</u>

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 紅顏禍水
all_cards.text: 談判。選擇你所在地點的一名敵人並檢定任意技能(3)。如果你成功，並且你檢定了…… - ……[willpower]，從該敵人上移除1個毀滅標記。 - ……[intellect]，發現你所在地點的1個線索。 - ……[agility]，自動躲避該敵人。如果該敵人非[[精英]]，將其移動到連接地點。 - ……[combat]，對該敵人造成2點傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Parley. Choose an enemy at your location and test any skill (3). If you succeed and you tested... - ...[willpower], remove 1 doom from that enemy. - ...[intellect], discover 1 clue at your location. - ...[agility], automatically evade that enemy. If it is non-[[Elite]], move it to a connecting location. - ...[combat], deal 2 damage to that enemy.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 告密者
all_cards.text:
快速。在你進行談判並且技能檢定成功後打出。
發現你所在地點和連接地點的總計2個線索。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play after you succeed at a skill test while parleying.
Discover 2 total clues from among your location and connecting locations.
all_cards.flavor: "我不應該告訴你的，不過你看起來可以信任……"

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 紅顏禍水
all_cards.text: 談判。選擇你所在地點的一名敵人與任意數量的技能。以任意順序依次檢定所選的技能(2)。如果你檢定成功並且檢定了…… - ……[willpower]，從該敵人上移除1個毀滅標記。 - ……[intellect]，發現該敵人所在地點的1個線索。 - ……[agility]，自動躲避該敵人。如果該敵人非[[精英]]，將其移動到連接地點。 - ……[combat]，對該敵人造成2點傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Parley. Choose an enemy at your location and any number of skills. One at a time, in any order, test each chosen skill (2). For each test you succeeded, if it was... - ...[willpower], remove 1 doom from that enemy. - ...[intellect], discover 1 clue at that enemy's location. - ...[agility], automatically evade that enemy. Move it to a connecting location if it is non-[[Elite]]. - ...[combat], deal 2 damage to that enemy.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 挑撥離間
all_cards.text: 談判。選擇你所在地點的一名敵人並檢定[intellect](X)，其中X為所選敵人的傷害/恐懼值總和。如果你成功，對你所在地點的每名敵人造成X點傷害。在此效果結算後，你可以與每名敵人解除交戰，並移動到連接地點。
all_cards.real_text: Parley. Choose an enemy at your location and test [intellect] (X), where X is the chosen enemy's combined damage/horror values. If you succeed, deal X damage to each enemy at your location. After this effect resolves, you may disengage from each enemy and move to a connecting location.
all_cards.flavor: "…並且他還說你是個蠢貨！"

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 靈貓面具
all_cards.text:
每位調查員限制1[[面具]]。
使用(2貢品)。在毀滅標記被放置到沒有毀滅標記的卡牌上後，補充2貢品。
[fast]花費1貢品：這次技能檢定中你+2[willpower]或+2[combat]。(每次檢定限制一次。)
all_cards.real_text:
Limit 1 [[Mask]] per investigator.
Uses (2 offerings). Replenish 2 of these offerings after doom is placed on a card with no doom.
[fast] Spend 1 offering: You get +2 [willpower] or +2 [combat] for this skill test. (Limit once per test.)
all_cards.traits: 道具. 守護. 面具

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 抽取精質
all_cards.text: 談判。選擇你所在地點的一名敵人並檢定[willpower](X)，其中X為所選敵人的攻擊值。如果你成功，將你調查員上的1點傷害移動到所選敵人上(如果所選敵人非[[精英]]，改為最多2點傷害)。
all_cards.real_text: Parley. Choose an enemy at your location and test [willpower] (X), where X is the chosen enemy's fight value. If you succeed, move 1 damage from your investigator to the chosen enemy (up to 2 damage instead if the chosen enemy is non-[[Elite]]).
all_cards.flavor: 你的一切現在歸我所有。

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 所羅門之鑰
all_cards.text:
[fast]如果混亂袋中的[bless]標記數量多於[curse]標記，從混亂袋移除1個[bless]標記並消耗所羅門之鑰：治癒你所在地點一位調查員或一張[[盟友]]支援卡的最多2點傷害和/或恐懼。
[fast]如果混亂袋中的[curse]標記數量多於[bless]標記，從混亂袋移除1個[curse]標記並消耗所羅門之鑰：獲得2個資源。
all_cards.real_text:
[fast] If there are more [bless] than [curse] tokens in the chaos bag, remove 1 [bless] token from the chaos bag and exhaust The Key of Solomon: Heal up to 2 damage and/or horror from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset at your location.
[fast] If there are more [curse] than [bless] tokens in the chaos bag, remove 1 [curse] token from the chaos bag and exhaust The Key of Solomon: Gain 2 resources.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 書籍. 祝福. 詛咒縈繞

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 火柴盒
all_cards.text:
使用(3補給)。如果火柴盒沒有補給，將其丟棄。
[fast]在任何調查員的回合期間，消耗火柴盒並花費1補給：直到本回合結束前你所在地點-1隱藏值。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (3 supplies). If Matchbox has no supplies, discard it.
[fast] During any investigator's turn, exhaust Matchbox and spend 1 supply: Your location gets -1 shroud until the end of this turn.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 毛皮生意
all_cards.text:
只要毛皮生意在你的手牌中，你的手牌上限減少3。
[reaction]在遊戲結束或你撤退時，如果毛皮生意在你的手牌中：你在下場冒險前購買下一張新卡牌的經驗值費用減1。
all_cards.real_text:
While Pelt Shipment is in your hand, your maximum hand size is reduced by 3.
[reaction] When the game ends or you resign, if Pelt Shipment is in your hand: Reduce the experience cost of the next new card you purchase before the next scenario by 1.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 手斧
all_cards.text: [action]：攻擊。將你的[agility]加入你這次攻擊的技能值。這次攻擊造成+1傷害。如果這次攻擊擊敗敵人，丟棄手斧。否則，失去對手斧的控制，並將其疊加到被攻擊的敵人。被疊加的敵人獲得： "[reaction]在被疊加的敵人被擊敗時：控制手斧。位於手斧所在地點的任何調查員均可觸發此能力。"
all_cards.real_text: [action]: Fight. Add your [agility] to your skill value for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage. If this attack defeats an enemy, discard Hatchet. Otherwise, lose control of Hatchet and attach it to the attacked enemy. Attached enemy gains: "[reaction] When attached enemy is defeated: Take control of Hatchet. Any investigator at Hatchet's location may trigger this ability."
all_cards.traits: 道具. 工具. 武器. 遠程

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 毅力
all_cards.text: 你可以從你的棄牌堆將毅力投入到技能檢定。如果你這麼做，在這次檢定結束後將其混洗入你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text: You may commit Persistence to a skill test from your discard pile. If you do, shuffle it into your deck after this test ends.
all_cards.flavor: "任何人都可能沉迷其中並失去理智，除了專心致志的農夫……"—H.P.洛夫克拉夫特，<u>《星之彩》</u>

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 生存技巧
all_cards.text:
[fast]選擇一張疊加到你所在地點的，且你擁有的卡牌，並消耗生存技巧：將該卡牌加入你的手牌。
[fast]在地點上或疊加到你所在地點的詭計上的技能檢定期間，消耗生存技巧：這次檢定中你+2技能值。
all_cards.real_text:
[fast] Choose a card you own that is attached to your location and exhaust Survival Technique: Add that card to your hand.
[fast] During a skill test on a location or on a treachery attached to your location, exhaust Survival Technique: You get +2 skill value for this test.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 神佑
all_cards.text: 如果這次技能檢定成功，你每有1點傷害或恐懼(取其中較低的數值)，加入1個[bless]標記到混亂袋。
all_cards.real_text: If this skill test is successful, add 1 [bless] token to the chaos bag for each damage or horror on you (whichever is less).
all_cards.flavor: 面對潛伏的恐懼，勇氣是你最好的防禦。

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 宗教信物
all_cards.text: [reaction]在抽出至少1個[curse]或[auto_fail]標記的技能檢定結束後，消耗宗教信物：加入同等數量的[bless]標記混亂袋。如果這次技能檢定失敗，在結算該失敗檢定的所有效果後，執行的調查員可以再次嘗試該檢定。(每次檢定最多一次。)
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] After a skill test ends in which 1 or more [curse] or [auto_fail] tokens were revealed, exhaust Token of Faith: Add that many [bless] tokens to the chaos bag. If this skill test failed, after resolving all effects from the failed test, the performing investigator may attempt that test again. (Max once per test.)
all_cards.traits: 道具. 守護. 祝福

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 衣著華麗
all_cards.text: 在談判行動期間投入衣著華麗到技能檢定的時候，其獲得[wild][wild][wild]。
all_cards.real_text: While Well-Dressed is committed to a skill test during a parley action, it gains [wild] [wild] [wild].
all_cards.flavor: 人要衣裝。

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 銀蛾
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 你必須將銀蛾放置入你的威脅區域，或受到1點恐懼並將其混洗入你的牌堆。除非通過以下[action][action]能力，否則其不能離場。 你獲得-1神智值。 [action][action]：丟棄銀蛾。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - You must either put The Silver Moth into play in your threat area, or take 1 horror and shuffle it into your deck. It cannot leave play except by the [action] [action] ability below. You get -1 sanity. [action] [action]: Discard The Silver Moth.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 狐狸面具
all_cards.text:
每位調查員限制1[[面具]]。
使用(2貢品)。在你移動離開有敵人的地點後，補充1貢品。
[fast]花費1貢品：這次技能檢定中你+2[intellect]或+2[agility]。(每次檢定限制一次。)
all_cards.real_text:
Limit 1 [[Mask]] per investigator.
Uses (2 offerings). Replenish 1 of these offerings after you move out of a location with an enemy.
[fast] Spend 1 offering: You get +2 [intellect] or +2 [agility] for this skill test. (Limit once per test.)
all_cards.traits: 道具. 守護. 面具

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 清理工具
all_cards.text:
使用(3補給)。
清理工具上的補給可以如同你控制的支援卡上的補給或子彈來被花費。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (3 supplies).
Supplies on Cleaning Kit may be spent as if they were supplies or ammo on assets you control.
all_cards.flavor:
"清潔！修理！夾起！拔除！擦亮！掃刷！一次滿足！"
-沙夫納的目錄，1924冬季號。

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 武士刀
all_cards.text: [action]：攻擊。這次檢定中你+2[combat]。如果你成功且超過難度正好2點，你可以消耗武士刀來使這次攻擊造成+2傷害。 [fast]消耗武士刀：攻擊。這次攻擊不使用[combat]，改為使用[agility]。
all_cards.real_text: [action]: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this test. If you succeed by exactly 2, you may exhaust Katana to deal +2 damage for this attack. [fast]Exhaust Katana: Fight. Use [agility] instead of [combat] for this attack.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 近戰

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 作業部隊
all_cards.text:
作為打出作業部隊的額外費用，花費一個行動。一次一個，以任意順序，選擇你所在地點的一位調查員……
- ……結算他控制的支援卡上的一個[action]能力，無需支付其[action]費用。
- ……移動到一個連接地點。
- ……發現他所在地點的1個線索。
all_cards.real_text:
As an additional cost to play Task Force, spend an action. One at a time, in any order, choose an investigator at your location to...
- ...resolve an [action] ability on an asset they control without paying its [action] cost.
- ...move to a connecting location.
- ...discover 1 clue at their location.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 恢復元氣
all_cards.text:
只能作為你的第一個行動打出。
治癒2點傷害(如果你本輪抽取了詭計卡，改為治癒3點傷害)。抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Play only as your first action.
Heal 2 damage (3 damage instead if you drew a treachery this round). Draw 1 card.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 清理工具
all_cards.text:
使用(4補給)。
清理工具上的補給可以如同你控制的支援卡上的補給或子彈來被花費。
[reaction]在從清理工具花費補給時，將其消耗：執行檢定的調查員這次檢定中+2技能值。
all_cards.real_text:
Uses (4 supplies).
Supplies on Cleaning Kit may be spent as if they were supplies or ammo on assets you control.
[reaction] When a supply is spent from Cleaning Kit, exhaust it: The performing investigator gets +2 skill value for this test.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 蒙福之刃
all_cards.text: [action]：攻擊。這次攻擊中你+2[combat]。如果這次攻擊成功，其造成+1傷害。將這次攻擊期間抽出的每個[bless]標記放回混亂袋。在這次攻擊抽出混亂標記前，你可以消耗蒙福之刃來加入2個[bless]標記混亂袋。
all_cards.real_text: [action]: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. If this attack is successful, it deals +1 damage. Return each [bless] token revealed during this attack to the chaos bag. Before revealing chaos token(s) for this attack, you may exhaust Blessed Blade to add 2 [bless] tokens to the chaos bag.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 近戰. 祝福

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 瓦盧西亞之眼
all_cards.text: [action]：談判。選擇你所在地點的1名敵人。直到本輪結束，每位調查員對所選敵人攻擊、躲避或談判的時候+1技能值。放置1個資源在瓦盧西亞之眼上，作為充能。 [fast]：在你的綁定卡牌中查找幽嘶之刃，並將其與瓦盧西亞之眼交換, 將瓦盧西亞之眼上的所有充能移動到幽嘶之刃。
all_cards.real_text: [action]: Parley. Choose an enemy at your location. Until the end of the round, each investigator gets +1 skill value while fighting, evading, or parleying with the chosen enemy. Place 1 resource on Eyes of Valusia, as a charge. [fast]: Search your bonded cards for Blade of Yoth and swap it with Eyes of Valusia, moving all charges from Eyes of Valusia to Blade of Yoth.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 遺物. 法術

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 幽嘶之刃
all_cards.text: 綁定(瓦盧西亞之眼)。 [action]花費1-3充能：攻擊。這次攻擊你可以不使用[combat]，改為使用[willpower]。作為這次行動的花費的一部分，每花費1充能，你+2技能值並造成+1傷害。 [fast]：在你的綁定卡牌中查找瓦盧西亞之眼，並將其與幽嘶之刃交換，丟棄所有充能。
all_cards.real_text: Bonded (Eyes of Valusia). [action] Spend 1-3 charges: Fight. For this attack, you may use [willpower] instead of [combat]. You get +2 skill value and deal +1 damage for each charge spent as part of this action's cost. [fast]: Search your bonded cards for Eyes of Valusia and swap it with Blade of Yoth, discarding all charges.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 遺物. 武器. 近戰

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 疾風連擊
all_cards.text: 只能在你有控制[[近戰]]支援卡時才可打出。作為打出疾風連擊的額外費用，花費一個行動。 攻擊。選擇你控制的一張[[近戰]]支援卡並立即使用該支援卡進行一次攻擊行動(無需支付其[action]費用)。你可以重複此效果最多三次。在最後一次攻擊結算後，如果這是你的回合，結束你的回合。
all_cards.real_text: Play only if you control a [[Melee]] asset. As an additional cost to play Flurry of Blows, spend an action. Fight. Choose a [[Melee]] asset you control and take an immediate fight action with that asset (without paying its [action] cost). You may repeat this effect up to three times. After the final attack resolves, if it is your turn, end your turn.
all_cards.traits: 策略. 雙倍. 定命

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 奇蹟之願
all_cards.text:
快速。在你所在地點的技能檢定期間抽出1個以上的[bless]後打出。
在你的綁定卡牌中查找轉瞬昇華，並將其放置入場。在其上放置最多X個資源，作為願望(最多為抽出的[bless]標記數量)。將奇蹟之願從遊戲中移除。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play after 1 or more [bless] tokens are revealed during a skill test at your location.
Search your bonded cards for Evanescent Ascension and put it into play. Place up to X resources on it, as wishes (to a maximum of the number of [bless] tokens revealed). Remove Miracle Wish from the game.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 轉瞬昇華
all_cards.text: 綁定(奇蹟之願)。如果轉瞬昇華沒有願望，將其放在一邊，位於場外。 [reaction]在你所在地點的調查員技能檢定將要失敗時，花費1願望並消耗轉瞬昇華：結算該調查員的[elder_sign]效果(加上這次檢定期間抽出的所有其它標記)。
all_cards.real_text: Bonded (Miracle Wish). If Evanescent Ascension has no wishes, set it aside, out of play. [reaction] When an investigator at your location would fail a skill test, spend 1 wish and exhaust Evanescent Ascension: Resolve that investigator's [elder_sign] effect (in addition to all other tokens revealed during this test).
all_cards.traits: 儀式. 契約. 祝福

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 控制變因
all_cards.text:
快速。你所在地點的調查員在技能檢定期間抽出[curse]標記後打出。
發現你所在地點的1個線索。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play after an investigator reveals a [curse] token during a skill test at your location.
Discover 1 clue at your location.
all_cards.traits: 洞察. 科學. 詛咒縈繞
all_cards.flavor: "他將一種溶液注射進死物的血脈裡，如果它們死亡時間不長，就會產生奇特的反應。" —H.P.洛夫克拉夫特，《赫伯特‧韋斯特—幽靈人種》

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 快速運算
all_cards.text: 作為打出快速運算的額外費用，花費一個行動。 調查。依隱藏值由低到高依序調查你所在地點與每個連接地點各一次，直到你調查失敗，或成功調查每個符合條件的地點。
all_cards.real_text: As an additional cost to play Testing Sprint, spend an action. Investigate. One at a time, investigate your location and each connecting location once each in ascending order of shroud, until you either fail to investigate or successfully investigate each eligible location.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 研究透徹
all_cards.text: 作為打出研究透徹的額外費用，花費一個行動。 你所在地點的調查員抽取總計5張卡牌(由你決定每位調查員各抽取幾張卡牌)。
all_cards.real_text: As an additional cost to play Thorough Inquiry, spend an action. Investigators at your location draw a combined total of 5 cards (you decide how many cards each investigator draws).
all_cards.flavor: 真相往往近在眼前。

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 蓋布瑞歐‧凱瑞羅
all_cards.text:
你獲得+1[intellect]。
[reaction]當你的回合開始時，加入1個[curse]標記到混亂袋：抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
You get +1 [intellect].
[reaction] At the start of your turn, add 1 [curse] token to the chaos bag: Draw 1 card.
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 學者. 詛咒縈繞
all_cards.flavor: "幫你忙比教會我的學生幾何學簡單多了。"

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 沉穩雙手
all_cards.text:
每位調查員限制1張。
[reaction]在你技能檢定將要成功時，消耗沉穩雙手：你成功且超過難度的點數增加1點或減少1點。如果你成功且超過難度正好2點，治癒1點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text:
Limit 1 per investigator.
[reaction] When you would succeed at a skill test, exhaust Steady-Handed: You either succeed by 1 more or 1 less. If you succeeded by exactly 2, heal 1 horror.
all_cards.flavor: 即使是最細微的顫抖都可能是決定生死的關鍵。

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 奇詭手法
all_cards.text: 在這次技能檢定結束後，執行檢定的調查員每成功且超過難度1點，或每失敗且低於難度1點，就加入1個[curse]標記到混亂袋。
all_cards.real_text: After this skill test ends, add 1 [curse] token to the chaos bag for each point the performing investigator either succeeded or failed by.
all_cards.flavor: 有傳言說大學裡最後一位顱像學教授擁有長的不自然的任期。

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 顯微鏡
all_cards.text: [reaction]在你所在地點的敵人被成功躲避或被擊敗後：放置1資源在顯微鏡上，作為證據。 [action][action]：調查。顯微鏡上每有一證據，這次調查中你+2[intellect](最多+6[intellect])。如果你成功，你可以花費最多3證據來發現你所在地點等同該花費量的額外線索。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] After an enemy at your location is successfully evaded or defeated: Place 1 resource on Microscope, as evidence. [action] [action]: Investigate. You get +2 [intellect] for this investigation for each evidence on Microscope (max +6 [intellect]). If you succeed, you may spend up to 3 evidence to discover that many additional clues at your location.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 工具. 科學

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 暴食菌株
all_cards.text:
研究完成。每副牌組限制1張。
[fast]：在你的綁定卡牌中查找詭異生長，並將其加入你的手牌。(每輪限制一次。)
[reaction]在調查員抽取一張非弱點詭計卡時，如果其所在地點的隱藏值等於或低於暴食菌株上的生長數量：取消該詭計卡的效果並將其丟棄。移除暴食菌株上的全部生長。
all_cards.real_text:
Researched. Limit 1 per deck.
[fast]: Search your bonded cards for Uncanny Growth and add it to your hand. (Limit once per round.)
[reaction] When an investigator draws a non-weakness treachery card, if their locations shroud is equal to or less than Ravenous Myconid's growth: Cancel that treachery's effects and discard it. Remove all growth from Ravenous Myconid.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 暴食菌株
all_cards.text:
研究完成。每副牌組限制1張。
[fast]：在你的綁定卡牌中查找詭異生長，並將其加入你的手牌。(每輪限制一次。)
[fast]選擇你所在地點一名剩餘生命值等於或低於暴食菌株上的生長數量的非[[精英]]敵人：擊敗該敵人。移除暴食菌株上的全部生長。
all_cards.real_text:
Researched. Limit 1 per deck.
[fast]: Search your bonded cards for Uncanny Growth and add it to your hand. (Limit once per round.)
[fast] Choose a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location with equal or fewer remaining health than the amount of growth on Ravenous Myconid: Defeat that enemy. Remove all growth from Ravenous Myconid.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 暴食菌株
all_cards.text:
研究完成。每副牌組限制1張。
[fast]：在你的綁定卡牌中查找詭異生長，並將其加入你的手牌。(每輪限制一次。)
[fast]移除暴食菌株上的全部生長：治癒暴食菌株等量的傷害/恐懼，或將你所在地點的調查員或[[盟友]]支援卡上等量的傷害/恐懼移動到暴食菌株上。
all_cards.real_text:
Researched. Limit 1 per deck.
[fast]: Search your bonded cards for Uncanny Growth and add it to your hand. (Limit once per round.)
[fast] Remove all growth from Ravenous Myconid: Either heal that much damage/horror from Ravenous Myconid, or move that much damage/horror from investigators or [[Ally]] assets at your location to Ravenous Myconid.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: "野貓"碧安卡
all_cards.text: 每副牌組限制1張。使用(10資源)。 [action]消耗"野貓"碧安卡：談判。將"野貓"碧安卡上的X個資源移動到你的資源池，X不能大於5。檢定[agility](X)。如果你失敗，記住"你欠碧安卡X資源"。然後，在你的綁定卡牌中查找"野貓"碧安卡敵人，並將她生成到你所在地點。將本卡牌從遊戲中移除。
all_cards.real_text: Limit 1 per deck. Uses (10 resources). [action] Exhaust Bianca "Die Katz": Parley. Move X resources from Bianca "Die Katz" to your resource pool. X cannot be more than 5. Test [agility] (X). If you fail, remember "you owe Bianca X resources." Then, search your bonded cards for the Bianca "Die Katz" enemy and spawn her at your location. Remove this card from the game.
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 罪犯. 社會名流

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: "野貓"碧安卡
all_cards.text: 綁定("野貓"碧安卡)。獵手。 獵物 - 僅對承受者。 [action]如果"你欠碧安卡X資源"，花費X資源：談判。將"野貓"碧安卡加入勝利牌區。 強制 - 在"野貓"碧安卡離場時(除了藉由以上能力以外)：將她混洗入你的牌組。
all_cards.real_text: Bonded (Bianca "Die Katz"). Hunter. Prey - Bearer only. [action] If "you owe Bianca X resources," spend X resources: Parley. Add Bianca "Die Katz" to the victory display. Forced - When Bianca "Die Katz" leaves play (except by the above ability): Shuffle her into your deck.
all_cards.traits: 類人. 罪犯. 社會名流

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 不列顛鬥牛犬
all_cards.text: 使用(3子彈)。 [action]花費1子彈：攻擊。這次攻擊你可以不使用[combat]，改為使用[agility]。這次攻擊造成+1傷害。 [reaction]在你與敵人談判並且技能檢定失敗後：將不列顛鬥牛犬從你的手牌中放置入場。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (3 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You may use [agility] instead of [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage. [reaction] After you fail a skill test while parleying with an enemy: Put British Bull Dog into play from your hand.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 槍械. 違法

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 銀行劫案
all_cards.text:
作為打出銀行劫案額外費用，花費一個行動。
你所在地點的調查員獲得總計8資源，由你自行分配
all_cards.real_text:
As an additional cost to play Bank Job, spend an action.
Investigators at your location gain a total of 8 resources, distributed as you wish.
all_cards.traits: 局勢. 雙倍. 違法
all_cards.flavor:
"別喊名字，倒霉蛋。"
"抱歉，芬恩。"

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 挑撥離間
all_cards.text: 談判。選擇你所在地點的一名敵人並檢定[intellect](X)，其中X為所選敵人的傷害和恐懼值總和。如果你成功，對你所在地點的每名敵人各造成2點傷害。如果你成功且超過難度至少2點，在此效果結算後，你可以與每名敵人解除交戰，並移動到連接地點。
all_cards.real_text: Parley. Choose an enemy at your location and test [intellect] (X), where X is the chosen enemy's combined damage and horror values. If you succeed, deal 2 damage to each enemy at your location. If you succeed by 2 or more, after this effect resolves you may disengage from each enemy and move to a connecting location.
all_cards.flavor: "他講了你頭髮的壞話…"

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 極糟的運氣
all_cards.text: 在你執行的技能檢定期間抽出[curse]標記時，你可以從你的手牌中投入極糟的運氣到該技能檢定。如果你這麼做，極糟的運氣獲得[wild][wild][wild]。
all_cards.real_text: When you reveal a [curse] token during a skill test you are performing, you may commit Diabolical Luck to that skill test from your hand. If you do, Diabolical Luck gains [wild][wild][wild].
all_cards.flavor: "修格斯，為什麼每次都是修格斯？"

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 身輕如燕
all_cards.text: 如果躲避期間這次技能檢定成功，你可以自動躲避你所在地點的另一名敵人。
all_cards.real_text: If this skill test is successful during an evasion attempt, you may automatically evade another enemy at your location.
all_cards.flavor: "我從沒見過那種惡魔，也從來沒跑得像今晚這麼快過。希望我不會再遇到這種事。" -—麗塔‧楊，《詭鎮奇談》調查員

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 不列顛鬥牛犬
all_cards.text: 使用(3子彈)。 [action]花費1子彈：攻擊。這次攻擊你可以不使用[combat]，改為使用[agility]，並且你+2技能值。這次攻擊造成+1傷害。這次攻擊忽略冷漠關鍵詞。 [reaction]在你與敵人談判並且技能檢定失敗後：將不列顛鬥牛犬從你的手牌中放置入場。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (3 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You may use [agility] instead of [combat] for this attack and you get +2 skill value. This attack deals +1 damage. Ignore the aloof keyword for this attack. [reaction] After you fail a skill test while parleying with an enemy: Put British Bull Dog into play from your hand.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 槍械. 違法

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 妖艷迷人
all_cards.text:
永久。卓越。
[reaction] 在你抽取你的起始手牌前：在你的牌堆中查找最多3張不同的[[技巧]]卡牌，並將其面朝下疊加到妖艷迷人。混洗你的牌堆。
[reaction]在你與敵人交戰時，消耗妖艷迷人：抽取1張疊加的卡牌，或在你的牌堆頂部9張卡牌中查找並抽取一張與疊加的卡牌同名的卡牌，並混洗你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text:
Permanent. Exceptional.
[reaction] Before you draw your opening hand: Search your deck for up to 3 different [[Trick]] cards, and attach them facedown to Bewitching. Shuffle your deck.
[reaction] When you engage an enemy, exhaust Bewitching: Either draw 1 attached card, or search the top 9 cards of your deck for a copy of an attached card, draw it, and shuffle your deck.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 齷齪生意
all_cards.text: 作為打出齷齪生意的額外費用，花費一個行動。 在你的牌堆中查找一張[[違法]]支援卡，並支付其費用將其打出。然後，你可以結算該支援卡上的一個[action]或[fast]能力，忽略所有費用(包含其[action]費用，如果有的話)。打出這張卡牌不會引起趁亂攻擊。
all_cards.real_text: As an additional cost to play Dirty Deeds, spend an action. Search your deck for an [[Illicit]] asset and play it, paying its cost. Then, you may resolve an [action] or [fast] ability on that asset, ignoring all costs (including its [action] cost, if any). Playing this card does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
all_cards.traits: 恩惠. 雙倍. 違法

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 假證件
all_cards.text: [action]選擇你所在地點的一名敵人：談判。檢定[intellect](0)。假證件上每有一可疑，這次檢定難度+1。如果你成功，發現你所在地點或連接地點的1個線索。如果你沒有成功且超過難度至少2點，放置1資源到假證件上，作為可疑。如果你失敗，將假證件返回你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text: [action] Choose an enemy at your location: Parley. Test [intellect](0). This test gets +1 difficulty for each suspicion on Fake Credentials. If you succeed, discover 1 clue at your location or a connecting location. If you did not succeed by 2 or more, place 1 resource on Fake Credentials, as suspicion. If you fail, return Fake Credentials to your hand.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 卡納瑪戈斯的權杖
all_cards.text:
每副牌組限制1張。
[fast]選擇任意地點的一名非[[精英]]敵人並消耗卡納瑪戈斯的權杖：從混亂袋隨機抽出5個混亂標記。如果抽出[curse]標記，在你的綁定卡牌中查找隨機1張[[Rot]]事件，並將其疊加到該敵人。
all_cards.real_text:
Limit 1 per deck.
[fast] Choose a non-[[Elite]] enemy at any location and exhaust Rod of Carnamagos: Reveal 5 random chaos tokens from the chaos bag. If a [curse] token is revealed, search your bonded cards for a random [[Rot]] event and attach it to that enemy.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 遺物. 密教. 詛咒縈繞

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 深淵腐蝕
all_cards.text: 綁定(卡納瑪戈斯的權杖) 被疊加的敵人不能攻擊。 強制 - 在被疊加的敵人離場時：將深淵腐蝕放在一邊，位於場外。
all_cards.real_text: Bonded (Rod of Carnamagos). Attached enemy cannot attack. Forced - When attached enemy leaves play: Set Abyssal Rot aside, out of play.
all_cards.traits: 法術. 腐爛. 詛咒縈繞

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 珀色腐蝕
all_cards.text: 綁定(卡納瑪戈斯的權杖) 強制 - 在被疊加的敵人被擊敗時：獲得等同於其印刷生命值數量的資源(最多5)。 強制 - 在被疊加的敵人離場時：將珀色腐蝕放在一邊，位於場外。
all_cards.real_text: Bonded (Rod of Carnamagos). Forced - When attached enemy is defeated: Gain resources equal to its printed health (to a maximum of 5). Forced - When attached enemy leaves play: Set Aember Rot aside, out of play.
all_cards.traits: 法術. 腐爛. 詛咒縈繞

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 虛弱腐蝕
all_cards.text: 綁定(卡納瑪戈斯的權杖) 被疊加的敵人-1攻擊和-1躲避。 強制 - 在被疊加的敵人離場時：將虛弱腐蝕放在一邊，位於場外。
all_cards.real_text: Bonded (Rod of Carnamagos). Attached enemy gets -1 fight and -1 evade. Forced - When attached enemy leaves play: Set Putrescent Rot aside, out of play.
all_cards.traits: 法術. 腐爛. 詛咒縈繞

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 猩紅腐蝕
all_cards.text: 綁定(卡納瑪戈斯的權杖) 強制 - 當本輪結束時：被疊加的敵人受到1點傷害。 強制 - 在被疊加的敵人離場時：將猩紅腐蝕放在一邊，位於場外。
all_cards.real_text: Bonded (Rod of Carnamagos). Forced - At the end of the round: Attached enemy takes 1 damage. Forced - When attached enemy leaves play: Set Scarlet Rot aside, out of play.
all_cards.traits: 法術. 腐爛. 詛咒縈繞

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 邪綠腐蝕
all_cards.text: 綁定(卡納瑪戈斯的權杖) 被疊加的敵人不能移動。 強制 - 在被疊加的敵人離場時：將邪綠腐蝕放在一邊，位於場外。
all_cards.real_text: Bonded (Rod of Carnamagos). Attached enemy cannot move. Forced - When attached enemy leaves play: Set Virescent Rot aside, out of play.
all_cards.traits: 法術. 腐爛. 詛咒縈繞

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 洪荒聖歌
all_cards.text:
作為打出洪荒聖歌的額外費用，花費一個行動。
揭示遭遇牌堆頂部的5張卡牌。對於每張揭示的卡牌，你可以加入1個[curse]標記到混亂袋來將該卡牌放到遭遇牌堆底部。 將剩餘卡牌任意順序返回遭遇牌堆頂部 。
all_cards.real_text:
As an additional cost to play Antediluvian Hymn, spend an action.
Reveal the top 5 cards of the encounter deck. For each card revealed, you may add 1 [curse] token to the chaos bag to place that card on the bottom of the encounter deck. Return the rest to the top of the encounter deck in any order.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 醉人誘引
all_cards.text: 投入此卡牌到技能檢定的時候，執行的調查員可以忽略這次檢定期間將要觸發的所有關鍵詞或地點效果。
all_cards.real_text: While this card is committed to a skill test, the performing investigator may ignore all keyword or location effects that would trigger during this test.
all_cards.flavor: 幻夢的識海跟任何海洋一般深沉。

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 卡納瑪戈斯的權杖
all_cards.text: [fast]選擇任意地點的一名非[[精英]]敵人並消耗卡納瑪戈斯的權杖：從混亂袋隨機抽出5個混亂標記。每抽出1個[curse]標記，你可以在你的綁定卡牌中查找1張[[腐爛]]事件，並將其疊加到該敵人。
all_cards.real_text: [fast] Choose a non-[[Elite]] enemy at any location and exhaust Rod of Carnamagos: Reveal 5 random chaos tokens from the chaos bag. For each [curse] token revealed, you may search your bonded cards for a [[Rot]] event and attach it to that enemy.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 遺物. 密教. 詛咒縈繞

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 召喚彼方
all_cards.text:
作為打出召喚彼方的額外費用，加入3個[curse]標記到混亂袋。
選擇你控制的一張有"使用(充能)"或"使用(秘密)"的支援卡。補充該支援卡的所有充能或秘密。然後，你可以結算該支援卡上的一個[action]或[fast]能力，無需支付其[action]費用，如果有的話。
all_cards.real_text:
As an additional cost to play Call the Beyond, add 3 [curse] tokens to the chaos bag.
Choose an asset you control with "uses (charges)" or "uses (secrets)". Replenish all of that asset's charges or secrets. Then, you may resolve an [action] or [fast] ability on that asset without paying its [action] cost, if any.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 飄渺靈體
all_cards.text: 躲避。將你的[willpower]值加入你這次躲避的技能值。如果你成功，與每名與你交戰的其於敵人解除交戰，並且本輪接下來的時間裡，你視為無形(敵人不能與你交戰，並且你不能攻擊或對敵人造成傷害)。如果這次躲避期間有抽出符號，當你回合結束時將飄渺靈體返回你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text: Evade. Add your [willpower] value to your skill value for this evasion attempt. If you succeed, disengage from each other enemy engaged with you, and for the remainder of the round, you are ethereal (enemies cannot engage or be engaged with you, and you cannot attack or deal damage to enemies). If a symbol was revealed during this evasion attempt, return Ethereal Form to your hand at the end of your turn.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 解讀秘符
all_cards.text: 調查。將你的[willpower]值加入你這次調查的技能值。你可以忽略這次調查期間將在你所在地點觸發的任意效果或關鍵詞。如果你成功，發現此地點的額外1個線索。如果這次調查期間有抽出符號，當你回合結束時將解讀秘符返回你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text: Investigate. Add your [willpower] value to your skill value for this investigation. You may ignore any effect or keyword on your location which would trigger during this investigation. If you succeed, discover 1 additional clue at this location. If a symbol was revealed during this investigation, return Read the Signs to your hand at the end of your turn.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 幽靈利刃
all_cards.text: 攻擊。將你的[willpower]值加入你這次攻擊的技能值。在這次攻擊前，你可以立即與被攻擊的敵人交戰。這次攻擊造成+1傷害(如果該敵人非[[精英]]，改為+2傷害)。如果這次攻擊期間有抽出符號，當你回合結束時將幽靈利刃返回你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text: Fight. Add your [willpower] value to your skill value for this attack. Immediately before this attack, you may engage the attacked enemy. This attack deals +1 damage (+2 damage instead if the enemy is non-[[Elite]]). If a symbol was revealed during this attack, return Spectral Razor to your hand at the end of your turn.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 以太織法
all_cards.text:
作為打出以太織法的額外費用，花費一個行動。
從你的手牌中揭示最多3張不同的[[法術]]事件卡。一次一張，打出每張揭示的事件，其費用減1。結算這些事件的時候，你+2技能值。
all_cards.real_text:
As an additional cost to play Ethereal Weaving, spend an action.
Reveal up to 3 different [[Spell]] events from your hand. One at a time, play each revealed event, reducing its cost by 1. While resolving each of these events, you get +2 skill value.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 古者封印
all_cards.text:
快速。在你所在地點，且其中抽出了至少2個[curse]標記或2個[bless]標記的技能檢定結束後打出。
如果抽出了2個[curse]標記，在你的綁定卡牌中查找黃銅侍從，並將其放置入場。如果抽出了2個[bless]標記，在你的綁定卡牌中查找門鑰守衛並將其放置入場。如果抽出了2個[curse]標記和2個[bless]標記，改為執行兩者。將古者封印從遊戲中移除。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play after a skill test at your location ends in which at least 2 [curse] tokens or 2 [bless] tokens were revealed.
If 2 [curse] tokens were revealed, search your bonded cards for 1 copy of Servant of Brass and put it into play. If 2 [bless] tokens were revealed, search your bonded cards for Keeper of the Key and put it into play. If 2 [curse] tokens and 2 [bless] tokens were revealed, do both instead. Remove Seal of the Elders from the game.
all_cards.traits: 法術. 契約. 祝福. 詛咒縈繞

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 門鑰守衛
all_cards.text: 綁定(古者封印)。 [reaction]在你所在地點的技能檢定期間抽出一個[bless]標記時：對門鑰守衛造成1點恐懼，並發現你所在地點或連接地點的1個線索。 強制 - 在黃銅侍從將要離場時：將其放在一邊，位於場外。
all_cards.real_text: Bonded (Seal of the Elders). [reaction] When a [bless] token is revealed during a skill test at your location: Deal 1 horror to Keeper of the Key and discover 1 clue at your location or a connecting location. Forced - When Keeper of the Key would leave play: Set it aside, out of play.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 黃銅侍從
all_cards.text: 綁定(古者封印)。 [reaction]在你所在地點的技能檢定期間抽出一個[curse]標記時：對黃銅侍從造成1點傷害，並對你所在地點或連接地點的一名敵人造成2點傷害。 強制 - 在黃銅侍從將要離場時：將其放在一邊，位於場外。
all_cards.real_text: Bonded (Seal of the Elders). [reaction] When a [curse] token is revealed during a skill test at your location: Deal 1 damage to Servant of Brass and 2 damage to an enemy at your location or a connecting location. Forced - When Servant of Brass would leave play: Set it aside, out of play.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 精心策畫的誘敵
all_cards.text:
作為打出精心策畫的誘敵的額外費用，花費一個行動。打出精心策畫的誘敵不會引起趁亂攻擊。
對於你所在地點與連接地點的每名敵人，選擇以下一項：
- 如果該敵人非[[精英]]，自動躲避該敵人。
- 對該敵人造成1點傷害。
all_cards.real_text: As an additional cost to play Elaborate Distraction, spend an action. Playing Elaborate Distraction does not provoke attacks of opportunity. For each enemy at your location and at each connecting location (choose one): - Automatically evade that enemy if it is non-[[Elite]]. - Deal 1 damage to that enemy.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: "惡魔"
all_cards.text: 強制 - 在你的回合開始時：將你調查員上的1點傷害移動到"惡魔"上。 強制 - 在"惡魔"被擊敗時：對你所在地點的每名敵人和每位調查員各造成2點傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Forced - When your turn begins: Move 1 damage from your investigator to "Devil". Forced - When "Devil" is defeated: Deal 2 damage to each enemy and investigator at your location.
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 生物. 詛咒縈繞
all_cards.flavor: 我會指引你。

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 消防斧
all_cards.text: 快速。 [action]：攻擊。如果你的資源池裡沒有資源，這次攻擊造成+1傷害。 [free]在使用消防斧攻擊期間，花費1資源：這次技能檢定中你+2[combat]。(每次攻擊限制三次。)
all_cards.real_text: Fast. [action]: Fight. If you have no resources in your resource pool, this attack deals +1 damage. [fast] During an attack using Fire Axe, spend 1 resource: You get +2 [combat] for this skill test. (Limit three times per attack.)
all_cards.traits: 道具. 武器. 近戰

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 狩獵外套
all_cards.text:
[fast]消耗狩獵外套：選擇你手牌中的1張非弱點卡牌，並將其面朝下疊加到狩獵外套(最多疊加3張卡牌)。然後，每有一張疊加的卡牌，獲得1資源。
[reaction]在狩獵外套被擊敗時：抽取每張疊加的卡牌.
all_cards.real_text:
[fast] Exhaust Hunting Jacket: Choose 1 non-weakness card in your hand and attach it facedown to Hunting Jacket (max 3 cards attached). Then, gain 1 resource for each attached card.
[reaction] When Hunting Jacket is defeated: Draw each attached card.

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 水手的羅盤
all_cards.text: [action]消耗水手的羅盤：調查。如果你失敗，準備水手的羅盤。如果你成功且你的資源池裡沒有資源，發現你所在地點的額外1個線索。 [fast]在使用水手的羅盤調查期間，花費1資源：這次技能檢定中你+1[intellect]。(每次調查限制三次。)
all_cards.real_text: [action] Exhaust Mariner's Compass: Investigate. If you fail, ready Mariner's Compass. If you succeed and have no resources in your resource pool, discover 1 additional clue at your location. [fast] During an investigation using Mariner's Compass, spend 1 resource: You get +1 [intellect] for this skill test. (Limit three times per investigation.)

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 堅守信念
all_cards.text:
快速。在任何[fast]時間段期間打出。
加入4個[bless]標記到混亂袋。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play during any [fast] window.
Add 4 [bless] tokens to the chaos bag.
all_cards.flavor: 行走於信仰之光者無懼黑暗。

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 黑馬
all_cards.text:
永久。每副牌組限制1張。
在補給階段期間，你可以選擇不獲得資源。
只要你的資源池裡沒有資源，你獲得+1[willpower]、+1 [intellect]、+1 [combat]和+1 [agility]。
all_cards.real_text:
Permanent. Limit 1 per deck.
During the upkeep phase, you may choose to not gain resources.
While you have no resources in your resource pool, you get +1 [willpower], +1 [intellect], +1 [combat], and +1 [agility].

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 靜候時機
all_cards.text:
作為打出靜候時機的額外費用，花費一個行動。
在你的下回合期間，你可以進行二個額外行動。
all_cards.real_text:
As an additional cost to play Bide Your Time, spend an action.
During your next turn, you may take two additional actions.
all_cards.flavor: 距離午夜已經過了半小時，你開始懷疑這一切都是個騙局。

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 黎明之星
all_cards.text:
快速。在你所在地點的技能檢定期間抽出混亂標記後打出。
忽略這次檢定期間抽出的每個[curse]標記的修正值。每忽略一個[curse]標記，對你所在地點的一名敵人造成1點傷害。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play after revealing chaos tokens during a skill test at your location.
Ignore the modifiers of each [curse] token revealed during this test. For each [curse] token ignored, deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location.
all_cards.flavor: 唯有堅強的心靈可以擊碎黑暗。

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 破碎頭冠
all_cards.text:
每副牌組限制1張。每位調查員限制1[[面具]]。
[reaction]在你所在地點,同時抽出[bless]和[curse]標記的技能檢定結束後：放置1資源在本卡牌上，作為貢品。然後，如果本卡牌上有3貢品，在你的綁定卡牌中查找暮光頭冠，並將其與本卡牌交換，將本卡牌上的所有貢品移動到暮光頭冠上。
all_cards.real_text:
Limit 1 per deck. Limit 1 [[Mask]] per investigator.
[reaction] After a skill test at your location ends in which both a [bless] and [curse] token were revealed: Place 1 resource on this card, as an offering. Then, if there are 3 offerings on this card, search your bonded cards for Twilight Diadem and swap it with this card, moving all offerings from this card to Twilight Diadem.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 守護. 面具

all_cards.pack_name: 鐵杉谷盛宴調查員擴充
all_cards.name: 暮光頭冠
all_cards.text:
綁定(破碎頭冠)。每位調查員限制1[[面具]]。
[reaction]你在技能檢定期間抽出一個[bless]或[curse]標記時，花費1貢品並消耗本卡牌：改為將抽出的標記視為[elder_sign]標記，並將其返回混亂袋。然後，如果本卡牌沒有貢品，在你的綁定卡牌中查找破碎頭冠，並將其與本卡牌交換。
all_cards.real_text:
Bonded (Broken Diadem). Limit 1 [[Mask]] per investigator.
[reaction] When you reveal either a [bless] or [curse] token during a skill test, spend 1 offering and exhaust this card: Treat the revealed token as an [elder_sign] token instead, returning it to the chaos bag. Then, if this card has no offerings, search your bonded cards for Broken Diadem and swap it with this card.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 守護. 面具. 祝福

all_cards.real_text: Revelation - You must either put Back Injury into play in your threat area, or take 1 damage and shuffle it into your deck. It cannot leave play except by the [action] [action] ability below. You get -1 health. [action] [action]: Discard Back Injury.

all_cards.text: 顯現 - 你必須將德茲泰利齊之誓放置入你的威脅區域，或受到1點恐懼並將其混洗入你的牌堆。除非通過以下[action][action]能力，否則其不能離場。 你獲得-1神智值。 [action][action]：丟棄德茲泰利齊之誓。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - You must either put Vow of Drzytelech into play in your threat area, or take 1 horror and shuffle it into your deck. It cannot leave play except by the [action] [action] ability below. You get -1 sanity. [action] [action]: Discard Vow of Drzytelech.

all_cards.name: 雷克斯·墨菲
all_cards.text:
[reaction] 當你將要在你所在地點放置1個線索,或者在混亂袋中加入2個[curse]標記時：改為執行另一項。(這仍然能够滿足一個能力的費用)
[elder_sign]效果：本次检定抽出的每个[curse]標記+2。本次检定每抽出一个[curse]標記，抽一張牌。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] When you would either place 1 of your clues on your location, or add 2 [curse] tokens to the chaos bag: Do the other instead. (This can still satisfy the cost of an ability.)
[elder_sign] effect: +2 for each [curse] token revealed during this test. Draw 1 card for each [curse] token revealed during this test.

deck_options.error: You cannot have more than 5 Rogue cards.

all_cards.flavor: "Oh, come on, not <u>again</u>!"
all_cards.back_text: 卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：探求者([seeker])等級 0-3，[[詛咒縈繞]]和[[局勢]] 卡牌等級0-4, 中立卡牌等級 0-5, 最多5張流浪者([rogue])等級0。 牌組構建需求(不計入卡牌張數)：尋找真相，雷克斯的詛咒，1張隨機基礎弱點。 牌組構建限制：無[[幸運]]或[[祝福]]卡牌(除非它們同時具有[[詛咒縈繞]])。
all_cards.back_flavor: When disaster strikes, Rex Murphy is usually on hand, suffering the consequences. After spending a day with Rex, even the most hardened skeptic will concede that the man is cursed. Anytime he had a lead on a good story, something would go wrong, like that business in Innsmouth with the photographs that blew out to sea. His terrible fortune has more than once exposed him to gruesome beasts and occult conspiracies. To survive, Rex has developed an inquisitive mind, keeping one step ahead of the next disaster.

all_cards.name: 尋找真相
all_cards.text:
雷克斯·墨菲牌組專用。進階。
雷克斯·墨菲每擁有1個線索(最大為5)，你可以選擇一項：
- 抽一張牌。
- 將該線索放置到你所在地點，並將棄牌堆中的任意一張牌返回你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Rex Murphy deck only. Advanced.
For each clue on Rex Murphy (to a maximum of 5) you may either:
- Draw 1 card.
- Place that clue on your location and return any card from your discard pile to your hand.

all_cards.name: 雷克斯的詛咒
all_cards.text: 進階。 顯現 - 將雷克斯的詛咒放置入你的威脅區域。 強制 - 在你將要技能檢定成功時：額外抽取1個新標記。如果這個效果導致你檢定失敗，將雷克斯的詛咒與你的牌堆混洗。(每次檢定限制1次。)
all_cards.real_text: Advanced. Revelation - Put Rex's Curse into play in your threat area. Forced - When you would succeed at a skill test: Reveal an additional chaos token. If this effect causes you to fail the test, shuffle Rex's Curse into your deck. (Limit once per test.)

all_cards.name: Jenny Barnes
all_cards.text:
[reaction] After your turn begins: Play a [[Talent]] asset, reducing its cost by 1.
[fast] Discard a [[Talent]] asset you control: Gain resources equal to that asset's printed cost. (Limit 5 resources per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +0. If you succeed, gain 3 resources.
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] After your turn begins: Play a [[Talent]] asset, reducing its cost by 1.
[fast] Discard a [[Talent]] asset you control: Gain resources equal to that asset's printed cost. (Limit 5 resources per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +0. If you succeed, gain 3 resources.
all_cards.flavor: "Oh honey, I'm making this up as I go along."
all_cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Rogue cards ([rogue]) level 0-3, Neutral cards level 0-5, up to 10 other non-permanent [[Talent]] cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Jenny's Twin .45s, Searching for Izzie, 1 random basic weakness.
all_cards.back_flavor: Jenny Barnes has spent the majority of her young life in pursuit of creature comforts, fine dining, and the latest fashions. That all changed when she received a letter from her sister, Isabelle. In this letter, Isabelle confessed that mysterious forces were aligning against her and that she feared she may fall victim to some paranormal threat. It was the last letter Jenny received from her beloved sister. Jenny has since returned to the States to track down and investigate all occult occurrences she can find. Hardly a wilting flower, she has proven herself a crack shot as well as a fearless and clever investigator of the unknown. Until Isabelle's disappearance is explained, Jenny will never relent in her search.

all_cards.name: Jenny's Twin .45s
all_cards.text: Jenny Barnes deck only. Advanced. Uses (X ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage. [reaction] After you defeat an enemy using the above ability, exhaust Jenny's Twin .45s: Gain resources equal to that enemy's printed health.
all_cards.real_text: Jenny Barnes deck only. Advanced. Uses (X ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage. [reaction] After you defeat an enemy using the above ability, exhaust Jenny's Twin .45s: Gain resources equal to that enemy's printed health.

all_cards.text: Advanced. Revelation - Attach Searching for Izzie to the location farthest from you. Attached location gets +2 shroud. [action] [action]: Investigate. If you succeed, instead of discovering clues, discard Searching for Izzie. Forced - When the game ends, if Searching for Izzie is in play: You suffer 1 mental trauma.
all_cards.real_text: Advanced. Revelation - Attach Searching for Izzie to the location farthest from you. Attached location gets +2 shroud. [action] [action]: Investigate. If you succeed, instead of discovering clues, discard Searching for Izzie. Forced - When the game ends, if Searching for Izzie is in play: You suffer 1 mental trauma.

all_cards.name: Father Mateo
all_cards.text:
[fast] During your turn: Seal a [bless] token on an investigator at your location with no [bless] token sealed on them. (Limit once per round.)
[reaction] When an investigator would reveal a chaos token: Resolve the [bless] token sealed on them instead. Release that token.
[elder_sign] effect: +1. Resolve Father Mateo's [fast] ability, ignoring its limit.
all_cards.real_text:
[fast] During your turn: Seal a [bless] token on an investigator at your location with no [bless] token sealed on them. (Limit once per round.)
[reaction] When an investigator would reveal a chaos token: Resolve the [bless] token sealed on them instead. Release that token.
[elder_sign] effect: +1. Resolve Father Mateo's [fast] ability, ignoring its limit.
all_cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Mystic cards ([mystic]) level 0-3, [[Blessed]] cards level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5, up to 5 other cards with "seal" level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): The Codex of Ages, Serpents of Yig, 1 random basic weakness.
all_cards.back_flavor: Mateo Castile's life has not been easy since he became a priest. Recent decades in Mexico have been wracked with instability and conflict. Father Mateo struggled to balance his faith with the pragmatic concerns of preaching when the law told him he must not. But this is not what has assaulted Mateo's faith at its core. The nearby murders and kidnappings were not politically motivated, as he had suspected. A gruesome and horrid cult thrives at the heart of the brewing war. How, Mateo wonders, could a kind and loving God allow what he saw that night to exist?

all_cards.name: The Codex of Ages
all_cards.text:
Father Mateo deck only. Advanced. Seal ([elder_sign] or up to 3 [bless]).
You get +1 to each of your skills while there is a token sealed here.
[reaction] When an investigator at your location would reveal a chaos token from the chaos bag: That investigator resolves a token sealed here instead, then releases that token. (Limit once per test.)
all_cards.real_text:
Father Mateo deck only. Advanced. Seal ([elder_sign] or up to 3 [bless]).
You get +1 to each of your skills while there is a token sealed here.
[reaction] When an investigator at your location would reveal a chaos token from the chaos bag: That investigator resolves a token sealed here instead, then releases that token. (Limit once per test.)

all_cards.name: Serpents of Yig
all_cards.text: Advanced. Prey - Father Mateo only. Hunter. Revelation - Search the chaos bag and all play areas for the [elder_sign] token and each [bless] token and seal them on Serpents of Yig.
all_cards.real_text: Advanced. Prey - Father Mateo only. Hunter. Revelation - Search the chaos bag and all play areas for the [elder_sign] token and each [bless] token and seal them on Serpents of Yig.

all_cards.name: 喬治‧巴納比
all_cards.text:
你的手牌上限等於喬治‧巴納比底下面朝下卡牌的數量。(限制5張卡牌。)
你可以將喬治‧巴納比底下面朝下的卡牌投入技能檢定，如同其在你的手牌中。
[reaction]在你從手牌中丟棄一張卡牌後：將其面朝下放置到喬治‧巴納比底下，然後抽取1張卡牌。(每階段限制一次)。
[elder_sign]效果：+1。抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Your max hand size is equal to the number of facedown cards beneath George Barnaby. (Limit 5 cards.)
You may commit facedown cards beneath George Barnaby to skill tests as if they were in your hand.
[reaction] After you discard a card from your hand: Place it facedown beneath George Barnaby, then draw 1 card. (Limit once per phase.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1. Draw 1 card.
all_cards.back_text: 牌組卡牌張數：35。 牌組構建選項：求生者卡牌([survivor])等級0-5，中立卡牌等級0-5，最多10張其它的探求者和/或流浪者卡牌([seeker]/[rogue])等級0。 牌組構建需求(不計入牌組卡牌張數)：3張冷酷決斷、漂流、1張隨機基礎弱點。 額外設置:在抽取你的起始手牌後，你可以從你的手牌中將任意數量的卡牌面朝下放置到喬治‧巴納比底下。
all_cards.back_flavor: 喬治‧巴納比在他19歲時進入監獄度過了一個月，在這之後他覺得自己有必要成為一名律師。他在事業上取得了巨大的成功，也因此聲名狼藉，在鄰近退休時，他計畫與妻子瑪莉亞一起環遊世界。然而，就在他退休的前夕，他的家遭到襲擊，瑪莉亞被異教徒殺害。現在，喬治憑藉著他過去醫生的財富和人脈，追蹤罪魁禍首來到阿卡姆，發誓要將他們繩之以法，為他們可怕的罪刑伸張正義。

all_cards.name: 冷酷決斷
all_cards.text:
喬治‧巴納比牌組專用。
在這次技能檢定結算後，你可以將喬治‧巴納比底下任意數量的卡牌與你手牌中相同數量的非弱點卡牌交換。
all_cards.real_text:
George Barnaby deck only.
After this skill test resolves, you may swap any number of cards beneath George Barnaby with the same number of non-weakness cards in your hand.

all_cards.name: 漂流
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 如果喬治‧巴納比底下沒有卡牌，將漂流混洗入你的牌堆。否則，丟棄喬治‧巴納比底下的每張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - If there are no cards beneath George Barnaby, shuffle Cast Adrift into your deck. Otherwise, discard each card beneath George Barnaby.

all_cards.name: 瑪麗恩‧塔瓦雷斯
all_cards.text:
你少1個手部槽位。
[reaction]你在你的回合期間打出事件卡後：抽取1張卡牌。然後，你可以打出一張不同的事件卡。(每輪限制一次。)
[elder_sign]效果：+1。在你牌堆頂部3張卡牌中查找並抽取一張事件卡。混洗你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text:
You have 1 fewer hand slots.
[reaction] After you play an event during your turn: Draw 1 card. Then, you may play a different event. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1. Search the top 3 cards of your deck for an event and draw it. Shuffle your deck.
all_cards.flavor: "人們依賴我完成我的工作。水裡的幾條怪魚並無法改變這一點。"
all_cards.back_text: 牌組卡牌張數：30。 屬性選擇：當牌組構建時，選擇以下一個屬性：[[幸運]]、[[局勢]]或[[臨時製品]]。 牌組構建選項: 守衛者卡牌([guardian]) 等級0-5，中立卡牌等級0-5，你所選[[屬性]]的事件卡等級0-2，最多5張其它求生者卡牌([survivor])等級0。 牌組構建需求(不計入牌組卡牌張數)：2張充滿決心、"我會自己來"、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 在她父親去世後，瑪麗恩從納拉甘西特海灣搬到阿卡姆。她和朋友安妮莉絲‧泰勒一起買了一艘船，兩人在這座城市的漁民社區找到了新的家園。在一個風雨交加的海上之夜，安妮莉絲被一個奇怪的魚狀生物拉到水中。瑪麗恩跳入水中，從那生物的口中救出了安妮莉絲，但代價是瑪麗恩失去了右臂。從那以後，她一直警惕著大西洋波濤洶湧的海域和潛藏其中的奇怪生物。

all_cards.name: 充滿決心
all_cards.text:
瑪麗恩‧塔瓦雷斯牌組專用。
如果這次技能檢定是你打出的事件卡的檢定且檢定成功，你可以不丟棄充滿決心，改為將其返回你的手牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Marion Tavares deck only.
If this skill test is successful and it is on an event you played, you may return Determined to your hand instead of discarding it.

all_cards.name: "我會自己來"
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 將"我會自己來"放置入你的威脅區域。 作為你打出事件卡的額外費用，受到1點恐懼。 [fast]從你的手牌丟棄3張事件卡：丟棄"我會自己來"。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Put "I'll do it myself" into play in your threat area. As an additional cost for you to play an event, take 1 horror. [fast] Discard 3 events from your hand: Discard "I'll do it myself."

all_cards.name: 盧修斯‧加洛維
all_cards.text:
[reaction]在你成功躲避敵人並超過難度至少2點後：發現你所在地點的1個線索。(每輪限制一次。)
[elder_sign]效果：你所在地點每有一名敵人，+1。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] After you successfully evade an enemy by 2 or more: Discover 1 clue at your location. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1 for each enemy at your location.
all_cards.flavor: "我只是很高興我所有的夢都留在我的腦海裡。"
all_cards.back_text: 牌組卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：探求者卡牌([seeker])等級0-5，流浪者卡牌([rogue])等級0-2，中立卡牌等級0-5。 牌組構建需求(不計入牌組卡牌張數)：詩文之書、洪災之夢、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 盧修斯是在紐約長大的南方移居者，他與哈萊姆區的知識份子、藝術家和音樂家一起創作夢境般的詩歌，並因此聲名大噪。與他相同時代的人們不知道的是，盧修斯描述的朦朧水下城市的靈感並非來自紐約，而是來自他失蹤的夥伴魯迪的惡夢。魯迪失蹤前曾經說過，在阿卡姆有一個由入夢者組成的小團體，他們分享者這些令人不安的夢境。現在，盧修斯在米斯卡塔尼克大學擔任客座講師，他在尋找失去的愛人，或許他也在尋找自己恐怖夢境的源頭……

all_cards.name: 詩文之書
all_cards.text:
盧修斯‧加洛維牌組專用。
使用(1靈感)。每輪第一次你發現線索時，補充此靈感。
[reaction]在技能檢定期間抽出混亂標記後，花費1靈感：這次技能檢定你+1技能值。如果你成功且正好等於難度，抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Lucius Galloway deck only.
Uses (1 inspiration). Replenish this inspiration the first time you discover a clue each round.
[reaction] After revealing chaos tokens during a skill test, spend 1 inspiration: You get +1 skill value for this skill test. If you succeed by exactly 0, draw 1 card.

all_cards.name: 洪災之夢
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 將洪災之夢放置入你的威脅區域。 強制 - 你在你的回合期間第一次發現線索時：受到1點恐懼並將洪災之夢混洗入你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Put Dreams of the Flood into play in your threat area. Forced - The first time you discover 1 or more clues during your turn: Take 1 horror and shuffle Dreams of the Flood into your deck.

all_cards.name: 阿加莎‧克雷恩
all_cards.text:
[reaction]在你的回合結束時，如果本輪你封印、取消或忽略過至少1個混亂標記：從你的棄牌堆打出一張[[法術]]或[[洞察]]事件卡。在該事件卡結算後，將其從遊戲中移除。
[elder_sign]效果：+2。你可以取消此標記並為此抽取另一個標記。如果你這麼做，抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] When your turn ends, if you sealed, canceled, or ignored 1 or more chaos tokens this round: Play a [[Spell]] or [[Insight]] event from your discard pile. After that event resolves, remove it from the game.
[elder_sign] effect: +2. You may cancel this token and draw another in its place. If you do, draw 1 card.
all_cards.traits: 米斯卡塔尼克. 學者
all_cards.back_text: 牌組卡牌張數：35。 牌組構建選項：探求者卡牌([seeker])等級0-5，中立卡牌等級0-5，[[洞察]]事件卡等級0-3，最多10張其它潛修者卡牌([mystic])等級0。 牌組構建需求(不計入牌組卡牌張數)：暗眼之鏡、窺視虛空、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 阿加莎‧克雷恩擁有數學和心理學學位，並總是種是以證據為基礎的科學。在她年輕的時候，她對那些鬼故事不屑一顧，但越來越多的證據讓阿加莎得出結論，阿卡姆歷史上流傳的怪物和魔法的故事，的確是真實存在的。如果這些東西是真的，那麼它們就必須遵守一致的規則。任何人只要聽得夠久，她將會解釋這個新的研究領域叫做"超心理學"，她的丈夫威爾伯也聽過很多次了。阿加莎試圖用久經驗證的科學方法來位神秘和理性、神祕學和科學之間搭建起跨越鴻溝的橋樑。

all_cards.name: 阿加莎‧克雷恩
all_cards.text:
[reaction]在你的回合結束時，如果本輪你封印、取消或忽略過至少1個混亂標記：從你的棄牌堆打出一張[[法術]]或[[洞察]]事件卡。在該事件卡結算後，將其從遊戲中移除。
