all_cards.name: 暗眼之鏡
all_cards.text: 阿加莎‧克雷恩牌組專用。 [reaction]在你技能檢定成功後，如果沒有標記被封印在此：封印這次技能檢定期間抽出的一個非符號標記在暗眼之鏡上。(每階段限制一次)。 強制 - 在你將要從混亂袋抽出一個標記時：改為結算封印在此的標記，然後釋放該標記。
all_cards.real_text: Agatha Crane deck only. [reaction] After you succeed at a skill test, if no tokens are sealed here and you did not release a token from Ocula Obscura during this skill test: Seal a non-symbol token revealed during this skill test on Ocula Obscura. (Limit once per phase.) Forced - When you would reveal a token from the chaos bag: Resolve the token sealed here instead, then release that token.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 工具. 科學

all_cards.name: 窺視虛空
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 將窺視虛空放置入你的威脅區域。 每次技能檢定期間你第一次抽出至少1個混亂標記時，你必須抽出額外1個混亂標記 (並結算其效果)。 [action]：將窺視虛空 混洗入你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Put Glimpse the Void into play in your threat area. The first time you reveal 1 or more chaos tokens during each skill test, you must reveal 1 additional chaos token (and resolve its effects). [action]: Shuffle Glimpse the Void into your deck.

all_cards.name: 邁克爾‧麥克格林
all_cards.text:
[reaction]在你從一張[[槍械]]支援卡花費至少1子彈後：獲得1資源。(每輪每張[[槍械]]支援卡限制一次。)
[elder_sign]效果：+2。你可以將1子彈放到你控制的[[槍械]]支援卡上。
all_cards.real_text:
[reaction] After you spend 1 or more ammo from a [[Firearm]] asset: Gain 1 resource. (Limit once per [[Firearm]] asset per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +2. You may place 1 ammo on a [[Firearm]] asset you control.
all_cards.flavor: "管它是不是神。如果它和我作對，就一定會後悔。"
all_cards.back_text: 牌組卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：流浪者卡牌([rogue]) 等級0-3，中立卡牌等級0-5，屬性或文字框中帶有[[槍械]]字樣的卡牌等級0-5。 牌組構建需求(不計入牌組卡牌張數)："中提琴"盒、充公沒收、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 邁克爾‧麥克格林是一位沉默寡言的人。他無須多說什麼；因為他身邊有快槍手路易斯。他們兩位是歐巴尼恩最強的戰士，確保幫派在整個阿卡姆都受到尊重……直到那天晚上，河流裡的東西把路易斯從碼頭上拖了下去，在水底把他撕成碎片。邁克爾以為當他告訴老大們發生了什麼事情的時候，老大們會認為他瘋了，但事實更糟：他們告訴他，他們相信並讓這件事就這樣過去。但邁克爾不能讓他拍檔的死、或那晚他看到的東西，就這樣不了了之。他仍是一位沉默寡言的人。現在他將用他的槍來說話。

all_cards.name: "中提琴"盒
all_cards.text:
邁克爾‧麥克格林 牌組專用。
你擁有額外2個手部槽位，只能用來放置[[槍械]]支援卡。
[reaction]在你打出"中提琴"盒後：在你牌堆頂部9張卡牌中查找一張[[槍械]]支援卡，並將其加入你的手牌。混洗你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text:
Michael McGlen deck only.
You have 2 additional hand slots, which can only be used to hold [[Firearm]] assets.
[reaction] After you play "Viola" Case: Search the top 9 cards of your deck for a [[Firearm]] asset and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck.

all_cards.name: 充公沒收
all_cards.text: 顯現 - 將你的玩家區域中的每張[[槍械]]支援卡混洗入你的牌堆。如果沒有支援卡因此效果被混洗入你的牌堆，受到1點傷害並將充公沒收混洗回你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text: Revelation - Shuffle each [[Firearm]] asset in your play area into your deck. If no asset was shuffled into your deck by this effect, take 1 damage and shuffle Confiscation back into your deck.
all_cards.flavor: "你，呃……是要去打獵嗎？麥克格林先生？"

all_cards.name: 歌莉婭‧戈德堡
all_cards.text:
神話階段期間由你選擇調查員順序。
[reaction]在你查看遭遇牌堆至少1張卡牌時：查看額外1張卡牌並從中選擇1張非[[精英]]卡牌。將其丟棄、放到遭遇牌堆頂，或面朝下放置到歌莉婭‧戈德堡底下(在她底下最多3張卡牌)。
[elder_sign]效果：+1。查看遭遇牌堆頂部的卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
You choose the investigator order during the mythos phase.
[reaction] When you look at 1 or more cards from the encounter deck: Look at 1 additional card and choose 1 non-[[Elite]] card among them. Either discard it, put it on top of the encounter deck, or place it facedown beneath Gloria Goldberg (max 3 cards beneath her).
[elder_sign] effect: +1. Look at the top card of the encounter deck.
all_cards.back_text: 牌組卡牌張數：30。 次級職階選擇：當牌組構建時，選擇守衛者([guardian])、探求者([seeker])或流浪者([rogue])。 牌組構建選項：潛修者卡牌([mystic])等級0-5，中立卡牌等級0-5，最多10張你所選次級職階的等級0-1事件卡和/或技能卡。 牌組構建需求(不計入牌組卡牌張數)：3張心靈感受性、3張末日預言(混洗入遭遇牌堆)、1張隨機基礎弱點。
all_cards.back_flavor: 在她年幼時，歌莉婭被可怕的幻象所困擾。經過看了多年的醫生之後，她學會了透過寫故事來忘卻這些幻象。她怪異而令人不安的小說不知何故地深入人心，並使她成為一位暢銷書作家。但在她拜訪阿卡姆時，她經歷了有生以來最強烈的幻象。天空被撕裂開來，一隻醜陋的怪物憑空湧出。不知道為什麼，歌莉婭知道這個幻象是真實的，如果她不做點什麼，它就會變成現實。

all_cards.name: 心靈感受性
all_cards.text:
歌莉婭‧戈德堡牌組專用。
快速。在任意地點的調查員抽取一張與歌莉婭‧戈德堡底下的遭遇卡同名的遭遇卡時打出。
取消該卡牌的所有效果並丟棄這兩張卡牌。然後，抽取1張卡牌。
all_cards.real_text:
Gloria Goldberg deck only.
Fast. Play when an investigator at any location draws an encounter card, if there is a copy of that encounter card beneath Gloria Goldberg.
Cancel all of that card's effects and discard both copies of it. Then, draw 1 card.

all_cards.real_text: Surge. all_cards.real_text: You get +1 [combat]. [fast] Exhaust Robert Castaigne: Fight. Reveal a [[Firearm]] asset that takes up 1 or fewer hand slots from your hand. Resolve a Fight ability on the revealed asset, ignoring all costs. Then, you may either discard the revealed asset to draw 1 card, or play that asset (paying its cost).

all_cards.name: "你見過更糟的…"
all_cards.text:
快速。在你所在地點或連接地點的一名調查員受到傷害和/或恐懼時打出。
該調查員可以給你最多5資源。本效果每給你1資源，該調查員取消剛剛受到的1點傷害或1點恐懼。
all_cards.real_text:
Fast. Play when an investigator at your location or a connecting location is dealt damage and/or horror.
That investigator may give you up to 5 resources. For each resource given by this effect, that investigator cancels 1 damage or 1 horror just dealt.

all_cards.name: 沉睡者之息
all_cards.text: 使用(9充能)。 [action]：攻擊。這次檢定不使用使用你的[combat]，改為使用你的[willpower]。在這次檢定抽出混亂標記前，你可以花費最多3充能來額外抽出同等數量的混亂標記。選擇其中1個抽出的標記結算並忽略其餘標記。如果你成功且所選標記與一個被忽略的標記相符，這次攻擊造成+2傷害。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (9 charges). [action]: Fight. Use your [willpower] instead of your [combat] for this test. Before revealing chaos tokens for this test, you may spend up to 3 charges to reveal that many additional chaos tokens. Choose 1 of the revealed tokens to resolve and ignore the rest. If you succeed and the chosen token matches an ignored token, this attack deals +2 damage.

all_cards.name: 入夢者之眼
all_cards.text: 使用(9充能)。 [action]：調查。這次檢定不使用你的[intellect]，改為使用你的[willpower]。在這次檢定抽出混亂標記前，你可以花費最多3充能來額外抽出同等數量的混亂標記。選擇其中1個抽出的標記結算並忽略其餘標記。如果你成功且所選標記與一個被忽略的標記相符，發現你所在地點的額外1個線索。
all_cards.real_text: Uses (9 charges). [action]: Investigate. Use your [willpower] instead of your [intellect] for this test. Before revealing chaos tokens for this test, you may spend up to 3 charges to reveal that many additional chaos tokens. Choose 1 of the revealed tokens to resolve and ignore the rest. If you succeed and the chosen token matches an ignored token, discover 1 additional clue at your location.

all_cards.name: 卡塔蓮娜‧索伊卡
all_cards.text: [reaction]你在你執行的技能檢定期間抽出混亂標記時，消耗卡塔蓮娜‧索伊卡：從混亂袋抽出標記，直到抽出一個帶有符號的標記。結算該標記並忽略其餘標記。
all_cards.real_text: [reaction] When you would reveal a chaos token during a skill test you are performing, exhaust Katarina Sojka: Reveal tokens from the chaos bag until a token with a symbol is revealed. Resolve that token and ignore the rest.
all_cards.traits: 盟友. 預知. 入夢者

all_cards.name: 賽羅塔夫手勢
all_cards.text: 多重。封印([skull]、[cultist]、[tablet]或[elder_thing])。使用(3充能)。 強制 - 在你的回合開始時：你必須花費1充能，或丟棄賽羅塔夫手勢。 [fast]從你的手牌丟棄一張賽羅塔夫手勢：補充此賽羅塔夫手勢上的所有充能。
all_cards.real_text: Myriad. Seal ([skull], [cultist], [tablet], or [elder_thing]). Uses (3 charges). Forced - When your turn begins: You must spend 1 charge or discard Sign of Xelotaph. [fast] Discard a copy of Sign of Xelotaph from your hand: Replenish all charges on this copy of Sign of Xelotaph.

all_cards.name: 幽冥之盾
all_cards.text: 快速。只能在你的回合期間打出。疊加到你所在地點帶有生命值和/或神智值的玩家卡。 強制 - 在疊加卡牌受到傷害/恐懼時：取消1點該傷害/恐懼。幽冥之盾的所有者必須從其控制的支援卡移除1充能。如果其不能，丟棄幽冥之盾。
all_cards.real_text: Fast. Play only during your turn. Attach to a player card with health and/or sanity at your location. Forced - When attached card takes 1 or more damage/horror: Cancel 1 of that damage/horror. The owner of Spectral Shield must remove 1 charge from an asset they control. If they cannot, discard Spectral Shield.

all_cards.name: 劍杖
all_cards.text: 快速。 [reaction]在劍杖入場後：你可以對與你交戰的一名敵人造成1點傷害。立即觸發以下"[action]"能力，無須支付其費用。 [action]消耗劍杖：攻擊/躲避。 這次攻擊或躲避你可以不使用你的[combat]或[agility]，改為使用你的[willpower]，並且這次檢定你+1技能值。
all_cards.real_text: Fast. [reaction] After Sword Cane enters play: You may deal 1 damage to an enemy engaged with you. Immediately trigger the "[action]" ability below without paying its cost. [action] Exhaust Sword Cane: Fight/Evade. You may use your [willpower] in place of your [combat] or [agility] for this attack or evasion attempt and you get +1 skill value for this test.
all_cards.traits: 道具. 遺物. 武器. 近戰

每次技能檢定最多投入1張。

all_cards.real_text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
If this skill test is successful during an investigation, place up to 3 charges and/or secrets on assets controlled by investigators at your location.

all_cards.real_text: Permanent. Exceptional. When you purchase this card, choose a non-signature [[Spell]] asset in your deck and record [spell's name] was branded in your campaign log. This is your branded spell. Your deck cannot include more than 1 copy of your branded spell. [reaction] Before you draw your opening hand: Search your deck for your branded spell and play it (paying its cost).

all_cards.name: 褻瀆神像
all_cards.text: 只能從你的棄牌堆打出褻瀆神像。 強制 - 在褻瀆神像被擊敗時：不將其丟棄，改為將其混洗入你的牌堆。
all_cards.real_text: Profane Idol can only be played from your discard pile. Forced - When Profane Idol is defeated: Shuffle it into your deck instead of discarding it.

all_cards.name: "接住！"

all_cards.real_text: As an additional cost to play "Catch!", choose and discard an [[Item]] asset that takes up at least 1 hand slot from your hand or play area. Evade. You get +X [agility] for this evasion attempt, where X is the chosen asset's printed resource cost. If you succeed against a non-[[Elite]] enemy and that asset was in your play area, that enemy does not ready during the next upkeep phase.

all_cards.name: 非常規手段
all_cards.text: 作為打出非常規手段的額外費用，從你的手牌或玩家區域選擇並丟棄一張佔用至少1個手部槽位的[[道具]]支援卡。 調查。這次調查你+X[intellect]，其中X為所選支援卡的打印資源費用。如果你成功且該支援卡曾在你的玩家區域中，發現你所在地點的額外1個線索。
all_cards.real_text: As an additional cost to play Unconventional Method, choose and discard an [[Item]] asset that takes up at least 1 hand slot from your hand or play area. Investigate. You get +X [intellect] for this investigation, where X is the chosen asset's printed resource cost. If you succeed and that asset was in your play area, discover 1 additional clue at your location.

all_cards.real_text: Myriad. A Glimmer of Hope can only be played from your discard pile. Add all copies of A Glimmer of Hope in your discard pile to your hand (including this copy).

all_cards.real_text:
Commit only to a skill test with no other cards committed to it. Other cards cannot be committed to this skill test.
Last Chance loses [wild] for each card in your hand. If this test is successful while Last Chance is committed to it, draw 2 cards.

Campaign mode only. Permanent. Limit 1 per deck. Purchase only at deck creation.
When you purchase this card, gain 10 experience.
For the remainder of the campaign, you cannot earn experience.

all_cards.real_text:

[[藝術家]]，[[預知]]，[[入夢者]]，[[藝人]]牌組專用。

[reaction]在你從遭遇牌堆抽取一張非弱點詭計卡時，將脫陶之夢從遊戲中移除：取消其顯現效果並將其丟棄。

[[Artist]], [[Clairvoyant]], [[Dreamer]], [[Performer]] deck only.

all_cards.back_flavor: Lola had assumed that her days of performing The King in Yellow were behind her. Recently, however, she has heard a lone violin play the haunting melody from the show's last production. The music creeps into her mind in moments of silence and solitude, and she's compelled to visit the Ward Theatre one last time.

all_cards.name: Daniela Reyes
all_cards.text: [reaction] After an enemy attacks an investigator at your location: Fight that enemy (using either a basic fight action or a Fight ability on a card). (Limit once per round.) [elder_sign] effect: +1. Deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location.

all_cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Guardian cards ([guardian]) level 0-5, Survivor cards ([survivor]) level 0-2, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Daniela's Wrench, In Harm's Way, 1 random basic weakness.
all_cards.back_flavor: Daniela worked hard to make a name for herself as a mechanic. She'd only just paid off her new garage when Arkham was devastated by a cataclysmic flood, sending her business quite literally underwater. Rather than mope, she rolled up her sleeves, like always, and got back to work. Now she works an extra shift tuning up engines at the new meat-packing factories. But she's started to hear talk about strange things going on in the waterfront district: locals gone missing; corpses drained of blood; and rumors of a shadowy figure that stalks the alleys at night. Daniela knows better than to dismiss these strange happenings as mere circumstance. Whatever it is, she intends to be ready.

all_cards.text: Daniela Reyes deck only. [fast] Exhaust Daniela's Wrench: Choose an enemy at your location. That enemy engages you and makes an immediate attack. [action]: Fight ([combat]). You get +2 [combat] for this attack. If this enemy attacked you this round, this attack deals +1 damage.
all_cards.real_text: Daniela Reyes deck only. [fast] Exhaust Daniela's Wrench: Choose an enemy at your location. That enemy engages you and makes an immediate attack. [action]: Fight ([combat]). You get +2 [combat] for this attack. If this enemy attacked you this round, this attack deals +1 damage.

all_cards.name: Joe Diamond
all_cards.text:
[reaction] After you successfully investigate: Draw 1 card. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1. If you succeed, draw 1 card and gain 1 resource.

all_cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Seeker cards ([seeker]) level 0-5, Guardian cards ([guardian]) level 0-2, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Detective's Intuition, Dead Ends, 1 random basic weakness.
all_cards.back_flavor: Joe Diamond has more experience with supernatural nonsense than most. He has developed a keen intuition and a knack for getting to the bottom of even the most uncanny occurrences, helped in no small part by his willingness to get his hands dirty. But in recent weeks, even Joe has been hard-pressed to stay on top of his work. His desk is flooded with photos of grisly murders and reports of disappearances: people from all walks of life vanishing without a trace. Joe isn't sure how each of these events is connected, but he's not about to let the case go cold.

all_cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Rogue cards ([rogue]) level 0-5, Seeker cards ([seeker]) level 0-2, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Covert Ops, Black Chamber Operative, 1 random basic weakness.
all_cards.back_flavor: Trish Scarborough enjoyed an exciting and dangerous career as a spy for the Black Chamber. She's no stranger to subterfuge, but never expected to be at the center of her own conspiracy when a new director arrived to run the organization. After a series of increasingly menial missions, she was strongly encouraged to "take time for herself." Suspicious of her director's motives, she dug into the Chamber's records and discovered evidence of corruption going all the way to the top - rumors of an organization known as the Red Coterie working behind the scenes. Framed for leaking sensitive information, she's now on the run and driven to restore her good name.

all_cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Mystic cards ([mystic]) level 0-5, Rogue cards ([rogue]) level 0-2, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): "For my next trick...", The Necronomicon (Drake Translation), 1 random basic weakness.
all_cards.back_flavor: After finding scraps of the dangerous and mysterious Necronomicon while fighting in the Great War, Dexter Drake wasted no small effort in hunting down and translating more pages. At first, his goal was to keep its evil contained. However, Dexter's curiosity drove him to delve deeper into the profane text, tempted by the promise of "true" magic. Dexter is sure he has what it takes to decode the text: he proved his courage in the war and his resourcefulness on stage. But true magic comes at a cost. Will Dexter prove his mastery over the arcane, or will the arcane overpower him?

all_cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Survivor cards ([survivor]) level 0-5, Mystic cards ([mystic]) level 0-2, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Isabelle's Twin .45s, Breaking Point, 1 random basic weakness.
all_cards.back_flavor: Isabelle Barnes has been on the run for as long as she can remember. She finally escaped from the Olmsteads, a family cult who thought of her as the "final piece" for some dark and twisted ritual. She doesn't know what made her so special to the cult. But now, thanks to her sister Jenny, Isabelle is finally free. But freedom comes at a cost. Her sister gave everything to get Isabelle back, and for that, Isabelle intends to make the Olmsteads - and all those who prey on the weak and innocent - pay in blood. Armed with her lost sister's twin .45s, Isabelle can finally turn to face her pursuers head on.

all_cards.name: André Patel
all_cards.text:

all_cards.real_text:

all_cards.flavor: "All the world's my stage."
all_cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Rogue cards ([rogue]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Know the Exit, Know the Line, Know the Scene, Weight of the World, 1 random basic weakness.
all_cards.back_flavor: When André turned 13, his parents scrounged up just enough money to buy him a ticket to the Central Paris Theatre. Enamored by the art form, André quickly became obsessed with the silver screen, working tirelessly to act his way to Hollywood. There, while filming A Cosmic Journey, he experienced inexplicable and world-altering happenings. As the lines between reality and fantasy began to blur in his mind, his peer and friend, Betsy Baxter, suggested a change of scenery. At her recommendation, André packed up and moved to the small town of Arkham, Massachusetts for a much-needed break.

all_cards.flavor: "Our dreams are a window into the hidden truths of not just our minds, but of the universe."
all_cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Seeker cards ([seeker]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Experimental Psychology, Unbroken Web, 1 random basic weakness.
all_cards.back_flavor: Carolyn Fern has listened to her patients share their dreams for years, many so vivid they seem like actual memories. But she never expected to experience such things herself. Visions of dark caves deep beneath the surface of the world, of alien creatures creeping in the shadows, and of thousands of strands of glistening spiderwebs. Is her mind trying to remind her of something she witnessed in her past? A place she went? Or is it trying to warn her of something dangerous, something otherworldly, or even something catastrophic still to come?

all_cards.name: Marie Lambeau
all_cards.text:
[reaction] After damage is placed on Marie Lambeau: Draw 2 cards and discard 1 of them. (Limit once per phase.)
[elder_sign] effect: +0. If you succeed, heal 1 damage.
all_cards.real_text:

all_cards.flavor: "I've got one hell of a showstopper in store for you tonight."
all_cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Mystic cards ([mystic]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Grand-Mère's Charm, Called to Guinée, 1 random basic weakness.
all_cards.back_flavor: When Marie discovered her Grand-Mère's dark and sordid legacy of blood magic, she did her best to ignore it. It was much easier to just sing in the smoky lounges and packed nightclubs of Arkham, and far less dangerous. But then times got tough. As crowds thinned and patrons grew surly, Marie found herself embracing her Grand-Mère's powers to sway her audience, quieting the rowdy ones and enticing the wealthier amongst them to open their wallets. Relying on her dangerous powers increasingly often, Marie felt they were becoming a necessary tool to get through the day. Surely there would be no cost for this newfound power... right?

all_cards.text:
You may take an additional action during your turn, which may only be used to play an event.

all_cards.flavor: "I'm more at home out in the wild than anywhere else."
all_cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Survivor cards ([survivor]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Miguel's Knapsack, Feline Hybrid, 1 random basic weakness.
all_cards.back_flavor: Miguel never thought he'd find himself managing a stockyard. Having left his native Argentina, he has worked tirelessly to save up enough money to bring his husband Guillermo and their daughter Adonia to Arkham. But now his business is at risk; something has been killing the livestock at night, leaving mutilated corpses in its wake. Stranger still, it's not even killing them for food. But Miguel is more than capable of fighting back: he has tracked this mysterious predator into the local woods, intent on catching it once and for all.

all_cards.flavor: "This uniform means something. I'm reminded of that every time I put it on."
all_cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Guardian cards ([guardian]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Becky, Loose Cannon, 1 random basic weakness.
all_cards.back_flavor: While he was working with the Boston Police Department, Tommy thought there was no such thing as real monsters. When he got loaned out to the sleepy river town of Arkham, he learned he couldn't have been more wrong. That was almost a year ago at this point, and despite still being "the new guy," he's pretty sure he's seen far more out on the beat than anyone else on the force. Now he's working hard to prove he's not a laughingstock to the rest of the police department, all while facing off against half the monsters of Arkham. And he's learned that not all monsters have fangs and tentacles.
