cards.back_flavor: 阿加莎‧克雷恩擁有數學和心理學學位，並總是種是以證據為基礎的科學。在她年輕的時候，她對那些鬼故事不屑一顧，但越來越多的證據讓阿加莎得出結論，阿卡姆歷史上流傳的怪物和魔法的故事，的確是真實存在的。如果這些東西是真的，那麼它們就必須遵守一致的規則。任何人只要聽得夠久，她將會解釋這個新的研究領域叫做"超心理學"，她的丈夫威爾伯也聽過很多次了。阿加莎試圖用久經驗證的科學方法來位神秘和理性、神祕學和科學之間搭建起跨越鴻溝的橋樑。

cards.name: 邁克爾‧麥克格林
cards.text:
[reaction]在你從一張[[槍械]]支援卡花費至少1子彈後：獲得1資源。(每輪每張[[槍械]]支援卡限制一次。)
[elder_sign]效果：+2。你可以將1子彈放到你控制的[[槍械]]支援卡上。
cards.real_text:
[reaction] After you spend 1 or more ammo from a [[Firearm]] asset: Gain 1 resource. (Limit once per [[Firearm]] asset per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +2. You may place 1 ammo on a [[Firearm]] asset you control.
cards.flavor: "管它是不是神。如果它和我作對，就一定會後悔。"
cards.back_text: 牌組卡牌張數：30。 牌組構建選項：流浪者卡牌([rogue]) 等級0-3，中立卡牌等級0-5，屬性或文字框中帶有[[槍械]]字樣的卡牌等級0-5。 牌組構建需求(不計入牌組卡牌張數)："中提琴"盒、充公沒收、1張隨機基礎弱點。
cards.back_flavor: 邁克爾‧麥克格林是一位沉默寡言的人。他無須多說什麼；因為他身邊有快槍手路易斯。他們兩位是歐巴尼恩最強的戰士，確保幫派在整個阿卡姆都受到尊重……直到那天晚上，河流裡的東西把路易斯從碼頭上拖了下去，在水底把他撕成碎片。邁克爾以為當他告訴老大們發生了什麼事情的時候，老大們會認為他瘋了，但事實更糟：他們告訴他，他們相信並讓這件事就這樣過去。但邁克爾不能讓他拍檔的死、或那晚他看到的東西，就這樣不了了之。他仍是一位沉默寡言的人。現在他將用他的槍來說話。

cards.name: 歌莉婭‧戈德堡
cards.text:
神話階段期間由你選擇調查員順序。
[reaction]在你查看遭遇牌堆至少1張卡牌時：查看額外1張卡牌並從中選擇1張非[[精英]]卡牌。將其丟棄、放到遭遇牌堆頂，或面朝下放置到歌莉婭‧戈德堡底下(在她底下最多3張卡牌)。
[elder_sign]效果：+1。查看遭遇牌堆頂部的卡牌。
cards.real_text:
You choose the investigator order during the mythos phase.
[reaction] When you look at 1 or more cards from the encounter deck: Look at 1 additional card and choose 1 non-[[Elite]] card among them. Either discard it, put it on top of the encounter deck, or place it facedown beneath Gloria Goldberg (max 3 cards beneath her).
[elder_sign] effect: +1. Look at the top card of the encounter deck.
cards.back_text: 牌組卡牌張數：30。 次級職階選擇：當牌組構建時，選擇守衛者([guardian])、探求者([seeker])或流浪者([rogue])。 牌組構建選項：潛修者卡牌([mystic])等級0-5，中立卡牌等級0-5，最多10張你所選次級職階的等級0-1事件卡和/或技能卡。 牌組構建需求(不計入牌組卡牌張數)：3張心靈感受性、3張末日預言(混洗入遭遇牌堆)、1張隨機基礎弱點。
cards.back_flavor: 在她年幼時，歌莉婭被可怕的幻象所困擾。經過看了多年的醫生之後，她學會了透過寫故事來忘卻這些幻象。她怪異而令人不安的小說不知何故地深入人心，並使她成為一位暢銷書作家。但在她拜訪阿卡姆時，她經歷了有生以來最強烈的幻象。天空被撕裂開來，一隻醜陋的怪物憑空湧出。不知道為什麼，歌莉婭知道這個幻象是真實的，如果她不做點什麼，它就會變成現實。

cards.name: 失落的荷姆克魯斯
cards.text: 不能被選為起始調查員。 你不能從你的牌組加入、移除或升級卡牌。 結算[[法術]]卡牌上的能力的時候你+2技能值。 強制 - 在你被擊敗時：你陣亡。 [elder_sign]效果：+0。抽取1張卡牌。
cards.real_text: Cannot be chosen as a starting investigator. You cannot add, remove, or upgrade cards from your deck. You get +2 skill value while resolving abilities on [[Spell]] cards. Forced - When you are defeated: You are killed. [elder_sign] effect: +0. Draw 1 card.
cards.flavor: 你總是想成為人類。

cards.name: Lola Hayes
cards.text: You begin the game in the Neutral role. You can only play or commit Neutral cards or cards of your current role. Forced - When your turn begins: Switch your role ([guardian], [seeker], [rogue], [mystic], [survivor], or Neutral). [elder_sign] effect: +2. You may switch roles.
cards.real_text: You begin the game in the Neutral role. You can only play or commit Neutral cards or cards of your current role. Forced - When your turn begins: Switch your role ([guardian], [seeker], [rogue], [mystic], [survivor], or Neutral). [elder_sign] effect: +2. You may switch roles.

deck_options.error: You must have at least 6 cards from each faction.

cards.back_text: Deck size: 40. Class Choices: At deck creation, choose 2 classes ([guardian], [seeker], [rogue], [mystic], or [survivor]). Deckbuilding Options: Neutral cards level 0-5, cards from your chosen classes level 0-4, cards from other classes level 0-1. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): 2 copies of Improvisation, 2 copies of Crisis of Identity, 1 random basic weakness. Additional Requirements: Your deck must include at least 6 cards from each class ([guardian], [seeker], [rogue], [mystic], and [survivor]).
cards.back_flavor: Lola had assumed that her days of performing The King in Yellow were behind her. Recently, however, she has heard a lone violin play the haunting melody from the show's last production. The music creeps into her mind in moments of silence and solitude, and she's compelled to visit the Ward Theatre one last time.

cards.name: Daniela Reyes
cards.text: [reaction] After an enemy attacks an investigator at your location: Fight that enemy (using either a basic fight action or a Fight ability on a card). (Limit once per round.) [elder_sign] effect: +1. Deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location.
cards.real_text: [reaction] After an enemy attacks an investigator at your location: Fight that enemy (using either a basic fight action or a Fight ability on a card). (Limit once per round.) [elder_sign] effect: +1. Deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location.
cards.flavor: "Those creatures are definitely gonna know what hit 'em."
cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Guardian cards ([guardian]) level 0-5, Survivor cards ([survivor]) level 0-2, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Daniela's Wrench, In Harm's Way, 1 random basic weakness.
cards.back_flavor: Daniela worked hard to make a name for herself as a mechanic. She'd only just paid off her new garage when Arkham was devastated by a cataclysmic flood, sending her business quite literally underwater. Rather than mope, she rolled up her sleeves, like always, and got back to work. Now she works an extra shift tuning up engines at the new meat-packing factories. But she's started to hear talk about strange things going on in the waterfront district: locals gone missing; corpses drained of blood; and rumors of a shadowy figure that stalks the alleys at night. Daniela knows better than to dismiss these strange happenings as mere circumstance. Whatever it is, she intends to be ready.

cards.name: Joe Diamond
cards.text:
[reaction] After you successfully investigate: Draw 1 card. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1. If you succeed, draw 1 card and gain 1 resource.
cards.real_text:
[reaction] After you successfully investigate: Draw 1 card. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1. If you succeed, draw 1 card and gain 1 resource.
cards.flavor: "I can't stop now. Not when I'm so close to the truth."
cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Seeker cards ([seeker]) level 0-5, Guardian cards ([guardian]) level 0-2, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Detective's Intuition, Dead Ends, 1 random basic weakness.
cards.back_flavor: Joe Diamond has more experience with supernatural nonsense than most. He has developed a keen intuition and a knack for getting to the bottom of even the most uncanny occurrences, helped in no small part by his willingness to get his hands dirty. But in recent weeks, even Joe has been hard-pressed to stay on top of his work. His desk is flooded with photos of grisly murders and reports of disappearances: people from all walks of life vanishing without a trace. Joe isn't sure how each of these events is connected, but he's not about to let the case go cold.

cards.name: Trish Scarborough
cards.text:
You may take an additional action during your turn, which can only be used to evade.
[elder_sign] effect: +0. After this test resolves, you may disengage from each enemy and move to a connecting location.
cards.real_text:
You may take an additional action during your turn, which can only be used to evade.
[elder_sign] effect: +0. After this test resolves, you may disengage from each enemy and move to a connecting location.
cards.flavor: "You're quite good, but nobody can catch me."
cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Rogue cards ([rogue]) level 0-5, Seeker cards ([seeker]) level 0-2, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Covert Ops, Black Chamber Operative, 1 random basic weakness.
cards.back_flavor: Trish Scarborough enjoyed an exciting and dangerous career as a spy for the Black Chamber. She's no stranger to subterfuge, but never expected to be at the center of her own conspiracy when a new director arrived to run the organization. After a series of increasingly menial missions, she was strongly encouraged to "take time for herself." Suspicious of her director's motives, she dug into the Chamber's records and discovered evidence of corruption going all the way to the top - rumors of an organization known as the Red Coterie working behind the scenes. Framed for leaking sensitive information, she's now on the run and driven to restore her good name.

cards.name: Dexter Drake
cards.text: [reaction] After you play an asset: Either return another non-story asset you control to your hand, or play a different asset from your hand (paying its cost). (Limit once per round.) [elder_sign] effect: +1. You may return a non-story asset at your location to its owner's hand.
cards.real_text: [reaction] After you play an asset: Either return another non-story asset you control to your hand, or play a different asset from your hand (paying its cost). (Limit once per round.) [elder_sign] effect: +1. You may return a non-story asset at your location to its owner's hand.
cards.flavor: "I'll show you real magic."
cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Mystic cards ([mystic]) level 0-5, Rogue cards ([rogue]) level 0-2, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): "For my next trick...", The Necronomicon (Drake Translation), 1 random basic weakness.
cards.back_flavor: After finding scraps of the dangerous and mysterious Necronomicon while fighting in the Great War, Dexter Drake wasted no small effort in hunting down and translating more pages. At first, his goal was to keep its evil contained. However, Dexter's curiosity drove him to delve deeper into the profane text, tempted by the promise of "true" magic. Dexter is sure he has what it takes to decode the text: he proved his courage in the war and his resourcefulness on stage. But true magic comes at a cost. Will Dexter prove his mastery over the arcane, or will the arcane overpower him?

cards.name: Isabelle Barnes
cards.text:
[fast] During a skill test you are performing, take 1 direct horror: Commit an eligible skill from your discard pile to this test. After this test resolves, shuffle that card into your deck. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1. If you succeed, heal 1 horror.
cards.real_text:
[fast] During a skill test you are performing, take 1 direct horror: Commit an eligible skill from your discard pile to this test. After this test resolves, shuffle that card into your deck. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1. If you succeed, heal 1 horror.
cards.flavor: "My sister's sacrifice won't be in vain."
cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Survivor cards ([survivor]) level 0-5, Mystic cards ([mystic]) level 0-2, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Isabelle's Twin .45s, Breaking Point, 1 random basic weakness.
cards.back_flavor: Isabelle Barnes has been on the run for as long as she can remember. She finally escaped from the Olmsteads, a family cult who thought of her as the "final piece" for some dark and twisted ritual. She doesn't know what made her so special to the cult. But now, thanks to her sister Jenny, Isabelle is finally free. But freedom comes at a cost. Her sister gave everything to get Isabelle back, and for that, Isabelle intends to make the Olmsteads - and all those who prey on the weak and innocent - pay in blood. Armed with her lost sister's twin .45s, Isabelle can finally turn to face her pursuers head on.

cards.name: André Patel
cards.text:
[reaction] After you succeed at a skill test by 2 or more during your turn: You may take an additional action this turn. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +2. Gain 1 resource.
cards.real_text:
[reaction] After you succeed at a skill test by 2 or more during your turn: You may take an additional action this turn. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +2. Gain 1 resource.
cards.flavor: "All the world's my stage."
cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Rogue cards ([rogue]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Know the Exit, Know the Line, Know the Scene, Weight of the World, 1 random basic weakness.
cards.back_flavor: When André turned 13, his parents scrounged up just enough money to buy him a ticket to the Central Paris Theatre. Enamored by the art form, André quickly became obsessed with the silver screen, working tirelessly to act his way to Hollywood. There, while filming A Cosmic Journey, he experienced inexplicable and world-altering happenings. As the lines between reality and fantasy began to blur in his mind, his peer and friend, Betsy Baxter, suggested a change of scenery. At her recommendation, André packed up and moved to the small town of Arkham, Massachusetts for a much-needed break.

cards.name: Carolyn Fern
cards.text:
[reaction] After you heal 1 or more horror from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset: Discover 1 clue at your location. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1. Heal 1 horror from an investigator at your location.
cards.real_text:
[reaction] After you heal 1 or more horror from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset: Discover 1 clue at your location. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1. Heal 1 horror from an investigator at your location.
cards.flavor: "Our dreams are a window into the hidden truths of not just our minds, but of the universe."
cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Seeker cards ([seeker]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Experimental Psychology, Unbroken Web, 1 random basic weakness.
cards.back_flavor: Carolyn Fern has listened to her patients share their dreams for years, many so vivid they seem like actual memories. But she never expected to experience such things herself. Visions of dark caves deep beneath the surface of the world, of alien creatures creeping in the shadows, and of thousands of strands of glistening spiderwebs. Is her mind trying to remind her of something she witnessed in her past? A place she went? Or is it trying to warn her of something dangerous, something otherworldly, or even something catastrophic still to come?

cards.name: Marie Lambeau
cards.text:
[reaction] After damage is placed on Marie Lambeau: Draw 2 cards and discard 1 of them. (Limit once per phase.)
[elder_sign] effect: +0. If you succeed, heal 1 damage.
cards.real_text:
[reaction] After damage is placed on Marie Lambeau: Draw 2 cards and discard 1 of them. (Limit once per phase.)
[elder_sign] effect: +0. If you succeed, heal 1 damage.
cards.flavor: "I've got one hell of a showstopper in store for you tonight."
cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Mystic cards ([mystic]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Grand-Mère's Charm, Called to Guinée, 1 random basic weakness.
cards.back_flavor: When Marie discovered her Grand-Mère's dark and sordid legacy of blood magic, she did her best to ignore it. It was much easier to just sing in the smoky lounges and packed nightclubs of Arkham, and far less dangerous. But then times got tough. As crowds thinned and patrons grew surly, Marie found herself embracing her Grand-Mère's powers to sway her audience, quieting the rowdy ones and enticing the wealthier amongst them to open their wallets. Relying on her dangerous powers increasingly often, Marie felt they were becoming a necessary tool to get through the day. Surely there would be no cost for this newfound power... right?

cards.name: Miguel de la Cruz
cards.text:
You may take an additional action during your turn, which may only be used to play an event.
[elder_sign] effect: +1. You may add a [[Trick]] or [[Trap]] card in your discard pile to your hand.
cards.real_text:
You may take an additional action during your turn, which may only be used to play an event.
[elder_sign] effect: +1. You may add a [[Trick]] or [[Trap]] card in your discard pile to your hand.
cards.flavor: "I'm more at home out in the wild than anywhere else."
cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Survivor cards ([survivor]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Miguel's Knapsack, Feline Hybrid, 1 random basic weakness.
cards.back_flavor: Miguel never thought he'd find himself managing a stockyard. Having left his native Argentina, he has worked tirelessly to save up enough money to bring his husband Guillermo and their daughter Adonia to Arkham. But now his business is at risk; something has been killing the livestock at night, leaving mutilated corpses in its wake. Stranger still, it's not even killing them for food. But Miguel is more than capable of fighting back: he has tracked this mysterious predator into the local woods, intent on catching it once and for all.

cards.name: Tommy Muldoon
cards.text:
[action] Spend 1 resource, or discard a [[Firearm]] asset you control from play: Play a [[Firearm]] asset from your hand, paying its cost. It enters play with 2 additional ammo on it.
[elder_sign] effect: +1. Place 1 ammo on an asset you control with uses (ammo).
cards.real_text:
[action] Spend 1 resource, or discard a [[Firearm]] asset you control from play: Play a [[Firearm]] asset from your hand, paying its cost. It enters play with 2 additional ammo on it.
[elder_sign] effect: +1. Place 1 ammo on an asset you control with uses (ammo).
cards.flavor: "This uniform means something. I'm reminded of that every time I put it on."
cards.back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Guardian cards ([guardian]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Becky, Loose Cannon, 1 random basic weakness.
cards.back_flavor: While he was working with the Boston Police Department, Tommy thought there was no such thing as real monsters. When he got loaned out to the sleepy river town of Arkham, he learned he couldn't have been more wrong. That was almost a year ago at this point, and despite still being "the new guy," he's pretty sure he's seen far more out on the beat than anyone else on the force. Now he's working hard to prove he's not a laughingstock to the rest of the police department, all while facing off against half the monsters of Arkham. And he's learned that not all monsters have fangs and tentacles.
